Genesis24:21 Monna yo a bego a mo makatse a homola, a tseba ge e ba Jehofa a atlegile leeto la gagwe goba aowa." 
Genesis24:22 Ya re ge dikamela di nwele, monna yoo a tsea lesale la gauta la boima bja seripa sa shekale, le dipalamonwana tse pedi tsa diatla tsa gagwe tsa boima bja gauta ya dishekale tse lesome." 
Genesis24:23 O morwedi wa mang? mpotse: naa go na le sebaka ka ntlong ya tatago gore re robale ka gare ga yona? 
Genesis24:24 A re go yena: “Ka morwedi wa Bethuele, morwa wa Milika, yo a belegetsego Nahoro.”" 
Genesis24:25 Go feta moo, a re go yena: “Re na le mahlaka a lekanego, dijo le madulo.”" 
Genesis24:26 Monna yoo a inamisa hlogo a khunamela Jehofa. 
Genesis24:27 A re: “A go tumiswe Jehofa Modimo wa mong wa ka Aborahama, yo a sa kago a lahla botho bja gagwe le thereso ya gagwe go mong wa ka.”" 
Genesis24:28 Mosetsana a kitimela a ba botsa ka ntlong ya mmagwe. 
Genesis24:29 Rebeka o be a na le ngwanabo, leina la gagwe e be e le Labane; Labane a kitimela go monna yoo, a ya sedibeng." 
Genesis24:30 Ya re ge a bona lesale le dipalamonwana diatleng tsa kgaetsedi ya gagwe, a ekwa mantsu a Rebeka kgaetsedi ya gagwe a re: Monna yo o boletse le nna. Go fihlelela motho yo mongwe; a bona a eme kgauswi le dikamela sedibeng." 
Genesis24:31 A re: “Tsenang, lena ba segofaditswego ka Morena; ka mang yo a emetsego ka ntle? ka gobane ka lokisitse ntlo le sebaka sa dikamela." 
Genesis24:32 Monna yoo a tsena ka ntlong, a phumola dikamela tsa gagwe, a nea dikamela mahlaka le dijo, le metsi a go hlapa dinao tsa gagwe le dinao tsa banna bao ba bego ba na le yena." 
Genesis24:33 A bewa dijo pele ga gagwe gore a je, eupsa yena a re: “Nka se je, go fihlela ka botsa thomo ya ka.” A re: Bolela." 
Genesis24:34 A re: “Ka mohlanka wa Aborahama.” 
Genesis24:35 Morena o segofaditse mong wa ka kudu; o mo file mehlape, dikgomo, le silifera, le gauta, le bahlanka ba banna, le makgoba a basadi, le dikamela, le dipere." 
Genesis24:36 Sara mosadi wa mong wa ka a belegetse mong wa ka morwa ge a tsofetse. 
Genesis24:37 Mong wa ka a ntira gore ka enane, a re: “O se ka wa tsea mosadi wa morwa wa ka go barwedi ba Bakanana, bao ka dulago nageng ya bona.”" 
Genesis24:38 Eupsa o ye ntlong ya tate le lapeng la ka le o tsee mosadi wa morwa wa ka. 
Genesis24:39 Ka re go mong wa ka: Mohlomongwe mosadi a ka se ntatele. 
Genesis24:40 A re go nna: “Jehofa yo ka sepelago pele ga gagwe o tla roma morongwa wa gagwe le wena le a atlege tsela ya gago; nka mosadi wa morwedi wa ka lapeng la tate. 
Genesis24:41 Bjale o swanetse go roba kano ye ya ka ge o fihla ntlong ya ka; ge ba sa go fe selo, o tla lokologa kanong ya ka." 
Genesis24:42 Ka tla lehono sedibeng, ka re: Morena Modimo wa mong wa ka Aborahama, ge bjale o ka atlega tsela ya ka yeo ka e sepelago." 
Genesis24:43 Bonang, ka eme fano kgauswi le sediba sa metsi; ya re ge kgarebe e etswa go yo ga metsi, ka re go yena: “Mphe metsi a mannyane ka pitseng ya gago, gore ka nwe;" 
Genesis24:44 Ka moka a re go nna: “Nwang lena ka bobedi le ka tla le gogela dikamela; Tsea mosadi yo Jehofa a mo filego morwa wa mong wa ka. 
Genesis24:45 Ge nka fetsa go bolela ka pelong ya ka, bona Rebeka a tswa a rwele mogopo wa gagwe magetleng. A theogela sedibeng, a ega metsi; ka re go yena: “E re ka nwe.”" 
Genesis24:46 A akgofela, a theosa pitsana ya gagwe legetleng, a re: “Nwa, ka tla nwa le dikamela tsa gago; Ka gona ka nwa, a nosetsa dikamela." 
Genesis24:47 Ka mmotsisa ka re: “O morwedi wa mang?” A re: Morwedi wa Bethuele, morwa wa Nahoro, yo Milika a mo belegetsego." 
Genesis24:48 Ka inamisa hlogo ya ka ka khunamela Jehofa Modimo wa mong wa ka Aborahama, yo a ilego a nkisa ka tsela e lokilego gore ka ise morwedi wa ngwanabo mong wa ka go morwa wa gagwe." 
Genesis24:49 Bjale ge o rata mong wa ka ka botho le ka nnete, mpotse. Le ge e ba go se bjalo, mpotse; gore nka retologela ka go le letona goba ka go le letshadi." 
Genesis24:50 Labane le Bethuele ba fetola ba re: Taba ye e tswa go Jehofa. Re ka se bolele selo se sebe goba se sebotse ka wena. 
Genesis24:51 Bona, Rebeka o pele ga gago, o mo tsee, o sepele, o be mosadi wa morwa wa mong wa gago, bjalo ka ge Jehofa a boletse." 
Genesis24:52 Ge mohlanka wa Aborahama a ekwa mantsu a bona, a khunamela Jehofa a khunama lefatsheng." 
Genesis24:53 Mohlanka a tlisa mabenyabje a silifera, mafsika a gauta le diaparo, a di fa Rebeka. Gape o ile a nea kgaetsedi ya gagwe le mmagwe dilo tsa bohlokwa." 
Genesis24:54 Ba ja le go nwa, yena le banna bao ba bego ba na le yena, ba dula bosego ka moka; ge ba feditse mesong, ba re: Nthome go mong wa ka." 
Genesis24:55 Ka moka kgaetsedi ya gagwe le mmagwe ba re: “Kgarebe yeo e dutse le rena mo e ka bago matsatsi a lesome; ka morago ga moo o tla sepela. 
Genesis24:56 A re go bona: “Le se ka la nthibela, gobane Jehofa o atlegisa tsela ya ka; e re ka ye go mong wa ka." 
Genesis24:57 Ba re: “A re bitseng kgarebe yeo re botsise molomo wa yona.” 
Genesis24:58 Ba bitsa Rebeka ba re go yena: “Na o tla sepela le monna yo?” A re: Ka tla ya. 
Genesis24:59 Ka moka ba raka Rebeka kgaetsedi ya bona, le mohlokomedi wa gagwe, le mohlanka wa Aborahama le banna ba gagwe." 
Genesis24:60 Ba segofatsa Rebeka ba re go yena: “O kgaetsedi ya rena, mmago ba dimilione tse dikate, peu ya gago e be ya kgoro ya bao ba ba hloilego.”" 
Genesis24:61 Rebeka le makgarebe a gagwe a tsoga, ba namela dikamela, ba latela monna yoo. Mohlanka a tsea Rebeka a sepela." 
Genesis24:62 Isaka a tloga moo sedibeng sa Laharoi; gobane o be a dula Borwa. 
Genesis24:63 Isaka a tswela pele a naganisisa tshemong mantsiboa; a lebelela godimo, a bona dikamela di etla." 
Genesis24:64 Rebeka a emisa mahlo a gagwe le ge a bona Isaka a tshuma kamela. 
Genesis24:65 Ka moka a re go mohlanka: “Ka monna ofe yo a tlago go tswa go re gahlanetsa nageng?” Mohlanka a re: Ka mong wa ka; ka fao, o ile a khupetsa le a ikhupetsa." 
Genesis24:66 Mohlanka a botsa Isaka tsohle tseo a di dirilego. 
Genesis24:67 Isaka a mo tlisa ka tenteng ya mmagwe Sara, a mo rea leina la Rebeka, a ba mosadi wa gagwe; a mo rata, Isaka a homotswa ka morago ga lehu la mmagwe." 
Genesis25:1 Aborahama a tsea mosadi gape, leina la gagwe e be e le Katura." 
Genesis25:2 A mo belegelwa Shimirane, Jokshane, Medane, Midiane, Ishibaka le Shua." 
Genesis25:3 Joksani a tswala Sheba le Dedane. Barwa ba Dedane e be e le Baasiria, Baluthe le Bajume." 
Genesis25:4 Bana ba Midiane; Efa, Efere, Henoge, Abida le Eldaa. Ba ka moka e be e le barwa ba Katura." 
Genesis25:5 Aborahama a neela Isaka tsohle tseo a bego a na le tsona. 
Genesis25:6 Eupsa barwa ba direthe tseo Aborahama a bego a na le tsona, Aborahama o ile a nea dimpho, a di tsea go Isaka morwa wa gagwe, ge a be a sa dutse a sa phela, ka bohlabela, nageng ya ka bohlabela." 
Genesis25:7 A ka matsatsi a nywaga ya Aborahama yeo a e phetsego, e lego nywaga e lekgolo le masometshela-hlano." 
Genesis25:8 Aborahama a gafa moya, a hwa a tsofetse, a tsofala, a tletse mengwaga; a kgobokanelwa setshabeng sa gabo." 
Genesis25:9 Barwa ba gagwe Isaka le Ishimaele ba mmoloka ka leweng la Makapela, tshemong ya Efurone morwa wa Tsohare wa Mohethe, yeo e lego ka pele ga Mamere." 
Genesis25:10 Tshemo yeo Aborahama a e rekilego go barwa ba Hethe, ka moo Aborahama a bolokilwego le Sara mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis25:11 Ka morago ga lehu la Aborahama, Modimo a segofatsa morwa wa gagwe Isaka; Isaka a dula kgauswi le sediba sa Laharoi." 
Genesis25:12 Ye ka meloko ya Ishimaele, morwa wa Aborahama, yo Hagara wa MoEgepeto, lekgoba la Sara, a mo belegetsego Aborahama." 
Genesis25:13 Maina a barwa ba Ishmaele ka maina a bona go ya ka malapa a bona ka a: leitsibulo la Ishmaele e lego Nebayothe; Kadara, Adbeele le Mibsame," 
Genesis25:14 Mishma, Duma le Masa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadare, le Tema, le Jeture, le Nafishi le Kadema;" 
Genesis25:16 Ba ka barwa ba Ishimaele, le maina a bona ka a go ya ka metsana ya bona le ka mesasa ya bona; 12 dikgosana go ya ka dinaga tsa tsona." 
Genesis25:17 Ye ka nywaga ya bophelo bja Ishmaele, e lego nywaga e lekgolo-masometharo-supa; a kgobokanelwa setshabeng sa gabo." 
Genesis25:18 Ba dula go tloga Havila go fihla Shure yeo e lego ka pele ga Egepeto ge o lebile Asiria. A hwa pele ga bana babo ka moka. 
Genesis25:19 Meloko ya Isaka, morwa wa Aborahama ka ye: Aborahama o belege Isaka;" 
Genesis25:20 Isaka a be a e-na le nywaga e masomenne ge a be a tsea Rebeka morwedi wa Bethuele wa mo-Ara wa Padane-Arama, kgaetsedi ya Labane wa mo-Ara maean, bjalo ka mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis25:21 Isaka a lopa Jehofa ka baka la mosadi wa gagwe, ka gobane e be e le moopa; Rebeka mosadi wa gagwe a ima." 
Genesis25:22 Bana ba lwa le yena; a re: Ge e ba go le bjalo, ka ka baka la’ng ka le bjalo? Ka moka a ya go kgopela Morena Modimo." 
Genesis25:23 Jehofa a re go yena: “Go na le ditshaba tse pedi ka popelong ya gago, le mehuta e mebedi ya batho e tla aroganywa le mala a gago; setshaba se sengwe se tla ba matla go feta se sengwe; yo mogolo o tla hlankala yo monyenyane." 
Genesis25:24 Ge matsatsi a gagwe a go belega a phethegile, go be go na le mafahla ka popelong ya gagwe." 
Genesis25:25 Ya pele ya tswa e khubedu, gohle e le seaparo sa boya; ba mo rea leina la Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Ka morago ga moo ngwanabo a tswa, seatla sa gagwe sa swara serethe sa Esau; yo a bitswago Jakobe, Isaka o be a e-na le nywaga e 60 ge a be a ba belega." 
Genesis25:27 Basemane ba gola, Esau e be e le motsomi wa bohwirihwiri, monna wa naga; Jakobe e be e le setlaela, a dula ditenteng." 
Genesis25:28 Isaka a rata Esau, ka gobane nama ya phoofolo ya naga e be e mo latswa, eupsa Rebeka a rata Jakobe." 
Genesis25:29 Jakobe a baka dipitsana, Esau a tla a etswa tshemong, a lapa." 
Genesis25:30 Ka moka Esau a re go Jakobe: “Hle o mphe tatso ya seno seo se sehwibidu; Ka ka baka leo a bitswago Edomo. 
Genesis25:31 Jakobe a re: “Bona, ka go rekiseditse diripa tsa gago lehono;" 
Genesis25:32 A re: “Bonang, ka kgauswi le go hwa; le tshwanelo yeo ya matswalo e tla ntira eng?" 
Genesis25:33 Jakobe a re: “Lehono o tla ntatola; a mo ena, a rekisetsa Jakobe tshwanelo ya gagwe ya matswalo." 
Genesis25:34 Ka morago Jakobe a fa Esau senkgwa le sebjana sa lenti; a ja, a nwa, a tsoga a sepela. Ka gona Esau a nyatsa tshwanelo ya gagwe ya matswalo." 
Genesis26:1 Go ile gwa ba le tlala nageng yeo, ka ntle le tlala ya mathomo yeo e bilego gona mehleng ya Aborahama. Ka gona Isaka a ya go Abimeleka kgosi ya Bafilisitia kua Gerara." 
Genesis26:2 Jehofa a iponagatsa go yena a re: Theogela Egepeto; dula nageng ye ka tlago go le botsa yona. 
Genesis26:3 Dula nageng ye, ka tla ba le wena, ka go segofatsa; gobane wena le peu ya gago, ka tla go fa dinaga tse ka moka, ka phethagatsa kano ye ka e enetsego Aborahama tatago;" 
Genesis26:4 Ka tla atisa peu ya gago bjalo ka dinaledi tsa legodimo, ka nea peu ya gago dinaga tse ka moka; ditshaba ka moka tsa lefatshe di tla segofatswa ka peu ya gago;" 
Genesis26:5 Ka gobane Aborahama o ile a kwa lentsu la ka, a boloka taelo ya ka, ditaelo tsa ka, melao ya ka le melao ya ka." 
Genesis26:6 Isaka a aga Gerara. 
Genesis26:7 Banna ba lefelong leo ba mmotsisa ka mosadi wa gagwe; a re: Ka kgaetsedi ya ka, ka gobane o be a boifa go re: Ka mosadi wa ka; a re, banna ba lefelong leo ba se ka ba mpolaya ka baka la Rebeka; gobane o be a le botse seetseng." 
Genesis26:8 Ge a setse a le moo, Abimeleka kgosi ya Bafilisitia a lebelela ka lefatshetere, a bona Isaka a bapala le Rebeka mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis26:9 Abimeleka a bitsa Isaka a re: “Ruri ka mosadi wa gago; le o boletse bjang gore: Ka kgaetsedi ya ka? Isaka a re go yena: “Ka ge ka boletse gore nka se mo hwele.” 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleka a re: “Ka eng seo o re dirilego sona?” yo mongwe wa batho bao o be a tla robala gabonolo le mosadi wa gago, le o be o tla re sola." 
Genesis26:11 Abimeleka a laela setshaba sa gagwe ka moka a re: “Yo a kgwathago monna yo goba mosadi wa gagwe o tla bolawa.” 
Genesis26:12 Isaka a bjala nageng yeo, le ka wona ngwaga woo a amogela makga a lekgolo, Jehofa a mo segofatsa." 
Genesis26:13 Monna yoo a tswela pele a gola le go feta go fihlela a tsofala kudu. 
Genesis26:14 Gobane o be a na le mehlape, dikgomo, le lesaka le legolo la bahlanka." 
Genesis26:15 Gobane didiba ka moka tseo bahlanka ba tatagwe ba di epilego mehleng ya Aborahama tatagwe, Bafilisitia ba be ba di thibetse le ba di tlatsa ka mmu." 
Genesis26:16 Ka moka Abimeleka a re go Isaka: “Tloga go rena; gobane o na le matla go re feta. 
Genesis26:17 Isaka a tloga moo, a hloma tente ya gagwe moeding wa Gerara, a dula moo." 
Genesis26:18 Isaka a epa gape didiba tsa metsi tseo ba di epilego mehleng ya Aborahama tatagwe; ka gobane Bafilisitia ba ile ba ba thibela ka morago ga lehu la Aborahama, a ba bitsa maina ao tatagwe a ba reetsego ona." 
Genesis26:19 Bahlanka ba Isaka ba epa moeding, ba hwetsa moo sediba sa metsi a madi." 
Genesis26:20 Badisi ba Gerara ba ngangisana le badisi ba Isaka, ba re: Metsi ka a rena. A reela sediba leina la Esek; gobane ba be ba ngangisana le yena." 
Genesis26:21 Ba epa sediba se sengwe, ba lwela seo le sona, a se reela leina la Sitna." 
Genesis26:22 A tloga moo, a epa sediba se sengwe; le ka fao ba ile ba ngangisana; a e reela leina la Rehobothe; a re: Seo ka ka gobane bjale, Jehofa o re diretse lefelo, le re tla phatlalala lefatsheng." 
Genesis26:23 A tloga moo a rotogela Beresheba. 
Genesis26:24 Jehofa a iponagatsa go yena bosegong bjoo, a re: “Ka nna Modimo wa Aborahama tatago. O se ka wa boifa, gobane ka na le wena, ka tla go segofatsa ka go atisa peu ya gago ka baka la mohlanka wa ka Aborahama." 
Genesis26:25 A aga sebeso moo, a bitsa leina la Jehofa, a hloma tente ya gagwe moo. Bahlanka ba Isaka ba epa sediba moo." 
Genesis26:26 Ka morago ga moo Abimeleka a tla go yena a etswa Gerara, le Ahusathe mogwera wa gagwe le Fikolo molaodi wa madira a gagwe." 
Genesis26:27 Isaka a re go bona: “Ka ka baka la’ng le tlile go nna, ka ge le ntlhoile le le nthometse go lena?" 
Genesis26:28 Ba re: “Ruri re bone gore Jehofa o na le lena; ra re: “A go be le kano magareng ga rena, le re tla dira kgwerano le wena;" 
Genesis26:29 mo e lego gore ga o re dire bobe, ka gobane ga se ra go kgoma, re go diretse botse, re go eteletse pele ka khutso; bjale, o tshegofatso ya Morena." 
Genesis26:30 A ba direla monyanya, ba ja, ba nwa." 
Genesis26:31 Ba tsoga ka dinako tse dingwe mesong, ba ena go se nene; Isaka a ba arosa, ba tloga go yena ka khutso." 
Genesis26:32 Ka lona letsatsi leo, bahlanka ba Isaka ba tla ba mmotsa ka sediba seo ba se epilego, ba re go yena: “Re hweditse metsi.”" 
Genesis26:33 A e reela leina la Sheba; ka fao leina la motse ka Bereseba go fihla le lehono. 
Genesis26:34 Esau o be a na le mengwaga ye masomenne ge a nyala Judithe morwedi wa Beeri wa Mohethe le Basemate morwedi wa Elone wa Mohethe. 
Genesis26:35 A kwesa Isaka le Rebeka bohloko. 
Genesis27:1 Ya re ge Isaka a tsofetse, mahlo a gagwe a fifala, a sa kgone go bona, a bitsa Esau morwa wa gagwe yo mogolo, a re go yena: “Morwa wa ka ka.”" 
Genesis27:2 A re: “Bonang bjale, ka tsofetse, ga ka tsebe letsatsi la lehu la ka.”" 
Genesis27:3 Bjale ka gona, ka kgopela gore o tsee dibetsa tsa gago, le sesiro sa gago le bora bja gago, o tswe nageng o ntseele nama ya phoofolo ya naga." 
Genesis27:4 Ndirele dijo tse di bose, tse ka di ratago, o ntlisetse tsona gore ka di je; gore moya wa ka o go segofatse pele ka ehwa." 
Genesis27:5 Ge Rebeka a ekwa ge Isaka a bolela le Esau morwa wa gagwe, Esau a ya nageng go yo tsoma nama ya phoofolo ya naga le go e tlisa." 
Genesis27:6 Rebeka a re go Jakobe morwa wa gagwe: “Ka kwele tatago a bolela le Esau ngwaneno a re. 
Genesis27:7 Ntlisetseng nama ya kgomo, o ntlisetse dijo tse bose, gore ka di je, ka le segofatse pele ga Jehofa pele ga lehu la ka." 
Genesis27:8 Bjale, morwa wa ka, kwa lentsu la ka go ya ka seo ka go laelago sona." 
Genesis27:9 Bjale eya mohlapeng o ntlisetse dikwanyana tse pedi tse dibotse; ka tla direla tatago dijo tse bose, tse a di ratago." 
Genesis27:10 O e tlisetse go tatago gore a je, a go segofatse pele ga lehu la gagwe." 
Genesis27:11 Jakobe a re go Rebeka mmagwe: “Bonang, Esau ngwaneso ka monna wa boya, le nna ka monna wa boreledi.”" 
Genesis27:12 Mohlomongwe Tate a ka ntheetsa, le ka tla tsebja ka moakatsi. Ka tla itlisetsa tshegofatso, e sego tshegofatso." 
Genesis27:13 Mmagwe a re go yena: “Morwa wa ka, thogako ya gago e be godimo ga ka.” Emela feela lentsu la ka, le o ye go nkhweletsa tsona." 
Genesis27:14 A e tsea a e tlisa go mmagwe; mmagwe o ile a dira nama ye bose bjalo ka ge tatagwe a e rata. 
Genesis27:15 Rebeka a tsea diaparo tse dibotse tsa Esau morwa wa gagwe yo mogolo, tseo a bego a na le yena ka ntlong, a di apara Jakobe morwa wa gagwe yo monyenyane." 
Genesis27:16 A bea matlalo a dipudi diatleng tsa gagwe le molala wo boreledi wa gagwe. 
Genesis27:17 Ka moka a nea dijo tse di bose le senkgwa tseo a di lokiseditsego diatleng tsa morwa wa gagwe Jakobe. 
Genesis27:18 A tla go tatagwe a re: Tate; A re: Ka nna yo! o mang morwa waka. 
Genesis27:19 Jakobe a re go tatagwe: “Ka nna Esau leitsibulo la gago; Ka dirile bjalo ka ge o ntaetse: tsoga, dula fase, o je nama, nama, nama, nama, nama, gore moya wa gago o ntshegofatse." 
Genesis27:20 Isaka a re go morwa wa gagwe: “Go tlile bjang gore o e hweditse ka pela gakaakaa, morwa wa ka? A re: Ka gobane Morena Modimo wa gago o di tlisitse go nna." 
Genesis27:21 Isaka a re go Jakobe: “Batamela, ka go kwele morwa wa ka, go sa setswe gore o morwa wa ka Esau goba aowa.”" 
Genesis27:22 Jakobe a batamela Isaka tatagwe; A mo kwa, a re: “Lentsu ka lentsu la Jakobe, eupsa diatla ka diatla tsa Esau.”" 
Genesis27:23 Ga se a ka a mo lemoga, ka gobane diatla tsa gagwe di be di na le boya, go swana le diatla tsa Esau ngwanabo; ka fao, o ile a mo segofatsa." 
Genesis27:24 A re: “Na ka wena morwa wa ka Esau?” A re: Ka nna. 
Genesis27:25 A re: “E batamele go nna, ka je nama ya morwa wa ka, gore moya wa ka o mo segofatse.” A mo tlisetsa yona, a ja; a mo tlisetsa beine, a nwa." 
Genesis27:26 Ka moka Isaka tatagwe a re go yena: “Batamelang, o nkatle, morwa wa ka.”" 
Genesis27:27 A batamela, a mo atla, a nkga monkgo wa diaparo tsa gagwe, a mo segofatsa a re: “Bona, monkgo wa morwa wa ka o swana le monkgo wa tshemo A Jehofa a o segofatse.”" 
Genesis27:28 Ka gona Modimo o le nea phoka ya legodimo le mafura a lefatshe le mabele a mantsi le beine e mpsha. 
Genesis27:29 Anka ditshaba di go hlankale, ditshaba di go khunamele; busa bana beno, le barwa ba mmago ba go khunamele. Go rogakwe yo a go rogakago, a go segofatswe yo a go segofatsago." 
Genesis27:30 Gateetee ge Isaka a feditse go segofatsa Jakobe le Jakobe a segofaditse Jakobe tatagwe, Esau ngwanabo a tsena a etswa go tsoma ga gagwe." 
Genesis27:31 A dira le nama e bose, a e tlisetsa tatagwe, a re go tatagwe: “A tate a tsoge a je nama ya morwa wa gagwe, gore moya wa gago o ntshegofatse.”" 
Genesis27:32 Isaka tatagwe a re go yena: “O mang?” A re: Ka nna morwa wa gago Esau, leitsibulo la gago." 
Genesis27:33 Isaka a thothomela kudu, a re: “Ka nna mang?” O kae yo a tsomago sebata, a se tlisa go nna, gore ka se je pele a etla, ka mo segofatse? ee, gona o tla segofatswa." 
Genesis27:34 Ge Esau a ekwa mantsu a tatagwe, a goeletsa ka mokgosi o mogolo kudu le o galakago le a re go tatagwe: “Le nna, ntshegofatse, tate!" 
Genesis27:35 A re: “Ngwaneno o tlile ka boradia, le o go tsere thoto.”" 
Genesis27:36 A re: “Na ga se ka mo go swanetsego go reela Jakobe? ka gobane o ntirisitse gabedi, wa ntsea bogolo bja ka; le bona, bjale o tsere dithoto tsa ka. A re: A ga se wa mpholosa tshegofatso?" 
Genesis27:37 Isaka a fetola Esau a re: “Bona, ka mo dirile mong wa gago, ka mo file bana babo ka moka gore e be bahlanka.” Ka mo homotsa ka mabele le beine; le bjale, ka tla go direla eng, morwedi wa ka?" 
Genesis27:38 Esau a re go tatagwe: “Na o na le tshegofatso e tee feela, tate? Le ka segofatsa tate! Esau a hlabosa lentsu, a lla." 
Genesis27:39 Isaka tatagwe a mo fetola a re: “Bona, bodulo bja gago e tla ba ka mafura a lefatshe le phoka ya legodimo e tswago godimo.”" 
Genesis27:40 O tla phela ka tshosa ya gago, wa hlankala ngwaneno; ge o tlo ba kgosi, o tla roba joko ya gagwe molaleng wa gago." 
Genesis27:41 Esau a hloya Jakobe ka baka la tshegofatso yeo tatagwe a mo segofaditsego ka yona; moo ka tla bolaya Jakobe ngwaneso. 
Genesis27:42 Mantsu a a botswa Rebeka ka Esau morwa wa gagwe yo mogolo; a roma, a bitsa Jakobe morwa wa gagwe yo monyenyane, a re go yena: “Bona, Esau ngwaneno, o a ikhomotsa, a rera go go bolaya.”" 
Genesis27:43 Bjale, morwa wa ka, kwa lentsu la ka; a tsoga, a tshabela go Labane ngwanabo kua Harane;" 
Genesis27:44 O dule le yena matsatsi a sego kae go fihlela bogale bja ngwaneno bo fedile; 
Genesis27:45 go fihlela bogale bja ngwaneno bo go furalela, a lebala seo o mo dirilego sona;" 
Genesis27:46 Ka moka Rebeka a re go Isaka: “Ka lapisitswe ka bophelo bja ka ka baka la barwedi ba Hethe. 
Genesis28:1 Isaka a bitsa Jakobe, a mo segofatsa, a mo laela, a re go yena: “O se ka wa tsea mosadi wa barwedi ba Kanana.”" 
Genesis28:2 Ema, o ye Padane-Arame, ntlong ya Bethuele tatago mmago; a mo tsea mosadi go barwedi ba Labane ngwanabo mmago." 
Genesis28:3 A Modimo Ramaatlaohle a le segofatse, a le belege le go le atisa, gore le be sehlopha sa ditshaba;" 
Genesis28:4 O go nee tshegofatso ya Aborahama, wena le peu ya gago yeo e nago le wena; gore le be bohwa bja naga yeo le lego bafaladi go yona, yeo Modimo a e filego Aborahama." 
Genesis28:5 Isaka a laela Jakobe, a ya Padanarame go Labane morwa wa Bethuele wa Mosiria, ngwanabo Rebeka, mmago Jakobe le Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Ge Esau a bona gore Isaka o segofaditse Jakobe, a mo romela Padanarama go yo mo tsea mosadi go tswa moo. Le gore ge a mo segofatsa o ile a mo laela, a re: “O se ka wa tsea mosadi wa barwedi ba Kanana;" 
Genesis28:7 le gore Jakobe o ile a kwa tatagwe le mmagwe le a ya Padane-Arame; 
Genesis28:8 Esau a bona gore barwedi ba Kanana ga ba kgahlise Isaka tatagwe; 
Genesis28:9 Ka moka Esau a ya go Ishmaele, a tsea mosadi wa gagwe Mahalathe morwedi wa Ishmaele, morwa wa Aborahama, kgaetsedi ya Nebayothe, gore e be mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis28:10 Jakobe a tloga Bereseba a ya Harane. 
Genesis28:11 A fihla lefelong le lengwe, a dula moo bosego ka moka, ka gobane letsatsi le be le sobetse; a ntsha maswika a mangwe lefelong leo, a a robatsa malaong a gagwe, a robala mo lefelong leo gore a robale." 
Genesis28:12 A lora, a bona lepara le eme godimo ga lefatshe, tlhora ya lona e fihla legodimong; le bona barongwa ba Modimo ba rotoga le go theoga godimo ga yona." 
Genesis28:13 Jehofa a ema ka godimo ga yona a re: “Ka nna Jehofa Modimo wa Aborahama tatago le Modimo wa Isaka.” Ka tla go fa wena le ditlogolo tsa gago naga ye o rapaletsego go yona; 
Genesis28:14 Peu ya gago e tla ba bjalo ka lerole la lefatshe, o tla phatlalala go ya bodikala le ka bohlabela le ka leboa le ka borwa; meloko ka moka ya lefatshe e tla segofatswa ka wena le peu ya gago." 
Genesis28:15 Bjale ka na le lena, ka tla le boloka mafelong ka moka ao le yago go ona, ka le busetsa nageng ye; gobane nka se le tlogele, e bile ga se ka dira seo ka le boditsego sona." 
Genesis28:16 Jakobe a tsoga borokong bja gagwe, a re: “Ruri Jehofa o mo lefelong le; le ka be ka sa e tsebe." 
Genesis28:17 A tshoga, a re: “Lefelo le le boifisa gakaakang! ga se selo ge e se ntlo ya Modimo, le kgoro ya legodimo." 
Genesis28:18 Jakobe a tsoga e sa le mesong, a tsea leswika leo a le beilego mosamo wa gagwe, a le hloma gore e be kokwane, a tshela mafura godimo ga lona." 
Genesis28:19 A reela lefelo leo leina la Bethele, eupsa motse woo o be o bitswa Luse mathomong." 
Genesis28:20 Jakobe o ile a ikana, a re: “Ge e ba ruri Modimo a ka ba le nna le a ntlhokomela tseleng yeo ka sepelago ka yona le a mpha senkgwa sa go ja le diaparo tsa go apara," 
Genesis28:21 Gore ka boele ntlong ya tate ka khutso; moo Morena e tla ba Modimo wa ka. 
Genesis28:22 Lefsika le, leo ka le beilego kokwane, e tla ba ntlo ya Modimo; le go tsohle tseo o tlago go mpha tsona, ruri ka tla go nea karolo ya lesome." 
Genesis29:1 Jakobe a tswela pele ka leeto la gagwe, a fihla nageng ya setshaba sa Bohlabela." 
Genesis29:2 A lebelela, a bona sediba tshemong, le bona, go be go na le mehlape e meraro ya dinku e rapaletse kgauswi le yona; gobane ba be ba nosetsa mehlape ka sedibeng seo, le leswika le legolo le be le le molomong wa sediba." 
Genesis29:3 Mehlape ka moka e be e kgobokane moo, ba kgokolosa leswika molomong wa sediba, ba nosetsa dinku, ba busetsa leswika molomong wa sediba legatong la lona." 
Genesis29:4 Jakobe a re go bona: “Bana beso, le tswa kae? Ba re: “Re tswa Harane.”" 
Genesis29:5 A re go bona: “Na le tseba Labane morwa wa Nahoro? Ba re: “Re a mo tseba.” 
Genesis29:6 A re go bona: “Na go lokile? Bona ba re: “O sa phela; 
Genesis29:7 A re: “Bonang, e sa le letsatsi le legolo, ga se nako ya gore dikgomo di kgobokatswe. Nosetsa dinku le go di fepa." 
Genesis29:8 Ba re: “Re ka se kgone, go fihlela mehlape ka moka e kgobokane le re kgokolosa leswika molomong wa sediba; ka moka re nosetsa dinku.”" 
Genesis29:9 Ge a sa bolela le bona, Ragele a tla le dinku tsa tatagwe, ka gobane o be a di disa." 
Genesis29:10 Ge Jakobe a bona Ragele morwedi wa Labane ngwanabo mmagwe le dinku tsa Labane ngwanabo mmagwe, Jakobe a batamela, a kgokolosa leswika molomong wa sediba, a tlogela mohlape wa Labane ngwanabo wa mmagwe. Fana ka metsi." 
Genesis29:11 Jakobe a atla Ragele, a hlabosa lentsu a lla." 
Genesis29:12 Jakobe a botsa Ragele gore ka ngwanabo tatagwe le gore ka morwa wa Rebeka; a kitimela a botsa tatagwe. 
Genesis29:13 Ya re ge Labane a ekwa ditaba tsa Jakobe morwa wa kgaetsedi ya gagwe, a kitimela go mo gahlanetsa, a mo gokarela, a mo atla, a mo isa ntlong ya gagwe. A botsa Labane dilo tse ka moka." 
Genesis29:14 Labane a re go yena: “Ruri o lerapo la ka le nama ya ka.” O ile a dula le yena kgwedi ka moka. 
Genesis29:15 Labane a re go Jakobe: “Ka ge o le ngwaneso, na o swanetse go ntirela lefeela? mpotse, mogolo wa gago e tla ba eng?" 
Genesis29:16 Labane o be a na le barwedi ba babedi, leina la mogolo e be e le Lea, yo monyenyane e be e le Ragele." 
Genesis29:17 Lea o be a na le mahlo a boleta; eupsa Ragele o be a le yo mobotse e bile a ratwa gabotse. 
Genesis29:18 Jakobe a rata Ragele; a re: “Ka tla go hlankala ka nywaga e supago ka baka la Ragele morwedi wa gago yo monyenyane.” 
Genesis29:19 Ka moka Labane a re: “Go kaone gore ka mo nee go wena go e na le gore ka mo nee monna yo mongwe. Dula le nna. 
Genesis29:20 Jakobe a hlankala Ragele nywaga e supago; le go yena e be e le matsatsi a mmalwa fela, ka lebaka la lerato leo a bego a na le lona go yena." 
Genesis29:21 Jakobe a re go Labane: “Mphe mosadi wa ka, gobane matsatsi a ka a phethegile, gore ka tsene go yena.”" 
Genesis29:22 Labane a kgobokanya banna ka moka ba lefelong leo le a dira monyanya. 
Genesis29:23 Ya re mantsiboa a tsea Lea morwedi wa gagwe a mo tlisa go yena. A tsena go yena. 
Genesis29:24 Labane a nea morwedi wa gagwe Lea Silipa lekgoba la gagwe la mosadi gore e be lekgoba la gagwe. 
Genesis29:25 Ya re mesong, a bona e be e le Lea, a re go Labane: “Ka eng seo o ntirilego sona?” Na ka ile ka hlankala le wena ka baka la Ragele? bjale ka ka lebaka la eng o nfora?" 
Genesis29:26 Labane a re: “Ga se gwa swanela go dirwa bjalo nageng ya gabo rena, go neela yo monyenyane pele ga leitsibulo.”" 
Genesis29:27 Phethagatsa beka ya gagwe, le re tla go nea le yona tirelo yeo o tlago go hlankala le nna ka nywaga e mengwe e supago." 
Genesis29:28 Jakobe a dira bjalo, a phethagatsa beka ya gagwe, a mo nea Ragele morwedi wa gagwe gore e be mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis29:29 Labane a nea Ragele morwedi wa gagwe Bilha lekgoba la gagwe gore e be lekgoba la gagwe. 
Genesis29:30 A ya go Ragele, a rata Ragele go feta Lea, a hlankala le yena mengwaga ye mengwe ye supa." 
Genesis29:31 Jehofa ge a bona gore Lea o hloilwe, a bula popelo ya gagwe, eupsa Ragele a se hloiwe." 
Genesis29:32 Lea a ima, a belega morwa, a mo rea leina la Rubeni. Ka gobane a re: “Ruri Jehofa o lebile tlaisego ya ka; bjale, monna wa ka o tla nthata." 
Genesis29:33 A ima gape, a belega morwa; O itse: Ka ge Jehofa a kwele gore ka hloilwe, o ile a mpha le morwa yo; a mo rea leina la Simeone." 
Genesis29:34 A ima gape, a belega morwa; a re: “Bjale mo nakong ye monna wa ka o tla kopanywa le nna, ka gobane ka mo belegetse barwa ba bararo. Ka gona a mo reela leina la Lefi." 
Genesis29:35 A ima gape, a belega morwa; ka fao a mo rea leina la Juda; le ga se a ka a belega gape." 
Genesis30:1 Ragele ge a bona gore ga a belege Jakobe bana, Ragele a hufegela kgaetsedi ya gagwe; A re go Jakobe: “Mphe bana ba ka, go sego bjalo ka hwe.”" 
Genesis30:2 Jakobe a galefela Ragele, a re: “Na ka legatong la Modimo yo a go thibetsego dienywa tsa popelo ya gago?”" 
Genesis30:3 Mosadi a re: “Bona, lekgoba la ka Biliha, kana ho yena; o tla belega ka mangwele a ka, gore le nna ka be le bana ka yena." 
Genesis30:4 A mo nea Biliha lekgoba la gagwe gore e be mosadi wa gagwe, Jakobe a tsena go yena." 
Genesis30:5 Bilha a ima, a belega Jakobe morwa." 
Genesis30:6 Ragele a re: “Modimo o nkahlotse, o kwele lentsu la ka, a mphile morwa; ka baka leo a mo rea leina la Dani." 
Genesis30:7 Bilha mohlanka wa Ragele a ima gape, a belega Jakobe morwa wa bobedi." 
Genesis30:8 Ragele a re: “Ka ile ka lwa le kgaetsedi ya ka ka mabole a matla, le ka fenya." 
Genesis30:9 Ge Lea a bona gore o tlogetse go belega, a tsea Tsilepa lekgoba la gagwe, a mo nea Jakobe gore e be mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis30:10 Tsilepa mohlanka wa Lea a belega Jakobe morwa. 
Genesis30:11 Mosadi a re: “Go tla sehlopha, ba mo rea leina la Gade.”" 
Genesis30:12 Tsilepa mohlanka wa Lea a belega Jakobe morwa wa bobedi. 
Genesis30:13 Lea a re: “Ka thabile, gobane barwedi ba ka ba tla mpitsa ka lehlogonolo; a mo rea leina la Ashere." 
Genesis30:14 Rubeni a ya mehleng ya puno ya korong, a hwetsa dimandraka tshemong, a di tlisa go mmagwe Lea. Ka moka Ragele a re go Lea: “Mphe di-mandraka tsa morwa wa gago.”" 
Genesis30:15 Mosadi a re go yena: “Na ka taba ye nnyane gore o tsere monna wa ka? le le wena o nyaka go tseela morwa waka diapola tsa lerato? Ragele a re: “Ka gona o tla robala le wena bosegong bjo ka baka la dimandaraka tsa morwa wa gago.” 
Genesis30:16 Jakobe a tswa nageng mantsiboa, Lea a tswa go yo mo gahlanetsa, a re: “O swanetse go tsena go nna; gobane ka go kgethile ka madi a morwa wa ka. Ka gona a robala le yena bosegong bjoo." 
Genesis30:17 Modimo a theetsa Lea, a ima, a belega Jakobe morwa wa bohlano." 
Genesis30:18 Lea a re: “Modimo o mphile moputso wa ka, ka gobane ka file monna wa ka kgarebe ya ka. A mo rea leina la Isakara." 
Genesis30:19 Lea a ima gape, a belega Jakobe morwa wa botshelela." 
Genesis30:20 Lea a re: “Modimo o mphile magadi a mabotse; bjale monna wa ka o tla dula le nna, ka gobane ka mo belegetse barwa ba tshelelago; a mo rea leina la Sebulone." 
Genesis30:21 Ka morago ga moo a belega morwedi le a mo rea leina la Dina. 
Genesis30:22 Modimo a gopola Ragele, a mo theetsa, a bula popelo ya gagwe." 
Genesis30:23 A ima, a belega morwa; a re: “Modimo o tlositse kgoboso ya ka." 
Genesis30:24 A mo rea leina la Josefa; a re: “Morena o tla nkgethela morwa yo mongwe.” 
Genesis30:25 Ya re ge Josefa a belegwa, Jakobe a re go Labane: “Ntloge gore ka ye lefelong la geso le nageng ya geso.”" 
Genesis30:26 Mphe basadi ba ka le bana ba ka bao ka go hlankatsego ka baka la bona, le o ntumelele ka sepele, gobane o tseba tirelo ya ka yeo ka go hlankatsego ka yona." 
Genesis30:27 Labane a re go yena: “Ge e ba bjale ka hweditse kgaugelo mahlong a gago, dula, gobane ka a tseba gore Jehofa o ntshegofaditse ka baka la gago.”" 
Genesis30:28 A re: “Nkgethe moputso wa gago, ka tla o nea.”" 
Genesis30:29 A re go yena: “O tseba kamoo ka go hlankatsego ka gona le kamoo dikgomo tsa gago di bego di na le nna ka gona.” 
Genesis30:30 Gobane e be e le ye nnyane yeo le bego le na le yona pele ka etla, le bjale e atile; mme Morena o le segofaditse ga e sa le ka etla; le bjale, ka tla hlokomela ntlo ya ka neng?" 
Genesis30:31 A re: Ka tla go fa eng? Jakobe a re: O se ka wa mpha selo; ge o ka ntirela se, ka tla busa ka disa mohlape wa gago, ka bolaya mohlape wa gago." 
Genesis30:32 Lehono ka tla phatsa mehlape ya gago ka moka, ka tlosa dikgomo ka moka, dipudi ka moka le dikgapa; le se e tla ba moputso wa ka." 
Genesis30:33 Gobane toko ya ka e tla nkarabela mehleng ya bofelo ge ka etla go le lefsa, yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a nonnego, yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a diilago gare ga dipudi le yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a diilago gare ga dinku tsa dipudi, tseo go thwego di na le tsona e utswitswe go nna." 
Genesis30:34 Labane a re: “Bona, ka rata go ya ka lentsu la gago.”" 
Genesis30:35 Letsatsing leo a aroganya dinku ka moka tse ntsho le tse sootho, le dipudi ka moka tse tshadi tse ntsho le tse tshweu, ka moka tse ntsho le tse di nago le mabala gare ga dinku, a di gafela diatleng tsa barwa ba gagwe." 
Genesis30:36 A bea leeto la matsatsi a mararo magareng ga gagwe le Jakobe, Jakobe a fepa mehlape e setsego ya Labane." 
Genesis30:37 Jakobe a mo tseela dithupa tsa sehlare se setala sa popalara, le tsa sehlare sa hazel le chesnut; a e tlatsa ka methalo ye mesweu, a dira gore bosweu bja lesela bo tswelele." 
Genesis30:38 A bea dithupa tseo a di ebolago pele ga mehlape ka megopong ya metsi ge dinku di etla go nwa, gore di ime ge di tlile go nwa." 
Genesis30:39 Mohlape wa ima pele ga dikota, wa belega dikgomo tse di nonnego, tse sesane le tse tshesane." 
Genesis30:40 Jakobe a aroganya dikwanyana, a bea difahlego tsa mehlape go dithapo tsa dithapo, le tse sootho ka moka mohlapeng wa Labane; a bea mehlape ya gagwe ka nosi, a se ka a e bea ka mehlape ya Labane." 
Genesis30:41 Ya re ge dikgomo tse di tiilego di ima, Jakobe a bea peu pele ga dikgomo ka gare ga mekoti, gore di ime gare ga dithupa." 
Genesis30:42 Eupsa ge e ba dinku e le tse sego kae kudu, a se ka a di tsenya; ba fokolago ba Labane le ba ba fokolago ba Jakobe ba bile bjalo." 
Genesis30:43 Monna yoo a okatsega kudu, a na le dikgomo tse dintsi, le makgoba a basadi, le bahlanka ba banna, dikamela le dipokolo." 
Genesis31:1 A kwa mantsu a barwa ba Labane a re: Jakobe o tsere tsohle tseo e bego e le tsa tatago rena; le go tswa go seo e bego e le sa tatago rena o hweditse tlhompho ye ka moka. 
Genesis31:2 Jakobe a bona sefahlego sa Labane, a bona se se lebile go yena bjalo ka pele." 
Genesis31:3 Ka moka Jehofa a re go Jakobe: “Boela nageng ya borakgolokhukhu ba gago le lapeng la gago; mme ka tla ba le lena. 
Genesis31:4 Ka gona Jakobe a roma a bitsa Ragele le Lea mohlapeng wa gagwe. 
Genesis31:5 A re go bona: “Ka bona sefahlego sa tatago lena, gore ga se go nna bjalo ka pele; eupsa Modimo wa tate o bile le nna." 
Genesis31:6 O a tseba gore ka hlankatse tatago ka maatla a ka ka moka. 
Genesis31:7 Tatago o nthetlile, a fetola meputso ya ka ga lesome; eupsa Modimo ga se a ka a mo dumelela gore a ntshware gampe." 
Genesis31:8 Ge go thwe: “Moputso wa lena e tla ba ba sego kae; ka moka dikgomo ka moka di apere mekotla; le ge a re: Dithupa tse e tla ba moputso wa gago; bjale mehlape ka moka e na le methalo. 
Genesis31:9 Ka gona Modimo o tsere diruiwa tsa tatago le a di nea nna. 
Genesis31:10 Ya re ge dikgomo di ima, ka emisa mahlo a ka, ka bona torong, ka bona dikgapa tse di tlolelago dikgomo tsa ima, tsa lla, tsa lla, tsa lla." 
Genesis31:11 Morongwa wa Modimo a bolela le nna torong a re: Jakobe; 
Genesis31:12 A re: “Emisa mahlo a lena le le bone, dikgapa ka moka tseo di tlolelago mohlape di sekame, di lla gotee; gobane ka bone tsohle tse Labane a di dirago." 
Genesis31:13 Ka nna Modimo wa Bethele, moo o tloditsego kokwane le moo o ntiretsego kano; bjale tsoga, o tswe nageng ye, o boele nageng ya meloko ya gago." 
Genesis31:14 Ragele le Lea ba mo fetola ba re: “Na go sa na le kabelo goba bohwa bja rena ka ntlong ya tatago rena? 
Genesis31:15 Na ga re balwe re le basele go yena? gobane O re rekisitse le a tsea tshelete ya rena ka botlalo. 
Genesis31:16 Gobane mahumo ka moka ao Modimo a a tserego go tatago rena, ka a rena le a bana ba rena. Bjale dira tsohle tse Modimo a go boditsego tsona." 
Genesis31:17 Yaba Jakobe a tsoga, a bea barwa ba gagwe le basadi ba gagwe godimo ga dikamela;" 
Genesis31:18 A tsea dikgomo tsa gagwe ka moka le dithoto tsa gagwe ka moka tseo a di hweditsego, dikgomo tsa gagwe tseo a di hweditsego kua Padanarama gore a ye go Isaka tatagwe nageng ya Kanana." 
Genesis31:19 Labane a ya go kuta dinku tsa gagwe, le Ragele a utswitse diswantsho tseo e bego e le tsa tatagwe." 
Genesis31:20 Jakobe a utswa Labane wa Mosiria a sa lemoge, ka ge a se a mmotsa gore o tshabile." 
Genesis31:21 A tshaba le tsohle tseo a bego a na le tsona; a tsoga, a tshela noka, a fihla thabeng ya Gileade." 
Genesis31:22 Ka letsatsi la boraro Labane a botswa gore Jakobe o tshabile. 
Genesis31:23 A tsea bana babo, a mo rakadisa matsatsi a supago; ba mo tsea dithabeng tsa Gileade." 
Genesis31:24 Modimo a tla go Labane Mosiria torong bosego, a re go yena: “Hlokomela gore o se ka wa bolela le Jakobe e ka ba tse botse goba tse mpe.”" 
Genesis31:25 Labane a kopana le Jakobe. Jakobe o be a hlomile tente ya gagwe thabeng, le Labane le bana babo ba hlomile thabeng ya Gileada." 
Genesis31:26 Ka moka Labane a re go Jakobe: “Ka eng seo o se dirilego, seo o utswitsego, le wa thopa barwedi ba ka gore e be makgoba ka tshosa?" 
Genesis31:27 Ka ka baka la’ng o ile wa tshaba ka setu wa utswa; le ga se wa mpotsa gore ka tla go busetsa morago ka lethabo ka dikosa, tamales le tsite?" 
Genesis31:28 Na ga se la ntumelela gore ka atle barwa ba ka le barwedi ba ka? o no dira selo sa bosilo. 
Genesis31:29 Ka matla a seatla sa ka go go kwesa bohloko; eupsa Modimo wa tatago o ile a bolela le nna bosegong bja maabane, a re: Hlokomela gore o se ka wa bolela le Jakobe e ka ba tse botse goba tse mpe." 
Genesis31:30 Le bjale, le ge o be o rata go hloka, ka baka la gore o hlologetse ntlo ya tatago kudu, le ge go le bjalo o utswitse medimo ya ka ka baka la’ng?" 
Genesis31:31 Jakobe a mo fetola a re go Labane: “Ka ka gobane ka be ka tshogile; 
Genesis31:32 Mang le mang yo o mo hwetsago medimo ya gago, o se ka wa mo dumelela gore a phele. Gobane Jakobe o be a sa tsebe gore Ragele o di utswitse." 
Genesis31:33 Labane a tsena ka tenteng ya Jakobe, le ka tenteng ya Lea le ka ditenteng tsa dikgarebe tse pedi; eupsa ga se a ka a di hwetsa. Ka moka a tswa ka tenteng ya Lea, a tsena ka tenteng ya Ragele." 
Genesis31:34 Bjale Ragele o be a tsere diswantsho tseo, a di bea ka gare ga sebjana sa kamela, a dula godimo ga tsona. Labane a phuruphutsa tente ka moka, eupsa a se di hwetse." 
Genesis31:35 A re go tatagwe: “Mong wa ka a se ka a galefa ka ge nka se kgone go ema pele ga gago; gobane mokgwa wa basadi o go nna. O ile a phuruphutsa, le a se hwetse diswantsho." 
Genesis31:36 Jakobe a galefa, a kgaola Labane, Jakobe a araba Labane a re: “Molato wa ka ka eng? Sebe sa ka ka eng, ge o nthatafaditse gakaakaa?" 
Genesis31:37 Bjale ka ge o nyakisisitse dilo tsa ka ka moka, o hweditse eng go dilo ka moka tsa ka gae? e beye mo pele ga bana beso le dikgaetsedi, gore ba ahlole magareng ga rena ka bobedi." 
Genesis31:38 Nywaga ye masomepedi ye ka bile le lena; Dikgapa tsa gago le dikgapa tsa gago ga se tsa ja, le nna ga se ka ja diphelehu tsa mohlape wa gago." 
Genesis31:39 Se se gagotswego ka dibata ga se ka se tlisa go lena; Ka ile ka rwala tahlegelo ya yona; e nyaka seatleng sa ka, e ka ba e utswitswe mosegare goba e utswitswe bosego." 
Genesis31:40 Ka be ka le bjalo; e omile mosegare le e tonya bosego; boroko bja ka bo be bo hlaelela mahlong a ka. 
Genesis31:41 Nywaga ye masomepedi ye ka bile ka ntlong ya gago; Ka go hlankatse mengwaga ye lesomenne ka lebaka la barwedi ba gago ba babedi, le mengwaga ye tshela ka diruiwa tsa gago o fetotse meputso ya ka ga lesome." 
Genesis31:42 Ge e se Modimo wa tate, Modimo wa Aborahama, le go boifa Isaka, a be a se na le nna, ruri o be o nthometse ka se na selo. Modimo o bone tlaisego ya ka le mosomo wa diatla tsa ka, le a go kgalema bosegong bja maabane." 
Genesis31:43 Labane a fetola a re go Jakobe: “Barwedi ba ka barwedi ba ka, le barwa ba ka barwa ba ka, dikgomo tse ka dikgomo tsa ka, le tsohle tseo o di bonago ka tsa ka; Le lehono, nka direla eng barwedi ba ka, le bana ba bona bao ba ba belegilego?" 
Genesis31:44 Bjale etla, a re direng kgwerano, nna le wena; o tla ba hlatse magareng ga ka le wena." 
Genesis31:45 Jakobe a tsea leswika a le hloma gore e be kokwane. 
Genesis31:46 Jakobe a re go bana babo: “Bokalang maswika; ba tsea maswika ba dira mokgobo; ba ja moo godimo ga mokgobo. 
Genesis31:47 Labane a e bitsa Jegare-Sahadutha, eupsa Jakobe a e bitsa Galete." 
Genesis31:48 Labane a re: “Lehono ka hlatse magareng ga ka le wena.” Ka ka baka leo leina la yona la bitswa Galede; 
Genesis31:49 kua Mitsepha; ka gobane o rile: Morena o lebeletse magareng ga ka le wena ge re se gona. 
Genesis31:50 Ge le ka tlaisa barwedi ba ka, goba le tsea basadi ka ntle le barwedi ba ka, ga go yo a nago le rena; bona, Modimo ka hlatse magareng ga ka le wena." 
Genesis31:51 Ka moka Labane a re go Jakobe: “Kholofelo se, le kokwane yeo ka e hlomilego magareng ga ka le wena se;" 
Genesis31:52 Kholofelo ye ka hlatse, le kokwane ye ka hlatse ya gore nka se fetisetse kholofelo ye go lena, le gore le ka se tsee kholofelo ye le kokwane ye go nkgobatsa." 
Genesis31:53 Modimo wa Aborahama le Modimo wa Nahoro, Modimo wa tatago bona, a re ahlole. Jakobe o ile a ikana ka baka la go boifa Isaka tatagwe." 
Genesis31:54 Ka morago Jakobe a neela sehlabelo thabeng, a bitsa bana babo gore ba je senkgwa; ba ja bogobe, ba dula thabeng bosego ka moka." 
Genesis31:55 Mesong e sa le ka pela Labane a tsoga, a atla barwa ba gagwe le barwedi ba gagwe, a ba segofatsa. Labane a tsoga a ya lefelong la gagwe." 
Genesis32:1 Jakobe a sepela, barongwa ba Modimo ba mo gahlanetsa." 
Genesis32:2 Ge Jakobe a bona seo, a re: “Tse ka diphuthego tsa Modimo; a reela lefelo leo leina la Mahanaime." 
Genesis32:3 Jakobe a roma baromiwa pele ga gagwe go Esau ngwanabo nageng ya Seire, nageng ya Edomo." 
Genesis32:4 A ba laela a re: “Bolelang le mong wa ka Esau; Jakobe mohlanka wa gago a re: “Ka dudile le Labane, ka dula moo go fihla bjale.”" 
Genesis32:5 Ka na le dikgomo, ditonki, dinku, bahlanka ba banna le bahlanka ba basadi. Le ka rometse go botsa mong wa ka mantsu a, gore ka hwetse kgaugelo mahlong a gago." 
Genesis32:6 Baromiwa ba boela go Jakobe ba re: “Re tlile go Esau ngwaneno, le yena o tla go gahlanetsa le banna ba makgolo a mane.”" 
Genesis32:7 Yaba Jakobe a tshoga kudu, a gateletsega, a arola batho bao ba bego ba na le yena, le mehlape le dikgomo le dikamela ka dihlopha tse pedi;" 
Genesis32:8 A re: “Ge e ba Esau a ka tla go sehlopha se sengwe a se hlaba, gona sehlopha se sengwe seo se setsego se tla phonyokga.”" 
Genesis32:9 Jakobe a re: “Wena Modimo wa tate Aborahama, le Modimo wa tate Isaka, Jehofa a re go nna: “Boela nageng ya geno le ntlong ya gago, ka tla go dira botse.”" 
Genesis32:10 Ga ka swanelwe ka yo monyenyane go kgaugelo ka moka le thereso ka moka yeo o e bontshitsego mohlanka wa gago; gobane ka ile ka tshela Jorodane ka lepara la ka; le bjale ka fetogile dihlopha tse pedi. 
Genesis32:11 Ntlhakodise diatleng tsa mogolo’a-ka diatleng tsa Esau, gobane ka a mo boifa, gore a se ka a tla a ntlhaba le mma le bana." 
Genesis32:12 A re: “Ruri ka tla go dira botse, ka dira peu ya gago bjalo ka santa ya lewatle, yeo e ka se balwago ka baka la bontsi.”" 
Genesis32:13 A robala moo bosegong bjona bjoo; a mo nea Esau ngwanabo mpho; 
Genesis32:14 dipudi tse makgolo a mabedi, dipudi tse masomepedi, dinku tse makgolo a mabedi le dikgapa tse masomepedi;" 
Genesis32:15 Dikamela tse masometharo tsa maswi le dipokolo tsa tsona, dikgomo tse masomenne, dipoo tse lesome, dipokolo tse masomepedi le dipudi tse tona tse lesome." 
Genesis32:16 A ba gafela diatleng tsa bahlanka ba gagwe, kgomo e nngwe le e nngwe ka yona; A re go bahlanka ba gagwe: “Tshatang pele ga ka, le bee sekgoba magareng ga mehlape le dikolobe.”" 
Genesis32:17 A laela bahlankadi a re: “Ge Esau ngwaneso a le gahlanetsa a le botsisa a re: “O wa mang?” le o ya kae? le selo seo se lego pele ga gago ka sa mang? 
Genesis32:18 O tla re: Ka ba mohlanka wa gago Jakobe; ka mpho yeo e rometswego go mong wa ka Esau; 
Genesis32:19 A laela wa bobedi le wa boraro le bohle bao ba bego ba latela mehlape, a re: “Bolela le Esau ka lentsu le ge o mo hwetsa.”" 
Genesis32:20 Mohlanka wa gago Jakobe o ka morago ga rena. Gobane a re: “Ka tla mo homotsa ka mpho yeo ka e filwego pele, le ka morago ka bone sefahlego sa gagwe; mohlomongwe o tla nkamogela." 
Genesis32:21 Ka gona mpho yeo ya tswa pele ga gagwe le a robala gare ga lesaba. 
Genesis32:22 A tsoga bosegong bjoo, a tsea basadi ba gagwe ba babedi, bahlanka ba gagwe ba babedi ba basadi le barwa ba gagwe ba lesometee, a tshela moedi wa Jaboko." 
Genesis32:23 A ba tsea, a ba fepa ka nokang, a romela tse a bego a na le tsona." 
Genesis32:24 Jakobe a sala a nnosi; monna yoo a katana le yena go fihla mesong. 
Genesis32:25 Ge a bona gore ga se a mo fenya, a kgoma moela wa noka ya gagwe; modu wa serope sa Jakobe wa sothoga ge a be a katana le yena." 
Genesis32:26 A re: “Ntumelele ka sepele, gobane letsatsi le hlatlogile.” Yena a re: “Nka se go lokolle, ge o sa ntshegofatse.”" 
Genesis32:27 A re go yena: “Leina la gago ka mang?” Ka moka a re: Jakobe! 
Genesis32:28 A re: “Leina la gago le ka se hlwe le bitswa Jakobe, eupsa Baiseraele." 
Genesis32:29 Jakobe a mmotsisa a re: “Mpotse leina la gago.” A re: Ka ka baka la’ng o kgopela leina la ka? Le a mo segofatsa fao. 
Genesis32:30 Jakobe a reela lefelo leo leina la Peniele; 
Genesis32:31 Ge a feta Penuele, letsatsi la mo hlaba, a ema gare ga mmu." 
Genesis32:32 Ka ka baka leo bana ba Baiseraele ba sa jego mesifa yeo e lego ka godimo ga lelokololo la moela go fihla le lehono, ka gobane o kgwathile lerapo la serope sa Jakobe ka gare ga mesifa ya letheka." 
Genesis33:1 Jakobe a emisa mahlo, a lebelela, a bona Esau a etla le banna ba makgolo a mane." 
Genesis33:2 A bea makgoba a basadi le bana ba bona pele, a bea Lea le bana ba gagwe ka morago, le Ragele le Josefa ba bea ka morago." 
Genesis33:3 Yena a tshela pele ga bona, a khunama fase ka makga a supago go fihlela a batamela ngwanabo." 
Genesis33:4 Esau a kitimela go mo gahlanetsa, a mo gokarela, a wela molaleng, a mo atla." 
Genesis33:5 A emisa mahlo a gagwe a bona basadi le bana; A re: Ka mang yo a nago le wena? A re: “Bana bao Modimo a ba filego mohlanka wa gago ka botho.” 
Genesis33:6 Ka moka makgoba ao a batamela, bona le bana ba bona, ba khunama." 
Genesis33:7 Lea le bana ba gagwe ba batamela, ba khunama; ka morago ga moo Josefa le Ragele ba batamela, ba khunama." 
Genesis33:8 A re: “O bolela’ng ka mohlape wo ka moka wo ka kopanego le wona?” A re: “Ba tla hwetsa kgaugelo mahlong a mong wa ka.” 
Genesis33:9 Esau a re: “Ka na le tse di lekanego, ngwaneso; boloka seo o nago le sona." 
Genesis33:10 Jakobe a re: “Ee; gobane ka ka baka leo ka bone sefahlego sa gago, bjalo ka ge eka ka bone sefahlego sa Modimo, le o ntanne." 
Genesis33:11 Tsea tshegofatso ya ka yeo ka le tlisitswego; gobane Modimo o nkgaugetse, le ka na le mo go lekanego. O ile a mo kgothatsa, le a dumela." 
Genesis33:12 A re: “A re sepele, ka tla go etelela pele.”" 
Genesis33:13 A re go yena: “Mong wa ka o tseba gore bana ba boleta, le gore ka na le mehlape le dikgomo;" 
Genesis33:14 Ka kgopela mong wa ka a fete pele ga mohlanka wa gagwe; 
Genesis33:15 Esau a re: “Bjale e re ka tlogele ba bangwe ba batho bao ba nago le wena; A re: E nyaka eng? A ka hwetse kgaugelo mahlong a mong wa ka. 
Genesis33:16 Ka gona Esau a boela morago letsatsing leo a le tseleng ya go ya Seire. 
Genesis33:17 Jakobe a ya Sukothe, a mo agela ntlo, a direla diruiwa tsa gagwe mesasa; ka fao leina la lefelo leo la bitswa Sukothe." 
Genesis33:18 Jakobe a fihla Shalema, motse wa Šegeme, wo o lego nageng ya Kanana, ge a be a etswa Padanarama. A hloma tente ya gagwe kgauswi le motse." 
Genesis33:19 Ka moka a reka sekgoba sa naga yeo a bego a atolositse tente ya gagwe go yona, seatleng sa bana ba Hamoro, tatago Šegeme, ka ditshelete tse lekgolo." 
Genesis33:20 A hloma sebeso moo, a e bitsa Elohe-Baiseraele." 
Genesis34:1 Dina morwedi wa Lea, yo a belegetsego Jakobe, a tswa go yo bona barwedi ba naga." 
Genesis34:2 Ge Šegeme morwa wa Hamoro wa Mohefi kgosana ya naga a mmona, a mo tsea, a robala le yena, a mo silafatsa." 
Genesis34:3 Moya wa gagwe wa kgomarela Dina morwedi wa Jakobe, a rata kgarebe yeo, a bolela le kgarebe yeo ka botho." 
Genesis34:4 Šegeme a bolela le Hamoro tatagwe a re: “Nkgeletse mosetsana yo e be mosadi wa gagwe.” 
Genesis34:5 Jakobe a kwa gore o silafaditse Dina morwedi wa gagwe; bjale barwa ba gagwe ba be ba le masemong le mohlape wa gagwe; Jakobe a homola go fihlela ba fihla. 
Genesis34:6 Hamoro tatago Šegeme a ya go Jakobe go yo boledisana le yena. 
Genesis34:7 Ge barwa ba Jakobe ba etswa nageng, banna ba ba e kwa le banna ba galefa kudu, ka gobane o be a dirile bosilo Baiseraeleng ka go robala le morwedi wa Jakobe; selo seo se sa swanelago go dirwa." 
Genesis34:8 Hamoro a boledisana le bona a re: “Moya wa morwa wa ka Šegeme o hlologetse morwedi wa lena. 
Genesis34:9 Le ile la itseela barwedi ba lena le la itseela barwedi ba rena. 
Genesis34:10 O dule le rena, naga e tla ba kgauswi le wena; tswela pele o gweba ka yona, huma ka yona." 
Genesis34:11 Šegeme a re go tatagwe le bana babo: “A ka hwetse kgaugelo mahlong a lena, le seo le tlago go mpotsa sona ka tla se nea.”" 
Genesis34:12 O se ka wa nkgopela theko ya monyadiwa goba mpho e bjalo, le ka tla e nea go etsa ge o bolela; eupsa mphe ngwanenyana gore e be mosadi wa ka." 
Genesis34:13 Barwa ba Jakobe ba araba Šegeme le Hamoro tatagwe ka boradia ba re, ka gobane o silafaditse Dina kgaetsedi ya bona." 
Genesis34:14 Bona ba re go bona: “Re ka se kgone go dira se gore re nee kgaetsedi ya rena go yo a sa bollago; gobane e be e le dihlong go rena. 
Genesis34:15 Eupsa ka se re tla le dumela: Ge le rata go swana le rena, monna yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa lena a bolotswe;" 
Genesis34:16 Ka moka re tla le nea barwedi ba rena, ra tsea barwedi ba lena go rena, ra dula le lena, ra ba setshaba se tee." 
Genesis34:17 Eupsa ge e ba le sa re theetse gore le bolotse; moo re tla tsea morwedi wa rena ra ya. 
Genesis34:18 Mantsu a bona a kgahlisa Hamoro le Šegeme morwa wa Hamoro. 
Genesis34:19 Lesogana leo la se ka la diega go dira taba yeo, ka gobane le be le kgahlwa ka morwa wa Jakobe." 
Genesis34:20 Hamoro le Šegeme morwa wa gagwe ba tla kgorong ya motse wa bona, ba boledisana le banna ba motse wa bona ba re:" 
Genesis34:21 Banna ba ba na le khutso le rena; ka fao, a ba dule nageng le ba gwebise fao; gobane lefatshe, bona, ba a lekana; re tsee barwedi ba bona gore e be basadi, re ba nee barwedi ba rena." 
Genesis34:22 Ge e ba yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa rena a bolotse go etsa ge a bolotse. 
Genesis34:23 Na dikgomo tsa bona le dithoto tsa bona le dibata ka moka tsa bona e ka se be tsa rena? a re kwane le bona fela, le ba tla dula le rena." 
Genesis34:24 Bohle bao ba tswago kgorong ya motse wa gagwe ba theetsa Hamore le Šegeme morwa wa gagwe; banna ka moka ba otlwa, bohle bao ba tswago kgorong ya motse wa gagwe." 
Genesis34:25 Ka letsatsi la boraro ge ba be ba soro, ba babedi ba barwa ba Jakobe, e lego Simeone le Lefi, bana babo Dina, yo mongwe le yo mongwe a tsea tshosa ya gagwe, a hlasela motse ka sebete, a bolaya banna ka moka." 
Genesis34:26 Ba bolaya Hamore le Šegeme morwa wa gagwe ka bogale bja tshosa, ba ntsha Dina ntlong ya Šegeme ba tswa." 
Genesis34:27 Barwa ba Jakobe ba tla godimo ga bao ba bolailwego, ba thopa motse, ka gobane ba be ba silafaditse kgaetsedi ya bona." 
Genesis34:28 Ba tsea mehlape ya bona, dikgomo tsa bona, le dipokolo tsa bona, le tse di lego motseng le tse di lego nageng." 
Genesis34:29 Ba tsea dithebola tsa bona ka moka, le bana ba bona ka moka le basadi ba bona, ba thopa tsohle tseo di bego di le ka ntlong." 
Genesis34:30 Jakobe a re go Simeone le Lefi: “Le nkgopisitse, la nkgopisa gare ga badudi ba naga, gare ga Bakanana le Baperesia; ka ba sego kae ka palo, le ba tla kgobokana kgahlanong le nna ba mpolaya; ka tla timela, nna le ntlo ya ka." 
Genesis34:31 Ba re: “Na o swanetse go swara kgaetsedi ya rena bjalo ka mogweba-ka-mmele?” 
Genesis35:1 Modimo a re go Jakobe: “Ema, o rotogele Bethele o dule moo, o direle Modimo sebeso, yo a go iponaditsego ge o be o tshaba Esau ngwaneno.”" 
Genesis35:2 Ka moka Jakobe a re go ba lapa la gagwe le bohle bao ba bego ba na le yena: “Lahlang medimo e sele yeo e lego gare ga lena, le hlweka, le fetose diaparo tsa lena." 
Genesis35:3 A re emeng re rotogeleng Bethele; ka tla direla Modimo sebeso moo, yo a ilego a nkaraba letsatsing la tlalelo ya ka, le a ba le nna tseleng yeo ka bego ka sepela ka yona." 
Genesis35:4 Ba nea Jakobe medimo yohle ya basele yeo e bego e le ka diatleng tsa bona, le masale ao a bego a le ditsebeng tsa bona; Jakobe a di uta ka tlase ga sehlare sa tamarisk seo se bego se le kua Šegeme." 
Genesis35:5 Ba tloga ba sepela, metse yeo e bego e ba dikologile, ya ba letshogo la Modimo, ba rakadisa barwa ba Jakobe." 
Genesis35:6 Ka gona Jakobe a tla Luse, yeo e lego nageng ya Kanana, e lego Bethele, yena le batho ka moka bao ba bego ba na le yena." 
Genesis35:7 A aga sebeso moo, a reela lefelo leo Elbethele, ka gobane moo Modimo a ilego a iponagatsa go yena ge a tshabela ngwanabo." 
Genesis35:8 Eupsa Debora mohlokomedi wa Rebeka a hwa, a bolokwa ka tlase ga Bethele ka tlase ga moeika." 
Genesis35:9 Modimo a iponagatsa go Jakobe gape, ge a be a etswa Padanarama, a mo segofatsa." 
Genesis35:10 Modimo a re go yena: “Leina la gago ka Jakobe, leina la gago le ka se sa bitswa Jakobe; Leina la gago le ka se sa bitswa Jakobe, eupsa leina la gago e tla ba Baiseraele. A mo rea leina la Baiseraele." 
Genesis35:11 Modimo a re go yena: “Ka nna Modimo Ramaatlaohle. Atisa o atise; Ditshaba le ditshaba di tla tswa go wena, le dikgosi di tla tswa lethekang la gago;" 
Genesis35:12 Naga yeo ka e filego Aborahama le Isaka, ka tla e nea lena, le naga yeo ka tla e nea peu ya gago yeo e tlago go e nea." 
Genesis35:13 Modimo a rotogela go yena lefelong leo a bego a boledisana le yena go lona. 
Genesis35:14 Jakobe a hloma kokwane lefelong leo a bego a bolela le yena go lona, e lego kokwane ya leswika; a tshela sehlabelo sa dino, a tshela mafura godimo ga sona." 
Genesis35:15 Jakobe a reela lefelo leo Modimo a boletsego le yena go lona leina la Bethele. 
Genesis35:16 Ba tloga Bethele; go be go sa na le bokgole bjo itsego go fihla Efurathe, Ragele a belega, a belega." 
Genesis35:17 Ya re ge a belega, mmelegisi a re go yena: “O se ka wa boifa; le wena o tla ba le ngwana yo." 
Genesis35:18 Ya re ge moya wa gagwe o be o tloga, (gobane o hwile) a mo rea leina la Benoni. Eupsa tatagwe a mo rea leina la Babenjamine." 
Genesis35:19 Ragele a hwa, a bolokwa tseleng ya go ya Efrate, e lego Betlelehema." 
Genesis35:20 Jakobe a hloma kokwane godimo ga lebitla la gagwe; ka kokwane ya lebitla la Ragele go fihla le lehono. 
Genesis35:21 Ka moka Baiseraele ya goga le ya hloma mesasa kgauswi le tora ya Edara. 
Genesis35:22 Ge Baiseraele a dutse nageng yeo Rubeni a ya a robala le Bilha serethe sa tatagwe le Baiseraele ya kwa ka seo. Barwa ba Jakobe e be e le ba 12; 
Genesis35:23 Barwa ba Lea; le leitsibulo la Jakobe Rubeni, le Simeone, le Lefi, le Juda, le Isakara, le Sebulone;" 
Genesis35:24 Barwa ba Ragele; Josefa le Benjamine: 
Genesis35:25 le barwa ba Bilha, mohlanka wa Ragele; Dani le Naftali:" 
Genesis35:26 le barwa ba Tsilipa, mohlanka wa Lea; Gade le Ashere: ba ka barwa ba Jakobe, bao a ba belegetswego kua Padane-Arame." 
Genesis35:27 Jakobe a tla go Isaka tatagwe kua Mamere, motseng wa Arba, e lego Heberone, moo Aborahama le Isaka ba bego ba dula gona." 
Genesis35:28 Mme malatsi a ga Isaka a ne a le dingwaga di le lekgolo le masome a le robedi. 
Genesis35:29 Isaka a gafa moya, a hwa, a kgobokatswa setshabeng sa gagwe, a tsofetse e bile a tletse matsatsi, le barwa ba gagwe Esau le Jakobe ba mmoloka." 
Genesis36:1 Ye ka meloko ya Esau, e lego Edomo." 
Genesis36:2 Esau a tsea basadi ba gagwe go barwedi ba Kanana; Ada morwedi wa Elone wa Mohethe, le Oholibama morwedi wa Ana morwedi wa Tsibeone wa Mohethe;" 
Genesis36:3 le Basemate, morwedi wa Ishimaele, kgaetsedi ya Nebayothe." 
Genesis36:4 Ada a belegelwa Esau Elifase; Basemate a belega Reuel; 
Genesis36:5 Oholibama a belega Jeushe, Jaalame le Kora. Ba ka barwa ba Esau bao a ba belegetswego nageng ya Kanana." 
Genesis36:6 Esau a tsea basadi ba gagwe, le barwa ba gagwe, le barwedi ba gagwe, le banna ka moka ba lapeng la gagwe, le dikgomo tsa gagwe, le diphoofolo tsa gagwe ka moka, le dithoto tsa gagwe ka moka tseo a di hweditsego nageng ya Kanana. A tsena fase pele ga sefahlego sa Jakobe ngwanabo." 
Genesis36:7 Gobane mahumo a bona a be a feta kamoo ba bego ba ka kgona go kgotlelela ka gona; naga yeo ba bego ba le go yona e be e sa kgone go di rwala ka baka la diruiwa tsa bona. 
Genesis36:8 Esau o be a dula Thabeng ya Seire, Esau ka Edomo." 
Genesis36:9 Ye ka meloko ya Esau tatago Baedomo thabeng ya Seire. 
Genesis36:10 A ka maina a barwa ba Esau; Elifase morwa wa Ada mosadi wa Esau, le Reuel morwa wa Basemate mosadi wa Esau." 
Genesis36:11 Barwa ba Elifase e be e le Temane, Omare, Tsefo, Gatame le Kanase." 
Genesis36:12 Timna o be a etelela pele Elifase morwa wa Esau; a belegelwa Elifase Amaleka. Ba ka barwa ba Ada, mosadi wa Esau." 
Genesis36:13 Ba ka barwa ba Ruele; Nahathe le Seraka, le Shama le Misa; ba ka barwa ba Bathemate, mosadi wa Esau." 
Genesis36:14 Ba ka barwa ba Aholibama, morwedi wa Ana, morwedi wa Tsibeone, mosadi wa Esau; a mo belegelwa Esau, le Jehu, le Jaalame, le Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Ba ka barwa ba Esau: Barwa ba Elifase, leitsibulo la Esau; Duka Teman, Duka Omar, Duka Zepho, Mohumagadi Kanaz, 1999." 
Genesis36:16 Kgosana Kora, kgosana Gathame, le moetapele wa Baamaleka; ba e be e le barwa ba Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Ba ka barwa ba Reuele morwa wa Esau; Kgosi Nahathe, Kgosi Sera, Kgosi Shama, Kgosi Misa; ba ka barwa ba Bathemate, mosadi wa Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Ba ka barwa ba Oholibama, mosadi wa Esau; Kgosana Jeushe, Kgosana Jaelama, Kgosana Kora; ka dikgosana tsa Oholibama morwedi wa Ana, mosadi wa Esau." 
Genesis36:19 Ba ka barwa ba Esau, yo e lego Edomo, le ba ka dikgosana tsa bona." 
Genesis36:20 Ba ka barwa ba Seire wa Mohore, yo a dulago nageng yeo; Lotane, le Shoba, le Tsibeone, le Ana;" 
Genesis36:21 Dishone, Esere, le Dishane: ba ka dikgosana tsa Bahori, barwa ba Seire nageng ya Edomo." 
Genesis36:22 Barwa ba Lotane e be e le Hori le Hemame; kgaetsedi ya Lotane e be e le Timna. 
Genesis36:23 Ba ka barwa ba Shobala; Alvane, Manahathe, Ebala, Tsefo le Oname." 
Genesis36:24 Ba ka barwa ba Tsibeone; Aja le Ana: ka Ana yo a ilego a hwetsa dikamela lesokang ge a be a fepa ditonki tsa Tsibeone tatagwe. 
Genesis36:25 Ba ka barwa ba Ana; Dishone le Oholibama morwedi wa Ana. 
Genesis36:26 Ba ka barwa ba Dishone; Hemdan, Eshbane, Jitran, Karan, le ba bangwe." 
Genesis36:27 Ba ka barwa ba Esere; Bilhan le Saavan le Akan. 
Genesis36:28 Ba ka barwa ba Dishane; Utse o mo Aran. 
Genesis36:29 Tse ka dikgosana tsa Bahori; le kgosana Lotane, le kgosana Tsoba, le kgosana Tsibeone, le kgosana Ana." 
Genesis36:30 Kgosana Dishone, kgosana Esere, kgosana Dishane: tse ka dikgosana tsa Hore le dikgosana tsa tsona nageng ya Seire." 
Genesis36:31 Bjale tse ka dikgosi tseo di busitsego nageng ya Edomo pele ga ge bana ba Baiseraele ba busa. 
Genesis36:32 Bela morwa wa Beore a busa kua Edomo, leina la motse wa gagwe e be e le Dinhaba." 
Genesis36:33 Bela a hwa, le Jobabe morwa wa Sera wa Botsera a busa legatong la gagwe." 
Genesis36:33 Bela a hwa, le Jobabe morwa wa Sera wa Botsera a busa legatong la gagwe." 
Genesis36:34 Ka gona Jobabe a hwa le Hushama wa naga ya Batemane a busa legatong la gagwe. 
Genesis36:34 Ka gona Jobabe a hwa le Hushama wa naga ya Batemane a busa legatong la gagwe. 
Genesis36:35 Hushame a hwa, le Hadada morwa wa Bedada, yo a ilego a fenya Midiane nageng ya Moaba, a busa legatong la gagwe; leina la motse wa gagwe e be e le Avithe." 
Genesis36:36 Hadada a hwa, Samla wa Masreka a busa legatong la gagwe." 
Genesis36:37 Samla a hwa, Shaulo wa Rehobothe kgauswi le noka a busa legatong la gagwe." 
Genesis36:38 Ge Shaulo a hwile, Baalhanani morwa wa Akibore a busa legatong la gagwe." 
Genesis36:39 Baali-Hanane morwa wa Akibore a hwa, le Hadara a busa legatong la gagwe; leina la motse wa gagwe e be e le Pau; leina la mosadi wa gagwe e be e le Mehetabele morwedi wa Matrede morwedi wa Metsahaba." 
Genesis36:40 A ka maina a dikgosana tseo di tlilego go Esau, go ya ka malapa a tsona, ka maina a tsona; kgosana Timna, kgosana Alva, kgosana Jethethe;" 
Genesis36:41 Hosana, le Oholibama, le Ela, le Hosana, le Pinone," 
Genesis36:42 le Hosana Kanase le Hosana Temane le Hosana Mibsara; 
Genesis36:43 Kgosana Magdiele, Kgosana Irama: tse ka dikgosana tsa Edomo, go ya ka bodulo bja tsona nageng ya bona: Esau ka tatago Baedomo." 
Genesis37:1 Jakobe o be a dula nageng yeo tatagwe a bego a dula go yona, nageng ya Kanana." 
Genesis37:2 Ye ka meloko ya Jakobe. Josefa, ka ge a be a na le mengwaga ye lesomesupa, o be a fepa mohlape le bana babo; le barwa ba Bilha, le barwa ba Tsilepa, basadi ba tatagwe; Josefa a tlisetsa tatago bona pego e mpe." 
Genesis37:3 Bjale Baiseraele o be a rata Josefa go feta bana ba gagwe ka moka, ka gobane e be e le morwa wa botsofadi bja gagwe. A mo direla kobo ya mebala e mentsi." 
Genesis37:4 Ge bana babo ba bona gore tatago bona o mo rata go feta bana babo ka moka, ba thoma go mo hloya le ba palelwa ka go bolela le yena ka khutso." 
Genesis37:5 Josefa a lora toro, a e botsa bana babo, ba mo hloya le go feta." 
Genesis37:6 A re go bona: “Utlwang toro ye ka e lorile. 
Genesis37:7 Gobane, bona, re be re loga tshemong, le bona, mosese wa ka wa tsoga, le gape wa ema thwii; mme, bona, ba bantsi ba lena le eme ka thoko, le khunamela kabelo ya ka." 
Genesis37:8 Bana babo ba re go yena: “Na ruri o tla re busa?” Goba na ruri o tla re busa? Ba mo hloya le go feta ka baka la ditoro tsa gagwe le ka baka la mantsu a gagwe. 
Genesis37:9 A lora toro e nngwe gape, a e botsa bana babo, a re: “Bonang, ka lorile toro gape; le bona, letsatsi le ngwedi le dinaledi tse lesometee di be di nkhunamela." 
Genesis37:10 A botsa tatagwe le bana babo seo, le tatagwe a mo kgalema a re go yena: “Toro ye o e lorile ka eng? Na ruri nna le mmago le bana beno re tla tla go go khunamela lefatsheng?" 
Genesis37:11 Bana babo ba mo hufegela; eupsa tatagwe o ile a boloka polelo yeo. 
Genesis37:12 Bana babo ba be ba disa mohlape wa Šegeme tatago bona. 
Genesis37:13 Baiseraele a re go Josefa: “Na bana beno ga se ba swara Šegeme? tla, ka tla go roma go bona. A re go yena: “Ka nna yo.”" 
Genesis37:14 A re go yena: “Sepela, o bone ge e ba go lokile go bana beno le mohlape; le o ntlisetse lentsu gape. Ka gona a mo roma moeding wa Heberone, a fihla Šegeme." 
Genesis37:15 Monna yo mongwe a mo hwetsa, a bona a lelera nageng. Monna a mmotsisa gore: O nyaka eng?" 
Genesis37:16 A re: “Ka nyaka bana beso; mpotseng moo ba fulago mehlape ya bona. 
Genesis37:17 Monna a re: “Ba tlogile mo; gobane ka ba kwele ba re: “A re ye Dothane.” Josefa a latela bana babo, a ba hwetsa kua Dothane." 
Genesis37:18 Ge ba mmona a le kgole, pele a batamela, ba mo loga maanomabe a go mmolaya." 
Genesis37:19 Ba boledisana ba re: “Molori yo o a tla.” 
Genesis37:20 Bjale etla re mmolaye, re mo lahlele ka gare ga o mongwe wa melete, le re tla re: “E jele sebata se sengwe, le re bone seo se tlago go direga ka ditoro tsa gagwe.”" 
Genesis37:21 Rubeni a e kwa, a mo hlakodisa diatleng tsa bona; ba re: “A re se ka ra mmolaya.”" 
Genesis37:22 Rubeni a re go bona: “Le se ka la tsholla madi; e le gore a mo hlakodise diatleng tsa bona, gore a mo busetse go tatagwe." 
Genesis37:23 Ya re ge Josefa a fihla go bana babo, ba hlobola Josefa kobo ya gagwe ya mebala e mentsi yeo e bego e mo apere." 
Genesis37:24 Ba mo tsea ba mo lahlela ka moleteng. 
Genesis37:25 Ba dula fase go ja bogobe, ba emisetsa mahlo, ba lebelela, ba bona sehlopha sa Baismaele se etswa Gileada se rwele dikamela tsa sona tse di rwelego dinoko le setlolo le mira, se theogela Egepeto." 
Genesis37:26 Ka moka Juda a re go bana babo: “Go hola’ng ge re ka bolaya ngwanabo rena le ra uta madi a gagwe?” 
Genesis37:27 Etlang re mo rekisetse Baismaele, re se ka ra mo rekisetsa seatla sa rena; gobane ka ngwanabo rena le nama ya rena. Le bana babo ba kgotsofetse." 
Genesis37:28 Bagwebi ba Bamidiane ba feta; ba ntsha Josefa ka moleteng, ba rekisetsa Baismaele Josefa ka diripa tse masomepedi tsa silifera; ba tlisa Josefa Egepeto." 
Genesis37:29 Rubeni a boela moleteng; le, bona, Josefa o be a se ka moleteng; a gagola diaparo tsa gagwe." 
Genesis37:30 A boela go bana babo a re: Ngwana ga a gona; le nna, ka tla ya kae?" 
Genesis37:31 Ba tsea kobo ya Josefa, ba bolaya pudi ya dipudi, ba ina kobo yeo mading." 
Genesis37:32 Ba romela kobo ya mebala e mentsi, ba e tlisa go tatago bona; ba re: Re e hweditse; bjale tseba gore ka seaparo sa morwa wa gago goba aowa." 
Genesis37:33 A e tseba, a re: “Ka kobo ya morwa wa ka; sebata se sebe se mo jele; Ka ntle le pelaelo, Josefa o ile a gagoga." 
Genesis37:34 Jakobe a gagola diaparo tsa gagwe, a apara mokotla lethekang la gagwe, a llela morwa wa gagwe matsatsi a mantsi." 
Genesis37:35 Barwa ba gagwe ka moka le barwedi ba gagwe ka moka ba tsoga ba mo homotsa; eupsa a gana go homotswa; a re: “Ka tla theogela lebitleng go yo llela morwa wa ka.” Le tatagwe a mo llela. 
Genesis37:36 Bamidiane ba mo rekisetsa Egepeto go Potifara, mohlankadi wa Faro le molaodi wa bahlapetsi." 
Genesis38:1 Ka nako yeo, Juda a theoga go bana babo, a retologela go Modulama yo mongwe yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Juda a bona moo morwedi wa Mokanana yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Shua; A mo isa ka gare. 
Genesis38:3 A ima, a belega morwa; a mo rea leina la Ere." 
Genesis38:4 A ima gape, a belega morwa; O ile a mo reela leina la Onan." 
Genesis38:5 A ima gape le a belega morwa; a mo rea leina la Shela, ge a belega kua Kasibe." 
Genesis38:6 Juda a tsea Ere leitsibulo la gagwe, leina la gagwe e be e le Tamara." 
Genesis38:7 Ere, leitsibulo la Juda, e be e le yo kgopo mahlong a Jehofa; Morena a mmolaya." 
Genesis38:8 Ka moka Juda a re go Onane: “Tsena go mosadi wa ngwaneno, o mo direle mosomo wa ngwanabo monna, o godisetse ngwaneno bana." 
Genesis38:9 Onane a tseba gore peu ga se ya swanela go ba ya gagwe; ge a tsena go mosadi wa ngwanabo, a hlobola bofeela bja gagwe, gore a se ka a nea ngwanabo peu." 
Genesis38:10 Se a se dirilego e be e le se sebe mahlong a Morena; ka fao, a mmolaya gape." 
Genesis38:11 Ka moka Juda a re go Thamara morwedi wa gagwe: “Dula o le mohlologadi lapeng la tatago go fihlela Shela morwa wa ka a gola. Ka gobane a re: “E se re go se ka a hwa le bana babo.” Thamara a ya a dula ntlong ya tatagwe. 
Genesis38:12 Mafelelong morwa wa Shua, mosadi wa Juda, a hwa; Juda a homotswa, a rotogela go ba kuta dinku ba gagwe kua Timnathe, yena le mogwera wa gagwe Hira wa Moadulama." 
Genesis38:13 Tamara a botswa a re: “Bona, ratswale wa gago o rotogela Timina go yo kuta dinku tsa gagwe.”" 
Genesis38:14 A hlobola diaparo tsa mohlologadi wa gagwe, a mo khupetsa ka sesiro, a iphuthelela, a dula lefelong le le bulegilego, leo le lego tseleng ya go ya Timina. Gobane o bone gore Shela o godile, a se a newa mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis38:15 Ge Juda a mmona, a nagana gore ka seotswa; ka gobane aa o ile a khupetsa sefahlego sa gagwe." 
Genesis38:16 A retologa, a mmona tseleng, a re: Sepela, ka tla sepela le wena; (gobane o be a sa tsebe gore ka morwedi wa gagwe.) A re: O tla mpha eng, gore o tsene le nna?" 
Genesis38:17 Yena a re: “Ka tla go romela potsanyane go tswa mohlapeng.” Ka moka a re: Na o tla mpha tiisetso go fihlela o e romela? 
Genesis38:18 A re: Ka tla go fa tshepiso efe? Ka moka a re: Palamonwana ya gago ya signet, dipalamonwana tsa gago le lepara la gago di ka diatleng tsa gago. A mo fa yona, a tsena go yena, a ima ka yena." 
Genesis38:19 A tsoga, a tloga, a lapa sesiro sa gagwe, a apara diaparo tsa bohlologadi bja gagwe." 
Genesis38:20 Juda a roma potsanyane yeo ka seatla sa mogwera wa gagwe wa mo-Adulame, gore e amogele peeletso ya yona seatleng sa mosadi yoo, eupsa a se mo hwetse." 
Genesis38:21 Ka moka a re go banna ba lefelong leo: “Mogweba-ka-mmele o kae ka thoko ga tsela?” Ba re: Go be go se na bofebe lefelong le. 
Genesis38:22 A boela Juda a re: “Ga ka kgone go mo hwetsa; le banna ba lefelong leo ba re ga go na go gweba ka mmele lefelong le. 
Genesis38:23 Juda a re: “A a e ise go yena, re se ka ra hlabja ka dihlong; bona, ka romile morwa yo, eupsa ga se la mo hwetsa." 
Genesis38:24 Mo e ka bago dikgwedi tse tharo ka morago ga moo, Juda ba botswa gore: “Tamare morwedi wa gago o dirile seotswa; le bona, o imile ka bootswa. Juda a re: “Mo ntsheng, a fiswe.”" 
Genesis38:25 Ge a belega, a romela lentsu go ratswale wa gagwe, a re: “Ka imile monna yo ba mo belegilego; basomedi." 
Genesis38:26 Juda a ba amogela, a re: “O bile yo a lokilego go mpheta; gobane ga se ka mo nea Shela morwa wa ka. Le ga a sa mo tseba." 
Genesis38:27 Ge a belega, go be go na le mafahla ka popelong ya gagwe." 
Genesis38:28 Ya re ge a belega, yo mongwe a otlolla seatla sa gagwe, mme mmelegisi a tsea tlhale e khubedu a mo tlema ka seatleng, a re: “Yo e tswile pele.”" 
Genesis38:29 Ya re ge a mo swara ka seatla, ngwanabo a tswa a re: “O tswile bjang? ka baka leo, o ile a rewa leina la Perese." 
Genesis38:30 Ka morago ga moo, ngwanabo a tswa, a swere kgama ye khubedu ka seatleng, a e reela leina la Sarage." 
Genesis39:1 Josefa a tliswa Egepeto; le Potifara, mohlankadi wa Faro, molaodi wa bahlapetsi, MoEgepeto, a mo reka diatleng tsa Baismaele bao ba mo theositsego moo." 
Genesis39:2 Jehofa o be a na le Josefa, e be e le monna yo a atlegilego; o be a le ntlong ya mong wa gagwe MoEgepeto." 
Genesis39:3 Mong wa gagwe a bona gore Jehofa o na le yena, le gore Jehofa o dira gore tsohle tseo a di dirilego di atlege ka seatleng sa gagwe." 
Genesis39:4 Josefa a hwetsa kgaugelo mahlong a gagwe, a mo hlankala; a mo bea molebeledi wa ntlo ya gagwe, le tsohle tseo a bego a na le tsona a di tsenya ka seatleng sa gagwe." 
Genesis39:5 Go tloga nakong yeo a mo beilego molebeledi ntlong ya gagwe le tsohle tseo a bego a na le tsona, Jehofa a segofatsa ntlo ya MoEgepeto ka baka la Josefa. Tshegofatso ya Jehofa e be e le godimo ga tsohle tseo a bego a na le tsona ka ntlong le tshemong." 
Genesis39:6 A tlogela tsohle tseo a bego a na le tsona diatleng tsa Josefa; o be a sa tsebe seo a bego a tla ba le sona, ge e se senkgwa seo a se jelego. Le Josefa e be e le monna yo mobotse, yo mobotse." 
Genesis39:7 Ka morago ga dilo tse, mosadi wa mong wa gagwe a lahlela mahlo a gagwe go Josefa; a re: “Robala le nna.”" 
Genesis39:8 Eupsa a gana le a re go mosadi wa mong wa gagwe: “Mong mong wa ka ga a tsebe seo se nago le nna ka ntlong, le o mphile tsohle tseo a nago le tsona;" 
Genesis39:9 Ga go na motho yo mogolo go mpheta ka ntlong ye; ga se a nthibela selo le gatee ge e se wena, ka gobane o mosadi wa gagwe; Bjale nka dira bjang bokgopo bjo bjo bogolo, ka senyetsa Modimo?" 
Genesis39:10 Ya re ge a be a bolela le Josefa letsatsi le letsatsi, a se ka a mo theetsa, a robala kgauswi le yena goba go ba le yena." 
Genesis39:11 Josefa a tsena go yo dira mediro ya gagwe; le go be go se na le o tee wa banna ba ntlo moo. 
Genesis39:12 A mo swara ka seaparo sa gagwe, a re: “Robala le nna; a tlogela seaparo sa gagwe ka seatleng sa gagwe, a tshaba, a mo ntsha." 
Genesis39:13 Ge a bona gore o tlogetse seaparo sa gagwe ka seatleng sa gagwe le a tshaba. 
Genesis39:14 A bitsa banna ba ntlo ya gagwe a bolela le bona a re: “Bonang, o re tlisitse Moheberu gore a re kwere; a tla go nna gore a robale le nna, le ka goeletsa ka lentsu le legolo." 
Genesis39:15 Ya re ge a ekwa gore ka hlatlositse lentsu la ka le ka goeletsa, a tlogela seaparo sa gagwe go nna, a tshaba a mo ntsha." 
Genesis39:16 A dula a apere seaparo sa gagwe go fihlela mong wa gagwe a boa gae. 
Genesis39:17 Mosadi a bolela le yena go ya ka mantsu a a re: “Mohlanka wa Moheberu yo o re tlisitsego go yena o tsene go tla go nkwera.” 
Genesis39:18 Ya re ge ka hlatlosa lentsu la ka ka goeletsa, a tlogela seaparo sa gagwe kgauswi le nna a tshaba." 
Genesis39:19 Ge mong wa gagwe a ekwa mantsu a mosadi wa gagwe, a re go yena: “Se ka seo lekgoba la gago le ntirilego sona; gore bogale bja gagwe bo tuka." 
Genesis39:20 Mong wa Josefa a mo tsea a mo tsenya kgolegong, lefelong leo bagolegwa ba kgosi ba bego ba tlemilwe go lona. Le o be a le gona kgolegong." 
Genesis39:21 Eupsa Jehofa o be a na le Josefa, a mo gaugela, a mo kgaugela pele ga mohlokomedi wa kgolego." 
Genesis39:22 Molebeledi wa kgolego a gafela bagolegwa ka moka bao ba bego ba le kgolegong seatleng sa Josefa; le se sengwe le se sengwe seo ba se dirilego moo, o ile a se dira." 
Genesis39:23 Mohlapetsi wa kgolego ga se a bona selo ka seatleng sa gagwe; gobane Jehofa o be a na le yena, le tse a di dirilego, Jehofa a di dira gore di atlege." 
Genesis40:1 Ka morago ga dilo tse, mohlankadi wa dinoka wa kgosi ya Egepeto le moapehi wa gagwe wa dinkgwa ba kgopisa mong wa bona kgosi ya Egepeto." 
Genesis40:2 Faro a galefela bahlankadi ba gagwe ba babedi, e lego molaodi wa baleti ba dinkgwa le molaodi wa bapepi ba dinkgwa." 
Genesis40:3 A ba golega ntlong ya molaodi wa baleti, ntlong ya kgolego, lefelong leo Josefa a bego a tswaletswe go lona." 
Genesis40:4 Molaodi wa bahlapetsi a laela Josefa gore a sepele le bona a ba hlankale; goba ba dula kgolegong ka nako e itsego. 
Genesis40:5 Ba lora toro ka bosego bjo tee, yo mongwe le yo mongwe go ya ka tlhathollo ya toro ya gagwe, e lego modiri wa dinoka le moapehi wa dinkgwa wa kgosi ya Egepeto, yo a bego a le kgolegong." 
Genesis40:6 Josefa a tsena go bona mesong, a ba lebelela, a bona ba nyamile." 
Genesis40:7 Ka gona a botsisa bahlanka ba Faro bao ba bego ba na le yena ntlong ya mong wa gagwe, a re: “Ka ka baka la’ng difahlego tsa lena di nyamile lehono?”" 
Genesis40:8 Ba re go yena: “Re lorile toro, ga go yo a ka e hlathollago.” Josefa a re go bona: “Tlhaloso ga se ya Modimo, akare? mpotse bjalo hle." 
Genesis40:9 Ka moka molaodi wa bamemi ba dino-seno o ile a botsa Josefa toro ya gagwe le a re go yena: “Torong ya-ka, bona, morara o be o le ka thoko ga-ka;" 
Genesis40:10 Ka gare ga morara go be go na le dikomiki tse tharo tse di bopegilego bjalo ka matsoba a almonde, dikonotswana tsa yona le matsoba; merara ya yona e tsweletsa morara wo o butswitsego;" 
Genesis40:11 Senoelo sa Faro se be se swere seatleng sa ka, ka tsea morara ka o gatelela ka senwelong sa Faro, ka neela senwelo seatleng sa Faro." 
Genesis40:12 Josefa a re go yena: “Tlhaloso ya yona ka ye: Makala a mararo ka matsatsi a mararo; 
Genesis40:13 Eupsa ka morago ga matsatsi a mararo Faro o tla emisa hlogo ya gago le a go busetsa lefelong la gago; o tla bea senwelo sa Faro ka seatleng sa gagwe, o be ka seatleng sa gagwe." 
Genesis40:14 O nkgopole fela ge o dirile botse mahlong a gago, le ge o nkgadile, wa mpitsa go Faro, wa ntsha ntlong ye." 
Genesis40:15 Gobane ruri ka utswitswe nageng ya Baheberu; le mo ga se ka dira selo seo ba ka mpeago ka moleteng ka baka la sona. 
Genesis40:16 Ge moapehi yo mogolo wa dinkgwa a bona gore tlhathollo e botse, a re go Josefa: Le nna torong ya ka ka bone gore ka apere diroto tse tharo tse tshweu hlogong ya ka." 
Genesis40:17 Ka serotong sa ka godimo go be go na le dijo tsa Faro tsa mehuta ka moka. Dinonyana tsa di ja ka mokotleng hlogong ya ka. 
Genesis40:18 Josefa a fetola a re: “Tlhaloso ya yona ka ye: meroto ye meraro ka matsatsi a mararo.” 
Genesis40:19 Eupsa ka morago ga matsatsi a mararo Faro o tla emisa hlogo ya gago le a go fega koteng; dinonyana di tla ja nama ya gago. 
Genesis40:20 Ka letsatsi la boraro, e lego letsatsi la matswalo la Faro, a direla bahlanka ba gagwe ka moka monyanya." 
Genesis40:21 A busetsa molaodi wa matlotlo mosomong wa gagwe; a busetsa senwelo seatleng sa Faro. 
Genesis40:22 Eupsa a fega moapehi yo mogolo wa dinkgwa, go etsa ge Josefa a ba hlatholletse." 
Genesis40:23 Le ge go le bjalo kgosana ya bahlankadi ga se ya gopola Josefa, eupsa ya mo lebala." 
Genesis41:1 Ya re ge nywaga e mebedi e tletsego, Faro a lora, a bona a eme kgauswi le noka." 
Genesis41:2 Dikgomo tse supago tse di nonnego di rotoga ka nokang le ba be ba fula mafulong. 
Genesis41:3 Dikgomo tse dingwe tse supago di rotoga ka morago ga bona di etswa nokang, di sa kgahlise e bile di se na nama a ema le dikgomo tse dingwe lebopong la noka." 
Genesis41:4 Dikgomo tse di sa kgahlisego le tse di se nago mafura di ile tsa ja dikgomo tse supago tse di sa kgahlisego le tse di nonnego. Ka moka Faro a tsoga. 
Genesis41:5 A robala a lora ka lekga la bobedi, a bona mabele a supago a rotoga godimo ga lehlaka le tee, a maemo a godimo le a mabotse." 
Genesis41:6 Le, bona, go rotoga ka morago ga gagwe dihlogo tse supago tse di sesane tsa dikgomo, tseo di rwelego phefo ya bohlabela." 
Genesis41:7 Dikgomo tse supago tse di nonnego tsa ja dikgomo tse supago tse di nonnego. Faro a phafoga, a bona e be e le toro." 
Genesis41:8 Mesong moya wa gagwe o a tshoga; a roma a bitsa boramaselamose ka moka ba Egepeta le bahlalefi ka moka ba yona; Faro a ba botsa toro ya gagwe; eupsa go be go se na motho yo a bego a ka e hlalosetsa Faro. 
Genesis41:9 Ka moka molaodi wa barwedi ba dino-seno o ile a bolela le Faro a re: “Ka gopola dibe tsa ka lehono.” 
Genesis41:10 Faro a galefela bahlanka ba gagwe, a mpea ka tlase ga molao wa baleti, nna le moapehi yo mogolo wa dinkgwa." 
Genesis41:11 Bosegong bjoo re lora toro, nna le yena; re lorile motho yo mongwe le yo mongwe go ya ka tlhathollo ya toro ya gagwe." 
Genesis41:12 Go be go na le lesogana la Moheberu, mohlanka wa balaodi ba bahlapetsi. Ra mmotsa, le a re hlatholla ditoro tsa rena; a botsa bohle ka toro ya gagwe." 
Genesis41:13 Ya re bjalo ka ge a re hlathollotse, gwa direga bjalo; O ile a nkisa mosomong wa ka, le a mo fega mogala." 
Genesis41:14 Ka moka Faro a roma gore a bitse Josefa, ba mo ntshetsa kgolegong ka lebelo; a beola, a fetola diaparo tsa gagwe, a tsena go Faro." 
Genesis41:15 Faro a re go Josefa: “Ka lorile toro, eupsa ga go na yo a ka e hlathollago; le ka go kwele o bolela gore o ka kwesisa toro gore o e hlatholle.”" 
Genesis41:16 Josefa a fetola Faro a re: “Ga se go nna. Modimo o tla araba Faro ka khutso. 
Genesis41:17 Faro a re go Josefa: “Torong ya ka, bona ka eme lebopong la noka." 
Genesis41:18 Ka gona, bona, go rotoga dikgomo tse supago tse di nonnego, tse di nonnego go tswa nokang. Le ba be ba fula mafulong." 
Genesis41:19 Dikgomo tse dingwe tse supago tsa rotoga ka morago ga bona, tse di diilago, tse di sa kgahlisego kudu le tse di se nago mafura, tseo ka sa kago ka di bona nageng ka moka ya Egepeto ka baka la bobe." 
Genesis41:20 Dikgomo tse di sa kgahlisego le tse di se nago mafura di ile tsa ja dikgomo tse supago tsa mathomo tse di nonnego. 
Genesis41:21 Ge ba e ja, go be go sa tsebje gore ba e jele; eupsa ba be ba sa dutse ba le ba babe go swana le pele. Ka moka ka tsoga." 
Genesis41:22 Ka bona torong ya ka, ka bona ditsebe tse supago di rotoga ka lehlaka le tee, di tletse e bile di lokile." 
Genesis41:23 Ditsebe tse supago, tse di omeletsego, tse sesane, le go thuthupa ka phefo ya bohlabela, di ile tsa tswelela ka morago ga tsona." 
Genesis41:24 Ditsebe tse di sesane tsa ja ditsebe tse supago tse dibotse. Eupsa go be go se na motho yo a ka ntlhalosetsago yona. 
Genesis41:25 Ka moka Josefa a re go Faro: “Toro ya Faro ka e tee: Modimo o utollotse Faro seo a tlago go se dira. 
Genesis41:26 Dikgomo tse supago tse dibotse ka nywaga e supago; mesifa e supago e mebotse ka swaga e supago, toro ka selo se tee." 
Genesis41:27 Dikgomo tse supago tse di sesane le tse di sa kgahlisego tseo di ilego tsa rotoga ka morago ga tsona e be e le nywaga e supago; ditsebe tse supago tse di sesane tseo di thuthupisitswego ka phefo ya bohlabela e tla ba nywaga e supago ya tlala.
