Joshua10:34 Jošua a tloga Lakishi le Baiseraele ka moka a na le yena, ba ya Egilone. Ba go dikanetsa, ba go lwantsha." 
Joshua10:35 Ba e tsea letsatsing leo, ba e bolaya ka tshosa, le a roga meoya ka moka yeo e bego e le go yona letsatsing leo, go ya ka tsohle tseo a di dirilego Lagish." 
Joshua10:36 Jošua a tloga Egilone le Baiseraele ka moka le yena a ya Heberone. Ba lwa le yona. 
Joshua10:37 Ba e tsea, ba e bolaya ka tshosa, kgosi ya yona, le metse ya yona ka moka le meoya ka moka yeo e bego e le go yona. A sa tlogele yo a setsego, bjalo ka ge a dirile kua Egilone; eupsa a e roga le meoya ka moka yeo e bego e le ka gare ga yona." 
Joshua10:38 Jošua le Baiseraele ka moka ba boela Debiri; le a lwa. 
Joshua10:39 A e tsea le kgosi ya yona le metse ya yona ka moka; ba ba bolaya ka bogale bja tshosa, ba roga meoya ka moka yeo e bego e le go yona; o be a se na motho; Ka gona a dira Heberone, le Debiri, le kgosi ya yona; bjalo ka ge a dirile Libina le kgosi ya yona." 
Joshua10:40 Ka gona Jošua a thopa naga yeo ka moka, dithaba, le Borwa, le naga ya dithaba, le meboto le dikgosi tsa tsona ka moka;" 
Joshua10:41 Jošua a ba bolaya go tloga Kadeshebarnea go fihla Gasa le naga ka moka ya Goshene go fihla Gibeone. 
Joshua10:42 Dikgosi tse ka moka le naga ya tsona Jošua a di thopa gatee-tee, ka gobane Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele o be a lwela Baiseraele." 
Joshua10:43 Jošua le Baiseraele ka moka ba boela mesaseng ya Gilegala. 
Joshua11:1 Ge Jabini kgosi ya Hatsore a ekwa ka seo, a romela go Jobabe kgosi ya Madone le kgosi ya Shimrone le kgosi ya Asafa a re:" 
Joshua11:1 Ge Jabini kgosi ya Hatsore a ekwa ka seo, a romela go Jobabe kgosi ya Madone le kgosi ya Shimrone le kgosi ya Asafa a re:" 
Joshua11:2 Le go dikgosi tseo di bego di le ka leboa dithabeng, le meeding, le ka borwa bja Kinerothe, le moeding le ka bodikala bja Doro;" 
Joshua11:3 Le Bakanana ka bohlabela le ka bodikala, le Baamore, le Bahethe, le Baperise, le Bajebuse nageng ya dithabeng, le Baheve ka tlase ga Hermone nageng ya Mitsepha." 
Joshua11:4 Ba tswa, bona le madira a bona ka moka a na le bona, batho ba bantsi, e lego dihlakahlakang le lebopong la lewatle ka bontsi, ba swere dipere le dikoloi tsa ntwa tse dintsi kudu." 
Joshua11:5 Dikgosi tse ka moka di kgobokana, tsa tla tsa hloma mesasa metsing a Meromo go yo lwa le Baiseraele." 
Joshua11:6 Jehofa a re go Josua: “O se ka wa boifa ka baka la bona, gobane gosasa mo e ka bago ka nako ye ka tla gafa bahlanka ka moka ba Baiseraele bao ba kokobetsego; ba be ba kgaola dipere tsa bona, ba fisa dikoloi tsa bona tsa ntwa ka mollo." 
Joshua11:7 Ka gona Jošua a tla le batho ka moka ba ntwa le yena, ba ba lwantsha kgauswi le metsi a Meromo gateetee; ba wela godimo ga bona." 
Joshua11:8 Jehofa a ba gafela diatleng tsa Baiseraele, bao ba ilego ba ba otla, a ba kitimisa go fihla Sidone e kgolo, le Misrefothemaime le moeding wa Mitsepha ka bohlabela. Ba ba otla go fihlela go se na yo a setsego." 
Joshua11:9 Jošua a ba dira bjalo ka ge Jehofa a mo laetse, a akgofisa dipere tsa bona, a fisa dikoloi tsa bona tsa ntwa ka mollo." 
Joshua11:10 Ka nako yeo Jošua a boela morago, a thopa Hatsore, a bolaya kgosi ya yona ka tshosa, gobane Hatsora e be e le hlogo ya mebuso yeo ka moka." 
Joshua11:11 Ba bolaya meoya ka moka yeo e bego e le go yona ka bogale bja tshosa; go be go se na motho aa a hemago; a fisa Hatsore ka mollo. 
Joshua11:12 Jošua a tsea metse ka moka ya dikgosi tseo le dikgosi ka moka tsa yona, a e bolaya ka tshosa, a e fedisa ka mo go feletsego, go etsa ge Moše mohlanka wa Jehofa a laetse." 
Joshua11:13 Eupsa ge e le metse yeo e setsego, Baiseraele ga se ya ka ya fisa le e tee ya yona, ge e se Hatsore feela; ya fisa Jošua." 
Joshua11:14 Dithebola ka moka tsa metse ye le diruiwa tseo bana ba Baiseraele ba ilego ba di thopa; eupsa ba bolaya motho yo mongwe le yo mongwe ka bogale bja tshosa go fihlela ba ba fedisa, le ba se dumelele motho yo a hemago." 
Joshua11:15 Go etsa ge Jehofa a laetse Moše mohlanka wa gagwe, Moše o ile a laela Josua le Josua a dira bjalo; a ka se fedise selo le ge e le sefe seo Jehofa a se laetsego Moše." 
Joshua11:16 Ka gona Jošua a tsea naga yeo ka moka, naga ya dithaba, le Borwa ka moka, le naga ka moka ya Goshene, moedi, lesoka, thaba ya Baiseraele le moedi wa yona;" 
Joshua11:17 go tloga Thabeng ya Halaka, yeo e rotogelago Seire, go fihla Baali-gade moeding wa Libanoni ka tlase ga Thaba ya Hermone; a tsea dikgosi tsa bona ka moka, a di bolaya, a di bolaya." 
Joshua11:18 Jošua a lwa le dikgosi tseo ka moka. 
Joshua11:19 Go be go se na motse wo o dirilego khutso le bana ba Baiseraele ge e se Baheve, badudi ba Gibeone; ba bangwe ka moka a ba eta pele ntweng." 
Joshua11:20 Gobane e be e le go thatafatsa dipelo tsa bona, gore ba tle ba lwe le Baiseraele ntweng, gore a ba tlisetse thogako, gore ba se ka ba gaugela, eupsa ba hwe, go etsa ge Jehofa a laetse." 
Joshua11:21 Ka nako yeo Jošua a tla a fedisa Baanaki tikologong ya dithaba, Heberone, Debiri, Anabe, le tikologong ka moka ya dithaba ya Juda le tikologong ka moka ya dithaba ya Baiseraele; Jošua a ba roga le metse ya bona." 
Joshua11:22 Go be go se na le o tee wa Baanaki yo a setsego nageng ya bana ba Baiseraele; 
Joshua11:23 Ka gona Jošua a tsea naga ka moka go ya ka tsohle tseo Jehofa a di boletsego le Moše; Jošua a e nea Baisraele gore e be bohwa bja bona, go ya ka dihlopha tsa bona go ya ka malapa a bona. Ka moka lefatshe le ile la khutsa ntweng." 
Joshua12:1 Ka dikgosi tsa naga tseo di ilego tsa hlasela bana ba Baiseraele le tsa tsea naga ya tsona ka mosola wa Jorodane go ya bohlaba bja letsatsi, go tloga nokang ya Arnone go fihla thabeng ya Hermone, le lesoka ka moka leo le bego le le ka thokong ya Jorodane go ya bohlaba bja letsatsi." 
Joshua12:2 Gobane Sihone kgosi ya Baamore yo a bego a dula Heshibone o be a busa go tloga Aroere yeo e lego lebopong la noka ya Arnone, go tloga bogareng bja noka le go tloga bogareng bja noka le seripa-gare sa Gileada Nokang ya Jaboko, e lego mollwane wa naga. Barwa ba Amoni;" 
Joshua12:3 Go tloga lesokang go ya lewatleng la Kinerothe ka bohlabela, go fihla lewatleng la lesoka, Lewatleng la Letswai ka bohlabela, tseleng ya go ya Betheshimothe; go tloga ka borwa, ka tlase ga Ashdode-pisga;" 
Joshua12:4 le mollwane wa Ogo kgosi ya Bashane, yo a setsego go masaledi a ditshaba tse dikgolo, ao a bego a dula Asitarothe le Edere;" 
Joshua12:5 A busa thabeng ya Heremone, le Salaka, le Bashane ka moka, go fihla mollwaneng wa Bageshure le Bahage, le seripa sa Gileade, mollwaneng wa Sihone kgosi ya Heshibone." 
Joshua12:6 Ba fenya Moše mohlanka wa Jehofa le bana ba Baiseraele; Moše mohlanka wa Jehofa a e nea Barubeni le Bagada le seripa sa moloko wa Manase gore e be thoto. 
Joshua12:7 Tse ka dikgosi tsa naga yeo Jošua le bana ba Baiseraele ba e thopilego ka lehlakoreng la bodikala la Jorodane, go tloga ka Baali-gade moeding wa moela wa Libanone go fihla tikologong ya dithaba ya Halaka yeo e rotogela Seire; yeo Jošua a e neilego meloko ya Baiseraele gore e be bohwa go ya ka mabopong a yona;" 
Joshua12:8 dithabeng, meeding, lesokang, didibeng, lesokang le Borwa; le Bahethe, le Baamore, le Bakanana, le Baperese, le Bahethe, le Bajebuse;" 
Joshua12:9 le kgosi ya Jeriko, e tee; kgosi ya Ai e lebane le Bethele;" 
Joshua12:10 le kgosi ya Jerusalema, e nnosi; yo mongwe ka kgosi ya Heberone;" 
Joshua12:11 le kgosi ya Jaremuthe, e tee; kgosi ya Lakishi e nnosi;" 
Joshua12:12 le kgosi ya Egilone, e tee; yo mongwe ka kgosi ya Gesere;" 
Joshua12:13 le kgosi ya Debiri, e tee; kgosi e nnosi ya Gedere;" 
Joshua12:14 le kgosi ya Horma, e tee; kgosi ya Arade feela;" 
Joshua12:15 le kgosi ya Libina, e tee; ka kgosi ya Adulame feela;" 
Joshua12:16 le kgosi ya Makada, e tee; kgosi ya Bethele feela;" 
Joshua12:17 le kgosi ya Tapua e nnosi; kgosi ya Hefere, e tee;" 
Joshua12:18 le kgosi ya Afeka, e tee; ka kgosi ya Latsaro fela;" 
Joshua12:19 le kgosi ya Madone, a nnosi; kgosi ya Hatsore, e tee;" 
Joshua12:20 le kgosi ya Shimirone-merone, e tee; kgosi ya Asafa, e tee;" 
Joshua12:21 le kgosi ya Taanage, yena a nnosi; kgosi e nnosi ya Megido;" 
Joshua12:22 le kgosi ya Kadeshe, e tee; kgosi ya Jokneama kua Karamele;" 
Joshua12:23 le kgosi ya Doro lebopong la Doro, e tee; kgosi ya dinaga tsa Gilegala e nnosi;" 
Joshua12:24 le kgosi ya Tirisa, e tee; dikgosi tse masometharo-tee ka moka." 
Joshua13:1 Bjale Jošua o be a tsofetse e bile a swerwe ka nywaga; Morena a re go yena: “O tsofetse, o swere mengwaga ye mentsi;" 
Joshua13:2 Naga ye e setsego ka ye: naga ka moka ya Bafilisitia le naga ka moka ya Bagesuri; 
Joshua13:3 Go tloga Sihoro, yeo e lego ka pele ga Egepeto, go fihla mollwaneng wa Ekrone ka leboa, moo Bakanana ba bego ba balwa gona, go ya ka palo ya marena a Bafilisitia, e lego marena a mahlano; le Bagase, le Baashidoda, le Baekrone, le Bagathe, le Baekrone; le Baavi:" 
Joshua13:4 Go tloga ka borwa naga ka moka ya Bakanana le Meara yeo e lebeletsego Sidone, go fihla Afeka, mollwaneng wa Baamore;" 
Joshua13:5 naga ya Gibala le Libanone ka moka go ya go hlaba ga letsatsi, go tloga Baali-gade maotong a Thaba ya Hermone go fihla Hamathe." 
Joshua13:6 Ka tla raka baagi ka moka ba tikologong ya dithaba pele ga bana ba Baiseraele go tloga Libanoni go fihla Misrefothe-Maime le Basidonia ka moka; eupsa le abela bana ba Baiseraele ka matengwa gore e be bohwa bjalo ka ge ka le laetse. 
Joshua13:7 Bjale arolelana naga ye gore e be bohwa go meloko ye senyane le seripa sa moloko wa Manase. 
Joshua13:8 Barubeni le Bagada ba amogetse bohwa bja bona bjo Moše a ba filego bjona, ka mosola wa Jorodane ka bohlabela, go etsa ge Moše mohlanka wa Jehofa a ba file." 
Joshua13:9 Go tloga Aroere yeo e lego lebopong la noka ya Arnone le motse wo o lego gare ga noka le lesokang ka moka go tloga Medeba go fihla Dibone; 
Joshua13:10 le metse ka moka ya Sihone kgosi ya Baamore, yo a busitsego Heshibone, go fihla mollwaneng wa bana ba Amoni;" 
Joshua13:11 Gileade, le mollwane wa Bageshure le Bahage, le dithaba ka moka tsa Heremone, le Bashani ka moka go fihla Salaka;" 
Joshua13:12 Mmuso ka moka wa Ogo kua Bashane, yo a ilego a busa kua Ashtarothe le kua Edere, yo a setsego go masaledi a Eferaime; gobane ba ile ba fenya Moše le ba ba raka." 
Joshua13:13 Le ge go le bjalo bana ba Baiseraele ga se ba raka Bageshure goba Bamagi, eupsa Bageshure le Bamagi ba dula gare ga Baiseraele go fihla le lehono." 
Joshua13:14 Fela moloko wa Lefi a se nee bohwa; dihlabelo tsa go fiswa tsa Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele ka bohwa bja bona, bjalo ka ge a ba boditse." 
Joshua13:15 Moše a nea bana ba Rubeni bohwa go ya ka malapa a bona. 
Joshua13:16 Mollwane wa bona o be o tloga Aroere, yeo e lego lebopong la noka ya Arnone, le motse wo o lego gare ga noka, le lesokang ka moka leo le lego kgauswi le Medeba." 
Joshua13:17 Heshibone le metse ya yona ka moka yeo e lego lebaleng la tlasana; Dibone, le Mothe-bala, le Bethe-Baali-mione;" 
Joshua13:18 le Jahase le Kademothe le Mefathe; 
Joshua13:19 Kiriathaime, le Sibema, le Tsarethe-Sahare, thabeng ya moeding;" 
Joshua13:20 le Bethe-Peore, le Ashdode, le Pisga, le Bethe-Jeshimothe;" 
Joshua13:21 le metse ka moka ya lesoka, le mmuso ka moka wa Sihone kgosi ya Baamore, yo a bego a busa kua Heshibone, yo Moše a mo bolailego, le dikgosana tsa Midiane, Evi, Rekame, le Tsure, le Hure, le Reba, ba dikgosana tsa Midiane. Sihone, yo a dulago nageng yeo." 
Joshua13:22 Balaame morwa wa Beoro, monoge, a bolaya bana ba Baiseraele ka tshosa gare ga bao ba bolailwego ka bona." 
Joshua13:23 Mollwane wa barwa ba Rubeni e be e le noka ya Jorodane le mollwane wa yona. Ye ka bohwa bja bana ba Rubeni go ya ka malapa a bona, metse le metsana ya bona." 
Joshua13:24 Moše a nea moloko wa Gada bohwa go ya ka malapa a bona. 
Joshua13:25 Naga ya bona e be e le Jasere, le metse ka moka ya Gileada, le seripa sa naga ya bana ba Amoni, go fihla Aroere yeo e lego ka pele ga Raba;" 
Joshua13:26 le go tloga Heshibone go fihla RamateMitsepha le Betonime; le go tloga Mahanaime go fihla mollwaneng wa Debiri; 
Joshua13:27 lebaleng, Bethe-rame, Bethe-nimera, Sukothe, Tsafone, le mmuso ka moka wa Sihone kgosi ya Heshibone, le noka ya Jorodane le naga ya gagwe, go fihla mafelelong a lewatle la Kinerete ka lehlakoreng le lengwe la Jorodane; ka bohlabela." 
Joshua13:28 Ye ka bohwa bja barwa ba Gade go ya ka malapa a bona, metse le madulo a bona." 
Joshua13:29 Moše a nea seripa sa moloko wa Manase bohwa, le se e be e le thoto ya seripa sa moloko wa bana ba Manase go ya ka malapa a bona." 
Joshua13:30 Mollwane wa bona o be o tloga Mahanaime, Bashani ka moka, mmuso ka moka wa Ogo kgosi ya Bashane le metse ka moka ya Jaire kua Bashani, metse e masometshela;" 
Joshua13:31 Seripa sa Gileade le Ashtarothe le Edere, metse ya mmuso wa Ogo kua Bashane, e be e le ya bana ba Magire morwa wa Manase, le seripa sa bana ba Magire go ya ka malapa a bona." 
Joshua13:32 Tse ka bohwa bjo Moše a bo abetsego lesokang la Moaba ka mosola wa Noka ya Jorodane kua Jeriko, ka bohlabela." 
Joshua13:33 Eupsa moloko wa Lefi Moše ga se a ka a nea bohwa; Morena Modimo wa Baiseraele e be e le bohwa bja bona, bjalo ka ge a ba holofeditse." 
Joshua14:1 Ka mafa ao bana ba Baiseraele ba a abetsego naga ya Kanana, ao moperisita Eleasara le Jošua morwa wa Nuni le dihlogo tsa malapa a botatago bana ba Baiseraele ba a abetsego bohwa bja bona." 
Joshua14:2 Bohwa bja bona e be e le ka matengwa, bjalo ka ge Jehofa a laetse ka seatla sa Moše, ka meloko e senyane le seripa." 
Joshua14:3 Gobane Moše o be a file bohwa bja meloko ye mebedi le seripa sa moloko wo o lego ka mosola wa Jorodane; 
Joshua14:4 Gobane barwa ba Josefa e be e le meloko e mebedi, e lego Manase le Eferaime; ka fao ga se ba ka ba fa Balefi kabelo nageng, ge e se metse ya go dula go yona, le mafulo a bona bakang sa dikgomo tsa bona le maruo a bona." 
Joshua14:5 Go etsa ge Jehofa a laetse Moše, bana ba Baiseraele ba dira bjalo le ba arola naga." 
Joshua14:6 Ka moka bana ba Juda ba tla go Jošua kua Gilegala, le Kalebe morwa wa Jefune wa Mokani a re go yena: “O tseba taba yeo Jehofa a e boditsego Moše monna wa Modimo mabapi le nna le wena kua Kadeshebarnea.”" 
Joshua14:7 Ka be ka na le nywaga e masomenne ge Moše mohlanka wa Jehofa a be a nthoma go tswa Kadeshe-Barnea go yo hlola naga; ka mo rera gape bjalo ka ge go be go le ka pelong ya ka. 
Joshua14:8 Lega go le bjalo bana beso bao ba ilego ba rotoga le nna ba ile ba tolosa pelo ya setshaba, eupsa nna ka ile ka latela Jehofa Modimo wa ka ka mo go feletsego." 
Joshua14:9 Moše a ikana letsatsing leo, a re: “Ruri naga yeo maoto a gago a gatago go yona e tla ba bohwa bja gago le bja bana ba gago ka mo go sa felego, ka gobane o latetse Jehofa Modimo wa ka ka mo go feletsego.”" 
Joshua14:10 Bjale, mo, Jehofa o ntira gore ka phele nywaga ye e masomenne-hlano, go etsa ge a boletse, go tloga nakong yeo Jehofa a boditsego Moše lentsu le, ge bana ba Baiseraele ba be ba sepela-sepela lesokang; le bjale, bona, matsatsi a masome a masometharo le mengwaga ye mehlano." 
Joshua14:11 Ka matla lehono go etsa ge ka be ka le matla letsatsing leo Moše a nthomilego ka lona; bjalo ka ge e be e le maatla a ka ka nako yeo, le maatla a ka bjale a ntwa, go tswa le go tsena." 
Joshua14:12 Bjale mphe thaba ye yeo Jehofa a boletsego ka yona letsatsing leo; gobane mohlang woo o kwele kamoo Baanaki ba bego ba le gona moo, le kamoo metse yeo e bego e ageleditswe ka legora ka gona; ge e ba Jehofa a na le nna, gona ka tla tseba go ba raka, go etsa ge Jehofa a boletse." 
Joshua14:13 Jošua a mo segofatsa, a nea Kalebe morwa wa Jefune Heberone gore e be bohwa." 
Joshua14:14 Ka gona Heberone ya ba bohwa bja Kalebe morwa wa Jefune wa Mokanise go fihla le lehono, ka gobane o ile a latela Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele ka mo go feletsego." 
Joshua14:15 Leina la Heberone pele e be e le Kiriatharba; Arba e be e le monna yo mogolo go Baanaki. Le naga e khutsa ntweng. 
Joshua15:1 Tse ka dihlopha tsa moloko wa bana ba Juda go ya ka meloko ya bona; go fihla mollwaneng wa Edomo, lesokang la Tsini ka borwa, ka thokong ya lebopong la ka borwa." 
Joshua15:2 Mollwane wa bona wa ka borwa o be o tloga koung ya Lewatle la Letswai, go tloga koung yeo e lebeletsego borwa." 
Joshua15:3 Ya tswela ka ntle ka borwa bja Maal-hakrabime, ya feta go ya Tsini, ya rotogela ka borwa bja Kadeshe-Barnea, ya rotogela Hetsirone, ya rotogela Adara, ya dikologa Karaka." 
Joshua15:4 A tloga moo a ya Azmone, a phatsa nokang ya Egepeto; ditsela tsa lebopong di be di le kgauswi le lewatle; wo e tla ba mollwane wa yona wa borwa." 
Joshua15:5 Mollwane wa ka bohlabela e be e le Lewatle la Letswai, go fihla mafelelong a Noka ya Jorodane. Mollwane wa bona ka thokong ya ka leboa o be o tloga moeding wa lewatle mafelelong a Noka ya Jorodane;" 
Joshua15:6 Mollwane wa rotogela Bethe-Hogla, wa feta ka leboa la Bethe-haraba; thapo ya rotogela leswikang la Bohane morwa wa Rubeni." 
Joshua15:7 Mollwane o rotogela Debire go tswa moeding wa moela wa Hagoro le wa ya ka leboa go ya Gilegala, ka pele ga moo go kopanago Adumime, yeo e lego ka borwa bja Eforate; le go tswa ga yona e be e le Enrogel." 
Joshua15:8 Mollwane wa rotogela moeding wa morwa wa Hinomo ka borwa bja Jebuse; mollwane wa rotogela ntlheng ya thaba yeo e lego pele ga moedi wa Hinomo ka bodikala, wo o lego mafelelong a moedi wa Refaime ka leboa;" 
Joshua15:9 Mollwane o be o gogelwa go tloga ntlheng ya thaba go ya sedibeng sa metsi a Neftoa, o tswela ka ntle go ya metseng ya thaba ya Efurone; mollwane wa retologela Baali, e lego Kiriathe-Jearime." 
Joshua15:10 Mollwane o be o tloga ka bodikala go tloga Baali go fihla thabeng ya Seire, o fetela ka thoko ya thaba ya Jearime, e lego Kasalone, ka lehlakoreng la ka leboa, o theogela Betheshemeshe, o feta Timina." 
Joshua15:11 Mollwane wa tswa ka thoko ga Ekorone ka leboa, mollwane wa tswa o ya Sikorone le wa feta Thabeng ya Baali le wa tswa o ya Jabineele; mollwane o be o le lewatleng." 
Joshua15:12 Mollwane wa ka bodikala o be o lebile Lewatleng le Legolo le mollwaneng wa lona. Ye ka mollwane wa bana ba Juda go dikologa malapa a bona. 
Joshua15:13 Kalebe morwa wa Jefune a nea kabelo gare ga bana ba Juda, go ya ka taelo ya Jehofa go Jošua, e lego motse wa Arba tatago Anaka, motse woo e lego Heberone." 
Joshua15:14 Kalebe a raka barwa ba bararo ba Anaka, e lego Sheshai, Ahimane le Talmai, bana ba Anaka." 
Joshua15:15 Go tloga moo a ya go badudi ba Debiri, le leina la Debiri pele ga moo e be e le Kiriathe-sefere." 
Joshua15:16 Kalebe a re: “Yo a hlabago Kiriathe-sefere a e tsea, ka tla mo nea Ahasi morwedi wa ka gore e be mosadi wa gagwe.”" 
Joshua15:17 Othiniele morwa wa Kanase, ngwanabo Kalebe yo monyenyane, a ya a mo nea Aksa morwedi wa gagwe gore e be mosadi wa gagwe." 
Joshua15:18 Ya re ge a fihla go yena, a mo tutueletsa go kgopela tshemo go tatagwe. A namela pokolo ya gagwe; Kalebe a re go yena: “O nyaka eng?" 
Joshua15:19 A re: Ntshegofatse; gobane O mphile naga ya Borwa; mphe didiba tsa metsi. A mo fa didiba tsa ka godimo le tsa ka fase. 
Joshua15:20 Ye ka bohwa bja moloko wa bana ba Juda go ya ka malapa a bona. 
Joshua15:21 Metse e setsego ya moloko wa bana ba Juda mollwaneng wa ka borwa wa Edomo e be e le Kabeseele, Edere le Jagure;" 
Joshua15:22 le Kina, le Dimona, le Hadada." 
Joshua15:23 Kadeshe le Hatsore le Ethanane; 
Joshua15:24 Tsife, le Teleme, le Belothe," 
Joshua15:25 Hatsore, Hadathe, Kariothe, Hetsirone, ka Hatsoro;" 
Joshua15:26 Amame, Shema le Molada;" 
Joshua15:27 le Hatseregade, le Heshimone, le Bethe-palet;" 
Joshua15:28 le Hatseba le Bishiotia; 
Joshua15:29 Baali, le Iime, le Aseme;" 
Joshua15:30 Eletolade le Kasile le Horma. 
Joshua15:31 Le Sitlage, le Madmana, le Sanshane;" 
Joshua15:32 le Lebaothe, le Shilihime, le Aine, le Rimone; metse ka moka e 29 le metsana ya yona;" 
Joshua15:33 Moeding e be e le Eshitaole, le Tsora le Ashna;" 
Joshua15:34 le Tsanoa, le Enganime, le Tapua, le Ename;" 
Joshua15:35 Jarame, le Adulame, Sogo, le Aseka." 
Joshua15:36 Le Sharaime, le Adithaime, le Gedera, le Gederothaime; metse e lesomenne le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:37 Senane le Hadasa le Migidale Gade," 
Joshua15:38 le Diliani, le Mitsepha, le Joktheele;" 
Joshua15:39 Lakishi, Botsekathe le Egilone;" 
Joshua15:40 Khapone, Lahmam, Kitlixe," 
Joshua15:41 le Gederothe, le Bethe-dagone, le Naama, le Makada; metse e lesometshela le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:42 Libina le Etere le Ashane," 
Joshua15:43 le Jefeta le Ashna le Nesibe. 
Joshua15:44 Le Kaila, le Agsibe, le Maresha; metse e tshela le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:45 Ekrone le mafulo a yona le mafulo a yona; 
Joshua15:46 go tloga Ekrone go fihla lewatleng, bohle bao ba bego ba le kgauswi le Ashdode le metsana ya bona." 
Joshua15:47 Ashdode le mafulo a yona, le mafulo a yona, le Gasa le mafulo a yona, le metsana ya yona, ho fihla Nokang ya Egepeta, le lewatle le leholo le mollwaneng wa yona." 
Joshua15:48 Le nageng ya dithabeng e be e le Shamire, Jatire le Soko;" 
Joshua15:49 le Dane le Kiriathe-sheba, ka Debiri." 
Joshua15:50 Le Anabe, le Estemo, le Anime;" 
Joshua15:51 le Goshene, le Holone, le Gilo; metse e lesometee le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:52 Maarabia le Duma le Eshane," 
Joshua15:53 le Janume, le Bethe-Tapua, le Afeka;" 
Joshua15:54 le Humeta, le Kiriathe-arba, ka gore Heberone le Sione; metse e tshela le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:55 Mayon, Karamele, Tsif, Utah," 
Joshua15:56 le Jeseriele, le Jokidiame, le Tsanoa;" 
Joshua15:57 Kaine, Gibea le Timina; metse ya yona e lesome;" 
Joshua15:58 Halule, le Betseru, le Gedoro," 
Joshua15:59 le Marathe, le Bethe-anothe, le Eltekone; metse e tshela le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriathe-baali (yena ka Kiriathe-Jearime), le Raba; metse e mebedi le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:61 Lesoka, Bethe-araba, Midine, le Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 le Nibishane, le Letswai, le Ene-gedi; metse e tshela le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:63 Ge e le Bajebusi bao ba dulago Jerusalema, bana ba Juda ga se ba kgona go ba raka; eupsa Bajebuse ba dula le bana ba Juda kua Jerusalema go fihla le lehono." 
Joshua16:1 Kabelo ya bana ba Josefa ya rotoga go tloga Nokang ya Jorodane ya ya Jeriko, metsing a Jeriko ka bohlabela, lesokang leo le rotogago go tloga Jeriko, go ya thabeng ya Bethele." 
Joshua16:2 A tloga Bethele a ya Luse, a phatsa go fihla mollwaneng wa Areka go ya Atarothe;" 
Joshua16:3 Ya theogela ka bodikala go ya lebopong la Jafulete, lebopong la Bethe-Horone-lower le Gesere; le lefelo la yona la go tswa le kgauswi le lewatle." 
Joshua16:4 Ka gona bana ba Josefa, Manase le Eferaime ba tsea bohwa bja bona." 
Joshua16:5 Mollwane wa bana ba Eferaime go ya ka malapa a bona e be e le o latelago: Mollwane wa bohwa bja bona ka bohlabela e be e le Atarothadara, go fihla Bethe-Horone ka godimo;" 
Joshua16:6 Mollwane o ya lewatleng, mollwane wa fihla Migimethathe ka lehlakoreng la ka leboa. Mothaladi o ile wa tswa ka bohlabela go ya Taanathe-shilo, wa tswa ka bohlabela go ya Janoha;" 
Joshua16:7 A theoga a tloga Janoa a ya Atarothe le Naara, a fihla Jeriko, a tswa nokang ya Jorodane." 
Joshua16:8 Mollwane o be o tloga Tapua ka bodikala go ya Nokang ya Kana; go tswa ga yona e be e le kgauswi le lewatle. Ye ka bohwa bja bana ba Eferaime go ya ka malapa a bona. 
Joshua16:9 Metse yeo e abetswego barwa ba Eferaime e be e le bohwa bja bana ba Manase, metse ka moka le madulo a yona." 
Joshua16:10 Ba raka Bakanana bao ba bego ba dula Gesere; eupsa Bakanana ba dula gare ga Baefuraimi go fihla le lehono, le ba amogelwa lekgetho." 
Joshua17:1 Moloko wa Manase e be e le o montsi; gobane e be e le leitsibulo la Josefa; e be e le Magiri leitsibulo la Manase, tatago Gileade. Ka ge e be e le monna wa ntwa, ka gona a tsea bohwa bja Gileade le Bashane." 
Joshua17:2 Barwa ba Manase ba bangwe ka malapa a bona; bana ba Abiesere, bana ba Heleka, bana ba Asiriele, bana ba Šegeme, bana ba Hefere, bana ba Shemida: ba ka bana ba Manase mora Josefa ka malapa a bona." 
Joshua17:3 Eupsa Tselofehadi morwa wa Hefere, morwa wa Gileada, morwa wa Magi, morwa wa Manase, o be a se na barwa, eupsa e be e le barwedi. Maina a barwedi ba gagwe ka a: Mahla, Noa, Hogla, Milika le Tirisa." 
Joshua17:4 Ba batamela moperisita Eleasara, Jošua morwa wa Nuni le dikgosana, ba re: “Morena o laetse Moše gore a re nee bohwa gare ga bana babo rena. Ka gona a ba nea bohwa gare ga bana babo tatago bona go etsa ge Jehofa a laetse." 
Joshua17:5 Moeding wa Gileade le Bashane, ka mosola wa Jorodane, dikarolo tse lesome tsa wela Manase;" 
Joshua17:6 Gobane barwedi ba Manase ba be ba na le bohwa gare ga barwa ba gagwe, le naga ya Manase e be e le ya barwa ba gagwe." 
Joshua17:7 Mollwane wa Manase o be o tloga Ashere go ya Migemethe, yeo e lego ka pele ga Šegeme; le mothaladi o kitima go batho ba Entapuag." 
Joshua17:8 Naga ya Tapua e be e le ya Manase, eupsa Tapua yeo e lego mollwaneng wa Manase e be e le ya bana ba Eferaime;" 
Joshua17:9 Mollwane o theogela moeding wa Kana, ka borwa bja moela; Metse ye ya Eferaime e gare ga metse ya Manase; Mollwane wa Manase o be o le ka leboa la noka, o felela lewatleng." 
Joshua17:10 Ka borwa e be e tloga Eferaime, le ka leboa e be e tloga Manase, lewatle e be e le mollwane wa yona; ba hloma mesasa kua Ashere ka leboa, le Isakara ka bohlabela." 
Joshua17:11 Manase a tsea badudi ba Betheseane le mafulo a yona, le Ibleame le mafulo a yona, le badudi ba Dore le mafulo a yona, le badudi ba Endor le mafulo a yona, le badudi ba Taanaka le mafulo a yona. Le badudi ba Megido le metse ya yona, e be e le ditshaba tse tharo." 
Joshua17:12 Barwa ba Manase ga se ba kgona go raka badudi ba metse yeo; eupsa Bakanana ba be ba tla dula nageng yeo. 
Joshua17:13 Eupsa ge bana ba Baiseraele ba tiile, ba lefisa Bakanana; eupsa ga se a ka a ba raka le gatee." 
Joshua17:14 Bana ba Josefa ba bolela le Jošua ba re: “Ka ka baka la’ng o mphile kabelo e tee le karolo e tee e le bohwa, ka ge ka le setshaba se segolo, ka ge Jehofa a ntshegofaditse go fihla ga bjale?" 
Joshua17:15 Jošua a re go bona: “Ge e ba o le setshaba se segolo, rotogela nageng ya dithokgwa, o iphemele nageng ya Peresia le Eferaime;" 
Joshua17:16 Bana ba Josefa ba re: “Tlhara ya mmoto ga e re lekane; Bakanana ka moka bao ba bego ba dula moeding ba be ba na le dikoloi tsa ntwa tsa tshipi, ba tswa Betheseani le metse ya yona, ba theogela moeding. Jezriele." 
Joshua17:17 Jošua a bolela le ba ntlo ya Josefa, e lego Eferaime le Manase, a re: “Le setshaba se segolo le le na le matla a magolo; mohlomongwe ga o na bokamoso bjo tee feela." 
Joshua17:18 Thaba e tla ba ya gago; gobane ka dikota, o tla di rema; le dikarolo tsa yona e tla ba tsa gago; gobane o tla raka Bakanana, le ge ba na le dikoloi tsa tshipi, le ge ba tiile." 
Joshua18:1 Phuthego ka moka ya bana ba Baiseraele ya kgobokana kua Shilo, ya hloma taberenakale ya kopano moo. Naga ya fenywa pele ga bona." 
Joshua18:2 Gare ga bana ba Baiseraele go be go setse meloko e supago, yeo e bego e se ya hlwa e hwetsa bohwa bja yona." 
Joshua18:3 Jošua a re go bana ba Baiseraele: “Le na le bofola go fihla neng go ya go tsea naga yeo Jehofa Modimo wa borakgolokhukhu ba lena a le filego yona? 
Joshua18:4 Ikgetheleng banna ba bararo molokong o mongwe le o mongwe, le ka tla ba roma, le ba tla tsoga, ba phatsa naga, ba e hlalose go ya ka bohwa bja bona; le ba tla boela go Nna." 
Joshua18:5 Ba tla e arola ka dikarolo tse supago: Juda e tla dula lebopong la yona ka borwa, ntlo ya Josefa e tla dula lebopong la yona ka leboa." 
Joshua18:6 O hlalose naga ka dikarolo tse supago, o tlise tlhaloso yeo go nna, gore ka e lahlele matengwa mo pele ga Jehofa Modimo wa rena." 
Joshua18:7 Eupsa Balefi ga ba na karolo gare ga lena; gobane boperisita bja Jehofa ka bohwa bja bona; Gade le Rubeni le seripa sa moloko wa Manase ba amogetse bohwa bja bona ka mosola wa Jorodane ka bohlabela, bjo Moše mohlanka wa Jehofa a ba filego bjona." 
Joshua18:8 Ka moka banna bao ba tsoga ba sepela; Jošua a laela bao ba bego ba eya go lekola naga, a re: “Sepelang le hlalose naga, le boele go nna, gore ka le lahlele matengwa mo pele ga Jehofa kua Shilo.”" 
Joshua18:9 Banna bao ba sepela ba phatsa naga yeo, ba e hlalosa ka metse ka dikarolo tse supago ka pukung, ba boela go Jošua ntweng kua Shilo." 
Joshua18:10 Jošua a ba lahlela matengwa kua Shilo pele ga Jehofa, le moo Jošua a abela bana ba Baiseraele naga go ya ka dihlopha tsa bona." 
Joshua18:11 Kabelo ya moloko wa bana ba Babenjamine e rotoga go ya ka malapa a bona, mollwane wa bohwa bja bona wa tswelela magareng ga bana ba Juda le bana ba Josefa." 
Joshua18:12 Mollwane wa bona ka lehlakoreng la ka leboa o be o tloga Jorodane; mollwane o rotogela thokong ya Jeriko ka leboa, o rotogela dithabeng ka bodikala; meboto ya yona e be e le lesokang la Bethe-Avene." 
Joshua18:13 Go tloga moo mollwane wa tshela o lebile Luse, ka thoko ga Luse, e lego Bethele, ka borwa; mollwane wa theogela Atarothe-Adara, kgauswi le mmoto wo o lego ka borwa bja Bethe-Horone ya tlase;" 
Joshua18:14 Mollwane wa gogwa moo, wa dikologa sekhutlong sa lewatle ka borwa, go tloga mmotong wo o lego ka pele ga Bethorone ka borwa. A tswa a ya Kiriathe-Baale, e lego Kiriathe-Jearime, motse wa bana ba Juda; e be e le lefelo la bodikala." 
Joshua18:15 Karolo ya borwa e be e tloga mafelelong a Kiriathe-Jearime, mollwane o be o tswela ka bodikala o fetela go ya sedibeng sa metsi a Nefutoa." 
Joshua18:16 Mollwane o theogela ntlheng ya thaba yeo e lego ka pele ga moedi wa morwa wa Hinomo, wo o lego moeding wa Banefilimi ka leboa, le wa theogela moeding wa Hinomo, wo o lego moeding wa ba-Jebuse; ka borwa, theogela go Enerogel;" 
Joshua18:17 Ya retologa go tloga ka leboa, ya tswa ya ya Eneseme, ya tswa ya ya Gelilothe, yeo e lebanego le tlhatlogo ya Adumime, ya theogela leswikang la Bohane morwa wa Rubeni." 
Joshua18:18 A ya ka thoko ya Araba ka leboa, a theogela Araba." 
Joshua18:19 Mollwane o fetela ka thoko ya Bethe-hogla ka leboa, mollwane wa tswela pele go fihla koung ya ka leboa ya Lewatle la Letswai ntlheng ya ka borwa ya Noka ya Jorodane; e be e le lebopong la ka borwa." 
Joshua18:20 Noka ya Jorodane e be e le mollwane wa yona ka lehlakoreng la ka bohlabela. Ye ka bohwa bja bana ba Babenjamine go ya ka meloko ya bona. 
Joshua18:21 Metse ya moloko wa barwa ba Babenjamine go ya ka malapa a bona e be e le Jeriko le Bethe-Hogla le moedi wa Katse; 
Joshua18:22 le Bethe-raba, le Shemaraime, le Bethele;" 
Joshua18:23 le Avime, le Para, le Ofura." 
Joshua18:24 Le Kafara-amone, le Ofini, le Geba; metse e lesomepedi le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua18:25 Gibeone le Rama le Beerothe; 
Joshua18:26 le Mitsepha le Kafira le Moše; 
Joshua18:27 le Rekame, le Irepeele, le Tarala." 
Joshua18:28 Tsela, Elefi, Jebuse, ka gore Jerusalema, Gibeathe le Kiriate; metse e lesomenne le metsana ya yona. Ye ka bohwa bja bana ba Babenjamine go ya ka malapa a bona." 
Joshua19:1 Kabelo ya bobedi ya tswa go Simeone, e lego moloko wa bana ba Simeone go ya ka malapa a bona; bohwa bja bona bo be bo le gare ga bohwa bja bana ba Juda." 
Joshua19:2 Bohwa bja bona e be e le Bereseba, goba Seba, le Molada;" 
Joshua19:3 Hatsarshuale, Baala, le Asheme." 
Joshua19:4 Eletolade, Bethule, Horema." 
Joshua19:5 Le Sitlage, le Bethe-marabothe, le Hatsaresa;" 
Joshua19:6 le Betlelehema kua Sharuhene; metse e lesometharo le metsana ya yona. 
Joshua19:7 Aine, le Rimone, le Etere, le Ashane; metse e mene le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:8 Le metse ka moka yeo e bego e dikologa metse ye go fihla Baali-bera, Rama ya ka borwa. Ye ka bohwa bja moloko wa bana ba Simeone go ya ka malapa a bona." 
Joshua19:9 Bohwa bja bana ba Simeone e be e le bohwa bja bana ba Juda; gobane karolo ya bana ba Juda e be e le e kgolo kudu go bona; ka fao bana ba Simeone ba filwe bohwa bja bona. 
Joshua19:10 Kabelo ya boraro ya rotogela bana ba Sebulone go ya ka malapa a bona. 
Joshua19:11 Mollwane wa bona o rotogela lewatleng go tloga Marala, wa fihla Dabashethe, nokang yeo e lego ka pele ga Jokneama." 
Joshua19:12 Go tloga Saride e ile ya retologela ka bohlabela go ya bohlaba bja letsatsi go fihla mollwaneng wa Kisilotabora, ya tswa ya ya Daberathe, ya rotogela Jafia." 
Joshua19:13 Go tloga moo e ile ya feta ka bohlabela go fihla Githe-hefere, Ithe-Kashane le Rimone-Metoara, go fihla Nea." 
Joshua19:14 Mollwane o o dikologa ka lehlakoreng la ka leboa go ya Hannathone. 
Joshua19:15 Katathe, Nahalale, Shimrone, Idala, Betlelehema, metse e lesomepedi le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:16 Ye ka bohwa bja bana ba Sebulone go ya ka malapa a bona, metse le metsana ya bona." 
Joshua19:17 Kabelo ya bone e ile ya tswelela bakang sa Isakara, bakang sa barwa ba Isakara go ya ka malapa a bona." 
Joshua19:18 Moedi wa bona wa rotogela Jeseriele, le Kasulothe, le Shuneme." 
Joshua19:19 Le Hafarime, le Sione, le Anaharathe." 
Joshua19:20 Rabi, Kishini, Abese;" 
Joshua19:21 le Remethe, le Enganime, le Enhadada, le Bethe-Pase;" 
Joshua19:22 Mollwane mollwaneng wa tswela pele go fihla Taboro le Shahatsime le Bethe-Shemeshe; Mollwane wa naga ya bona e be e le noka ya Jorodane: metse ye lesometshela le metsana ya yona. 
Joshua19:23 Ye ka bohwa bja moloko wa barwa ba Isakara go ya ka malapa a bona, metse le madulo a bona." 
Joshua19:24 Kabelo ya bohlano e ile ya tswa bakang sa moloko wa bana ba Ashere go ya ka malapa a bona. 
Joshua19:25 Mollwane wa bona e be e le Helikathe, Hali, Bethene, le Agsape." 
Joshua19:26 Le Almeleka, le Amade, le Mishiele; ya fihla Karamele ka bodikala, le Shihore-Libinathe;" 
Joshua19:27 Ya retologela ka bohlabela go leba Bethe-dagone, ya fihla Sebulone le moeding wa Jafethele ka leboa la Bethe-temeka le Neiele, ya tswa e ya Kabule ka letsogong le letshadi." 
Joshua19:28 Heberone, Rehobe, Hamone, Kana, go fihla Sidone e kgolo;" 
Joshua19:29 Mollwane wa rotogela Rama le motseng o sireleditswego wa Tiro; mollwane wa lewatle o be o fihla Hosa; a theoga lewatleng a theogela Agibe. 
Joshua19:30 Le Umma, le Afeka, le Rehobe: metse e masomepedi-pedi le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:31 Ye ka bohwa bja moloko wa barwa ba Ashere go ya ka malapa a bona, metse ye le madulo a bona." 
Joshua19:32 Tebelo ya botshelela e ile ya tswa bakang sa barwa ba Nafutali, bakang sa barwa ba Nafutali ka malapa a bona." 
Joshua19:33 Mollwane wa bona o be o tloga Helefa, go tloga Alone go ya Tsananime, le Adama, Nekabe, le Jabeneele, go fihla Lakume. Meboto ya yona e be e le kua Jorodane;" 
Joshua19:34 Mollwane o ya ka bodikala go ya Ashnothe-tabore, o tloga moo o ya Hukoka, o fihla Sebulone ka lehlakoreng la borwa, o fihla Ashere ka lehlakoreng la bodikala le Juda kua Jorodane go ya bohlaba bja letsatsi." 
Joshua19:35 Metse yeo e sireleditswego e be e le Sidime, Tsere, Hamate, Rakathe le Kinerete;" 
Joshua19:36 le Adama, le Rama, le Hatsore." 
Joshua19:37 Le Kadeshe, le Edrei, le Enesore." 
Joshua19:38 Le Ishitara, le Migidale, le Horeme, le Bethe-anathe, le Bethe-Shemeshe; metse e lesometshela le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:39 Ye ka bohwa bja moloko wa bana ba Naftali go ya ka malapa a bona, metse le madulo a bona." 
Joshua19:40 Kabelo ya bosupa ya tswa go moloko wa bana ba Dani go ya ka malapa a bona. 
Joshua19:41 Naga ya bohwa bja bona e be e le Tsora, Eshitaolo le Ireshemeshe;" 
Joshua19:42 le Shaalebini, le Ajalone, le Jetla." 
Joshua19:43 Le Elone, le Timina, le Ekrone;" 
Joshua19:44 le Elteka, le Gibethone, le Baalathe;" 
Joshua19:45 go Jehuda morwa wa Beraka le Gatrimone; 
Joshua19:46 le Mejakone, le Rakone, le mollwane wo o lego pele ga Jopa;" 
Joshua19:47 Mollwane wa bana ba Dani o be o ba tshesane kudu; ka fao bana ba Dani ba ya ba lwa le Leseme, ba e thopa, ba e hlaba ka bogale bja tshosa, ba dula go yona, ba bitsa Leseme Dane, ka leina la Dani tatago bona." 
Joshua19:48 Ye ka bohwa bja moloko wa bana ba Dani go ya ka malapa a bona, metse ye le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:49 Ka gona ge ba feditse go arola naga gore e be bohwa go ya ka maboto a bona, bana ba Baiseraele ba nea Jošua morwa wa Nuni bohwa gare ga bona." 
Joshua19:50 Go ya ka lentsu la Jehofa ba mo nea motse wo a o kgopetsego, e lego Timnathe-sera tikologong ya dithaba ya Eferaime; a aga motse a dula go wona." 
Joshua19:51 Ye ka bohwa bjoo moperisita Eleasara, Jošua morwa wa Nuni le dihlogo tsa malapa a botatago meloko ya bana ba Baiseraele ba di abilego ka matengwa kua Shilo pele ga Jehofa, mojakong wa taberenakale ya kopano. Bohwa bjo bo tswago phuthegong. Ka gona ba ile ba kgaotsa go ahlola naga." 
Joshua20:1 Jehofa a bolela le Jošua a re: 
Joshua20:2 “Bolela le bana ba Baiseraele o ba botse o re: ‘Tseang metse yeo ka le boditsego ka yona ka seatla sa Moše.’ 
Joshua20:3 Gore mmolai yo a bolayago motho a sa lemoge e bile a sa tsebe a tshabele moo; e tla ba setshabelo go wena go molefetsi wa madi. 
Joshua20:4 O tla tshabela o mongwe wa metse yeo, a ema mojakong wa kgoro ya motse, a bolele taba ya gagwe ditsebeng tsa bagolo ba motse woo, ba gona. A ka phela gare ga bona." 
Joshua20:5 Ge e ba molefetsi wa madi a mo rakadisa, o se ka wa gafela mmolai seatleng sa gagwe; ka gobane o ile a otla moagisani wa gagwe a sa lemoge, a mo hloya pele." 
Joshua20:6 A dula motseng woo go fihlela a ema pele ga phuthego bakang sa kahlolo le go fihla lehung la moperisita yo mogolo yo a tlago go ba gona mehleng yeo, motseng wo a tshabilego go wona." 
Joshua20:7 Ka gona ba arola Kadeshe kua Galilea nageng ya dithabeng ya Nafutali, Šegeme nageng ya dithabeng ya Eferaime le Kiriathe-Arba (ka gore Heberone) nageng ya dithabeng ya Juda." 
Joshua20:8 Ka mosola wa Jorodane go ya Jeriko ka bohlabela, ba bea Betsere lesokang lesokang go tswa molokong wa Rubeni, le Ramothe kua Gileada go tswa molokong wa Gada, le Golane kua Bashane go tswa molokong wa Manase." 
Joshua20:9 Ye e be e le metse yeo e bego e beetswe bana ba Baiseraele ka moka le moeng yo a dulago e le mofaladi gare ga bona, gore mang le mang yo a bolayago motho le ge e le ofe a sa ikamisetsa a tshabele moo le a se bolawe ka molefetsi wa madi go fihlela a bolawa ema pele ga phuthego." 
Joshua21:1 Ka moka dihlogo tsa borakgolokhukhu ba Balefi tsa batamela go moperisita Eleasara le Jošua morwa wa Nuni le dihlogo tsa borakgolokhukhu ba bana ba Baiseraele. 
Joshua21:2 Ba bolela le bona kua Shilo nageng ya Kanana ba re: “Jehofa o laetse ka seatla sa Moše gore a re nee metse yeo re ka dulago go yona, le mafulo a yona a diruiwa tsa rena.”" 
Joshua21:3 Bana ba Baiseraele ba nea Balefi bohwa bja bona ka taelo ya Jehofa metse ye le mafulo a rona. 
Joshua21:4 Ka morago ga moo matengwa a wela malapa a Bahethe; barwa ba moperisita Arone, Balefi." 
Joshua21:5 Barwa ba bangwe ka moka ba Kohathe ba ile ba ba le metse e lesome go tswa malapeng a moloko wa Eferaime le molokong wa Dani le seripa-gare sa moloko wa Manase. 
Joshua21:6 Barwa ba Gershone ba newa ka matengwa go tswa malapeng a moloko wa Isakara le molokong wa Ashere le molokong wa Nafutali le seripagare moloko wa Manase kua Bashane metse e 13. 
Joshua21:7 Barwa ba Merari go ya ka malapa a bona ba be ba na le metse e lesomepedi molokong wa Rubeni le molokong wa Gada le molokong wa Sebulone ka matengwa. 
Joshua21:8 Bana ba Baiseraele ba nea Balefi metse ye le mafulo a yona ka matengwa, go etsa ge Jehofa a laetse ka Moše." 
Joshua21:9 Ba nea metse ye go tswa molokong wa bana ba Juda le molokong wa bana ba Simeone ka maina. 
Joshua21:10 E be e le ya barwa ba Arone, gare ga malapa a Bakohathe ba barwa ba Lefi, ka gobane kabelo ya pele e be e le ya bona." 
Joshua21:11 Ba ba nea motse wa Arba tatago Anaka, e lego motse wo e lego Heberone, nageng ya dithabeng ya Juda, le mafulo a wona." 
Joshua21:12 Eupsa masemo a motse le madulo a wona ba a nea Kalebe morwa wa Jefune gore e be thoto ya gagwe. 
Joshua21:13 Ba nea barwa ba moperisita Arone Heberone le mafulo a yona e le motse o lokologilego wo o ka hlabjago; le Libina le mafulo a yona; 
Joshua21:14 le Jatire le mafulo a yona, le Estemoa le mafulo a yona;" 
Joshua21:15 le Holone le mafulo a yona, le Debiri le mafulo a yona;" 
Joshua21:16 Aine le mafulo a yona, le Juta le mafulo a yona, le Bethe-Shemeshe le mafulo a yona; metse e senyane go tswa melokong yeo e mebedi." 
Joshua21:17 Molokong wa Babenjamine, Gibeone le mafulo a yona, le Geba le mafulo a yona." 
Joshua21:18 Anathothe le mafulo a yona, le Almone le mafulo a yona; metse e mene." 
Joshua21:19 Metse ka moka ya barwa ba Arone, baperisita, e be e le metse ye lesometharo le mafulo a yona." 
Joshua21:20 Malapa a bana ba Kohathe, Balefi bao ba setsego go bana ba Kohathe, ba ile ba ba le metse yeo e bego e le kabelo ya bona molokong wa Eferaime." 
Joshua21:21 Gobane ba ile ba ba nea Šegeme nageng ya dithabeng ya Eferaime le mafulo a yona, e lego motse wa go khutsa bakang sa go bolaya; le Gesere le mafulo a yona;" 
Joshua21:22 le Kibsaime le mafulo a yona, le Bethe-Horone le mafulo a yona; metse e mene." 
Joshua21:23 Molokong wa Dani e be e le Elteka le mafulo a yona, le Gibethone le mafulo a yona." 
Joshua21:24 Ajalone le mafulo a yona, Gatrimone le mafulo a yona; metse e mene." 
Joshua21:25 Seripa sa moloko wa Manase, Taanaka le mafulo a yona, le Gatrimone le mafulo a yona; metse e mebedi." 
Joshua21:26 Metse ka moka e be e le e lesome le mafulo a yona bakang sa malapa a barwa ba Kohathe ao a setsego. 
Joshua21:27 Bana ba Gershone, ba malapa a Balefi, go tswa go seripa se sengwe sa moloko wa Manase, ba nea Golane kua Bashane le mafulo a yona, gore e be motse wa botshabelo bja mmolai. Le Beesterah le mafulo a yona; metse e mebedi." 
Joshua21:28 Molokong wa Isakara, Kishone le mafulo a yona, Dabere le mafulo a yona;" 
Joshua21:29 Jaremuthe le mafulo a yona, Enganime le mafulo a yona; metse e mene." 
Joshua21:30 Molokong wa Ashere, Mishale le mafulo a yona, le Abdone le mafulo a yona;" 
Joshua21:31 Helikathe le mafulo a yona, le Rehobe le mafulo a yona; metse e mene." 
Joshua21:32 Go tswa molokong wa Naftali, Kadeshe kua Galilea le mafulo a yona, e le motse wo o se nago polao; le Hamothedore le mafulo a yona, le Kartane le mafulo a yona; metse e meraro." 
Joshua21:33 Metse ka moka ya barwa ba Gershone go ya ka malapa a bona e be e le metse e lesometharo le mafulo a yona. 
Joshua21:34 Malapa a barwa ba Merari, Balefi ba bangwe ka moka, ba moloko wa Sebulone, Jokneama le mafulo a wona, Karta le mafulo a wona;" 
Joshua21:35 Dimna le mafulo a yona, Nahalale le mafulo a yona; metse e mene." 
Joshua21:36 Molokong wa Rubeni, Betsere le mafulo a yona le Jahase le mafulo a yona;" 
Joshua21:37 Kademothe le mafulo a yona, le Mefathe le mafulo a yona; metse e mene." 
Joshua21:38 Moloko wa Gade e be e le Ramothe kua Gileada le mafulo a yona, bakang sa polao le mafulo a yona; le Mahanaime le mafulo a yona;" 
Joshua21:39 Heshibone le mafulo a yona, Jasere le mafulo a yona; metse e mene ka palomoka." 
Joshua21:40 Metse ka moka ya barwa ba Merari go ya ka malapa a bona yeo e setsego malapeng a Balefi ka kabelo ya bona ya ba metse e lesomepedi. 
Joshua21:41 Metse ka moka ya Balefi yeo e bego e le nageng ya bana ba Baiseraele e be e le metse e masomenne-seswai le mafulo a yona. 
Joshua21:42 Metse ye nngwe le ye nngwe e be e na le mafulo a yona go e dikologa; go be go swana metseng ye ka moka. 
Joshua21:43 Ka gona Jehofa a nea Baiseraele naga ka moka yeo a ikannego gore o tla e nea borakgolokhukhu ba bona; ba e thopa, ba dula go yona." 
Joshua21:44 Jehofa a ba khutsisa go etsa ge a be a enile borakgolokhukhu ba bona; le ga go le o tee wa manaba a bona yo a ilego a ema kgauswi le bona; Jehofa o ile a gafela manaba a bona ka moka diatleng tsa bona. 
Joshua21:45 Ga go selo seo se ilego sa palelwa seo Jehofa a se boletsego le ntlo ya Baiseraele; ka moka ga tsona di diregile. 
Joshua22:1 Jošua a bitsa Barubeni le Bagada le seripa sa moloko wa Manase; 
Joshua22:2 A re go bona: “Le bolokile tsohle tseo Moše mohlanka wa Jehofa a le laetsego tsona, le la kwa lentsu la ka go tsohle tseo ka le laetsego tsona." 
Joshua22:3 Le ge go le bjalo ga se wa lahla bana beno matsatsi a mantsi, eupsa o bolokile taelo ya Jehofa Modimo wa gago." 
Joshua22:4 Bjale Jehofa Modimo wa gago o file bana beno khutso bjalo ka ge a ba holofeditse. Bjale boela morago ditenteng tsa lena le nageng e botse yeo Moše mohlanka wa Jehofa a le filego yona ka mosola wa Jorodane; 
Joshua22:5 Ela hloko taelo le molao wo Moše mohlanka wa Jehofa a go laetsego wona, gore o rate Jehofa Modimo wa gago, o sepele ditseleng tsa gagwe ka moka, o lote ditaelo tsa gagwe, o mo kgomarele gore o mo hlankale le bohle pelo ya gago. Le ka moya wa gago ka moka." 
Joshua22:6 Jošua a ba segofatsa, a ba raka, ba ya ditenteng tsa bona." 
Joshua22:7 Moše o be a neetse seripa-gare sa moloko wa Manase thoto kua Bashane, eupsa seripa-gare sa sona a nea Jošua gare ga bana babo bona ka mosola wa Jorodane. Jošua a ba arosa, ba ba segofatsa;" 
Joshua22:8 A re go bona: “Boelang ka dilo tse dintsi ditenteng tsa lena, le dikgomo tse dintsi kudu, silifera e ntsi kudu, gauta e ntsi kudu, koporo e ntsi kudu, tshipi e ntsi kudu, le diaparo tse dintsi kudu.” Arola dithebola tsa manaba a gago gare ga bana beno." 
Joshua22:9 Barwa ba Rubeni le barwa ba Gada le seripa sa moloko wa Manase ba boela morago go tswa go bana ba Baiseraele kua Shilo, yeo e lego nageng ya Kanana, nageng ya Giliead, go ya bohwa bja bona. Ba e abetse, ka taelo ya Morena, ka tirelo ya Moše." 
Joshua22:10 Ge ba fihla mollwaneng wa Jorodane, wo o lego nageng ya Kanana, bana ba Rubeni le bana ba Gada le seripa sa moloko wa Manase ba ile ba aga sebeso moo go bapa le Jorodane, e lego sebeso e kgolo ya go bona." 
Joshua22:11 Bana ba Baiseraele ba kwa le ba re: “Barwa ba Rubeni le barwa ba Gada le seripa sa moloko wa Manase ba agile sebeso go lebana le naga ya Kanana kgauswi le Noka ya Jorodane tseleng ya barwa ba Baiseraele. Baiseraele. 
Joshua22:12 Ge bana ba Baiseraele ba ekwa ka seo, phuthego ka moka ya bana ba Baiseraele ya kgobokana kua Shilo gore e yo lwa le bona." 
Joshua22:13 Bana ba Baiseraele ba romela Finease morwa wa moperisita Eleasare go bana ba Rubeni le bana ba Gada le seripa-gare sa moloko wa Manase nageng ya Gileada. 
Joshua22:14 O be a na le dikgosana tse lesome, kgosana ya ntlo ya tatago yo mongwe le yo mongwe gare ga meloko ka moka ya Baiseraele; yo mongwe le yo mongwe e be e le hlogo ya ntlo ya tatagwe gare ga ba dikate tsa Baiseraele." 
Joshua22:15 Ba tla go bana ba Rubeni le go bana ba Gada le seripa-gare sa moloko wa Manase nageng ya Gileade. 
Joshua22:16 A re go phuthego ka moka ya Jehofa: “Ka eng seo le se dirilego go Modimo wa Baiseraele, ka ge le tlogetse Jehofa lehono le la le agela sebeso lehono gore le rabele malebana le Jehofa?" 
Joshua22:17 Na phoso ya Peoro ka e nyenyane kudu go rena, yeo re sa itlhwekisago go yona go fihla le lehono, gaesita le ge go bile le leuba ka phuthegong ya Jehofa?" 
Joshua22:18 Eupsa na o ka furalela go latela Jehofa lehono? ge le ka rabela malebana le Jehofa lehono, o tla galefela phuthego ka moka ya Baiseraele gosasa." 
Joshua22:19 Eupsa ge e ba naga ya lena e sa hlweka, gona tshelela nageng ya bohwa bja Jehofa, moo taberenakale ya Jehofa e lego gona, le o e tsee gare ga rena; eupsa o se ka wa rabela go Jehofa goba go rena, o age sebeso pele ga sebeso ya Jehofa Modimo wa rena." 
Joshua22:20 Na Akane morwa wa Tsera ga se a ka a dira molato pele ga yo kgopo, le bogale bja wela phuthego ka moka ya Baiseraele? le motho yoo a ka hwelela bokgopo bja gagwe a nnosi." 
Joshua22:21 Ka moka barwa ba Rubeni le barwa ba Gade le seripa sa moloko wa Manase ba araba ba re go dihlogo tsa dikate tsa Baiseraele. 
Joshua22:22 Jehofa Modimo wa medimo, Jehofa Modimo wa medimo, o tsebile Baiseraele le o tla tseba Baiseraele; ge e le go rabela go Jehofa, goba go senyetsa Jehofa (o se ka wa re pholosa lehono)." 
Joshua22:23 E le gore re age sebeso ya go tlogela go latela Jehofa goba go neela dihlabelo tsa go fiswa goba dihlabelo tsa mabele godimo ga yona goba go neela dihlabelo tsa tebogo godimo ga yona, e tla nyakaga ka Jehofa ka boyena;" 
Joshua22:24 Re ka se dire seo bjang ka ge re be re boifa se, ra re: Ge nako e dutse e e-ya bana ba gago ba tla kgona go bolela le bana ba rena, ba re: Le na le bothata Ku go thwe’ng ka Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele?" 
Joshua22:25 Jehofa o dirile Jorodane mollwane magareng ga rena le lena, lena bana ba Rubeni le bana ba Gada; ga o na karolo go Jehofa; ka fao bana ba gago ba tla dira gore bana ba rena ba se sa boifa Morena." 
Joshua22:26 Ka ka baka leo re ilego ra re: A re itokisetseng bjale go re agela sebeso, e sego ya dihlabelo tsa go fiswa goba dihlabelo." 
Joshua22:27 Eupsa gore e be bohlatse magareng ga rena le lena le meloko ya rena ka morago ga rena, gore re dire tirelo ya Jehofa pele ga gagwe ka dihlabelo tsa rena tsa go fiswa le ka dihlabelo tsa rena le ka dihlabelo tsa rena tsa tebogo; gore ka nako e swanetsego barwa ba gago ba se ka ba re go barwa ba rena: “Ga le na karolo go Jehofa.”" 
Joshua22:28 Ka ka baka leo re rile, ge ba ka re botsa ka se, goba go meloko ya rena mo nakong ye e tlago, gona re tla re, Bona pontsho ya sebeso ya Morena, yeo borakgolokhukhu ba rena ba e agilego, e sego mollo; e sego ka dihlabelo; eupsa ka hlatse magareng ga rena le lena." 
Joshua22:29 Anka Modimo a re thibele go rabela malebana le Jehofa le ra tlogela go latela Jehofa lehono, gore a re age sebeso ya dihlabelo tsa go fiswa le tsa dihlabelo tsa go fiswa goba dihlabelo pele ga tabarenakale ya Jehofa Modimo wa rena." 
Joshua22:30 Ge moperisita Finease le dikgosana tsa phuthego le dihlogo tsa ba dikate ba Baiseraele bao ba bego ba na le yena ba ekwa mantsu ao bana ba Rubeni le bana ba Gada le bana ba Manase ba a boletsego, ba ile ba ba kgahlisa." 
Joshua22:31 Finease morwa wa moperisita Eleasara a re go bana ba Rubeni le bana ba Gada le bana ba Manase: “Lehono re tseba gore Jehofa o gare ga rena, ka gobane ga se la dira sebe Morena bjale o lopolotse bana ba Baiseraele seatleng sa Morena.”" 
Joshua22:32 Ka moka Finease morwa wa moperisita Eleasara le bakgomana ba boela go bana ba Rubeni le go bana ba Gada nageng ya Gileada nageng ya Kanana. Tseba gape. 
Joshua22:33 Taba yeo ya kgahlisa bana ba Baiseraele; bana ba Baiseraele ba segofatsa Modimo, bana ba Baiseraele ba katanela go se ba bolaya, ba senya naga yeo bana ba Rubeni le bana ba Gada ba bego ba dula go yona." 
Joshua22:34 Barwa ba Rubeni le barwa ba Gada ba thoma go reela sebeso leina la Ede, ka gobane e tla ba hlatse magareng ga rena gore Jehofa ka Modimo." 
Joshua23:1 Ka morago ga matsatsi a mantsi Jehofa a khutsisa Baiseraele medirong ya bona ka moka, le Jošua a tsofala a ba gatelela." 
Joshua23:2 Jošua a bitsa Baiseraele ka moka, banna ba bona ba bagolo le dihlogo tsa bona le Baatlhodi ba bona le balaodi ba bona le a re go bona: “Ka tsofetse e bile ka lapile." 
Joshua23:3 O bone tsohle tseo Jehofa Modimo wa gago a di dirilego ditshaba tse ka moka ka baka la gago; gobane Jehofa Modimo wa gago ka yena yo a go lwetsego. 
Joshua23:4 Bonang, ka le arotse ka matengwa ditshaba tse tse di setsego, gore e be bohwa bja meloko ya lena, go tloga Jorodane, le ditshaba ka moka tseo ka di feditsego, go fihla lewatleng le legolo ka bodikala." 
Joshua23:5 Jehofa Modimo wa gago o tla ba raka pele ga gago; o tla tsea naga ya bona, bjalo ka ge Jehofa Modimo wa gago a go holofeditse." 
Joshua23:6 E-ba le sebete sa go boloka le go dira tsohle tseo di ngwadilwego ka pukung ya Molao wa Moše, gore le se ka la e fapogela ka go le letona goba ka go le letshadi;" 
Joshua23:7 gore le se tle gare ga ditshaba tseo di setsego gare ga lena; Le se ka la bolela leina la medimo ya bona, le se ka la e ena, la e hlankala, la e khunamela." 
Joshua23:8 Eupsa kgomarela Jehofa Modimo wa gago, go etsa ge o dirile go fihla le lehono." 
Joshua23:9 Gobane Jehofa o rakile ditshaba tse dikgolo le tse matla pele ga lena, eupsa ge e le lena ga go na motho yo a emego pele ga lena go fihla le lehono." 
Joshua23:10 Monna o tee go lena o tla raka ba sekate; gobane Jehofa Modimo wa gago ka yena yo a go lwelago, bjalo ka ge a go holofeditse." 
Joshua23:11 Itlhokomele gore o rate Jehofa Modimo wa gago. 
Joshua23:12 Ge go se bjalo, ka ditsela ka moka, boela morago le o tsee masaledi a setshaba se, se se setsego gare ga lena, le o a tsee ka gare, le bona le lena;" 
Joshua23:13 Ka gona tsebang gore Jehofa Modimo wa gago a ka se ka a raka ditshaba tse pele ga gago; eupsa e tla ba melaba le melaba go lena, le dikotlo ka mahlakoreng a lena, le meetlwa mahlong a lena, go fihlela le fediswa nageng ye e botse ye Jehofa Modimo wa lena a le filego yona." 
Joshua23:14 Ka mo ka sepelago tseleng ya lefatshe ka moka lehono, le o tseba gabotse ka pelo ya gago ka moka le ka moya wa gago ka moka gore ga go le lentsu le tee go mantsu ka moka a mabotse ao Jehofa Modimo wa gago a a boletsego mabapi le wena ao a paletswego ka go lebanya; tsohle di go diragaletse, le ga go selo seo se go paletswego." 
Joshua23:15 Ka gona ga go le lentsu le tee leo le le phethagetsego mantsung ka moka a mabotse ao Jehofa Modimo wa gago a go holofeditsego ona; ka baka leo Jehofa o tla go tlisetsa bosula ka moka, go fihlela a go fedisa nageng ye e botse yeo Jehofa Modimo wa gago a go filego yona." 
Joshua23:16 Eupsa ge o ka tshela kgwerano ya Jehofa Modimo wa gago, yeo a go laetsego yona, wa ya go hlankala medimo e mengwe le wa e khunamela; moo bogale bja Jehofa bo tla go tuka, le o tla fediswa ka pela nageng ye e botse ye a go filego yona." 
Joshua24:1 Jošua a kgobokatsa meloko ka moka ya Baiseraele kua Šegeme, a bitsa bagolo ba Baiseraele, le dihlogo tsa bona, le Baatlhodi ba bona, le balaodi ba bona; ba ithapela pele ga Modimo." 
Joshua24:2 Jošua a re go setshaba ka moka: “Se ka seo Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele a se boletsego: “Borakgolokhukhu ba lena ba be ba dula ka mosola wa metsifula mehleng ya kgale, bjalo ka Tera, tatago Aborahama le tatago Nahoro. Ba hlankala medimo e mengwe." 
Joshua24:3 Ka ile ka tsea tatago Aborahama go tshela metsi-fula ka mo eta pele nageng ka moka ya Kanana, ka atisa peu ya gagwe le go mo nea Isaka." 
Joshua24:4 Ka mo nea Isaka, Jakobe le Esau; Ka file Esau Thaba ya Seire gore e be thoto ya gagwe; eupsa Jakobe le bana ba gagwe ba theogela Egepeto." 
Joshua24:5 Ka roma le Moše le Arone, ka tlaisa Egepeto go ya ka seo ka se dirilego gare ga bona, ka morago ga moo ka le ntsha. Le ka morago ga moo ka go ntsha." 
Joshua24:6 Ka ntshitse tatago Egepeto le a tla lewatleng; BaEgepeto ba rakadisa tatago ka dikoloi tsa ntwa le banamedi ba dipere go fihla Lewatleng le Lehwibidu. 
Joshua24:7 Ge ba llela Jehofa, a bea leswiswi magareng ga lena le BaEgepeto, a ba tlisetsa lewatle, a ba khupetsa; mahlo a gago a bone tse ka di dirilego kua Egepeto, le o phetse nako e telele lesokang." 
Joshua24:8 Ka le tlisa nageng ya Baamore bao ba bego ba dula ka mosola wa Jorodane; ba tla lwa le wena; ka ba gafetse diatleng tsa lena, gore le tsee naga ya bona; Ka ba fedisitse pele ga gago." 
Joshua24:9 Ka moka Balaka morwa wa Tsipora kgosi ya Moaba a tsoga a lwa le Baiseraele, a roma ba bitsa Balaame morwa wa Beore gore a go roga." 
Joshua24:10 Eupsa ka be ka sa nyaka go theetsa Balaame; ka fao, O sa go segofatsa; ka baka leo ka go hlakodisitsego diatleng tsa gagwe." 
Joshua24:11 Wa tshela noka ya Jorodane wa fihla Jeriko, banna ba Jeriko ba be ba lwa le wena, e lego Baamore le Baperetsi le Kanana Bahethe le Bahethe le Bagirgashe le Bahethe le Bajebuse; ka di gafela diatleng tsa gago." 
Joshua24:12 Ka ile ka roma dikota pele ga gago, tseo di ilego tsa ba raka pele ga gago, e lego dikgosi tse pedi tsa Baamore; eupsa e sego ka tshosa ya gago goba bora bja gago." 
Joshua24:13 Ka le file naga yeo le sa kago la soma ka yona, le metse yeo le tlago go e aga, le le dula go yona; le ja dirapa tsa merara le dirapa tsa mehlware tse le sa di bjalago." 
Joshua24:14 Bjale boifang Jehofa, le mo hlankale ka potego le ka thereso; le lahle medimo yeo borakgolokhukhu ba lena ba bego ba e hlankala ka mosola wa Noka le kua Egepeto; hlankala Morena." 
Joshua24:15 Ge e ba o bonala e le bobe go hlankala Jehofa, gona lehono kgetha yo o tlago go mo hlankala; goba medimo yeo borakgolokhukhu ba lena ba bego ba e hlankala yeo e bego e le ka thoko ya metsifula, goba medimo ya Baamore bao le dulago nageng ya bona; eupsa ge e le nna le ba lapa la ka, re tla hlankala Jehofa Modimo." 
Joshua24:16 Setshaba sa araba sa re: “A go re kgole le rena gore re tlogele Jehofa ra hlankala medimo e mengwe; 
Joshua24:17 Gobane ka Jehofa Modimo wa rena, yo a re ntshitsego nageng ya Egepeto, ntlong ya bokgoba, rena le borakgolokhukhu ba rena, le yo a dirilego mehlolo ye e megolo pele ga mahlo a rena, yo a re bolokilego tseleng ka moka yeo re bego re le go yona sepela le ka tlase ba na le. Batho ka moka bao re ilego ra ba feta;" 
Joshua24:18 Jehofa a raka setshaba ka moka pele ga rena, Baamore bao ba bego ba dula nageng yeo. Ka fao, le rena re tla hlankala Morena; gobane ka Modimo wa rena." 
Joshua24:19 Jošua a re go setshaba: “Le ka se kgone go hlankala Jehofa, gobane ka Modimo yo mokgethwa; ka Modimo wa lehufa; A ka se lebalele dibe tsa lena le dibe tsa lena." 
Joshua24:20 Ge o ka lahla Jehofa wa hlankala medimo e mengwe, gona o tla retologa a go dira bobe, a go fedisa ka morago ga ge a go diretse botse." 
Joshua24:21 Setshaba sa re go Jošua: “Ee; eupsa re tla hlankala Morena. 
Joshua24:22 Jošua a re go setshaba: “Le dihlatse tsa lena gore le le kgethile Jehofa gore le mo hlankale. Ba re: Re dihlatse. 
Joshua24:23 Bjale lahlang medimo e sele yeo e lego gare ga lena, le le sekametseng dipelo tsa lena go Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele." 
Joshua24:24 Setshaba sa re go Jošua: “Re tla hlankala Jehofa Modimo wa rena, le re tla kwa lentsu la gagwe.”" 
Joshua24:25 Ka gona Jošua a dira kgwerano le setshaba letsatsing leo, a ba bea molao le molao kua Šegeme." 
Joshua24:26 Jošua o ile a ngwala mantsu a ka pukung ya molao wa Modimo wa thereso le a tsea leswika le legolo a le hloma moo ka tlase ga sehlare sa turpentine sekgethwa sa Jehofa. 
Joshua24:27 Jošua a re go setshaba ka moka: “Bonang, leswika le e tla ba hlatse go rena; gobane le kwele mantsu ka moka a Jehofa a re boditsego ona." 
Joshua24:28 Ka gona Jošua a roma setshaba, yo mongwe le yo mongwe a ya bohwa bja gagwe." 
Joshua24:29 Ka morago ga dilo tse, Jošua morwa wa Nuni, mohlanka wa Jehofa, a hwa, a na le nywaga e lekgolo le lesome." 
Joshua24:30 Ba mmoloka mollwaneng wa bohwa bja gagwe kua Timnathe-Sera, e lego thabeng ya Eferaime, ka leboa la mmoto wa Gaase." 
Joshua24:31 Baiseraele e ile ya hlankala Jehofa mehleng ka moka ya Jošua le mehleng ka moka ya bagolo bao ba phetsego go feta Jošua bao ba tsebilego dikotlo ka moka. 
Joshua24:32 Marapo a Josefa ao bana ba Baiseraele ba a ntshitsego Egepeto, ba a boloka kua Šegeme tshemong yeo Jakobe a e rekilego go barwa ba Hamoro tatago Šegeme ka disekale tse lekgolo tsa silifera. Bohwa bja barwa ba Josefa." 
Joshua24:33 Eleasara morwa wa Arone a hwa; ba mmoloka thabeng ya Finease morwa wa gagwe, yeo a e filwego thabeng ya Eferaime." 
Judges1:1 Ka morago ga lehu la Jošua, bana ba Baiseraele ba botsisa Jehofa ba re: “Ka mang yo a tlago go rotogela Bakanana pele ka baka la rena go yo lwa le bona?”" 
Judges1:2 Jehofa a re: “Juda o tla rotoga; bona, ka tla gafela naga diatleng tsa gagwe." 
Judges1:3 Ka moka Juda a re go Simeone ngwanabo: “Rotogela le nna kabelong ya ka, gore re lwe le Bakanana; ka tla sepela le wena go fihla bofelong bja gago. Ka gona Simeone a sepela le yena." 
Judges1:4 Juda a rotoga; Morena a gafela Bakanana le Baperesia diatleng tsa bona, ba bolaya banna ba dikate tse lesome kua Beseka." 
Judges1:5 Ba hwetsa Adoni-beseka, ba lwa le yena, ba bolaya Bakanana le Baperesia." 
Judges1:6 Eupsa Adoni-beseka a tshaba; ba mo rakadisa, ba mo swara, ba mo kgaola menwana le menwana ya maoto." 
Judges1:7 Ka moka Adoni-beseka a re: “Dikgosi tse masometshela-tee tseo di kgaotswego menwana e megolo le menwana ya tsona e megolo di be di kgobokane ka tlase ga tafola ya ka; bjalo ka ge ka dirile, Modimo o ntirile bjalo. Ba mo tlisa Jerusalema, moo a ilego a hwa." 
Judges1:8 Bana ba Juda ba lwa le Jerusalema, ba e thopa, ba e bolaya ka tshosa, ba tshuma motse." 
Judges1:9 Ka morago ga moo bana ba Juda ba theoga go yo lwa le Bakanana bao ba bego ba dula tikologong ya dithaba ka borwa le lebaleng la tlasana la moedi wa moela. 
Judges1:10 Juda a lwa le Bakanana bao ba bego ba dula Heberone; (bjale leina la Heberone pele e be e le Kiriathe-Arba:) ba bolaya Sheshai, Ahimane, le Talmai." 
Judges1:11 Go tloga moo a ya go lwa le badudi ba Debiri, leina la Debiri pele e be e le Kiriathesefere." 
Judges1:12 Kalebe a re: “Yo a hlabago Kiriathe-sefere a e tsea, ka tla mo nea Ahasi morwedi wa ka gore e be mosadi wa gagwe.”" 
Judges1:13 Othiniele morwa wa Kanase, ngwanabo Kalebe, a ya a mo nea Aksa morwedi wa gagwe gore e be mosadi wa gagwe." 
Judges1:14 Ya re ge a fihla go yena, a mo tutueletsa go kgopela tshemo go tatagwe. Kalebe a re go yena: “O nyaka eng?" 
Judges1:15 Mosadi a re go yena: “Mphe tshegofatso, gobane o mphile naga ya borwa; mphe didiba tsa metsi. Ka gona Kalebe a mo nea didiba tsa ka godimo le tsa ka tlase." 
Judges1:16 Bana ba Mokathe, ratswale wa Moše, ba rotogela motseng wa mepalema le bana ba Juda lesokang la Juda, leo le lego ka borwa bja Arade. Ba ya ba dula gare ga setshaba." 
Judges1:17 Juda a sepela le Simeone ngwanabo, ba bolaya Bakanana bao ba bego ba dula Shefathe, ba e fedisa ka mo go feletsego. Leina la motse woo e be e le Horma." 
Judges1:18 Juda ya thopa Gasa le lebopong la yona, Ashkalone le lebopong la yona, le Ekrone le lebopong la yona." 
Judges1:19 Jehofa o be a na le Juda; a raka badudi ba thabeng; eupsa ba be ba sa kgone go raka badudi ba moeding, ka gobane ba be ba na le dikoloi tsa tshipi." 
Judges1:20 Ka moka ba ba nea Heberone go Kalebe go etsa ge Moše a boletse. 
Judges1:21 Barwa ba Babenjamine ga se ba raka Bajebusi bao ba dulago Jerusalema; eupsa Bajebusi ba dula le bana ba Babenjamine Jerusalema go fihla le lehono. 
Judges1:22 Ba ntlo ya Josefa le bona ba rotogela Bethele, Jehofa a na le bona." 
Judges1:23 Ba lapa la Josefa ba ile ba romelwa go yo hlola Bethele. (Bjale leina la motse e be e le Luse). 
Judges1:24 Dihlodi tsa bona monna a etswa motseng, tsa re go yena: “Re a re bontshe tsela ya go tsena motseng le re tla go gaugela.”" 
Judges1:25 Ge a ba boditse tsela ya go tsena motseng, ba bolaya motse ka bogale bja tshosa; eupsa ba tlogela monna yoo le lapa la gagwe ka moka ba lokologile." 
Judges1:26 Monna yoo a ya nageng ya Bahethe a aga motse a o reela leina la Luse, e lego leina la wona go fihla le lehono." 
Judges1:27 Gape Manase o be a se na badudi ba Bethe-Sheane le metse ya yona, le Taanaka le metse ya yona, le badudi ba Doro le metse ya yona, le badudi ba Ibleame le metse ya yona, le badudi ba Megido le metse ya yona e sego go raka; eupsa Bakanana ba be ba tla dula nageng yeo." 
Judges1:28 Ya re ge Baiseraele e be e le matla, ba bea Bakanana lekgetho le ba se ba raka ka mo go feletsego." 
Judges1:29 Le Eferaime ga se a ka a raka Bakanana bao ba bego ba dula Gesere; eupsa Bakanana ba be ba dula gare ga bona kua Gesere. 
Judges1:30 Sebulone ga se a ka a raka badudi ba Kitrone le badudi ba Nahalole; eupsa Bakanana ba dula gare ga bona, ba mo hlankala." 
Judges1:31 Ashere ga se a ka a raka badudi ba Aggo, le badudi ba Sidone, Aglabe, Agsibe, Heleba, Apiki goba Rehobe." 
Judges1:32 Ba-Ashere ba be ba dula gare ga Bakanana bao e lego badudi ba naga yeo, ka gobane ga se ba ka ba ba raka." 
Judges1:33 Le gona Nafutali ga se a ka a raka badudi ba Betheshemeshe le badudi ba Bethanathe; eupsa o be a dula gare ga Bakanana, badudi ba naga; eupsa badudi ba Bethe-Shemeshe le Bethe-Shemeshe e be e le melapo ya bona." 
Judges1:34 Baamore ba gapeletsa mosemane yoo go tsena dithabeng, ka gobane ba be ba sa mo dumelele go theogela moeding." 
Judges1:35 Eupsa Baamore ba be ba tla dula Thabeng ya Heres, Ajalone le Shaalibime;" 
Judges1:36 Mollwane wa Baamore o be o tloga morotong wa Akrabime, go tloga leswikang le go ya godimo." 
Judges2:1 Morongwa wa Jehofa a rotoga a etswa Gilegala a ya Bogime a re: “Ka go rotogetse Egepeto, ka go tlisa nageng yeo ka e enetsego borakgolokhukhu ba gago; ka re: Nka se tsoge ka robile kgwerano ya ka le lena." 
Judges2:2 O se ka wa dira kgwerano le badudi ba naga ye; o phusotse disebeso tsa bona, eupsa ga se wa kwa lentsu la ka. Ka ka baka la’ng o dirile seo?" 
Judges2:3 Ka gona ka re: Nka se ba raka pele ga lena; eupsa e tla ba bjalo ka meetlwa ka mahlakoreng a gago, medimo ya yona e tla ba moreo go wena." 
Judges2:4 Ya re ge morongwa wa Jehofa a bolela mantsu a go bana ba Baiseraele ka moka, setshaba sa hlabosa lentsu sa lla." 
Judges2:5 Ba reela lefelo leo leina la Bogime, ba direla Jehofa dihlabelo moo." 
Judges2:6 Ge Jošua a tlosa setshaba, bana ba Baiseraele yo mongwe le yo mongwe a ya bohwa bja gagwe go yo tsea naga." 
Judges2:7 Setshaba sa hlankala Jehofa mehleng ka moka ya Jošua le matsatsi ka moka a bagolo bao ba phetsego go feta Jošua, bao ba bonego mediro ka moka e megolo ya Jehofa yeo a e diretsego Baiseraele." 
Judges2:8 Ka morago ga dilo tse, Jošua morwa wa Nuni, mohlanka wa Jehofa, a hwa a na le nywaga e lekgolo le lesome." 
Judges2:9 Ba mmoloka mollwaneng wa bohwa bja gagwe kua Timnathe, e lego thabeng ya Eferaime, ka leboa la mmoto wa Gaase." 
Judges2:10 Moloko woo ka moka wa kgobokatswa go borakgolokhukhu ba wona, le gwa tsoga moloko o mongwe ka morago ga bona, wo o bego o sa tsebe Jehofa le mediro yeo a e diretsego Baiseraele." 
Judges2:11 Bana ba Baiseraele ba dira bobe mahlong a Jehofa, ba hlankala Baali." 
Judges2:12 Ba tlogela Jehofa Modimo wa borakgolokhukhu ba bona, yo a ba ntshitsego nageng ya Egepeto, ba latela medimo e mengwe, ya medimo ya setshaba seo se ba dikologilego, ba khunama pele ga bona, ba galefisa Jehofa nyamile." 
Judges2:13 Ba lahla Jehofa le ba hlankala Baali le Ashorethe. 
Judges2:14 Bogale bja Jehofa bja tuka go Baiseraele, a ba rekisetsa diatleng tsa bahlakodi a ba rekisetsa diatleng tsa manaba a bona gohle, moo ba se sa kgonago go ema pele ga manaba a bona." 
Judges2:15 Gohle moo ba bego ba e-tswa gona, seatla sa Jehofa se be se ba lwantsha ka bobe, bjalo ka ge Jehofa a boletse le kamoo Jehofa a ikannego ka gona. Le ba be ba tshwenyegile kudu." 
Judges2:16 Eupsa Jehofa o ile a tsosa Baatlhodi bao ba ba pholositsego diatleng tsa bao ba ba thopilego. 
Judges2:17 Lega go le bjalo, ga se ba theetsa Baatlhodi ba bona, eupsa ba dira bootswa ka morago ga medimo e mengwe le ba e khunamela. Eupsa ga se ba ka ba e dira." 
Judges2:18 Ge Jehofa a ba tsosa Baatlhodi, Jehofa o be a na le moahlodi le a ba pholosa diatleng tsa manaba a bona matsatsing ka moka a moahlodi; gobane Jehofa o ile a ba kwela bohloko, a ba llela ka baka la bagateledi ba bona a ba galefela." 
Judges2:19 Eupsa ya re ge moahlodi a fedisitswe, ba boela morago, ba senya go feta borakgolokhukhu ba bona, ka go latela medimo e mengwe go e direla le go e khunamela. Ga se ba ka ba lahla ditiro tsa bona le go sepela ga bona ka manganga." 
Judges2:20 Bogale bja Jehofa bja tuka go Baiseraele; a re: Gobane setshaba se se robile kgwerano ya ka ye ka e laetsego borakgolokhukhu ba sona, le ga se sa theetsa lentsu la ka;" 
Judges2:21 Gape, go tloga bjale nka se raka motho ditshabeng tseo Jošua a di tlogetsego ge a hwile." 
Judges2:22 E le gore ba leka Baiseraele ge e ba ba tla boloka tsela ya Jehofa ya go sepela go yona, go etsa ge borakgolokhukhu ba bona ba e bolokile, goba go se bjalo." 
Judges2:23 Ka ka baka leo Jehofa a tlogetsego ditshaba tseo a sa di raka gatee-tee; o be a ka di gafela diatleng tsa Jošua. 
Judges3:1 Bjale tse ka ditshaba tseo Jehofa a di tlogetsego go leka Baiseraele ka tsona, go etsa ge Baiseraele e be e sa tsebe dintwa ka moka tsa Kanana;" 
Judges3:2 Go direga feela gore meloko ya bana ba Baiseraele e tsebe, go ba ruta ntwa, gaesita le bao ba bego ba se na tsebo ya yona pele;" 
Judges3:3 Bjale tse ka marena a mahlano a Bafilisitia le Bakanana ka moka le Basidonia le Bahethe bao ba bego ba dula Thabeng ya Libanone, go tloga Thabeng ya Baali-heremone go ya mojakong wa Hamathe." 
Judges3:4 Ba be ba swanetse go leka Baiseraele ka bobona, go bona ge e ba ba tla kwa ditaelo tsa Jehofa tseo a di filego borakgolokhukhu ba bona ka Moše." 
Judges3:5 Bana ba Baiseraele ba be ba dula gare ga Bakanana, Bahethe, Baamore, Baperese, Bahethe le Bajebuse." 
Judges3:6 Ba tsea barwedi ba bona gore e be basadi ba bona, ba neela barwedi ba bona go barwa ba bona, ba hlankala medimo ya bona." 
Judges3:7 Bana ba Baiseraele ba dira bobe mahlong a Jehofa, ba lebala Jehofa Modimo wa bona, ba hlankala Baali le dithokgwa." 
Judges3:8 Bogale bja Jehofa bja tuka go Baiseraele, a ba rekisetsa seatleng sa Kushanrishama kgosi ya Mesopotamia, bana ba Baiseraele ba hlankala Kushanrishathaime ka nywaga e seswai." 
Judges3:9 Ge bana ba Baiseraele ba llela Jehofa, Jehofa a tsosetsa bana ba Baiseraele mopholosi yo a ba hlakoditsego, e lego Othiniele morwa wa Kanase, ngwanabo Kalebe yo monyenyane." 
Judges3:10 Moya wa Jehofa wa mo wela, a ahlola Baiseraele; seatla sa gagwe sa fenya Kushane-Risathaime." 
Judges3:11 Naga ya khutsa mengwaga ye masomenne, Othiniele morwa wa Kanase a hwa." 
Judges3:12 Bana ba Baiseraele ba boela ba dira tse mpe mahlong a Jehofa; Jehofa a matlafatsa Egilone kgosi ya Moaba go Baiseraele, ka gobane ba dirile bobe mahlong a Jehofa." 
Judges3:13 A kgobokatsa bana ba Amoni le Baamaleka go yena, a ya a hlasela Baiseraele, a tsea motse wa mepalema." 
Judges3:14 Bana ba Baiseraele ba hlankala Egilone kgosi ya Moaba ka nywaga e lesomeseswai. 
Judges3:15 Eupsa ge bana ba Baiseraele ba thoma go bitsa Jehofa, Jehofa o ile a ba tsosetsa mopholosi, Ehudi morwa wa Gera wa Mobenyamini, monna wa letsogo le letshadi; ka yena yo bana ba Baiseraele ba ilego ba romela lekgetho go Egilone kgosi ya Moaba." 
Judges3:16 Eupsa Ehude a mo direla tshosa yeo e nago le mapheko a mabedi, ya botelele bja kubiti; a e kgomaretsa ka tlase ga kobo ya gagwe seropeng sa gagwe sa le letona." 
Judges3:17 A tlisa mpho yeo go Egilone kgosi ya Moaba, le Egilone a nonne kudu." 
Judges3:18 Ya re ge a feditse go neela mpho yeo, a roma batho bao ba rwelego mpho yeo." 
Judges3:19 Eupsa yena a retologa mafelong a go epa maswika a Gilegala, a re: “Ka na le thomo ya sephiri go wena, wena kgosi. Bohle bao ba bego ba eme pele ga gagwe ba tswa go yena." 
Judges3:20 Ehude a tla go yena; le a dula ka phaposing ya selemo, yeo a bego a e-na le yona. Ehude a re: “Ka na le molaetsa o tswago go Modimo go wena.” Ka moka a tsoga setulong sa gagwe." 
Judges3:21 Ehude a otlolla letsogo la gagwe la nngele, a tsea tshosa seropeng sa gagwe sa le letona, a e tsenya ka mpeng ya gagwe." 
Judges3:22 Morako le wona o tsena ka morago ga tshosa; mafura a ile a khupetsa legare, moo a bego a sa kgone go ntsha tshosa ka mpeng ya gagwe; ka moka tlhale e a tswa." 
Judges3:23 Ka moka Ehude a ema, a mo tswalela mejako ya phaposi ya go robala, a e notlela." 
Judges3:24 Ge a etswa, bahlanka ba gagwe ba tla; le ge ba bona mejako ya phaposi ya go thalela e tswaletswe, ba re: “Ruri, o khupetsa maoto a gagwe ka phaposing ya gagwe ya selemo.”" 
Judges3:25 Ba leta go fihlela ba hlabja ka dihlong; ba tsea lepokisi ba le bula, ba bona mong wa bona a robetse fase a hwile." 
Judges3:26 Ehude a phonyokga ge ba sa dutse ba le gona, a feta ka mosola wa mafelo a go epa maswika a tshabela Seirathe." 
Judges3:27 Ya re ge a fihla, a letsa phalafala thabeng ya Eferaime, bana ba Baiseraele ba theoga le yena ba etswa thabeng, yena a ba etelela pele." 
Judges3:28 A re go bona: “Ntatele, gobane Jehofa o gafetse manaba a lena a Bamoaba diatleng tsa lena.” Ba theoga ba mo latela, ba tshela noka ya Jorodane ba ya Moaba, ba se dumelele motho le ge e le ofe go tshela." 
Judges3:29 Ka nako yeo ba bolaya banna ba ka bago 10 000 ba Moaba, ka moka e le banna ba bagale; le ga go yo a phonyokgilego." 
Judges3:30 Ka ka baka leo Moaba e ilego ya buswa letsatsing leo ka tlase ga diatla tsa Baiseraele. Ka moka naga e ile ya khutsa ka nywaga e 80. 
Judges3:31 Ka morago ga gagwe go be go na le Shamgare morwa wa Anathe, yo a ilego a bolaya banna ba makgolo a tshelelago go Bafilisitia ka lesoba la kgomo. A pholosa Baiseraele." 
Judges4:1 Bana ba Baiseraele ba boela ba dira bobe mahlong a Jehofa, ge Ehude a hwile." 
Judges4:2 Jehofa a di rekisa seatleng sa Jabini kgosi ya Kanana, yo a bego a busa kua Hatsore; Molaodi wa gagwe e be e le Sisera, yo a bego a dula Harosethe ya Baditšhaba." 
Judges4:3 Bana ba Baiseraele ba thoma go bitsa Jehofa, ka gobane o be a na le dikoloi tsa tshipi tse makgolo a senyane; O ile a gatelela Baiseraele ka nywaga e 20." 
Judges4:4 Debora, moporofeta wa mosadi, mosadi wa Lapidothe, o be a etelela pele Baiseraele ka nako yeo." 
Judges4:5 O be a dula ka tlase ga sehlare sa mopalema sa Debora magareng ga Rama le Bethele tikologong ya dithaba ya Eferaime, le bana ba Baiseraele ba be ba rotogela go yena bakang sa kahlolo." 
Judges4:6 A roma a bitsa Baraka morwa wa Abinoama go tswa Kadeshe-naftali, a re go yena: “Na Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele ga se a go laela a re: ‘Rotogela thabeng ya Tabora, o tsee banna ba dikate tse lesome, le ba bana ba Nafutali, o na le wena? ba bangwe ba barwa ba Sebulone?" 
Judges4:7 Ka tla gogela Sisera molaodi wa madira a Jabini le dikoloi tsa gagwe tsa ntwa le lesaba la gagwe Nokang ya Kishone; ka tla mo gafela diatleng tsa gago. 
Judges4:8 Baraka a re go yena: “Ge o ka sepela le nna, gona ka tla ya; eupsa ge le sa sepele le nna, gona nka se ye.”" 
Judges4:9 A re: “Ruri ka tla sepela le wena; gobane Jehofa o tla rekisetsa Sisera seatleng sa mosadi. Debora a rotogela Kadeshe le Baraka. 
Judges4:10 Baraka a bitsa Sebulone le Nafutali Kadeshe. Banna ba sekate ba rotoga le yena maotong a gagwe, le Debora a rotoga le yena." 
Judges4:11 Bjale Hebere wa Mokanana, yo e bego e le wa bana ba Hobabe tatago Moše, o be a kgaogile le Bakanana, a hloma tente ya gagwe go fihla lebaleng la Tsanaime, yeo e lego kgauswi le Kadeshe." 
Judges4:12 Ba botsa Sisera gore Baraka morwa wa Abinoama o rotogetse thabeng ya Tabora. 
Judges4:13 Sisera a kgobokatsa dikoloi tsa gagwe ka moka tsa ntwa, e lego dikoloi tsa tshipi tse makgolo a senyane le batho ka moka bao ba bego ba na le yena, go tloga Harosethe ya ditshaba go fihla nokang ya Kishone." 
Judges4:14 Ka moka Debora a re go Baraka: “Ema! gobane le ka letsatsi leo ka lona Jehofa a gafetsego Sisera diatleng tsa gago. Na Jehofa ga se a go hlahla? Baraka a theoga thabeng ya Tabora, a latelwa ka banna ba dikate tse lesome." 
Judges4:15 Jehofa a thoma go lahlela Sisera le dikoloi tsa gagwe ka moka le madira a gagwe ka moka kgakanego ka bogale bja tshosa pele ga Baraka; mo e lego gore Sisera a fologa koloing ya gagwe a tshaba ka maoto. 
Judges4:16 Eupsa Baraka a rakadisa dikoloi tsa ntwa le madira go fihla Harosethe ya ditshaba. Le go be go se na motho yo a setsego. 
Judges4:17 Eupsa Sisera a tshabela ka maoto a ya tenteng ya Jaele mosadi wa Hebere wa Mokani, ka gobane go be go na le khutso magareng ga Jabini kgosi ya Hatsoro le ntlo ya Hebere wa Mokani." 
Judges4:18 Ka moka Jaele a tswa a yo gahlanetsa Sisera le a re go yena: “Tsena, mong wa ka, retologela go nna; O se ka wa boifa. Ge a mo tlisa ka tenteng, a mo khupetsa ka kobo." 
Judges4:19 A re go yena: “Mphe ka nwe, gobane ka nyorilwe.” Ka gona a bula lepotlelo la maswi, a mo tlogela a nwa le a le tswalela.”" 
Judges4:20 A re go yena: “Ema mojakong wa tente, le go tla direga ge motho a feta a re: “Na go na le monna moo?” gore o tle o re: Ee." 
Judges4:21 Ka morago ga moo mosadi wa Jaele Hebere a swere pego ya tente le hamore ka seatleng sa gagwe, a ya go yena ka boleta, a kgomaretsa sepekare fase, ka gobane o be a robetse e bile a lapile. Ka moka a hwa." 
Judges4:22 Ge Baraka a rakadisa Sisera, Jaele a tswa a mo gahlanetsa, a re go yena: “Tloo, ka tla go bontsha monna yo o mo nyakago.” Ge a tsena ka tenteng ya gagwe, a bona Sisera a robetse a hwile, a swere sepekare ka tempeleng ya gagwe." 
Judges4:23 Ka letsatsi leo Modimo a fenya Jabini kgosi ya Kanana pele ga bana ba Baiseraele. 
Judges4:24 Letsogo la bana ba Baiseraele la fenya Jabini kgosi ya Kanana go fihlela ba fedisa Jabini kgosi ya Kanana. 
Judges5:1 Ka moka Debora le Baraka morwa wa Abinoama ka letsatsi leo ba opela ba re: 
Judges5:2 Boka Jehofa ka baka la tefetso ya Baiseraele, ge setshaba se be se ithapela ka go rata." 
Judges5:3 Theeletsang, lena dikgosi! theeletsang, lena dikgosana! Ka tla opelela Morena; Ka rata go opelela Morena Modimo wa Baiseraele diPesalome." 
Judges5:4 Morena, ge o be o etswa Seire, ge o be o etswa nageng ya Edomo, lefatshe le ile la thothomela, magodimo a rotha, maru le ona a rothisa metsi." 
Judges5:5 Dithaba tsa tologa pele ga Jehofa, Sinai ya tologa pele ga Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele." 
Judges5:6 Mehleng ya Shamgare morwa wa Anathe, mehleng ya Jaele, ditsela tse dikgolo di be di se na motho le basepedi ba sepela ditseleng tsa ka thoko." 
Judges5:7 Badudi ba motse ba ema, Baiseraele ya ema, go fihlela nna Debora ka tsoga, ka tsoga bjalo ka mma kua Baiseraele." 
Judges5:8 Ba ikgethile medimo e mefsa; ntwa ya phulega dikgorong; Na go be go e-na le kotse goba tshosa yeo e bego e tla bonwa gare ga ba 40 000 kua Baiseraele? 
Judges5:9 Pelo ya ka e lebane le babusi ba Baiseraele bao ba itsebisitsego gare ga setshaba. Bokang Morena. 
Judges5:10 Bolela se, lena bao ba nametsego disele tse tshweu, lena bao ba dulago mabaleng, lena bao ba sepelago tseleng." 
Judges5:11 Bao ba phonyokgilego lesata la babetsi ba mesebe didibeng tsa metsi moo ba tla kwa ditiro tsa go loka tsa Jehofa, ditiro tsa go loka tseo a di direlago badudi ba metse ya gagwe kua Baiseraele; setshaba sa Jehofa se tla theogela dikgorong." 
Judges5:12 Phafoga, phafoga, Debora, phafoga, opela; Tsoga, Baraka, o tsee morwa wa Abinoama bothopsa." 
Judges5:13 Ba bangwe ka moka a ba dira dikgosana gare ga ditshaba; Jehofa o ntirile mmusi wa bagale. 
Judges5:14 Ba hloma medu Eferaime, ba lwa le Baamaleka; le ka morago ga gago, wena Babenjamine, gare ga setshaba sa gago; go tswa go Magire go be go na le dikgosana, le go tswa go Sebulone ka bao ba swarago lesela la mongwadi." 
Judges5:15 Dikgosana tsa Isakara di be di na le Debora; ee, Isakara le Baraka; o ile a romelwa ka maoto moeding. Dihlopheng tsa Rubeni go be go na le kgopolo ye kgolo ya pelo." 
Judges5:16 Ka ka baka la’ng o ile wa dula masakang a mohlape gore o kwe sello sa mohlape? Go ile gwa tsongwa kudu dipelo tsa meloko ya Rubeni. 
Judges5:17 Gileade e be e le ka mosola wa Noka ya Jorodane, le ka ka baka la’ng Dani a ile a dula ka dikapeng? Ashere a dula a sa sisinyege sekhutlong sa lewatle, a dula ditenteng tsa gagwe." 
Judges5:18 Sebulone le Nafutali e be e le banna bao ba beilego maphelo a bona kotsing lefelong le le phagamego. 
Judges5:19 Ka moka dikgosi tsa lwa le bona, ka morago ga moo dikgosi tsa Kanana tsa lwa, kua Taanaka kgauswi le metsi a Megido; ga se ba thopa tshelete le ge e le efe." 
Judges5:20 Ba lwa ba le legodimong; dinaledi tseo di bego di dikologa dikoloi tsa tsona di ile tsa lwa le Sisera. 
Judges5:21 Noka ya Kishone ya ba gogola, noka ya bogologolo ya Kishone. O moya wa ka, o fentswe." 
Judges5:22 Ditlhako tsa dipere tsa robega ka lebelo, le tse matla tsa lahlelwa fase." 
Judges5:23 Rogang Merotse, o re’alo morongwa wa Jehofa, rogang badudi ba yona ka matla; gobane ga se ba thusa Morena, Morena o ile a thusa bagale." 
Judges5:24 Jaele o tla tumiswa gare ga basadi, mosadi wa Hebere wa Mokani o tla segofatswa gare ga basadi ka tenteng." 
Judges5:25 A kgopela metsi, a mo fa maswi; a tlisa botoro ka sekotlelong se se bose." 
Judges5:26 A bea seatla sa gagwe sepekare le a bea seatla sa gagwe sa le letona godimo ga molomo wa mosomi; a otla Sisera ka lepara, a mo kgaola hlogo ka go betha, a mo phunya direthe." 
Judges5:27 Mosadi a khunama maotong a gagwe, a robala; a khunama maotong a gagwe a wa; moo a ilego a inama, o ile a wa a hwile." 
Judges5:28 Mmago Sisera a lebelela ka lefatshetere le a goeletsa a re: “Ka ka baka la’ng koloi ya gagwe e e-tla nako e telele gakaakaa? ka ka lebaka la eng dikoloi tsa gagwe di diegile? 
Judges5:29 Basadi ba gagwe ba bohlale ba mo araba. 
Judges5:30 Na ga se ba akgofela? ga se ba arola dithebola; go monna yo mongwe le yo mongwe ngwanenyana goba ba babedi; ka gobane Sisera ka seaparo sa mebala e fapa-fapanego, seaparo se se logeletswego sa mebala ka moka, se se logilwego ka mahlakoreng ka bobedi le melaleng ya bagolegwa?"
