Judges5:31 Anka manaba a gago ka moka a fediswe, Jehofa, eupsa bao ba go ratago a ba tshwane le letsatsi ge le tswela ka ntle ka matla a lona. Le lefatshe la khutsa mengwaga ye masomenne." 
Judges6:1 Bana ba Baiseraele ba dira tse mpe mahlong a Jehofa, Jehofa a ba gafela diatleng tsa Midiane ka nywaga e supago." 
Judges6:2 Seatla sa Midiane sa fenya Baiseraele, ka baka la Midiane bana ba Baiseraele ba ba dira mesasa yeo e lego dithabeng le magaga le dibo." 
Judges6:3 Ya re ge Baiseraele e bjetse, Bamidiane le Baamaleka le bana ba bohlabela ba rotoga;" 
Judges6:4 Ba hloma mesasa kgahlanong le bona, ba fedisa dimela tsa lefatshe go fihlela o fihla Gasa, ba sa tlogele Baiseraele dijo, le ge e le dinku goba kgomo goba pokolo." 
Judges6:5 Gobane ba be ba rotoga ka mehlape ya bona le ditente tsa bona, ba tla bjalo ka ditsie ka bontsi; gobane bona le dikamela tsa bona ba be ba sa balege, le ba tsena go yo senya naga." 
Judges6:6 Baiseraele ya diila kudu ka baka la Midiane; bana ba Baiseraele ba bitsa Jehofa. 
Judges6:7 Ge bana ba Baiseraele ba goeletsa Jehofa ka baka la Midiane. 
Judges6:8 Jehofa a roma moporofeta go Baiseraele, a re go bona: “Se ka seo Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele a se bolelago: Ka le ntshitse Egepeto, ntlong ya bokgoba;" 
Judges6:9 Ka le hlakodisa diatleng tsa BaEgepeto le diatleng tsa bohle bao ba le gatelelago, ka ba raka pele ga lena, ka le nea naga ya bona;" 
Judges6:10 Ka re go lena: Ka nna Jehofa Modimo wa lena; le se boife medimo ya Baamore bao le dulago nageng ya bona, eupsa ga se la kwa lentsu la ka." 
Judges6:11 Morongwa wa Jehofa a tla a dula ka tlase ga moeika wo o bego o le kua Ofura, e lego wa Joase wa Momoaba; morwa wa gagwe Gideone o be a photha korong segatelong sa morara gore a e utele Bamidiane." 
Judges6:12 Morongwa wa Jehofa a iponagatsa go yena, a re go yena: “Jehofa o na le wena, wena mogale wa sebete.”" 
Judges6:13 Gideone a re go yena: “Morena wa ka, ge e ba Jehofa a na le rena, gona ka ka baka la’ng tse ka moka di re wetse? mehlolo ya gagwe ka moka yeo borakgolokhukhu ba rena ba re boditsego ka yona e kae, ba re: “Na Jehofa ga se a re rotosa Egepeto?” eupsa bjale Jehofa o re lahlile, a re gafela diatleng tsa Bamidiane." 
Judges6:14 Jehofa a mo lebelela a re: “Sepela ka matla a gago, o pholose Baiseraele diatleng tsa Bamidiane.” Na ga se ka go roma?" 
Judges6:15 A re go yena: “Morena, ka tla pholosa Baiseraele ka eng? bona, lapa la ka le diila kua Manase, le nna ka yo monyenyane lapeng la tate." 
Judges6:16 Jehofa a re go yena: “Ruri ka tla ba le wena, le o tla bolaya Bamidiane bjalo ka motho o tee.”" 
Judges6:17 A re go yena: “Ge bjale ka hweditse kgaugelo mahlong a gago, mphe pontsho ya gore o tla bolela le nna.”" 
Judges6:18 O se ka wa tloga mo go fihlela ka etla go wena ka tlisa mpho ya ka ka e bea pele ga gago. A re: Ka tla leta go fihlela o boa. 
Judges6:19 Gideone a tsena, a lokisetsa potsanyane le efa ya dinkgwa tse di sa omelwago. A tsenya nama ka mokotleng, a tsenya moro ka pitseng, a e tlisa ka fase ga sehlare sa turpentine, a e tlisa." 
Judges6:20 Morongwa wa Modimo a re go yena: “Tsea nama le dinkgwa tse di sa omelwago, o di bee godimo ga leswika le, o tsholle moro.” Le o dirile sona seo." 
Judges6:21 Ka moka morongwa wa Jehofa a ntsha ntlha ya lepara ka seatleng sa gagwe, a kgwatha nama le dinkgwa tse di sa omelwago. Mollo wa tswa leswikang, wa fisa nama le senkgwa se se sa omelwago. Ka moka Morongwa wa Morena a tloga pele ga gagwe." 
Judges6:22 Ge Gideone a lemoga gore ka morongwa wa Jehofa, Gideone o ile a re: “Go madi, Mmusi Morena Jehofa! gobane ka bone morongwa wa Jehofa a lebane ka difahlego." 
Judges6:23 Jehofa a re go yena: “Khutso a e be go wena; o se ka wa boifa: o ka se hwe. 
Judges6:24 Ka moka Gideone a agela Jehofa sebeso moo, a e bitsa Jehofashalomo, go fihla le lehono e sa dutse e le Ofura wa Baabiesre. Gaesita le go fihla le lehono e sa le Ofura wa Babiesre." 
Judges6:25 Bosegong bjoo Jehofa a re go yena: “Tsea poo ya tatago, poo ya bobedi ya nywaga e supago, o phusole sebeso ya Baali yeo tatago a nago le yona.”" 
Judges6:26 O agele Jehofa Modimo wa gago sebeso godimo ga leswika le lefelong leo o tlago go le hloma godimo ga lona, le o tsee poo ya bobedi le o dire sehlabelo sa go fiswa godimo ga dikota tsa sethokgwa seo o se remago." 
Judges6:27 Ka gona Gideone a tsea banna ba lesome ba bahlanka ba gagwe le a dira kamoo Jehofa a mmoditsego ka gona; le ka ge a be a boifa ntlo ya tatagwe le banna ba motse, moo a bego a sa kgone go dira bjalo mosegare, o ile a dira bjalo. Ka bosego." 
Judges6:28 Ge banna ba motse ba tsoga e sa le ka pela mesong, ka ka baka la’ng, moo sebeso ya Baali e be e fedisitswe, le sehlare seo se bego se le kgauswi le yona se remilwe, le poo ya bobedi e be e neetswe sebesong yeo e be e agilwe." 
Judges6:29 Ba thoma go botsana: “Ka mang yo a dirilego selo se?” Ge ba botsisa, ba botsisa, ba re: “Gideone morwa wa Joashe o dirile taba ye.”" 
Judges6:30 Ka moka banna ba motse ba re go Joase: “Ntsha morwa wa gago a hwe. E be e abetse sethokgwa seo se bego se le gona. 
Judges6:31 Joase a re go bohle bao ba bego ba eme pele ga gagwe: “Na le tla lopa Baali?” o tla mo pholosa? mang le mang yo a ratago go mo rapelela, a a bolawe gosasa; ge e ba e le modimo, a a ikgopele, ka gobane o lahlile sebeso ya gagwe." 
Judges6:32 Ka ka baka leo letsatsing leo a ilego a bitsa Jeruba-Baali a re: “Anka Baali a mo lopele, gobane o lahlile sebeso ya gagwe.”" 
Judges6:33 Ka moka Bamidiane ka moka le Baamaleka le bana ba bohlabela ba kgobokana, ba tshela, ba hloma mesasa moeding wa Jeseriele." 
Judges6:34 Eupsa moya wa Jehofa wa tla Gideone, a letsa phalafala; Abiesere a kgobokana ka morago ga gagwe." 
Judges6:35 A roma baromiwa gohle Manase; a roma baromiwa go Ashere, le Sebulone, le Nafutali; ba rotogela go ba gahlanetsa." 
Judges6:36 Gideone a re go Modimo: “Ge o ka pholosa Baiseraele ka seatla sa ka, bjalo ka ge o boletse." 
Judges6:37 Bonang, ka tla bea boya mo lefatsheng; ge lesoba le le meriring fela le le omile mobung ka moka ka ntle, gona ka tla tseba gore o tla lopolla Baiseraele ka seatla sa ka, go etsa ge o holofeditse." 
Judges6:38 Seo ga se sa ba bjalo, ka gobane letsatsing le le latelago o ile a tsoga pele go hlaba, a kgobokatsa boya bjoo le a ina boya bjoo ka moleteng wo o bego o tletse metsi." 
Judges6:39 Gideone a re go Modimo: “A bogale bja gago bo se ka bo nkgahla, le ka tla bolela gatee. E re ka e leka, eupsa mo nakong ye ka boya; bjale, e be e omile go fihla boya, le phoka ka moka e be e le fase." 
Judges6:40 Modimo a dira bjalo bosegong bjoo, ka gobane leratadima le be le omile lefatsheng ka moka le phoka." 
Judges7:1 Ka moka Jerubaale, yo e lego Gideone, a tsoga e sa le ka pela le batho ka moka bao ba bego ba na le yena, ba ema kgauswi le sediba sa Harode. Mesasa ya Bamidiane e be e le ka leboa la bona mmotong wa More moeding." 
Judges7:2 Jehofa a re go Gideone: “Batho bao ba nago le wena ka ba bantsi kudu gore nka gafela Bamidiane diatleng tsa bona, e le gore Baiseraele e se ka ya ikgantsha ka nna, ya re: ‘Seatla sa ka se mpholositse." 
Judges7:3 Bjale eya, o goeletse ditsebeng tsa setshaba, o re: Mang le mang yo a boifago le go tshoga, a a boele a tloge e sa le ka pela thabeng ya Gileada. Ka moka ba boa gare ga batho ba 22 000; go setse ba dikate tse lesome." 
Judges7:4 Jehofa a re go Gideone: “Setshaba se sa dutse se le gona kudu; Theogela metsing, le ka tla go leka fao. Ka le botsa mang le mang, a se ka a tloga go lena." 
Judges7:5 Ka gona a theosetsa setshaba metsing, Jehofa a re go Gideone: “Motho yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a tshosago metsi ka leleme la gagwe go etsa mpsa, o mo beye a nnosi; go bjalo le ka yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a khunamago gore a nwe." 
Judges7:6 Palo ya bao ba ilego ba latswa goba ba bea diatla melomong ya bona e be e le banna ba makgolo a mararo; eupsa batho ba bangwe ba khunama ba nwa. 
Judges7:7 Jehofa a re go Gideone: “Ka tla go pholosa le basadi ba makgolo a mararo ka wena, ka gafela Bamidiane diatleng tsa gago; le ditshaba tse dingwe ka moka a yo mongwe le yo mongwe a ye lefelong la gagwe." 
Judges7:8 Ka gona setshaba sa tsea dijo tsa sona le diphalafala ka diatleng tsa sona, le a re go Baiseraele ka moka: “Yo mongwe le yo mongwe a ye tenteng ya gagwe, o yo disa banna bao ba makgolo a mararo; madira a Midiane a be a le ka tlase ga gagwe moeding." 
Judges7:9 Bosegong bjoo Jehofa a re go yena: “Ema, theogela ntweng; gobane ka e gafetse seatleng sa gago." 
Judges7:10 Eupsa ge e ba o tshaba go theoga, theogela le mohlanka wa gago Fura madireng." 
Judges7:11 O theeletsa seo ba se bolelago; ka morago diatla tsa gago di tla matlafatswa gore di theogele sebo. Ka gona a theoga le Fura mohlanka wa gagwe kgauswi le banna bao ba itlhamilego. 
Judges7:12 Bamidiane le Baamaleka le bana ka moka ba bohlabela ba rapaletse moeding bjalo ka ditsie; dikamela tsa bona e be e le tse dintsi go etsa santa lebopong la lewatle. 
Judges7:13 Ge Gideone a fihla, a bona monna a botsa modirisani wa gagwe toro, le a re: “Bona! moo e ilego ya wa, ya e phekgola, moo tente e ilego ya robala ka lehlakoreng la yona." 
Judges7:14 Motho wa gabo a araba a re: “Se ga se selo se sengwe ge e se tshosa ya Gideone morwa wa Joashe, monna wa Baiseraele;" 
Judges7:15 Ge Gideone a ekwa toro yeo le tlhathollo ya yona, a khunama le a boela madireng a Baiseraele a re: “Ema! gobane Jehofa o gafetse madira a Midiane seatleng sa gago." 
Judges7:16 A arola banna bao ba makgolo a mararo ka dihlopha tse tharo, a bea phalafala ka seatleng sa yo mongwe le yo mongwe, le dipitsana tse di se nago selo, le mabone ka gare ga dipitsana." 
Judges7:17 A re go bona: “Ntebeleleng, le dire se se swanago. Mme, bona, ge ka etswa mesaseng, ka dirile go ya ka tsohle tse ka di dirago." 
Judges7:18 Ge ka letsa phalafala, nna le bohle bao ba nago le nna, gona le letsa diphalafala ka mahlakoreng ka moka a mesasa ka moka, le re: Kosa ya Jehofa le kosa ya Gideone;" 
Judges7:19 Gideone le banna ba lekgolo bao ba bego ba na le yena, ba tla ka ntle ga mesasa mathomong a mohlapetsi wa gare; ba be ba sa tswa go bea mohlapetsi, le ba letsa dinaka tsa kgapa, ba roba dikota tse di bego di le ka diatleng tsa bona." 
Judges7:20 Ba bararo ba letsa diphalafala, ba roba dipitsana, ba swere mabone ka diatleng tsa bona tsa le letshadi, le diphalafala ka diatleng tsa bona tsa le letona gore ba tle di letsa. Ba goeletsa ba re: “Tshosa ya Jehofa le ya Gideone.”" 
Judges7:21 Yo mongwe le yo mongwe a ema lefelong la gagwe go dikologa mesasa; 
Judges7:22 Makgolo a mararo a otla dinaka tsa dikgapa, Jehofa a bea tshosa ya yo mongwe le yo mongwe kgahlanong le magagabo le madira ka moka;" 
Judges7:23 Banna ba Baiseraele ba kgobokane go tswa go Nafutali le motse wa Ashere le wa Manase ka moka, ba rakadisa Bamidiane." 
Judges7:24 Gideone a roma baromiwa dithabeng ka moka tsa Eferaime, ba re: “Theogelang go lwa le Midiane, le tsee metsi pele ga bona go fihla Bethebara le Jorodane.” Banna ka moka ba Eferaime ba kgobokana, ba gogela metsi go fihla Bethebara le Jorodane." 
Judges7:25 Ba tsea dikgosana tse pedi tsa Bamidiane, e lego Orebe le Tsebe; ba bolaya Orebe godimo ga leswika la Orebe, Sebe a ba bolaya segatelong sa morara sa Sebe, a rakadisa Midiane, a tlisa dihlogo tsa Orebe le Shebe Gideone ka mosola wa Noka ya Jorodane." 
Judges8:1 Banna ba Eferaime ba re go yena: “Ka ka baka la’ng o re hlankale, wa se re bitsa, mola o be o eya go lwa le Bamidiane?” Le ba ile ba lwa le yena kudu." 
Judges8:2 A re go bona: “Ka eng seo bjale ka se dirilego ge ka bapetswa le lena? Na dithakangwaga tsa Eferaime di be di le kaone go feta morara wa Abisere? 
Judges8:3 Modimo o gafetse dikgosana tsa Midiane, Orebe le Tsebe diatleng tsa lena; le nka dira eng ge ka bapetswa le wena? Ka moka pefelo ya bona ya kokobela ge a bolela seo." 
Judges8:4 Gideone a fihla noka ya Jorodane, a tshela, yena le banna ba makgolo a mararo bao ba bego ba na le yena, ba lapa, eupsa ba ba rakadisa." 
Judges8:5 A re go banna ba Sukothe: “Ka kgopela gore le fe batho bao ba ntatelago dinkgwa; gobane ba lapile, le ka rakadisa Sheba le Tsalmuna, dikgosi tsa Midiane." 
Judges8:6 Dikgosana tsa Sukothe tsa re: “Na diatla tsa Seba le Tsalmuna bjale di ka seatleng sa gago, gore re nee madira a gago senkgwa?”" 
Judges8:7 Gideone a re: “Ka gona ge Jehofa a gafetse Sheba le Tsalmuna diatleng tsa ka, ka tla gagola nama ya lena ka meetlwa ya lesoka le ka meetlwa.”" 
Judges8:8 A rotogela Penuwele go tloga moo, a bolela le bona ka mo go swanago, banna ba Penuel ba mo araba go etsa ge banna ba Sukothe ba mo arabile." 
Judges8:9 A bolela le banna ba Penele a re: “Ge ka boa ka khutso, ka tla phusola tora ye.”" 
Judges8:10 Tseba le Tsalamuna ba be ba le Karkore, le madira a bona, banna ba ka bago dikate tse lesomehlano, ka moka ba setsego go madira ka moka a bana ba Bohlabela. Gobane go ile gwa wa banna ba 120 000 bao ba ilego ba ntsha tshosa." 
Judges8:11 Gideone a rotoga ka tsela ya bao ba dulago ditente ka bohlabela bja Noba le Jogbeha, a bolaya madira, ka gobane madira a be a sireletsegile." 
Judges8:12 Ge Sheba le Tsalmuna ba tshaba, a ba rakadisa, a tsea dikgosi tse pedi tsa Midiane, e lego Sheba le Tsalmuna, a sitisa naga ka moka." 
Judges8:13 Gideone morwa wa Joase a boa ntweng pele letsatsi le hlaba. 
Judges8:14 A swara lesogana la banna ba Sukothe, a rerisana le lona; A mo hlalosetsa bakgomana ba Sukothe le bagolo ba yona, banna ba masome a supago." 
Judges8:15 A tla go banna ba Sukothe, a re: “Bonang Seba le Tsalmuna, bao le nkgobositsego ka bona, la re: ‘Na diatla tsa Seba le Tsalmuna bjale di ka seatleng sa lena gore re le nee tsona?’ banna ba.” O lapisitswe ka bogobe?" 
Judges8:16 A tsea bagolo ba motse, le meetlwa ya lesokang le dimela, a ruta banna ba Sukothe le bona." 
Judges8:17 A betha tora ya Penele, a bolaya banna ba motse." 
Judges8:18 Ka moka a re go Tseba le Tsalamuna: “Ka banna bafe bao le ba bolailego kua Tabora? Ba araba ka gore: Go swana le wena, ba be ba le bjalo; yo mongwe le yo mongwe o be a swana le barwa ba kgosi." 
Judges8:19 A re: “E be e le bana beso, barwa ba mma; bjalo ka ge Jehofa a phela, ge nkabe o ba hlakodisitse, nkabe ka sa go bolaya." 
Judges8:20 A re go Jethere leitsibulo la gagwe: “Tsoga o ba bolaye.” Eupsa lesogana leo ga se la ntsha tshosa ya lona, gobane le be le boifa ka gobane e be e sa le mofsa." 
Judges8:21 Ka moka Seba le Tsalmuna ba re: “Ema o re wele, gobane go etsa ge motho a le bjalo, matla a gagwe a bjalo.” Gideone a tsoga, a bolaya Sheba le Tsalmuna, a tsea mekgabiso yeo e bego e le melaleng ya dikamela tsa bona." 
Judges8:22 Ka moka banna ba Baiseraele ba re go Gideone: “Re buse, wena le morwa wa gago le morwa wa gago, ka gobane o re hlakodisitse diatleng tsa Midiane.”" 
Judges8:23 Gideone a re go bona: “Nna nka se le buse, le morwa wa ka a ka se le buse. Jehofa o tla go busa." 
Judges8:24 Gideone a re go bona: “Ka rata kgopelo go lena, gore yo mongwe le yo mongwe a mphe masale a diphoofolo tsa gagwe.” (Gobane ba be ba na le masale a gauta, ka gobane e be e le Baismaele)." 
Judges8:25 Ba araba ba re: “Re tla di fa ka go rata.” Ka moka ba phurolla lesela le yo mongwe le yo mongwe a lahlela dipalamonwana tsa dithebola ka gare ga lona. 
Judges8:26 Boima bja masale a gauta ao a a kgopetsego e be e le disekale tse 1 700 tsa gauta; ntle le mekgabiso le diaparo le diaparo tse khubedu tse di bego di le godimo ga dikgosi tsa Midiane le dikatane tseo di bego di le melaleng ya dikamela tsa tsona. 
Judges8:27 Gideone a dira lesela ka lona, a le bea motseng wa gabo, kua Ofura, Baiseraele ka moka ya ya moo e le mogweba-ka-mmele." 
Judges8:28 Ka gona Midiane a fenywa pele ga bana ba Baiseraele, ba se sa emisa dihlogo tsa bona. Ka moka naga ya khutsa ka nywaga e 40 mehleng ya Gideone." 
Judges8:29 Jerubaale morwa wa Joase a ya a dula ntlong ya gagwe. 
Judges8:30 Gideone a ba le barwa ba masome a masome a masome a mmele ba belegwe, ka gobane o be a na le basadi ba bantsi." 
Judges8:31 Le mosadi wa gagwe wa serethe yo a bego a le Šegeme, o ile a mo belega morwa yo a mo reetsego leina la Abimeleka." 
Judges8:32 Gideone morwa wa Joashe a hwa a tsofetse, a bolokwa lebitleng la Joashe tatagwe, kua Ofura ya Baabiesere." 
Judges8:33 Gateetee ge Gideone a hwile, bana ba Baiseraele ba boela morago, ba dira bootswa ba sala Baali, ba dira Baaleberithe modimo wa bona." 
Judges8:34 Bana ba Baiseraele ga se ba gopola Jehofa Modimo wa bona yo a ba hlakodisitsego diatleng tsa manaba a bona ka moka ka mahlakoreng ka moka. 
Judges8:35 Le gona ga se ba ka ba bontsha botho go ba ntlo ya Jerubaali, e lego Gideone, go ya ka botho ka moka bjo a bo bontshitsego Baiseraele." 
Judges9:1 Abimeleka morwa wa Jerubaale a ya Šegeme go bana babo mmagwe, a bolela le bona le ba ntlo ka moka ya tatagwe a re:" 
Judges9:2 “Ka gona, bolela ka go theeletsa banna ka moka ba Šegeme, o re: Ka efe e kaone go lena, gore barwa ka moka ba masometshela ba Jerubaali ba le buse, goba o tee a le buse? le o gopole gore ka marapo a gago le nama ya gago." 
Judges9:3 Bana ba mmagwe ba bolela mantsu a ka moka ka yena ditsebeng tsa banna ka moka ba Šegeme. Gobane ba be ba re: “Ka ngwaneso.” 
Judges9:4 Ba mo nea ditsekana tsa silifera tse masomeseswai ka ntlong ya Baali-berithe, moo Abimeleka a ilego a thwala batho ba lefeela le ba bofefo, bao ba ilego ba mo latela." 
Judges9:5 A ya ntlong ya tatagwe kua Ofura, a bolaya bana babo barwa ba Jerubaali, e lego batho ba masometshela-tee godimo ga leswika le tee. Eupsa Jothame morwa yo monyenyane wa Jerubaali a sala; gobane o be a iphihla." 
Judges9:6 Banna ka moka ba Šegeme ba kgobokana le ba ntlo ka moka ya Milo, ba ya, ba bea Abimeleka kgosi, lebaleng la kokwane yeo e bego e le Šegeme." 
Judges9:7 Ge ba botsa Jothame seo, a ya a ema godimo ga Thaba ya Gerisima, a hlabosa lentsu a goeletsa a re go bona: ‘Theetsang, lena banna ba Šegeme, gore Modimo a le theetse." 
Judges9:8 Kgalekgale dihlare di be di etswa go tlo tlotsa kgosi ya tsona; ba re go sehlare sa mohlware: “Re a busa.” 
Judges9:9 Eupsa sehlare sa mohlware sa re go bona: “Na ka tlogele mafura a ka ao ba tumisago Modimo le motho ka ona, ka be molemi wa merara?”" 
Judges9:10 Ka moka dihlare tsa re go mogo: “Etla o re buse.” 
Judges9:11 Eupsa sehlare sa mogo sa re go bona: “Na ka swanetse go lahla bose bja ka le dienywa tsa ka tse dibotse, ka ye go phagamiswa godimo ga dihlare?" 
Judges9:12 Ka moka dihlare tsa re go morara: “Etla o re buse.” 
Judges9:13 Morara wa re go bona: “Na ka swanetse go tlogela beine ya ka yeo e thabisago Modimo le motho, ka ye go phagamiswa godimo ga dihlare?" 
Judges9:14 Ka moka dihlare ka moka tsa re go mootlwa: “Etla o re buse.” 
Judges9:15 Sehlare sa re go dihlare: “Ge e ba ruri le ka nkgethela gore ka be kgosi ya lena, gona le tla bota moriti wa ka;" 
Judges9:16 Ge e ba o dirile Abimeleka kgosi ka thereso le ka thereso, wa dira gabotse le Jerubaale le ba ntlo ya gagwe, wa mo dira ka mo go dirilwego ka diatla tsa gagwe;" 
Judges9:17 (Gobane tate o le lwetse, a okatsa ka bophelo bja gagwe, a go hlakodisa diatleng tsa Midiane." 
Judges9:18 Le ntlo ya tate, le barwa ba gagwe, banna ba masomeseswai, bao ba bolailwego godimo ga leswika le tee, ba dirile Abimeleka, morwa wa serethe sa gagwe, kgosi ya banna ba Šegeme; ngwana wa gago;)" 
Judges9:19 Ge e ba o dirile ka nnete le ka potego le Jerubaali le lapa la gagwe lehono, gona thabeleng Abimeleka, le yena a thabe ka wena." 
Judges9:20 Eupsa ge e ba go se bjalo, anka mollo o tswe Abimeleka, o fise banna ba Šegeme le ba ntlo ya Milo. Mollo wa tswa go banna ba Šegeme le ba ntlong ya Milo, wa fisa Abimeleka." 
Judges9:21 Jothame a tshaba, a tshaba, a ya Bere, a dula moo, ka baka la go boifa Abimeleka ngwanabo." 
Judges9:22 Ge Abimeleka a busitse Baiseraele ka nywaga e meraro. 
Judges9:23 Modimo a roma moya o mobe magareng ga Abimeleka le banna ba Šegeme; banna ba Šegeme ba dira Abimeleka ka boradia. 
Judges9:24 Gore sehlogo seo se dirilwego go barwa ba Jerubi-baali ba masomesupa, madi a bona a wele Abimeleka ngwanabo bona yo a ba bolailego. Le mabapi le banna ba Šegeme bao ba mo thusitsego go bolaya bana babo." 
Judges9:25 Banna ba Šegeme ba mo lalela ditlhoreng tsa dithaba, ba hula bohle bao ba bego ba sepela ka tsela yeo." 
Judges9:26 Gaale morwa wa Ebede a tla le bana babo, a tshelela Šegeme." 
Judges9:27 Ba ya tshemong, ba kgobokatsa dirapa tsa bona tsa merara, ba gatakala morara, ba thaba, ba tsena ntlong ya modimo wa bona, ba ja, ba nwa, ba roga Abimeleka." 
Judges9:28 Ge a re’alo Gaale morwa wa Ebede a re: “Abimeleka ka mang, le Šegeme ka mang yo re swanetsego go mo hlankala? Na ga se morwa wa Jerubaali? le Sebule mohlanka wa gagwe? hlankala banna ba Hamoro tatago Šegeme, gobane re swanetse go mo direla eng?" 
Judges9:29 Ge nkabe Modimo a ka gafela naga ye seatleng sa ka! ka tlosa Abimeleka. Ka moka a re go Abimeleka: “Okatsa madira a gago o tswe. 
Judges9:30 Ge Sebule mmusi wa motse a ekwa mantsu a Gaele morwa wa Ebede, a tuka bogale." 
Judges9:31 A roma baromiwa go Abimeleka ka sephiring, a re: “Bona, Gaale morwa wa Ebede le bana babo ba tlile Šegeme; ba tiisa motse go wona." 
Judges9:32 Bjale wena le setshaba seo se nago le wena, tsoga bosego, le robale, le dise naga." 
Judges9:33 Mesong, ge letsatsi le hlaba, tsoga e sa le ka pela o phatsa motse; le, bona, ge yena le banna bao ba nago le yena ba etswa go lwa le wena, gona o ka swaragana le bona ka mehla ka mo o ka hwetsago sebaka." 
Judges9:34 Abimeleka a tsoga le batho ka moka bao ba bego ba na le yena bosego, ba lalela Šegeme ka dihlopha tse nne." 
Judges9:35 Gaale morwa wa Ebede a tswa a ema mojakong wa kgoro. 
Judges9:36 Ge Gaale a bona setshaba, a re go Sebule: “Bona, batho ba etswa ditlhoreng tsa dithaba.” Sebule a re go yena: “O bona moriti wa dithaba bjalo ka ge eka ka batho.”" 
Judges9:37 Gaele a bolela gape a re: “Bonang batho ba theoga gare ga naga, le sehlopha se sengwe se tla seleteng sa Meoneme." 
Judges9:38 Ka moka Sebule a re go yena: “Bjale o kae molomo wa gago wo o boletsego ka wona gore: ‘Abimeleka ka mang, gore re mo hlankale? Na e be e se batho bao o bego o ba nyatsa? Hle, tswela ka ntle bjale le o ba lwe." 
Judges9:39 Gaale a tswa pele ga banna ba Šegeme, a lwa le Abimeleka." 
Judges9:40 Abimeleka a mo kitimisa, a tshaba pele ga gagwe;" 
Judges9:41 Abimeleka a dula Arume, le Sebule a raka Gaale le bana babo, moo ba se ka ba dula Šegeme." 
Judges9:42 Ka letsatsi le le latelago, setshaba sa tswa nageng. Ba botsa Abimeleka." 
Judges9:43 A tsea banna bao a ba arola ka dihlopha tse tharo, a mo robatsa tshemong, a lebelela, a bona banna bao ba etswa motseng. A ba tsogela, a ba fenya." 
Judges9:44 Abimeleka le sehlopha seo se bego se na le yena, ba kitimela, ba ema mojakong wa kgoro ya motse. Dihlopha tse dingwe tse pedi tsa kitimela batho ka moka bao ba bego ba le motseng, tsa ba bolaya." 
Judges9:45 Abimeleka a lwa le motse letsatsi ka moka. A tsea motse, a bolaya batho bao ba bego ba le go wona, a senya motse, a o bjala letswai." 
Judges9:46 Ge banna ka moka ba tora ya Šegeme ba ekwa ka seo, ba tsena ka lefelong la go swara ntlo ya modimo Berith." 
Judges9:47 Abimeleka a botswa gore banna ka moka ba tora ya Šegeme ba kgobokane. 
Judges9:48 Abimeleka a mo rotogela thabeng ya Tsalamone, yena le batho ka moka bao ba bego ba na le yena; Abimeleka a tsea selepe ka seatleng sa gagwe, a rema lekala la mohlare, a le bea legetleng la gagwe; dira kamoo ka dirilego ka gona." 
Judges9:49 Ka mo go swanago setshaba ka moka sa rema makala ka moka, sa latela Abimeleka, sa a bea ka gare ga masoba a dithabeng, sa fisa masoba a dithabeng. Mo e lego gore banna ka moka ba tora ya Šegeme le bona ba hwa, banna le basadi ba ka bago 1 000." 
Judges9:50 Abimeleka a ya Thebe, a hloma mesasa kgahlanong le Thebe, a e thopa." 
Judges9:51 Eupsa go be go na le tora e tiilego ka gare ga motse, le banna le basadi ka moka le batho ka moka ba motse ba tshabela moo, ba e tswalela, ba ba rotogela lebotong la tora." 
Judges9:52 Abimeleka a fihla toreng, a e lwantsha, a ya mojakong wa tora ka thata gore a e fise ka mollo." 
Judges9:53 Mosadi yo mongwe a lahlela seripa sa leswika la tshilo hlogong ya Abimeleka, le ka moka ba mo pshatla legata." 
Judges9:54 Ka moka a bitsa lesogana leo ka lebelo la morwadi wa dibetsa tsa lona, a re go lona: “Nga tshosa ya gago o mpolaye, gore banna ba se bolele ka nna: Mosadi o mmolaile.” Le lesogana la gagwe la mo kgorometsa, le a hwa." 
Judges9:55 Ge banna ba Baiseraele ba bona gore Abimeleka o hwile, yo mongwe le yo mongwe a tloga lefelong la gagwe." 
Judges9:56 Modimo a busetsa bokgopo bja Abimeleka bjo a bo dirilego tatagwe ka go bolaya bana babo ba masomesupa. 
Judges9:57 Modimo o ile a busetsa bokgopo ka moka bja banna ba Šegeme dihlogo tsa bona, le gwa tla thogako ya Jothame morwa wa Jerubaali." 
Judges10:1 Ka morago ga Abimeleka, Tola morwa wa Pua, morwa wa Dodo, monna wa Isakara, a tsoga go sireletsa Baiseraele. A dula Samaria thabeng ya Eferaime." 
Judges10:2 A ahlola Baiseraele mengwaga ye masomepedi-tharo, ka morago a hwa le a bolokwa Samaria." 
Judges10:3 Ka morago ga gagwe a tla Jaire wa Mogileada, a busa Baiseraele ka nywaga e masomepedi-pedi." 
Judges10:4 O be a na le barwa ba masometharo bao ba namego dipokolo tse masometharo, ba na le metse ye masometharo, yeo e bitswago Havothe-jaire go fihla le lehono, yeo e lego nageng ya Gileade." 
Judges10:5 Jaire a hwa, a bolokwa kua Kamone." 
Judges10:6 Bana ba Baiseraele ba boela ba dira tse mpe mahlong a Jehofa, ba hlankala Baali, Ashtarothe le medimo ya Siria le ya Basidone le ya Moaba le ya Baamoni le ya Baamoni le ya Baamoni bana ba Amoni. Medimo ya Bafilisitia e lahlile Morena, ya se mo hlankale." 
Judges10:7 Kgalefo ya Jehofa ya tuka Baiseraele, a ba rekisetsa diatleng tsa Bafilisitia le diatleng tsa bana ba Amoni." 
Judges10:8 Ngwageng woo ba tshwenya le go gatelela bana ba Baiseraele, ka nywaga e lesomeseswai, bana ba Baiseraele ka moka bao ba bego ba le ka mosola wa Jorodane nageng ya Baamore yeo e lego Gileade." 
Judges10:9 Go feta moo, bana ba Amoni ba tshela noka ya Jorodane go yo lwa le Juda le Babenjamine le ntlo ya Eferaime; moo Baiseraele a ilego a tlalelwa kudu." 
Judges10:10 Bana ba Baiseraele ba goeletsa Jehofa ba re: “Re go senyetse, ka gobane re tlogetse Modimo wa rena le ra hlankala le Baali.”" 
Judges10:11 Jehofa a re go bana ba Baiseraele: “Na ga se ka le hlakodisa diatleng tsa BaEgepeto le diatleng tsa Baamore le diatleng tsa Baamoni le tsa Bafilistines? 
Judges10:12 Basidone le Baamaleka le bana ba Amoni ba le gateletse; o tla Nkgoeletsa, le ka tla go hlakodisa diatleng tsa bona." 
Judges10:13 Eupsa lena le ntlogetse, la hlankala medimo e mengwe; ka fao, nka se sa go pholosa." 
Judges10:14 Sepela o bitse medimo yeo o e kgethilego; a ba go pholose nakong ya masetlapelo a gago. 
Judges10:15 Bana ba Baiseraele ba re go Jehofa: “Re paletswe; Re lokolle lehono fela, re a rapela." 
Judges10:16 Ba tlosa medimo e sele gare ga bona, ba hlankala Jehofa; moya wa gagwe wa nyamiswa ka go fediswa ga Baiseraele." 
Judges10:17 Bana ba Amoni ba kgobokana, ba hloma mesasa Gileade. Bana ba Baiseraele ba kgobokana kua Mitsepha;" 
Judges10:18 Batho le dikgosana tsa Gileade ba boledisana: “Ka motho ofe yo a tlago go lwa le bana ba Amoni?” e tla ba hlogo ya badudi ka moka ba Gileade. 
Judges11:1 Jafete wa Mogileada e be e le mogale wa sebete, e be e le morwa wa seotswa. Gileade a tswala Jafete." 
Judges11:2 Mosadi yo mongwe wa Gileade a mo belegelwa barwa; Barwa ba mosadi wa gagwe ba gola, ba raka Jafete, ba re go yena: “O se ka wa tsea bohwa lapeng la tatago rena; gobane ka morwa wa mosadi o sele." 
Judges11:3 Ka moka Jafete a tshaba bana babo, a dula nageng ya Tobe. Banna ba lefeela ba kgobokana kua Jafete, ba tswa le yena." 
Judges11:4 Mafelelong bana ba Amoni ba thoma go lwa le Baiseraele. 
Judges11:5 Ya re ge bana ba Amoni ba lwa le Baiseraele, bagolo ba Gileada ba ya go tsea Jafete nageng ya Tobo." 
Judges11:6 Ba re go Jafethe: “Etla o be molaodi wa rena, re lwe le bana ba Amoni.”" 
Judges11:7 Jafete a re go bagolo ba Gileade: “Na le ntlhoile, la nrakalela lapeng la tate? le o tle go Nna bjale, ge o le mathateng?" 
Judges11:8 Bagolo ba Gileade ba re go Jafete: “Ka gona bjale re boela go wena, gore o sepele le rena, o lwe le bana ba Amoni, o be hlogo ya rena godimo ga badudi ka moka ba Gileade.”" 
Judges11:9 Jafete a re go bagolo ba Gileada: “Ge le ka busetsa gae go yo lwa le bana ba Amoni le Jehofa a ba lokolla pele ga ka, na ka tla ba hlogo ya lena?" 
Judges11:10 Bagolo ba Gileada ba re go Jafete: “Morena e be hlatse magareng ga rena, ge re sa dire bjalo ka mantsu a gago.”" 
Judges11:11 Ka moka Jafete a sepela le bagolo ba Gileade, le setshaba sa mo bea hlogo le molaodi wa bona; Jafete a bolela mantsu a gagwe ka moka pele ga Jehofa kua Mitsepha." 
Judges11:12 Jefeta a roma baromiwa go kgosi ya bana ba Amoni, a re: “O na le taba efe le nna, ge o tlile go lwa le nna nageng ya geso?" 
Judges11:13 Kgosi ya bana ba Amoni ya fetola baromiwa ba Jafete: “Ka gobane Baiseraele e tsere naga ya ka ge ba be ba rotoga Egepeto, go tloga Arnone go fihla Jaboko le Jorodane. Bjale busetsa ditshaba tseo khutsong." 
Judges11:14 Jafete a roma baromiwa gape go kgosi ya bana ba Amoni; 
Judges11:15 A re go yena: “Se ka seo Jafethe a se boletsego: “Baiseraele ga se ya tsea naga ya Moaba le naga ya bana ba Amoni. 
Judges11:16 Eupsa ge Baiseraele ba rotoga Egepeto, ba phatsa lesokang ba fihla lewatleng la Shefe, ba fihla Kadeshe;" 
Judges11:17 Ka moka Baiseraele ya roma baromiwa go kgosi ya Edomo, ba re: “Ka kgopela gore ka fete nageng ya gago; Ka mokgwa wo o swanago ba romela kgosi ya Moaba; Bana ba Baiseraele ba dula Kadeshe." 
Judges11:18 Ka moka ba phatsa lesoka, ba dikanetsa naga ya Edomo le naga ya Moaba, ba fihla ka bohlabela bja naga ya Moaba, ba hloma mesasa ka mosola wa Arnone, eupsa ba se tsene mollwaneng wa Moaba. Gobane Arnone e be e le mollwane wa Moaba." 
Judges11:19 Baiseraele ya roma baromiwa go Sihone kgosi ya Baamore, kgosi ya Heshibone. Baiseraele a re go yena: “A re fete nageng ya gago, re tla boela lefelong la rena.”" 
Judges11:20 Eupsa Sihone ga se a ka a bota Baiseraele gore e fete mollwaneng wa gagwe, eupsa Sihone a kgobokatsa setshaba sa gagwe ka moka, a hloma mesasa kua Jahase, a lwa le Baiseraele." 
Judges11:21 Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele a gafela Sihone le setshaba sa gagwe ka moka diatleng tsa Baiseraele, le ba ba fenya; Baiseraele ya fenya naga ka moka ya Baamore, badudi ba naga yeo." 
Judges11:22 Ba hlasela naga ka moka ya Baamore, go tloga Arnone go fihla Jaboko, le go tloga lesokang go fihla Jorodane." 
Judges11:23 Bjale Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele o rakile Baamore pele ga setshaba sa gagwe sa Baiseraele, le na o swanetse go ba rua?" 
Judges11:24 Na o ka se hwetse bohwa seo Camus modimo wa gago a go fago sona gore o se abe bohwa? Mang le mang yo Jehofa Modimo wa rena a tlago go ba raka pele ga rena, re tla ba rua." 
Judges11:25 Bjale na o phala Balaka morwa wa Tsipora kgosi ya Moaba? Na o kile wa lwa le Baisraele, goba na o kile wa lwa le bona?" 
Judges11:26 Ge Baiseraele e be e dutse Heshibone le metse ya yona, le Aroere le metse ya yona le metseng ka moka yeo e lego kgauswi le mabopong a Arnone, e be e le nywaga e makgolo a mararo? bjale ka ka lebaka la eng o se wa di busetsa morago ka nako yeo?" 
Judges11:27 Ka gona ga se ka go senyetsa, eupsa o ntira bobe ka go lwa le nna; Jehofa, Moahlodi, o tla ahlola lehono magareng ga bana ba Baiseraele le bana ba Amoni." 
Judges11:28 Eupsa kgosi ya bana ba Amoni ga se ya theetsa mantsu a Jafete kgosi ya Baamoni. 
Judges11:29 Moya wa Jehofa wa wela Jafete, a phatsa Gileade le Manase, a phatsa Mitsipe ya Gileada le go tloga Mitsipe ya Gileada a tshelela go bana ba Amoni." 
Judges11:30 Jafete a ena ka kano go Jehofa, a re: “Ge e ba o ka gafela bana ba Amoni diatleng tsa ka;" 
Judges11:31 Se sengwe le se sengwe seo se tswago ka mejako ya ntlo ya ka se tla ntlhasela, go fihlela ka boa ka khutso go bana ba Amoni;" 
Judges11:32 Jafete a tshelela go bana ba Amoni go yo lwa le bona; Jehofa a di gafela diatleng tsa gagwe. 
Judges11:33 A ba bolaya go tloga Aroere go fihla Minite, metse e masomepedi le lesokang la dirapa tsa merara, ka polao e kgolo. Ka tsela yeo Baamone ba ile ba fenywa pele ga Baiseraele." 
Judges11:34 Ge Jafete a fihla Mitsipe, a bona morwedi wa gagwe a etswa go mo gahlanetsa a rwele dikosa le ka metantsho. Mme e be e le ngwana wa gagwe a nnosi; le o be a se na morwa goba morwedi." 
Judges11:35 Ge a mmona, a gagola diaparo tsa gagwe, a re: “Go madimabe, morwedi wa ka! O nkokobeditse kudu, le o yo mongwe wa bao ba ntshosago, ka gobane ka buletse Morena molomo wa ka, le nka se boele morago." 
Judges11:36 Mosadi a re go yena: “Tate, ge e ba o buletse Jehofa molomo wa gago, o ntire ka mo o tswago molomong wa gago; gobane Jehofa o le lefeletsa ka ditiro tsa lena, lena bana ba Amoni." 
Judges11:37 A re go tatagwe: “A nka go dirwe taba ye, ka tlogele dikgwedi tse pedi, gore ka rotoge le go theoga dithabeng, ka llele bokgarebe bja ka, nna le magageso.”" 
Judges11:38 A re go bona: “Sepela.” A mo fa dikgwedi tse pedi tsa maikhutso, le a sepela le bagwera ba gagwe, ba lla bokgarebe bja gagwe dithabeng." 
Judges11:39 Ya re ge dikgwedi tse pedi di fedile, a boela go tatagwe, a phethagatsa kano ya gagwe yeo a e ennego. Le o be a sa tsebe motho. Ya ba mokgwa wa Israele," 
Judges11:40 Barwedi ba Baiseraele ba be ba e-ya ngwaga le ngwaga go yo llela morwedi wa Jafete wa Mogileada matsatsi a mane ka ngwaga. 
Judges12:1 Banna ba Eferaime ba kgobokana, ba ya ka leboa, ba re go Jafethe: “Ka ka baka la’ng o ile wa phatsa go lwa le bana ba Amoni gore o rotogele bana ba Amoni, moo o ilego wa re bitsa gore re sepele le wena?” re tla fisa ntlo ya gago ka mollo." 
Judges12:2 Jafete a re go bona: “Nna le setshaba sa ka re be re ngangisana kudu le bana ba Amoni; mme ge ka bitsa, wa ntakolla diatleng tsa bona." 
Judges12:3 Ge ka bona gore o ka se mpholose, ka bea bophelo bja ka ka seatleng sa ka, ka tshelela bana ba Amoni, Jehofa a ba gafela diatleng tsa ka; ka ka baka leo o tlilego go nna lehono go tlo lwa. NNA?" 
Judges12:4 Ka moka Jefeta a kgobokanya banna ka moka ba Gileada, a lwa le Eferaime; banna ba Gileade ba otla Eferaime, ka gobane ba be ba re: “Le batshabi ba Eferaime gare ga BaEferaime le gare ga Bamanase, lena banna ba Gileada.”" 
Judges12:5 Ba-Gileada ba thopa Noka ya Jorodane pele ga bana ba Eferaime, le bafaladi ba Eferaime ba re: “E re ka tshele; Banna ba Gileada ba re ho yena: “Na o Moefraimi?” Ge a ka re: Ee!" 
Judges12:6 Ka moka ba re go yena: “Bolela Shibolethe, gobane ga a kgone go go bolela gabotse.” Ka moka ba mo tsea ba mmolaya nokang ya Jorodane, ka nako yeo e be e le ba-Eferaime ba 42 000." 
Judges12:7 Jefeta a ahlola Baiseraele ka nywaga e tshela. Ka moka Jafete wa Mogileada a hwa, a bolokwa go o mongwe wa metse ya Gileada." 
Judges12:8 Ka morago ga gagwe Ibsana wa Betlelehema a ahlola Baiseraele. 
Judges12:9 A ba le barwa ba masometharo le barwedi ba masometharo, bao a ilego a ba romela ka ntle le a amogela barwa ba gagwe barwedi ba masometharo go tswa dinageng disele. Ka moka a etelela pele Baiseraele ka nywaga e supago." 
Judges12:10 Ka moka Ibsane a hwa le a bolokwa kua Betlelehema. 
Judges12:11 Ka morago ga gagwe Elone Mosebulone a etelela pele Baiseraele; a busa Baiseraele ka nywaga e lesome. 
Judges12:12 Elone wa Mosebulone a hwa, a bolokwa kua Ajalone nageng ya Sebulone." 
Judges12:13 Ka morago ga gagwe Abdone morwa wa Hilele wa Pirathoni a ahlola Baiseraele. 
Judges12:14 O be a na le barwa ba masomenne le ditlogolo tse masometharo bao ba bego ba nametse dipokolo tsa dipokolo tse masomeseswai; a ahlola Baiseraele ka nywaga e seswai. 
Judges12:15 Abedone morwa wa Hilele wa Mopirathone a hwa, a bolokwa kua Pirathone nageng ya Eferaime, thabeng ya Baamaleka." 
Judges13:1 Bana ba Baiseraele ba boela ba dira bobe mahlong a Jehofa; Jehofa a ba gafela diatleng tsa Bafilisitia ka nywaga e masome a mane. 
Judges13:2 Bjale gwa ba le monna yo mongwe wa Tsora, wa lapa la Badani, yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Manoa; mosadi wa gagwe e be e le moopa, a se na peu." 
Judges13:3 Morongwa wa Jehofa a iponagatsa go mosadi, a re go yena: “Bona bjale, o moopa, ga o belege;" 
Judges13:4 Bjale, ka a le hlokomele, le se ka la nwa beine goba seno se se tagago le le se ka la ja selo le ge e le sefe se se sa hlwekago." 
Judges13:5 Gobane bona, o tla ima, a belega morwa; gobane ngwana e tla ba Monatsare go Modimo go tloga popelong; o tla thoma go pholosa Baiseraele diatleng tsa Bafilisitia." 
Judges13:6 Mosadi a tla a botsa monna wa gagwe, a re: Monna wa Modimo o tlile go nna, sefahlego sa gagwe se be se swana le sefahlego sa morongwa wa Modimo, se se siisago kudu; eupsa ga se ka mmotsisa gore o tswa kae, e bile ga se a ka a mpotsa leina la gagwe." 
Judges13:7 Eupsa yena a re go nna: “Bona, o tla ima, wa belega morwa; bjale, le se ka la nwa beine goba seno se se tagago, le se ka la ja selo se se sa hlwekago; gobane ngwana e tla ba Monatsare wa Modimo go tloga ka popelong go fihla letsatsing la lehu la gagwe." 
Judges13:8 Manoa a lopa Jehofa a re: “Morena wa ka, monna wa Modimo yo o mo romilego a boele go rena, a re Ruthe seo re tlago go se dira ngwana yo a tlago go belegwa.”" 
Judges13:8 Manoa a lopa Jehofa a re: “Morena wa ka, monna wa Modimo yo o mo romilego a boele go rena, a re Ruthe seo re tlago go se dira ngwana yo a tlago go belegwa.”" 
Judges13:9 Modimo a theetsa lentsu la Manoa; morongwa wa Modimo a boela go mosadi yoo a dutse tshemong, eupsa Manoa monna wa gagwe a se na yena." 
Judges13:10 Mosadi a akgofela, a kitimela, a botsa monna wa gagwe, a re go yena: “Bona, monna yo a iponagaditsego go nna yo a tlilego go nna letsatsing le lengwe.”" 
Judges13:11 Manoa a tsoga, a latela mosadi wa gagwe, a tla go monna yoo a re go yena: “Na ka wena monna yo a boletsego le mosadi?” A re: Ka nna." 
Judges13:12 Manoa a re: “Bjale anka mantsu a gago a phethagale.” Re tlo ruta ngwana bjang, gona re tlo dira eng ka yena?" 
Judges13:13 Morongwa wa Jehofa a re go Manoa: “Mo go tsohle tseo ka di boditsego mosadi yoo a a hlokomele.” 
Judges13:14 A se ka a ja morara le ge e le ofe, a se ka a nwa beine goba seno se se tagago goba a ja selo le ge e le sefe se se sa hlwekago; tsohle tse ka mo laetsego tsona, a di boloka." 
Judges13:15 Manoa a re go morongwa wa Jehofa: “A re go golege go fihlela re go lokisetsa potsanyane.” 
Judges13:16 Morongwa wa Jehofa a re go Manoa: “Le ge o ka ntshwara, nka se je bogobe bja gago; ge e ba o rata go neela sebego sa go fiswa, se dirisetse Jehofa. Gobane Manoa o be a sa tsebe gore ka morongwa wa Jehofa." 
Judges13:17 Manoa a re go morongwa wa Jehofa: “Leina la gago ka mang, gore ge mantsu a gago a phethagala re go hlomphe?" 
Judges13:18 Morongwa wa Jehofa a re go yena: “Ka ka baka la’ng o kgopela leina la ka ka tsela ye, o bona e le sephiri?" 
Judges13:19 Ka gona Manoa a tsea potsanyane yeo le sehlabelo sa go fiswa, a e direla Jehofa leswikang. Le Manoa le mosadi wa gagwe ba lebelela." 
Judges13:20 Ya re ge kgabo e rotogela legodimong e le sebesong, morongwa wa Jehofa a rotoga ka kgabo ya sebeso. Manoa le mosadi wa gagwe ba e lebelela le ba wela fase ka difahlego." 
Judges13:21 Eupsa morongwa wa Jehofa ga se a hlwa a iponagatsa go Manoa le mosadi wa gagwe. Manoa a tseba gore ka morongwa wa Morena. 
Judges13:22 Manoa a re go mosadi wa gagwe: “Ruri re tla hwa ka gobane re bone Modimo.” 
Judges13:23 Eupsa mosadi wa gagwe a re go yena: Ge nkabe Jehofa a be a nyaka go re bolaya, nkabe a se a amogela sehlabelo sa go fiswa le sehlabelo sa go fiswa diatleng tsa rena, e bile a ka se re dumelele go bona tse ka moka, go etsa ge go le bjalo lehono. Ga se ra bolela dilo tsa go swana le tse." 
Judges13:24 Mosadi a belega morwa, a mo rea leina la Simisone, ngwana a gola, Jehofa a mo segofatsa. Ngwana a gola, Morena a mo segofatsa." 
Judges13:25 Moya wa Jehofa wa thoma go soma godimo ga gagwe mesaseng ya Dani magareng ga Tsora le Eshitaolo. 
Judges14:1 Simisone a theogela Timnathe, a bona mosadi wa barwedi ba Bafilisitia kua Timnathe." 
Judges14:2 A rotoga a botsa tatagwe le mmagwe a re: “Ka bone mosadi yo mongwe kua Timnathe wa barwedi ba Bafilisitia. Le bjale mo tsee gore e be mosadi wa ka. 
Judges14:3 Ka moka tatagwe le mmagwe ba re go yena: “Na ga go na mosadi gare ga barwedi ba bana beno goba gare ga setshaba sa ka ka moka, yo o ka yago go tsea mosadi go Bafilisitia? Simisone a re go tatagwe: “Mo tsee; gobane ka yena yo a nthabisago." 
Judges14:4 Eupsa tatagwe le mmagwe ba be ba sa tsebe gore e be e le go Jehofa moo a bego a nyaka nako ya go lwantsha Bafilisitia, ka gobane ka nako yeo Bafilisitia ba be ba busa Baiseraele." 
Judges14:5 Ka moka Simisone le tatagwe le mmagwe ba theogela Timnathe, ba fihla dirapeng tsa merara tsa Timina." 
Judges14:6 Moya wa Jehofa wa mo wela ka matla, a mo ja bjalo ka ge a be a tla ja potsanyane, a se na selo ka seatleng sa gagwe; eupsa ga se a ka a botsa tatagwe goba mmagwe seo a se dirilego." 
Judges14:7 A theoga a boledisana le mosadi; a kgahlisa Simisone kudu. 
Judges14:8 Ka morago ga lebakanyana a boa a mo swara, a retologa a bona setopo sa tau; le, bona, go be go na le sehlopha sa dinose le todi ya dinose mmeleng wa tau." 
Judges14:9 A tsea tse dingwe tsa diatla tsa gagwe, a tswela pele a eja, a tla go tatagwe le mmagwe, a di fa, ba ja; eupsa o se ka wa ba botsa gore o tsere todi ya dinose moleteng wa ditau." 
Judges14:10 Ka gona tatagwe a theogela go mosadi yoo, Simisone a dira monyanya moo; ka gobane masogana a be a dira seo." 
Judges14:11 Ya re ge ba mmona, ba tlisa bagwera ba masometharo gore ba dule le yena." 
Judges14:12 Simisone a re go bona: “Bjale e re ka le hlalosetse thae. Ge e ba ruri o ka mpotsa se matsatsing a supago a monyanya, le wa se hwetsa, ka tla go nea diaparo tse masometharo tsa linene le diaparo tse masometharo." 
Judges14:13 Eupsa ge e ba o sa kgone go ntlhalosetsa seo, gona o tla mpha diaparo tse masometharo le diaparo tse masometharo." 
Judges14:14 A re go bona: “Dijo di tswa go moja, bose bo tswa go yo a nago le matla. Le ba be ba sa kgone go rarolla sephiri ka matsatsi a mararo." 
Judges14:15 Ka letsatsi la bosupa ba re go mosadi wa Simisone: “Leka monna wa gago gore a re botse thae, gore re se ka ra go fisa le ntlo ya tatago ka mollo; o re biditse gore re tsee seo re nago le sona? Na ga go bjalo?" 
Judges14:16 Mosadi wa Simisone a lla pele ga gagwe, a re: “O ntlhoile, ga o nthate; O beetse bana ba setshaba sa geso seema, eupsa ga se wa mpotsa. A re go yena: “Bona, ga se nka ka botsa tate goba mma ditaba tse;" 
Judges14:17 A lla pele ga gagwe matsatsi a supago, ge monyanya wa bona o be o tswela pele; ka letsatsi la bosupa a mmotse, ka gobane o mo senyetse; a botsa barwa ba setshaba sa gabo sephiri seo." 
Judges14:18 Ka letsatsi la bosupa pele letsatsi le sobela banna ba motse ba re go yena: “Ka eng se se bose go feta todi ya dinose?” le ka eng seo se fetago tau ka maatla? A re go bona: “Ge nkabe le sa lema ka kgomo ya ka, le ka be le sa hwetse sephiri sa ka." 
Judges14:19 Ka moka moya wa Jehofa wa mo wela, a theogela Ashkalone a bolaya banna ba masometharo ba bona le a tsea dithebola le a nea diaparo tseo go bao ba hlalositsego sephiri. Bogale bja gagwe bja tuka, a rotogela ntlong ya tatagwe." 
Judges14:20 Eupsa mosadi wa Simisone a newa mogwera wa gagwe yo a bego a mo dirisitse e le mogwera wa gagwe. 
Judges15:1 Eupsa ka morago ga lebakanyana, nakong ya puno ya korong, Simisone a etela mosadi wa gagwe a swere potsanyane; A re: Ka tla tsena ka phaposing le mosadi wa ka. Eupsa tatagwe o ile a gana go mo dumelela go tsena." 
Judges15:2 Tatagwe a re go yena: “Ka go boditse gore o mo hloile. Ka fao, ka mo file molekane wa gago; Na kgaetsedi ya gagwe ga se ye botse go mo feta? mo tsee legatong la gagwe." 
Judges15:3 Simisone a re mabapi le bona: “Bjale ka tla ba bjalo ka Bafilisitia, le ge ka sa ba dire bobe.”" 
Judges15:4 Simisone a ya a swara digwagwa tse makgolo a mararo, a tsea masoba a mollo, a retolosa mosela go ya go mosela, a bea lesoba la mollo gare magareng ga mesela ye mebedi." 
Judges15:5 Ge a tshumisitse dihlasana ka mollo, a di tlogela di wela godimo ga mabele ao a emego a Bafilisitia, a fisa mabele le serapa sa merara le dirapa tsa mehlware." 
Judges15:6 Bafilisitia ba re: “Ka mang yo a dirilego se? Bona ba fetola ba re: “Simisone morwa wa Timinathe, ka gobane o tsere mosadi wa gagwe a mo neela modirisani wa gagwe.” Bafilisitia ba rotoga, ba mo fisa le tatagwe ka mollo." 
Judges15:7 Simisone a re go bona: “Le ge le ka dira se, ka tla le itefeletsa, le ka morago ga moo ka tla kgaotsa.”" 
Judges15:8 A ba bolaya ka polao e kgolo, a theoga a dula leswikang la Ethame." 
Judges15:9 Ka moka Bafilisitia ba rotoga, ba hloma mesasa kua Juda, ba phuhlama kua Lehi." 
Judges15:10 Banna ba Juda ba re: “Ka ka baka la’ng le rotogela go re lwa le rena? Bona ba re: “Re rotogile go tlama Simisone, go mo dira bjalo ka ge a re dirile.”" 
Judges15:11 Ka moka banna ba 3 000 ba Juda ba ya leswikang la Etame le ba re go Simisone: “Na ga o tsebe gore ka ka baka la’ng Bafilisitia e le babusi ba rena? o re dirile eng? A re go bona: “Bjalo ka ge ba ntirile, le nna ka ba dirile bjalo.”" 
Judges15:12 Ba re go yena: “Re theogile go tlo go tlema gore re go gafele diatleng tsa Bafilisitia; Simisone a re go bona: “Nnyatsa, le ka se nwe.”" 
Judges15:13 Ba re go yena: “Ee; eupsa re tla go tlema, ra go gafela diatleng tsa bona; eupsa ruri re ka se go bolaye. Ba mo tlema ka dithapo tse pedi tse mpsha, ba mo emisetsa godimo go tswa leswikang." 
Judges15:14 Ge a fihla Lehi, Bafilisitia ba mo goeletsa, le Moya wa Jehofa wa tla godimo ga gagwe, le dithapo tseo di bego di le matsogong a gagwe tsa ba bjalo ka folaxe yeo e fisitswego ka mollo, le marapo a gagwe ao a robegilego ka mollo wa gagwe diatla." 
Judges15:15 A hwetsa lerapo la mohlagare le lefsa la pokolo, a otlolla seatla sa gagwe, a le swara, a bolaya banna ba sekate ka lona." 
Judges15:16 Simisone a re: “Ka bolaile banna ba sekate ka mohlagare wa pokolo, mekgobo godimo ga mekgobo, ka mohlagare wa pokolo ka bolaile banna ba sekate.”" 
Judges15:17 Ya re ge a feditse go bolela, a tlosa lerapo la mohlagare seatleng sa gagwe, a bitsa lefelo leo Ramatle." 
Judges15:18 A nyorilwe kudu, a bitsa Jehofa a re: “O gafetse pholoso ye e kgolo seatleng sa mohlanka wa gago." 
Judges15:19 Eupsa Modimo a kgaola lesoba kgopong, le metsi a tswa go lona; ge a nwele, moya wa gagwe wa boa, a tsosolosa; ka fao re mo reetse leina la En-Hakore, e lego Lehi go fihla le lehono." 
Judges15:20 A tswela pele a ahlola Baiseraele mehleng ya Bafilisitia ka nywaga e 20. 
Judges16:1 Simisone a ya Gasa, a bona mogweba-ka-mmele moo." 
Judges16:2 Baeng ba tsebiswa le gwa thwe: “Simisone o tlile mo.” Ba mo dikanetsa, ba mo letela bosego ka moka kgorong ya motse, ba mo letela bosego ka moka, ba re: Gosasa, mosegare wa sekgalela, re tla mmolaya.”" 
Judges16:3 Simisone a robala moo go fihla bosegogare, a tsoga bosegogare, a tsea mejako ya kgoro ya motse, le dikota tse pedi tsa mejako, le dikota tse pedi tsa mojako le ka moka ga tsona, a di bea magetleng a gagwe e ise mohlareng. Mmotong wo o lego pele ga Heberone." 
Judges16:4 Ka morago ga moo a ratana le mosadi yo mongwe moeding wa Soreka, yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Delila." 
Judges16:5 Marena a Bafilisitia a tla go yena a re go yena: “Mo hlahlobe o bone gore matla a gagwe a magolo a le kae le gore re ka mo fenya ka tsela efe, e le gore re mo fenye re gapeletse go mo gatelela.” Le yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa rena re tla go fa diripa tse lesometee tsa silifera." 
Judges16:6 Ka moka Delila a re go Simisone: “Mpotse moo matla a gago a magolo a lego gona, le seo o ka tlamago go go tlaisa ka sona." 
Judges16:7 Simisone a re go yena: “Ge ba ka tlama ka dikota tse supago tse tala tseo di sa kago tsa oma, gona ka tla fokola, ka ba bjalo ka monna yo mongwe.”" 
Judges16:8 Ka moka marena a Bafilisitia a mo tlisetsa dikota tse supago tse tala tseo di bego di se tsa omiswa le a mo tlema ka tsona. 
Judges16:9 Go be go na le banna bao ba bego ba iphihla le ba dula le yena ka phaposing. Yena a re go yena: “Bafilisitia a go go hlasele, Simisone.” Ka moka a mo kgaola moriri, bjalo ka ge ditshila di kgaolwa ge di kgoma mollo. Ka gona matla a gagwe a be a sa tsebje." 
Judges16:10 Ka moka Delila a re go Simisone: “Bona, o nkwera, wa mpotsa maaka; mpotse seo o ka tlemilwego go sona." 
Judges16:11 A re go yena: “Ge ba ka tlema ka marapo a mafsa ao a sa kago a aparwa, gona ka tla fokola, ka ba bjalo ka motho yo mongwe.”" 
Judges16:12 Ka gona Delila a tsea dithapo tse difsa a mo tlema ka tsona, a re go yena: “Samsone, Bafilisitia ba go hlasela! Le go be go na le ba maaka bao ba bego ba dula ka phaposing yeo. Ka moka a di gagola diatleng tsa gagwe bjalo ka thapo." 
Judges16:13 Delila a re go Simisone: “Go fihla ga bjale o nkwera, wa mpotsa maaka. Mpotse seo o ka tlemilwego go sona. A re go yena: “Ge o ka loga dinotlelo tse supago tsa hlogo ya ka ka lesoba.”" 
Judges16:14 Mosadi a e kgomaretsa ka yona, a re go yena: “Simisone, Bafilisitia a be go wena.” Ka moka a tsoga borokong bja gagwe, a iphahla ka sepekare sa kota le lesela." 
Judges16:15 Mosadi a re go yena: “O ka re bjang: ‘Ka a go rata, mola pelo ya gago e se na le nna?” O nkgokile gararo, le ga se wa mpotsa moo maatla a gago a magolo a lego gona." 
Judges16:16 Ya re ge a mo gatelela letsatsi le letsatsi ka mantsu a gagwe, a mo tlaisa, moo moya wa gagwe o ilego wa tshwenyega go fihla lehung." 
Judges16:17 A mmotsa tsohle tseo di bego di le ka pelong ya gagwe, a re go yena: “Ga se ka go beola hlogo; gobane ka bile Monasara wa Modimo go tloga ka popelong ya mma." 
Judges16:18 Ge Delila a bona gore o mmoditse dipelo tsa gagwe ka moka, a roma a bitsa marena a Bafilisitia a re: “Rotoga gatee, gobane o mpontshitse dipelo tsa gagwe ka moka.” Barena ba Bafilisitia ba rotogela go yena, ba tlisa tshelete ka diatleng tsa bona." 
Judges16:19 A mo robatsa ka matolo; a bitsa monna yoo, a beola dinotlelo tse supago tsa hlogo ya gagwe; a thoma go mo gatelela, le maatla a gagwe a tloga go yena." 
Judges16:20 Mosadi a re go yena: “Bafilisitia ba go hlasele Simisone.” A tsoga borokong bja gagwe le a re: Ka tla tswa bjalo ka pele, ka thothomela. Le gona o be a sa tsebe gore Jehofa o mo tlogetse." 
Judges16:21 Eupsa Bafilisitia ba mo swara, ba mo ntsha mahlo, ba mo theosetsa Gasa, ba mo tlema ka ditlemo tsa koporo; le a hwa kgolegong." 
Judges16:22 Eupsa moriri wa hlogo ya gagwe wa thoma go gola gape ka morago ga ge a beotse. 
Judges16:23 Marena a Bafilisitia a ba kgobokatsa gore ba direle modimo wa bona Dagone sehlabelo se segolo le go thaba. Ba re: “Modimo wa rena o gafetse lenaba la rena Simisone diatleng tsa rena.” 
Judges16:24 Ge setshaba se mmona, sa reta modimo wa sona, ka gobane se be se re: “Modimo wa rena o gafetse diatleng tsa rena lenaba la rena, le mofedisi wa naga ya rena, yo a bolailego ba bantsi ba rena.”" 
Judges16:25 Ya re ge dipelo tsa bona di thabile, ba re: “Bitseng Simisone gore a re diragatse.” Ka gona ba bitsa Simisone ka ntlong ya kgolego; ba mo bea fase magareng ga dikokwane." 
Judges16:26 Simisone a re go mosemane yo a mo swerego ka seatla: “Ntumelele gore ka kwe dikokwane tseo ntlo e emego godimo ga tsona, gore ka ithekge ka tsona.”" 
Judges16:27 Ntlo e be e tletse ka banna le basadi; marena ka moka a Bafilisitia ba be ba le moo; marulelong go be go na le banna le basadi ba dikate tse tharo bao ba bego ba lebelela ge Simisone a dira dipapadi. 
Judges16:28 Simisone a goeletsa Jehofa a re: “Ka a go kgopela, Jehofa Modimo, o nkgopole gatee gatee, gore ka tle ka lefeletse Bafilisitia ka baka la mahlo a ka a mabedi.”" 
Judges16:29 Simisone a swara dikokwane tse pedi tseo ntlo e bego e eme godimo ga tsona le tseo e bego e eme godimo ga tsona, e nngwe ka seatla sa gagwe sa le letona le e nngwe ka letsogo la gagwe la nngele." 
Judges16:30 Simisone a re: “E re ka hwe le Bafilisitia.” A khunama ka matla a gagwe ka moka; ntlo ya wela marena le batho ka moka bao ba bego ba le go yona. Ka gona bahu bao a ba bolailego lehung la gagwe ba be ba feta bao a ba bolailego bophelong bja gagwe. 
Judges16:31 Ka moka bana babo le ba ntlo ka moka ya tatagwe ba theoga, ba mo tsea ba mo godisa, ba mmoloka magareng ga Tsora le Eshitaole lefelong la poloko la Manoa tatagwe. Ka moka a busa Baiseraele ka nywaga e 20." 
Judges17:1 Go be go na le monna wa thabeng ya Eferaime, yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Mika." 
Judges17:2 A re go mmagwe: ‘Dikarolwana tsa silifera tse lekgolo le tee tseo o di tserwego, tseo o boletsego thogako ka tsona le wa bolela ka tsona ka di kwele, sele silifera e na le nna; Ka ile ka e tsea. Mmagwe o ile a re: Anka Jehofa a go segofatse morwa wa ka!" 
Judges17:3 Ge a busetsa disekale tse 1 100 tsa silifera go mmagwe, mmagwe o ile a re: “Ka kgethetse silifera yeo e tswago seatleng sa ka go Jehofa bakang sa morwa wa ka, gore ka dire seswantsho se se betlilwego le seswantsho se se betlilwego; se go wena." 
Judges17:4 Eupsa a busetsa tshelete yeo go mmagwe; mme mmagwe a tsea dishekale tsa silifera tse makgolo a mabedi a di nea modiri yo a di dirilego seswantsho se se betlilwego le seswantsho se se tolositswego. E be e le ka ntlong ya Mika. 
Judges17:5 Monna yoo Mika o be a na le ntlo ya medimo, a dira efode le diterafime, a kgethagatsa yo mongwe wa barwa ba gagwe, e lego moperisita wa gagwe." 
Judges17:6 Mehleng yeo go be go se na kgosi mo Baiseraele, yo mongwe le yo mongwe o be a dira se se lokilego mahlong a gagwe." 
Judges17:7 Go be go e-na le lesogana le le tswago Betlelehema Juda la lapeng la Juda, e bego e le Molefi, le a dula moo." 
Judges17:8 Monna yoo a tloga motseng a etswa Betlelehema Juda go yo dula moo a ka hwetsago lefelo; 
Judges17:9 Mika a re go yena: “O tswa kae?” A re go yena: “Ka Molefi wa Betlelehema ya Juda, ka ya go dula moo nka hwetsago lefelo.”" 
Judges17:10 Mika a re go yena: “Dula le nna, tatago le moperisita, ka tla go nea disekale tse lesome tsa silifera ka ngwaga, le seaparo sa go apara le dijo tsa gago.” Ka moka Molefi a tsena." 
Judges17:11 Molefi a dumela go dula le monna yoo; lesogana leo la ba yo mongwe wa bana ba gagwe go yena. 
Judges17:12 Mika a kgethagatsa Molefi; lesogana leo la ba moperisita wa lona, la dula lapeng la Mika." 
Judges17:13 Ka moka Mika a re: “Bjale ka tseba gore Jehofa o tla ntira botse, ka ge ka na le Molefi go moperisita wa ka.”" 
Judges18:1 Mehleng yeo go be go se na kgosi mo Baiseraele; gobane go fihla letsatsing leo bohwa bja bona bo be bo se bja wela go bona gare ga meloko ya Baiseraele. 
Judges18:2 Barwa ba Dani ba roma go tswa lapeng la bona banna ba bahlano go tswa palong ya bona ka moka, banna ba bagale ba go tswa Tsora le go tswa Eshitaole, gore ba yo hlola naga le go e hlahloba; ba re go bona: “Sepela le sepele mo lefatsheng.”" 
Judges18:3 Ge ba le kgauswi le ntlo ya Mika, ba tseba lentsu la lesogana la Molefi. Ba tsena ba re go yena: “Ka mang yo a go tlisitsego mo?” le o dira eng mo lefelong le? le o na le eng moo?" 
Judges18:4 A re go bona: “Mika o ntira ka tsela ye le ka tsela ye, o ntsere le ka moperisita wa gagwe.”" 
Judges18:5 Ba re go yena: “Re kgopela Modimo kaletso gore re tsebe ge e ba tsela ya rena yeo re sepelago ka yona e tla atlega.” 
Judges18:6 Moprista a re go bona: “Eyang ka khutso pele ga Jehofa mo le yago gona.” 
Judges18:7 Banna ba bahlano ba tloga, ba fihla Laishe, ba bona batho bao ba bego ba le go yona, ba dula ba sa setse ka mokgwa wa Basidone, ba homotse e bile ba sireletsegile. Le go be go se na peu ya mosetareta nageng ya ka yeo e ilego ya ba nyamisa tabeng efe goba efe; ba be ba le kgole le Basidone, ba se ba kopana le motho le ge e le ofe." 
Judges18:8 Ba tla go bana babo bona Tsora le Eshitaolo, bana babo bona ba re go bona: “Le reng?" 
Judges18:9 Bona ba re: “Ema re rotogele go ba lwantsha; ka gobane re bone naga, le, bona, e botse kudu. Le na o sa le gona? le se ka la diega go tsena le la ja bohwa bja naga." 
Judges18:10 Ge le sepela, le tla fihla nageng e sireletsegilego le nageng e kgolo, gobane Modimo o e gafetse diatleng tsa lena. Lefelo leo go se nago selo lefatsheng." 
Judges18:11 Go tswa lapeng la Badani, banna ba makgolo a tshelelago ba itlhamile ka dibetsa tsa ntwa, ba tswa Tsora le go tswa Eshitaole." 
Judges18:12 Ba rotoga ba hloma mesasa kua Kiriathe-jearime kua Juda; ka baka leo ba bitsa lefelo leo gore ka Mahanehadan go fihla le lehono; le bona, e ka morago ga Kiriathe-Jearime." 
Judges18:13 Ba tloga moo ba ya thabeng ya Eferaime, ba fihla ntlong ya Mika." 
Judges18:14 Ka moka banna ba bahlano bao ba ilego go hlola naga ya Laishe ba araba, ba re go bana babo bona: “Na le a tseba gore go na le seswantsho se se betlilwego le seswantsho se se tolositswego ka dintlong tse?” bjale, ela hloko seo o swanetsego go se dira." 
Judges18:15 Ba retologa moo, ba tla ntlong ya Molefi yo monyenyane, ntlong ya Mika, ba mo dumedisa." 
Judges18:16 Banna ba makgolo a tshelelago bao ba kgethilwego ka dibetsa tsa ntwa, bao e bego e le ba bana ba Dani, ba ema kgauswi le mojako wa kgoro." 
Judges18:17 Banna ba bahlano bao ba bego ba ile go hlola naga ba rotoga, ba tsena, ba tsea seswantsho se se betlilwego, le efode, le diterafima, le seswantsho se se tolositswego. Moperisita a ema mojakong wa kgoro le banna ba makgolo a tshelelago bao ba itlhamilego ka dibetsa tsa ntwa." 
Judges18:18 Ba tsena ka ntlong ya Mika, ba tsea seswantsho se se betlilwego, le efode, le diterafi, le seswantsho se se tolositswego. Moperisita a re go bona: “Le dira eng?”" 
Judges18:19 Ba re go yena: “Homola, bea seatla sa gago molomong wa gago, o sepele le rena, o be tate le moperisita go rena; Na go kaone gore o be moperisita wa ntlo ya monna o tee, goba o be moprista wa moloko le lapa la Baiseraele?" 
Judges18:20 Pelo ya moperisita ya thaba, a tsea efode, le diterafi, le seswantsho se se betlilwego, a ya gare ga setshaba." 
Judges18:21 Ka gona ba retologa ba tloga le ba bea bana ba banyenyane le dikgomo le dikoloi tsa ntwa pele ga bona. 
Judges18:22 Ge ba be ba le kgole le ntlo ya Mika, banna bao ba bego ba le ka dintlong tsa kgauswi le ntlo ya Mika ba kgobokana le ba hwetsa bana ba Dani." 
Judges18:23 Ba bitsa bana ba Dani. Ba retolosa difahlego tsa bona, ba re go Mika: “Ka eng seo o tlago go tla le sehlopha se se bjalo?" 
Judges18:24 A re: “O tsere medimo ya ka yeo ka e dirilego le moperisita, a sepetse. Le ka eng se sengwe seo ka nago le sona? le a re go nna: Bothata bja gago ka bofe?" 
Judges18:25 Bana ba Dani ba re go yena: “Lentsu la gago le se ka la kwewa gare ga rena, gore batho ba ba galefilego ba se ka ba kitima go wena, wa lahlegelwa ka bophelo bja gago le maphelo a ba lapa la gago.”" 
Judges18:26 Ge bana ba Dani ba sepela, Mika a bona gore ba mo kgole kudu, a retologa a boela ntlong ya gagwe." 
Judges18:27 Ba tsea dithoto tseo Mika a di dirilego le moperisita yo a bego a na le yena, ba tla Laishe, e lego setshaba se se homotsego le se se sireletsegilego. Ba ba bolaya ka bogale bja tshosa, ba tshuma motse ka mollo." 
Judges18:28 Go be go se na mopholosi, ka gobane e be e le kgole le Tsidone, le go be go se na kopano le motho; e be e le moeding wa kgauswi le Bethe-rehobe. Ka moka ba aga motse ba dula go wona." 
Judges18:29 Motse woo ba rewa leina la Dani, ka leina la Dani tatago bona, yo a belegetswego Baiseraele; eupsa leina la motse pele e be e le Laishe." 
Judges18:30 Bana ba Dani ba hloma seswantsho se se betlilwego, le Jonathane morwa wa Geresomo morwa wa Manase e be e le moperisita wa moloko wa Badan go fihla letsatsing la go thopsa ga naga." 
Judges18:31 Ba ba hloma seswantsho se se betlilwego sa Mika seo a se dirilego matsatsi ka moka a ntlo ya Modimo kua Shilo. 
Judges19:1 Mehleng yeo ge go be go se na kgosi Baiseraeleng, Molefi yo mongwe yo a bego a dula thabeng ya Eferaime, yo a ilego a mo tsea serethe sa Betlelehema sa Juda." 
Judges19:2 Mosadi wa gagwe wa serethe a mo dira seotswa, a tloga go yena a ya ntlong ya tatagwe kua Betlelehema Juda, a dula moo dikgwedi tse nne tse di feletsego." 
Judges19:3 Monna wa gagwe a tsoga, a mo sala morago, a bolela le yena ka botho, a mo busetse le mohlanka wa gagwe le dipokolo tsa gagwe; a mo tlisa ntlong ya tatagwe, le tatago kgarebe a mmona, a thabela go mo gahlanetsa." 
Judges19:4 Motswala wa gagwe, tatago kgarebe, a mo disa; a dula le yena matsatsi a mararo; ba ja, ba nwa, ba robala moo bosego ka moka." 
Judges19:5 Ka letsatsi la bone ge ba tsoga e sa le mesong, a tsoga gore a tloge;" 
Judges19:6 Ka gona ba dula fase, ba ja le go nwa mmogo, ka gobane tatago kgarebe o be a boletse go monna yoo: “Ka a kgotsofala, o dule bosego ka moka, pelo ya gago e thabe.”" 
Judges19:7 Ge monna yoo a tsoga gore a tloge, mmatswale wa gagwe a mo kgothatsa; ka fao, o ile a robala moo gape." 
Judges19:8 A tsoga e sa le ka pela mesong ka letsatsi la bohlano gore a tloge; Tatago ngwanenyana a re: Khomotsa pelo ya gago. Ka moka ba dula go fihla mosegare wa sekgalela, le bobedi bja bona ba ja." 
Judges19:9 Ge monna yoo a tsoga gore a tloge, yena le mohlanka wa gagwe le mohlanka wa gagwe, serethe sa gagwe, tatago morwa wa gagwe, ba re go yena: “Bona! dula mo go fihlela letsatsi le sobela, pelo ya gago e thabe; le o tloga gosasa a ya gae." 
Judges19:10 Eupsa monna yoo ga se a ka a dula bosegong bjoo, eupsa a tsoga a tloga, a tshela Jebuse, e lego Jerusalema. E ile ya tlatsa mafura didisele tse pedi; serethe sa gagwe se be se na le yena." 
Judges19:11 Ge ba fihla Jebuse, letsatsi le be le sobela; mohlanka a re go mong wa gagwe: “Tla, a re retologeleng motseng wo wa Bajebuse, re robale go wona.”" 
Judges19:12 Mong wa gagwe a re go yena: “Re ka se ka ra fapogela motseng wa mosele yo e sego wa bana ba Baiseraele; re tla rotogela Gibea. 
Judges19:13 A re go mohlanka wa gagwe: “Tloo, re batamele go le lengwe la mafelo a gore re robale bosego ka moka, Gibea goba Rama.”" 
Judges19:14 Ba sepela ka tsela ya bona; letsatsi la ba sobela kua Gibea kua Babenjamine. 
Judges19:15 Ka gona ba retologa moo gore ba tsene Gibea le ba robale moo; ge a tsena, a mo dudisa setarateng sa motse; gobane go be go se na motho aa yo a ba isago ntlong ya gagwe go yo robala." 
Judges19:16 Mokgalabje yo mongwe yo a bego a etswa tshemong mantsiboa a etswa modirong wa gagwe. O be a tlile Gibea e le mofaladi, eupsa banna ba lefelong leo e be e le ba moloko wa Babenjamine." 
Judges19:17 Ge a emisitse mahlo, a bona monna yo a sepelago setarateng sa motse; le mokgalabje a re: O ya kae? le o tswa kae?" 
Judges19:18 A re go yena: “Re tloga Betlelehema Juda re lebile thokong ya thaba ya Eferaime; Ka tloga moo ka ya Betlelehema kua Juda, eupsa bjale ka ya ntlong ya Morena; le ga go yo a tlago go nkamogela ka ntlong." 
Judges19:19 Le ge go le bjalo go na le bjang le mafulo a ditonki tsa rena; go na le senkgwa le beine bakang sa ka, le mosadi wa gago, lesogana la gago, le bahlanka ba gago; ga e nyaka selo." 
Judges19:20 Mokgalabje a re: “Khutso a e be le wena.” Thato ya gago ka moka e be godimo ga ka; just don’t live mo setarateng. 
Judges19:21 A ba tlisa ka ntlong ya gagwe, a ba bea dijo, ba hlapa maoto, ba ja le go nwa." 
Judges19:22 Ge ba thabile dipelong tsa bona, bona banna ba motse, barwa ba Beliale, ba tsena ka ntlong, ba kokota mojakong, ba re go mokgalabje mong wa ntlo: “Re tlisetse pholoso.” Monna yo a tlilego ka ntlong ya gago, gore re mo tsebe." 
Judges19:23 Monna yoo, mong wa ntlo, a tswa go bona, a re go bona: “Aowa, bana beso, aowa, aowa, ka a le rapela, le se ka la dira bokgopo bjo bjalo; bona gore monna yo o tlile ka ntlong ya ka, le o se ka wa dira selo se sa bosilo." 
Judges19:24 Bonang, mona ka morwedi wa ka, kgarebe, le serethe sa gagwe; bjale ka tla ba ntsha, ka go homotsa, ka ba dira tse dibotse mahlong a gago;" 
Judges19:25 Eupsa banna bao ba gana go mo theetsa, ka gona a tsea serethe sa gagwe a ba tlisetsa sona; ba mo tseba, ba mo roga bosego ka moka go fihla mesong; ge e fihla, ba mo lokolla." 
Judges19:26 Ka moka mosadi a tla mesong, a robala mojakong wa ntlo ya monna go fihla mesong." 
Judges19:27 Mong wa gagwe a tsoga mesong, a bula mejako ya ntlo, a tswa a tloga. Mme, bona, mosadi yoo a wela fase mojakong wa ntlo a beile diatla tsa gagwe mojakong." 
Judges19:28 A re go yena: “Tsoga re sepele.” Eupsa ga go yo a ilego a araba. Ka moka monna yoo a mo nametsa pokolo, monna yoo a tsoga a boela gae." 
Judges19:29 Ge a fihla ka ntlong ya gagwe, a tsea tshosa a e arola ka diripana tse lesomepedi, a e romela dinaga ka moka tsa Baiseraele." 
Judges19:30 Bohle bao ba e bonego ba re: “Selo se se swanago le se ga se sa ka sa dirwa goba sa bonwa go tloga letsatsing leo bana ba Baiseraele ba rotogilego ka lona nageng ya Egepeto go fihla le lehono; ela hloko, tsea kaletso le o bolele monagano wa gago." 
Judges20:1 Bana ka moka ba Baiseraele ba tswa, phuthego ya kgobokana e le motho o tee, go tloga Dani go fihla Beresheba, le naga ya Gileada, go Jehofa kua Mitsepha." 
Judges20:2 Dikgosana tsa setshaba, tsa meloko ka moka ya Baiseraele, di ile tsa iponagatsa phuthegong ya setshaba sa Modimo, e lego bahlabani ba maoto ba dikate tse makgolo a mane (400 000)." 
Judges20:3 Barwa ba Babenjamine ba kwa gore bana ba Baiseraele ba rotogetse Mitsepha. Bana ba Baiseraele ba re: “Re botse, bokgopo bjo bo bile bjang?”" 
Judges20:4 Molefi, monna wa mosadi yo a bolailwego, a araba a re: “Ka tlile Gibea yeo e lego ya Babenjamine, nna le serethe sa ka re yo robala.”" 
Judges20:5 Banna ba Gibea ba nthomela, ba nkgokolosa ntlo bosego, ba nagana gore ba mpolaile. Le serethe sa ka se ba gapeleditse go hwa." 
Judges20:6 Ka tsea serethe sa ka ka se sega ka diripa ka se romela nageng ka moka ya bohwa bja Baiseraele, ka gobane ba dirile ditiro tse di gobogilego le bosilo Baiseraeleng." 
Judges20:7 Bonang, bana ka moka ba Baiseraele; fa malebela le kaletso ya gago mo." 
Judges20:8 Setshaba ka moka sa ema bjalo ka motho o tee, sa re: “Re ka se tsene ka tenteng ya gagwe, le gona re ka se tsene ka ntlong ya gagwe.”" 
Judges20:9 Eupsa bjale se ka seo re tlago go se dira Gibea; re tla e hlasela ka bofelo; 
Judges20:10 Re tla tsea banna ba lesome go tswa go lekgolo le lengwe le le lengwe la meloko ka moka ya Baiseraele, le lekgolo go ba sekate, le ba sekate go ba dikate tse lesome, le ba tla nea setshaba dijo tseo di ka fihlago Gibea. Nageng ya Babenjamine, go ya ka bosilo ka moka bjo ba bo dirilego Baiseraele." 
Judges20:11 Ka gona banna ka moka ba Baiseraele ba kgobokane kgahlanong le motse, ba logagantswe bjalo ka motho o tee." 
Judges20:12 Meloko ya Baiseraele e roma banna go phatsa moloko ka moka wa Babenjamine, ba re: “Ka bokgopo bofe bjo bo dirilwego gare ga lena?" 
Judges20:13 Bjale re hlakodiseng banna bao e lego barwa ba Beliale ba Gibea gore re ba bolaye le re fedise bobe go Baiseraele. Eupsa bana ba Babenjamine ga se ba ka ba theetsa lentsu la bana babo bona bana ba Baiseraele. 
Judges20:14 Bana ba Babenjamine ba kgobokana go tswa metseng go ya Gibea, go yo lwa le bana ba Baiseraele." 
Judges20:15 Ka nako yeo barwa ba Babenjamine ba be ba ngwadisitswe metseng yeo banna ba dikate tse masomepedi-tshela bao ba swerego tshosa, ka ntle le badudi ba Gibea, bao e bego e le banna ba makgolo a supago bao ba kgethilwego." 
Judges20:16 Gare ga setshaba se ka moka go be go na le banna ba makgolo a supago bao ba kgethilwego ba letsogo le letshadi; yo mongwe le yo mongwe aa kgona go lahlela maswika bophara bja moriri, ntle le go fosa kotlo." 
Judges20:17 Banna ba Baiseraele, ka ntle le Babenjamine, ba ile ba balwa banna ba dikate tse makgolo a mane bao ba swerego tshosa; ka moka ga bona e be e le bagale." 
Judges20:18 Ka moka bana ba Baiseraele ba itokiseletsa le ba rotogela ntlong ya Modimo wa thereso le ba botsisa Modimo le ba re: “Ka mang go rena yo a tlago go rotogela pele ntweng le bana ba Babenjamine?” Jehofa a re: “Juda o tla rotoga pele.” 
Judges20:19 Bana ba Baiseraele ba tsoga mesong ba hloma mesasa kgahlanong le Gibea. 
Judges20:20 Banna ba Baiseraele ba tswa go yo lwa le Babenjamine; banna ba Baiseraele ba ba tsogela Gibea. 
Judges20:21 Barwa ba Babenjamine ba tswa Gibea, le letsatsing leo ba bolaya banna ba 22 000 ba bana ba Baiseraele." 
Judges20:22 Setshaba, e lego banna ba Baiseraele, ba ikgothatsa, ba hloma ntwa gape lefelong leo ba lokaleditsego lona letsatsing la pele." 
Judges20:23 (Bana ba Baiseraele ba rotoga ba lla pele ga Jehofa go fihla mantsiboa le ba botsisa Jehofa ba re: “Na ka tla rotoga gape go yo lwa le bana ba Babenjamine ngwaneso?”) 
Judges20:24 Ka letsatsi la bobedi bana ba Baiseraele ba batamela go gahlanetsa barwa ba Babenjamine. 
Judges20:25 Ka letsatsi la bobedi Babenjamine a tswa Gibea a ba hlasela, a bolaya banna ba dikate tse lesomeseswai. Ka moka ba ntsha ditshosa tsa bona." 
Judges20:26 Ka moka bana ba Baiseraele ka moka le setshaba ka moka ba rotogela ntlong ya Modimo wa thereso le ba lla ba dula fase pele ga Jehofa le ba ikona dijo letsatsing leo go fihla mantsiboa le ba neela dihlabelo tsa go fiswa le dihlabelo tsa tebogo pele ga Jehofa. MODIMO. 
Judges20:27 Bana ba Baiseraele ba thoma go botsisa Jehofa, ka gobane areka ya kgwerano ya Modimo e be e le moo mehleng yeo;" 
Judges20:28 Ka moka Finease morwa wa Eleasara morwa wa Arone a ema kgauswi le yena a re: “Na ka tla boela ka tswa go yo lwa le bana ba Babenjamine ngwaneso, goba na ka tla ba lesa?” Jehofa a re: “Rotoga; gobane gosasa ka tla di gafela diatleng tsa gago." 
Judges20:29 Ka gona Baiseraele a dula Gibea. 
Judges20:30 Ka letsatsi la boraro bana ba Baiseraele ba rotogela barwa ba Babenjamine le ba rotogela Gibea go etsa dinakong tse dingwe. 
Judges20:31 Bana ba Babenjamine ba tswa ba ba lwantsha, ba gogelwa motseng. Ba thoma go hlasela le go bolaya ba bangwe ba setshaba, bjalo ka pele, ditseleng tse dikgolo, yo mongwe a rotogela ntlong ya Modimo, le yo mongwe a rotogela Gibea nageng, banna ba ka bago ba masometharo ba Baiseraele." 
Judges20:32 Bana ba Babenjamine ba re: “Ba otlilwe pele ga rena go etsa pele.” Eupsa bana ba Baiseraele ba re: “A re tshabeng re ba goge motseng re ba goge ditseleng tse dikgolo; 
Judges20:33 Banna ka moka ba Baiseraele ba tsoga lefelong la bona, ba itlhama kua Baali-tamara;" 
Judges20:34 Banna ba ba kgethilwego ba sekate go tswa go Baiseraele ka moka ba tla go lwa le Gibea, le ntwa e be e le e soro." 
Judges20:35 Jehofa a fenya Babenjamine pele ga Baiseraele, le ka letsatsi leo bana ba Baiseraele ba bolaya banna ba dikate tse masomepedi-hlano kua Babenjamine; ka moka ba ntsha ditshosa tsa bona." 
Judges20:36 Bana ba Babenjamine ba bona gore ba otlilwe, ka gobane banna ba Baiseraele ba ile ba ineela go bana ba Babenjamine, ka gobane ba be ba botile bahlaledi bao ba bego ba ba beile ka thoko ga Gibea." 
Judges20:37 Baakatsi ba akgofela ba fihla Gibea; marabele a kgobokana, a dikanetsa motse ka moka ka bogale bja tshosa." 
Judges20:38 Go be go na le pontsho magareng ga banna ba Baiseraele le ba maaka bao ba bego ba letetse gore ba tla tsweletsa kgabo e kgolo ya musi motseng. 
Judges20:39 Ge banna ba Baiseraele ba boetse ntweng, Babenjamine a thoma go bolaya banna ba Baiseraele ba ka bago 30; ka gobane ba rile: Ruri, ba fentswe pele ga rena bjalo ka ntweng ya mathomo." 
Judges20:40 Eupsa ge kgabo e thoma go rotoga motseng ka leru la musi, Babenjami ba lebelela ka morago ga bona, ba bona kgabo ya motse e rotogela legodimong." 
Judges20:41 Ge banna ba Baiseraele ba boela morago, banna ba Babenjamine ba makala, ka gobane ba bona gore ba wetse masetla-pelo." 
Judges20:42 Ka ka baka leo ba ilego ba furalela banna ba Baiseraele ba lebile lesokang; eupsa ntwa ya ba swara; bao ba tswago metseng yeo ba ile ba ba fedisa gare ga yona. 
Judges20:43 Ba dikanetsa Babenyamini, ba ba kitimisa gabonolo go fihla Gibea ge letsatsi le hlaba." 
Judges20:44 Molokong wa Babenjamine ba 18 000; ka moka e be e le banna ba sebete. 
Judges20:45 Ba retologa ba tshabela lesokang go ya leswikang la Rimone; ba ba rakadisa go fihla Gidomo, ba bolaya ba 2 000 ba bona." 
Judges20:46 Ka gona bohle bao ba ilego ba bolawa ka Babenjamine letsatsing leo e be e le banna ba 25 000 bao ba ilego ba ntsha tshosa; ka moka e be e le banna ba sebete. 
Judges20:47 Eupsa banna ba makgolo a tshelelago ba retologa ba tshabela lesokang go ya leswikang la Rimone le ba dula leswikang la Rimone dikgwedi tse nne. 
Judges20:48 Banna ba Baiseraele ba busetsa bana ba Babenjamine, ba ba bolaya ka tshosa, motse ka moka le bohle bao ba hweditswego go wona. Ba fisa metse ka moka. Seo ba tletsego ka sona." 
Judges21:1 Banna ba Baiseraele ba be ba ikanne kua Mitsepha, ba re: “Go ka se be le o tee wa rena yo a ka neelago Babenjamine morwedi wa gagwe gore e be mosadi wa gagwe.”" 
Judges21:2 Setshaba sa tla ntlong ya Modimo, sa dula moo go fihla mantsiboa pele ga Modimo, sa hlabosa mantsu a sona, sa lla o soro;" 
Judges21:3 A re: “Wena Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele, ka ka baka la’ng go ka ba le moloko o tee wo o hwilego mo Baiseraele lehono?" 
Judges21:4 Letsatsing le le latelago batho ba tsoga e sa le ka pela le ba aga sebeso moo le ba neela dihlabelo tsa go fiswa le dihlabelo tsa tebogo. 
Judges21:5 Bana ba Baiseraele ba re: “Ka mang go meloko ka moka ya Baiseraele yo a rotogelago go Jehofa le phuthego? Gobane ba dirile kano e kgolo mabapi le yo a rotogelago go Jehofa kua Mitsepha, ba re: “Ruri o tla bolawa.”" 
Judges21:6 Bana ba Baiseraele ba ba sokologa ka baka la Babenjamine ngwanabo bona, ba re: “Go na le moloko o tee wo o kgaotswego go Baiseraele lehono.”" 
Judges21:7 Re tla dira’ng ka bao ba setsego e le basadi, ka ge re ikanne ka Jehofa gore re ka se ba nee go barwedi ba rena gore e be basadi?" 
Judges21:8 Ba re: “Ka mang mo melokong ya Baiseraele yo a rotogelago go Jehofa kua Mitsepha?” Go be go se na motho mesaseng kua Jabeshe Gileade ka morago ga phuthego. 
Judges21:9 Gobane setshaba se be se balwa, le go be go se na le o tee wa badudi ba Jabeshe-gileade moo." 
Judges21:10 Phuthego ya roma banna ba bagale ba dikate tse lesomepedi, ya ba laela ya re: “Sepelang le yo bolaya badudi ba Jabeshe-gileada ka bogale bja tshosa, le basadi le bana ba banyenyane.”" 
Judges21:11 Se ka seo o swanetsego go se dira: Roga monna yo mongwe le yo mongwe le mosadi yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a robalago le monna. 
Judges21:12 Gare ga badudi ba Jabeshe-gileada ba hwetsa dikgarebe tse makgolo a mane tseo di bego di sa tsebe motho ka go robala le yena; ba ba isa bothopsa Shilo nageng ya Kanana. 
Judges21:13 Phuthego ka moka ya roma ba bangwe go yo bolela le bana ba Babenjamine bao ba bego ba le leswikang la Rimone, le go ba bitsa ka khutso." 
Judges21:14 Benyamini a tsena ka nako yeo; ba ba nea basadi ba basadi ba Jabeshe kua Gileada, eupsa ga se ba ka ba lekana." 
Judges21:15 Setshaba sa ba sokologa ka baka la Babenjamine, ka gobane Jehofa o be a arotse meloko ya Baiseraele." 
Judges21:16 Ka moka bagolo ba phuthego ba re: “Re tla direla’ng basadi bao ba setsego, ka ge basadi ba fedisitswe go Babenjamine?”" 
Judges21:17 Ba re: “Ba phonyokgilego ba Babenjamine ba tla ba le bohwa, gore moloko o mongwe o se ka wa fediswa Baiseraeleng.”" 
Judges21:18 Eupsa re ka se ba fe basadi ba barwedi ba rena, ka gobane barwa ba Baiseraele ba ikanne ba re: “Go rogilwe yo a neago Babenjamine mosadi!”" 
Judges21:19 Ba re: “Bonang, go na le monyanya wa Jehofa kua Shilo ngwaga le ngwaga, ka leboa la Bethele, ka bohlabela bja tsela ye e rotogago go tloga Bethele go ya Šegeme le ka borwa bja Lebona." 
Judges21:20 Ka gona ba laela bana ba Babenjamine ba re: “Sepelang le yo hlokomela dirapa tsa merara; 
Judges21:21 Ge e ba barwa ba Shilo ba be ba etswa dirapeng tsa merara go yo bina, gona na lena le ile la swara mosadi wa gagwe wa barwedi ba Shilo le la ya nageng ya Babenjamine." 
Judges21:22 Ge botatago bona goba bana babo bona ba tla go rena bakang sa go re ngongorega, re tla re go bona: “Re direng botho, gobane ga se ra boloka mosadi wa monna yo mongwe le yo mongwe ntweng; go ba le molato." 
Judges21:23 Bana ba Babenjamine ba dira bjalo, ba ba tsea basadi go ya ka palo ya bona, ba ba binago, bao ba ilego ba ba swara. Ba ya, ba boela bohwa bja bona, ba lokisa metse, ba dula go yona." 
Judges21:24 Ka nako yeo bana ba Baiseraele ba rotoga go tloga moo, yo mongwe le yo mongwe a ya molokong wa gagwe le lapa la gagwe, le ba tlogela moo, yo mongwe le yo mongwe a ya bohwa bja gagwe." 
Judges21:25 Mehleng yeo go be go se na kgosi mo Baiseraele; yo mongwe le yo mongwe o be a dira ka mo a ratago. 
Ruth1:1 Mehleng ya Baatlhodi, gwa ba le tlala nageng yeo. Monna yo mongwe wa Betlelehema Juda a ya go dula nageng ya Moaba, yena le mosadi wa gagwe le barwa ba gagwe ba babedi." 
Ruth1:2 Leina la monna yoo e be e le Elimeleka, mosadi wa gagwe e be e le Naomi, le maina a barwa ba gagwe ba babedi e be e le Mahlone le Kilion, e lego Baefurathe ba Betlelehema kua Juda. Ka moka ba fihla nageng ya Moaba, ba dula moo." 
Ruth1:3 Elimeleka monna wa Naomi a hwa; o tlogetswe ka barwa ba gagwe ba babedi. 
Ruth1:4 Ba ba tsea basadi ba basadi ba Moaba; leina la yo mongwe e be e le Orpa, yo mongwe e be e le Ruthe; ba dula moo mengwaga ye e ka bago ye lesome." 
Ruth1:5 Mahlone le Kilion le bona ba hwa ka bobedi; mosadi yoo a sala le barwa ba gagwe ba babedi le monna wa gagwe. 
Ruth1:6 Ka moka yena le bana babo ba boela nageng ya Moaba; ka gobane o be a kwele mo nageng ya Moaba gore Jehofa o etetse setshaba sa gagwe ge a ba fa bogobe. 
Ruth1:7 Ka gona a tlogela lefelo leo a bego a le go lona le barwedi ba gagwe ba babedi; ba ikamisetsa go boela nageng ya Juda. 
Ruth1:8 Naomi a re go barwedi ba gagwe ba babedi: “Sepela, yo mongwe le yo mongwe a boele ntlong ya mmagwe. Morena Modimo a go dire ka botho bjalo ka ge o dirile le nna le bahu." 
Ruth1:9 Anka Jehofa a le khutsise, yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa lena, ntlong ya monna wa lena. Ka moka a ba atla; ba hlabosa lentsu ba lla." 
Ruth1:10 Ba re go yena: “Ruri re tla boela le wena setshabeng sa gago. 
Ruth1:11 Naomi a re: “Boelang, barwedi ba ka, na le tla sepela le nna?” Na go sa na le barwa ka popelong ya ka, gore e be banna ba lena?" 
Ruth1:12 Fapogelang, barwedi ba ka, sepelang tsela ya lena; gobane ka tsofetse kudu gore nka ba le monna. Ge nka re: Ka na le kholofelo, le ge ka na le monna bosegong bjo, le le nna ka belega barwa;" 
Ruth1:13 Na o be o tla di leta go fihlela di gola? o ka rata go ba le banna? ee, barwedi ba ka; gobane go nkwesa bohloko kudu ka baka la lena ge seatla sa Jehofa se ntshitse." 
Ruth1:14 Ba hlabosa lentsu ba lla, Orpa a atla mmatswale wa gagwe; eupsa Ruthe a mo pholosa." 
Ruth1:15 Mosadi a re: “Bona, morwedi wa gago o boetse setshabeng sa gabo le go medimo ya gagwe. Boa morago ga morwedi wa gago." 
Ruth1:16 Ruthe a re: “O nkgopele gore ka se go tlogele, goba gore ka boele morago ga go go latela. Gobane mo o yago gona ka tla ya; le mo o dulago gona, ka tla dula; Setshaba sa gago e tla ba setshaba sa ka, Modimo wa gago e tla ba Modimo wa ka." 
Ruth1:17 Mo o hwilego gona, ka tla hwa, le ka tla bolokwa gona; Ka kamoo Jehofa a tlago go ntshwara ka gona, bjalobjalo, ge feela lehu le re aroganya le wena." 
Ruth1:18 Ge a bona gore o ikamiseditse go sepela le yena, a kgaotsa go bolela le yena." 
Ruth1:19 Ka gona bobedi bja bona ba sepela go fihlela ba fihla Betlelehema. Ge ba fihla Betlelehema, motse ka moka wa ba dikologa, wa re: “Na Naomi yo?”" 
Ruth1:20 A re go bona: “Le se ka la mpitsa Naomi, le mpitse Mara;" 
Ruth1:21 Ka ile ka tswa ka tletse, Jehofa o ntlisitse gae ka se na selo; Ka ka baka la’ng o mpitsa Naomi, mola Morena Modimo a nkgalemile, le Ramaatlaohle a ntlhokofaditse?" 
Ruth1:22 Ka gona Naomi a boa le Ruthe wa Momoaba morwedi wa gagwe, yo a boilego nageng ya Moaba. Ba fihla Betlelehema mathomong a puno ya korong." 
Ruth2:1 Naomi o be a na le motswala wa monna wa gagwe, monna wa mahumo, wa lesika la Elimeleka; leina la gagwe e be e le Boase." 
Ruth2:2 Ruthe wa Momoaba a re go Naomi: “Bjale e re ka ye tshemong ka yo buta ditsebe tsa mabele ka morago ga gagwe, gore ka hwetse kgaugelo mahlong a gagwe.” A re go yena: “Sepela, morwedi wa ka.”" 
Ruth2:3 A ya a buta tshemong ka morago ga babuni; 
Ruth2:4 Boase a tla a etswa Betlelehema a re go banna ba motse: “Jehofa a be le lena.” Ba re go yena: “Morena a go segofatse.” 
Ruth2:5 Boase a re go mohlanka wa gagwe yo a hlokometsego babuni: “Ka morwedi wa mang?” 
Ruth2:6 Mohlanka yo a bego a hlokometse badisi a araba ka gore: “Ka yena Momoaba yo a boilego le Naomi nageng ya Moaba.
