Ruth2:7 Mosa a re: “Bjale e re ka bute, ka kgobokatse babuni ka morago ga dikgopo; a tla a dula go tloga mesong go fihla bjale ge a dutse ka ntlong lebakanyana." 
Ruth2:8 Boase a re go Ruthe: “Na ga o kwe, morwedi wa ka? O se ka wa rotogela lefatsheng le lengwe, goba wa tloga mo, eupsa dula mo le lapa la ka." 
Ruth2:9 Mahlo a lena a a bone naga yeo ba e bunago, le ba latele; Na ga se ka laela masogana ao gore a se ka a go kgwatha? ge o nyorilwe, eya didibeng, o nwe tse masogana a di gogilego." 
Ruth2:10 A wela fase ka sefahlego, a khunama fase, a re go yena: “Ka hweditse bjang kgaugelo mahlong a gago, gore o ntebe ka ge ka le moeng?" 
Ruth2:11 Boase a mo fetola a re: “Ka mpotse tsohle tseo o di dirilego mmatswale ga e sa le go tloga lehung la monna wa gago, le kamoo o tlogetsego tatago le mmago le naga yeo o belegetswego go yona.” Le a fihla nageng yeo le bego le sa e tsebe pele." 
Ruth2:12 Anka Jehofa a putse modiro wa gago, le anka go be le moputso o feletsego bakang sa gago go Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele, yoo o holofeditsego ka tlase ga maphego a gagwe." 
Ruth2:13 A re: “Mong wa ka, anka ka hwetse kgaugelo mahlong a gago; ka gobane o nkhomotse, wa bolela le lekgoba la gago ka botho, le ge ka sa swane le le ge e le ofe wa makgoba a gago." 
Ruth2:14 Boase a re go yena: “Etla mo nakong ya dijo, o je bogobe bjoo o ine sekhwama sa gago ka gare ga asene.” A dula kgauswi le badisi, a tla go yena mabele a omilego, a ja, a kgora, a sepela." 
Ruth2:15 Ya re ge a tsoga e le megabaru, Boase a laela masogana a gagwe a re: “A le yena a be le megabaru gare ga batho, le o se ka wa mo kgalema.”" 
Ruth2:16 Le gona, ba bangwe ba diatla ba ile ba wela go yena ka boomo le ba mo tlogela, gore a ba tsee a sa mo kgaleme." 
Ruth2:17 A budula tshemong go fihla mantsiboa, a betha seo a se buduletsego." 
Ruth2:18 A e tsea a ya motseng, mme mmatswale wa gagwe a bona seo a se tserego." 
Ruth2:19 Mmatswale a re go yena: “O be o le kae lehono?” le o somile kae? go segofaditswe yo a go hlokomelago. A tsebisa mmagwe yo a somilego le yena, a re: Leina la monna yo ka somilego le yena lehono ka Boase." 
Ruth2:20 Naomi a re go ngwetsi ya gagwe: “A go segofatswe Jehofa, yo a sa kago a tlogela botho bja gagwe go ba ba phelago le bahu.” Naomi a re go yena: “Monna yo o kgauswi le rena, yo mongwe wa ba leloko la rena.”" 
Ruth2:21 Ruthe wa Momoaba a re: “Le nna a re: Dula le masogana a ka, gore a je puno ya ka ka moka.”" 
Ruth2:22 Naomi a re go Ruthe morwedi wa gagwe: “Ka mo gobotse, morwedi wa ka, gore o tswe le dikgarebe tsa gagwe, gore di se ka tsa go gahlanetsa nageng e sele.”" 
Ruth2:23 Ka gona a dula le barwedi ba Boase go buna go fihla mafelelong a puno ya garase le puno ya korong; a dula le mosadi wa gagwe. 
Ruth3:1 Naomi mmatswale a re go yena: “Morwedi wa ka, na nka se go nyakale khutso, gore o go phele gabotse?”" 
Ruth3:2 Bjale ka ge Boase e be e se wa meloko ya rena, o be a na le barwedi bafe? O a bona, bosegong bjo o thopa korong ka lesakang." 
Ruth3:3 Ka gona, hlapa o go tlotse, o go apese diaparo tsa gago, o theogele fase; eupsa o se ka wa itsebisa monna yoo go fihlela a fetsa go ja le go nwa." 
Ruth3:4 Ge a robetse, o boloka lefelo leo a tlago go robala go lona, le o tsene le o khupetse maoto a gagwe le o robale; le o tla go botsa seo o swanetsego go se dira." 
Ruth3:5 Mosadi a re go yena: “Tsohle tseo o mpotsago tsona ka tla di dira; 
Ruth3:6 Ka gona a theoga a dira go ya ka lentsu la mmatswale wa gagwe. 
Ruth3:7 Boase ge a jele a nwa, pelo ya gagwe e thabile, a ya go robala mafelelong a seaparo sa gagwe; a mo robatsa maoto ka boleta, a mo robatsa fase." 
Ruth3:8 Ya re bosegogare, monna yoo a tshoga, a retologa, a bona mosadi a robetse dinaong tsa gagwe." 
Ruth3:9 A re: “O mang?” Yena a re: “Ka nna Ruthe lekgoba la gago; ala kobo ya gago godimo ga mohlanka wa gago wa mosadi; gobane ka wa leloko la kgauswi. 
Ruth3:10 A re: “A Jehofa a segofatswe, morwedi wa ka, ka gobane o bontshitse botho bjo bogolo mafelelong go feta mathomong, ka ge o se wa latela masogana, e ka ba badiidi goba bahumi.”" 
Ruth3:11 Le bjale, morwedi wa ka, o se boife; Ka tla dira tsohle tseo o di kgopelago, ka gobane ba ntlo ya setshaba sa geso ka moka ba a tseba gore o mosadi wa bokwala." 
Ruth3:12 Bjale ka thereso gore ka motswala wa gago wa kgauswi ka madi; eupsa go na le wa leloko kgauswi le nna. 
Ruth3:13 Robala bosegong bjo, e tla ba mesong, gore ge o ka itira tshwanelo ya lapa, ka mo gobotse; aa o ile a bapala karolo ya mogweba-ka-mmele; eupsa ge e ba a sa le nee kabelo, nna ka tla le nea kabelo ya Morena yo a phelago; robala go fihla mesong." 
Ruth3:14 A robala maotong a gagwe go fihla mesong, a tsoga pele a tseba. A re: Ga se gwa swanela go tsebja gore ka ka lebaka la eng mosadi yo a tlile kgorong ya tsheko." 
Ruth3:15 A re: “Tlisa kobo yeo e lego godimo ga gago o e sware.” A e tsea, a ela garase ya dikalo tse tshela, a mo fa yona; a ya motseng." 
Ruth3:16 Ge a fihla go mmatswale a re: “O mang, morwedi wa ka?” Ka moka a mmotsa tsohle tseo monna yoo a mo dirilego tsona." 
Ruth3:17 Yena a re: “Ka di file dikalo tse tse tshela tsa garase; ka gobane a re go nna: “O se ka wa ya go mmago o nnosi.” 
Ruth3:18 A re: “Homola, morwedi wa ka, go fihlela o tseba kamoo taba yeo e tlago go wela ka gona; gobane monna yoo a ka se khutse go fihlela a fetsa taba yeo lehono." 
Ruth4:1 Boase a rotogela kgorong, a mo dudisa moo. Yo a ilego a re go bona: Oo! retologa, dula fase mo. Ka moka a retologa le a dula fase." 
Ruth4:2 A tsea banna ba lesome ba bagolo ba motse a re: Dulang mo. Ka moka ba dula fase. 
Ruth4:3 A re go wa leloko: “Naomi yo a boilego a etswa nageng ya Moaba, o rekisa naga yeo e bego e le ya Elimeleka ngwanabo rena.”" 
Ruth4:4 Ka ile ka nagana go le tsebisa, ka re: “E reka pele ga badudi le pele ga bagolo ba naga ya rena.” Ge o nyaka go e tlogela, e tlogele; eupsa ge le gana go di tlogela, mpotseng gore ka tsebe; ka moka ka go tlogela. A re: Ka tla e gafa." 
Ruth4:5 Boase a re: “Letsatsing leo o tlago go reka tshemo ya Naomi, o e reka le go Ruthe wa Momoaba, mosadi wa bahu, gore a tsose leina la bahu bohwa bja gagwe.”" 
Ruth4:6 Mokgobokatsi a re: “Nka se e tsee, gore ka se ka ka senya bohwa bja ka; ntlogele ka nnosi; gobane nka se kgone go e lopolla." 
Ruth4:7 Ye e be e le tsela ya Baiseraele ya pholoso le phetogo, yeo e kgonthisetsago tsohle; monna yo mongwe a apola seeta sa gagwe a se nea wa gabo; le e be e le pontsho kua Baiseraele." 
Ruth4:8 Ka gona mohlapetsi a re go Boase: “Ithekale yona.” Ka gona a apola seeta sa gagwe. 
Ruth4:9 Boase a re go bagolo le setshaba ka moka: “Lena le dihlatse lehono gore ka rekile tsohle tsa Elimeleka le tsa Kilion le Mahlone diatleng tsa Naomi.” 
Ruth4:10 Le gona, ka rekile Ruthe wa Momoaba, mosadi wa Mahlone, gore e be mosadi wa ka, e le gore ka tsose leina la bahu bohwa bja gagwe, gore leina la bahu le se ka la phumolwa gare ga bana babo le dikgaetsedi." 
Ruth4:11 Batho ka moka bao ba bego ba le kgorong le bagolo ba re: “Re dihlatse.” Mosadi yo a tsenago ka ntlong ya gago Jehofa a a dire bjalo ka Ragele le Lea yo a agilego ntlo ya Baiseraele; o dira botse kua Efrata, le o tumile kua Betlelehema." 
Ruth4:12 Ngwako wa gago e be bjalo ka ntlo ya Perese yo Thamara a mo belegetsego Juda, e be bjalo ka peu yeo Jehofa a tlago go go nea yona go kgarebe ye." 
Ruth4:13 Boase a tsea Ruthe a ba mosadi wa gagwe; ge a tsena go yena, Jehofa Modimo a mo ima, a belega morwa." 
Ruth4:14 Basadi ba re go Naomi: “A go tumiswe Jehofa, yo a sa go tlogelago lehono o se na wa leloko, gore leina la gagwe le tume Baiseraeleng.”" 
Ruth4:15 E tla ba thekgo ya bophelo bja gago le mofepi wa botsofadi bja gago, ka gobane morwedi wa gago yo a go ratago e bile a go phala barwa ba supago o mo belegetse." 
Ruth4:16 Naomi a tsea ngwana a mo robatsa sehubeng sa gagwe, a mo amusa." 
Ruth4:17 Basadi bao baagisani ba gagwe ba e reela leina, ba re: “Naomi o belegetswe morwa; ba mo rea leina la Obede. Ka yena tatago Jese, tatago Dafita." 
Ruth4:18 Meloko ya Peretse ka ye: Perese a tswala Hetserone; 
Ruth4:19 Hetserone a tswala Rama, Rama a tswala Aminadaba;" 
Ruth4:20 Aminadaba a tswala Nahashone, Nasoni a tswala Salmone." 
Ruth4:21 Salmone a tswala Boase, Boase a tswala Obede." 
Ruth4:22 Obede a tswala Jese, Jese a tswala Dafita." 
1Samuel1:1 Go be go na le monna yo mongwe wa Ramathaime-Tsofime, wa thabeng ya Eferaime, leina la gagwe e be e le Elkana, morwa wa Jerohama, morwa wa Elihu, morwa wa Tohu, morwa wa Tsefe, noka ya Eforate." 
1Samuel1:2 O be a na le basadi ba babedi; leina la yo mongwe e be e le Hanna, yo mongwe e be e le Penina; Penina o be a e-na le bana, eupsa Hanna a se na bana." 
1Samuel1:3 Monna yo o be a rotoga a etswa motseng wa gagwe ngwaga le ngwaga go yo khunamela le go khunamela Jehofa wa madira kua Shilo. Barwa ba babedi ba Eli, e lego Hofini le Finease, baperisita ba Jehofa, ba be ba le moo." 
1Samuel1:4 Ge letsatsi leo Elkana a direlago dihlabelo ka lona le fihla, a nea Penina mosadi wa gagwe le barwa ba gagwe ka moka le barwedi ba gagwe kabelo." 
1Samuel1:5 Eupsa Hanna a nea Hanna kabelo; gobane o be a rata Hanna, eupsa Jehofa o be a tswaletse popelo ya gagwe." 
1Samuel1:6 Lenaba la gagwe le lona la mo kwera e le gore le mo fore, ka gobane Jehofa o be a tswaletse popelo ya gagwe." 
1Samuel1:7 A dira se ka nywaga e mentsi ge a be a rotogela ntlong ya Jehofa a mo kwera; ka fao, o ile a lla le a se je." 
1Samuel1:8 Ka moka Elkana monna wa gagwe a re go yena: “Na o a lla? le ka ka baka la’ng o sa je? le ka ka baka la’ng pelo ya gago e babja? Na ga ka go phala barwa ba lesome? 
1Samuel1:9 Ka gona Hanna a tsoga ka morago ga ge ba jele kua Shilo le ka morago ga ge ba nwele. Eli moperisita o be a dutse setulong kgauswi le kokwane tempeleng ya Jehofa. 
1Samuel1:10 Moya o be a galefile, a rapela Jehofa, a lla o soro." 
1Samuel1:11 A ena a re: “Wena Jehofa wa madira, ge o ka gopola tlaisego ya ka, wa lebala lekgoba la gago la mosadi, wa se lebale lekgoba la gago la mosadi, wa fa lekgoba la gago la mosadi morwa, ka tla go nea morwa, ‘mo nee Jehofa matsatsi ka moka a bophelo bja ka. Dula ka ntlong ya gago. Bophelo bja gagwe, le ga go tshosa yeo e tlago go tla hlogong ya gagwe." 
1Samuel1:12 Ge a tswela pele a rapela pele ga Jehofa, Eli o ile a bona molomo wa gagwe." 
1Samuel1:13 Hanna a bolela pelong ya gagwe; melomo ya gagwe feela e ile ya sikinyega, eupsa lentsu la gagwe le be le sa kwewe; ka fao, Eli o be a nagana gore o tagilwe." 
1Samuel1:14 Eli a re go yena: “O tla fihla neng o tagwa? tlosa beine ya gago go wena. 
1Samuel1:15 Ana a fetola a re: “Ee, mong wa ka, ka mosadi wa moya wa go nyama; Ga se ka nwa beine goba seno se se tagago, eupsa ka tsholletse moya wa ka pele ga Morena." 
1Samuel1:16 O se ka wa bala lekgoba la gago e le morwedi wa Beliale, ka gobane go fihla ga bjale ka boletse ka go fegelwa ga ka le ka tlaisego ya ka." 
1Samuel1:17 Eli a fetola a re: Sepela ka khutso, Modimo wa Baiseraele a go fe kgopelo ya gago ye o mo kgopetsego yona." 
1Samuel1:18 Mosadi a re: “A lekgoba la gago la mosadi a bone kgaugelo mahlong a gago.” Ka gona mosadi yoo a ya go ja, sefahlego sa gagwe se se sa hlwa se nyamile." 
1Samuel1:19 Ba tsoga e sa le ka pela mesong ba khunamela pele ga Jehofa le ba boela morago ba tla ntlong ya bona kua Rama; Elikana a reela mosadi wa gagwe leina la Hanna; Jehofa a mo gopola. 
1Samuel1:20 Ka gona ya re ge nako ya gore Hanna a ima, a belega morwa le a mo rea leina la Samuele, a re: “Ka gobane ka mo kgopetse go Jehofa.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Monna Elkana le ba lapa la gagwe ka moka ba rotogela go neela Jehofa sehlabelo sa ngwaga le ngwaga le kano ya gagwe. 
1Samuel1:22 Eupsa Ana ga se a ka a rotoga; ka gobane a re go monna wa gagwe: “Nka se rotoge go fihlela ngwana a belegwa; 
1Samuel1:23 Elkana monna wa gagwe a re go yena: “Dira se o bonalago se le botse; dula go fihlela o mo tlosa; ka Jehofa feela yo a tiisetsago lentsu la gagwe. Ka moka mosadi yoo a dula fase a amusa morwa wa gagwe go fihlela a mo kgwesa. 
1Samuel1:24 Ge a mo kgwesa, a mo isa le yena, a na le dipoo tse tharo, le efa e tee ya bupi le lekotlelo la beine, a mo tlisa ntlong ya Jehofa kua Shilo ka e nyenyane." 
1Samuel1:25 Ba hlaba poo, ba tlisa ngwana go Eli." 
1Samuel1:26 A re: “Mong wa ka, ka ge moya wa gago o phela, mong wa ka, ka nna mosadi yo a bego a eme kgauswi le wena mo, a rapela Jehofa.”" 
1Samuel1:27 Ka rapeletse ngwana yo; le Jehofa Modimo o ile a nnea kgopelo yeo ka mo kgopetsego yona. 
1Samuel1:28 Ka ka baka leo le nna ka kgopetsego Jehofa; matsatsi ka moka a bophelo bja gagwe o tla ba yo mokgethwa go Jehofa. Le o ile a rapela Jehofa moo. 
1Samuel2:1 Hanna a rapela a re: Pelo ya ka e thabile Morena, lenaka la ka le phagamisitswe Moreneng; molomo wa ka o buletswe manaba a ka; gobane ka thabile ka pholoso ya gago." 
1Samuel2:2 Ga go na yo a swanago le Jehofa, ka gobane ga go na yo a swanago le wena, le leswika le le swanago le Modimo wa rena." 
1Samuel2:3 O se ka wa bolela ka boikgogomoso; anka boikgogomoso bo se ka bja tswa molomong wa gago, gobane Jehofa ka Modimo wa tsebo, le ditiro di lekantshwa ka yena." 
1Samuel2:4 Bora bja bagale bo robegile, le bao ba kgopsago ba tlemilwe ka matla." 
1Samuel2:5 Bao ba bego ba kgotsofetse ba ithekisetsa bogobe. Bao ba swerwego ka tlala ba ema ba belega bana ba supago; yo a bego a na le bana ba bantsi o be a fokola. 
1Samuel2:6 Gobane Morena ka monei wa bophelo; O theogela Hadese le a rotoga. 
1Samuel2:7 Jehofa ka yena yo a diilago, e bile ka yena yo a humilego; O a kokobetsa le go godisa." 
1Samuel2:8 O tsosa modiidi leroleng, a emisa mokgopedi leroleng, e le gore a mo bee le dikgosana le a mo dire bohwa bja sedulo sa bogosi sa letago; gobane dikokwane tsa lefatshe ka tsa Morena, le o na le lefatshe godimo ga tsona." 
1Samuel2:9 O tla boloka maoto a bakgethwa ba gagwe, le ba kgopo ba tla homola leswiswing; gobane ka kgapeletso ga go yo a tlago go fenya." 
1Samuel2:10 Manaba a Jehofa a tla pshatlaganywa; o tla ba duma a le legodimong: Jehofa o tla ahlola mafelo a lefatshe; o tla nea kgosi ya gagwe matla, a phagamisa lenaka la motlotswa wa gagwe." 
1Samuel2:11 Elikana a ya Rama ntlong ya gagwe. Mosemane yoo o ile a hlankala Jehofa pele ga moperisita Eli. 
1Samuel2:12 Barwa ba Eli e be e le barwa ba Belia; ba be ba sa tsebe Morena. 
1Samuel2:13 Mokgwa wa baperisita le setshaba e be e le gore ge motho le ge e le ofe a neela sehlabelo, mohlanka wa moperisita a tla, ge nama e be e bela, a swere meno a mararo." 
1Samuel2:14 A e bedise ka paneng goba ka pitseng goba ka pitseng goba ka pitseng; tsohle tseo di neelwago ka nama, moperisita o a itseela tsona. Se ka seo ba se dirilego kua Shilo le Baisraele ka moka bao ba tlilego moo." 
1Samuel2:15 Le gona, pele ba fisa mafura, mohlanka wa moperisita o be a tla a re go monna yo a bego a dira sehlabelo: “Neela moperisita dijo; gobane a ka se nwe nama le lena, eupsa o tla nwa." 
1Samuel2:16 Ge e ba motho a ka re go yena: “Anka ba se ka ba fisa mafura ka yona nako yeo, o tsee tse dintsi tseo moya wa gago o di kganyogago; le a re go yena: Ee; eupsa o swanetse go nnea yona bjale; le ge e ba go se bjalo, ka tla e tsea ka kgapeletso." 
1Samuel2:17 Sebe sa masogana ao e be e le se segolo kudu pele ga Jehofa, ka gobane banna ba be ba hloile sehlabelo sa Jehofa." 
1Samuel2:18 Eupsa Samuele e be e sa le ngwana pele ga Jehofa, a tlemilwe ka efode ya linene." 
1Samuel2:19 Go feta moo, banna bao ba mo direla kobo yeo le ba mo tlisetsa yona ngwaga le ngwaga ge a be a rotoga le monna wa gagwe bakang sa sehlabelo sa ngwaga le ngwaga." 
1Samuel2:20 Eli a segofatsa Elkana le mosadi wa gagwe a re: “Jehofa a go fe peu ya mosadi yo bakang sa kadimo yeo e adimilwego Jehofa.” Ka moka ba ya ntlong ya bona. 
1Samuel2:21 Jehofa a etela Hanna, a ima le a belega barwa ba bararo le barwedi ba babedi. Ngwana Samuele a gola pele ga Jehofa." 
1Samuel2:22 Eli o be a tsofetse kudu le a kwele tsohle tseo barwa ba gagwe ba di dirago Baiseraele ka moka; le kamoo ba bego ba robala le basadi bao ba bego ba kgobokane mojakong wa taberenakale ya kopano. 
1Samuel2:23 A re go bona: “Ka ka baka la’ng le dira dilo tse bjalo? Gobane ka kwele ka ditiro tsa gago tse mpe go batho ba ka moka. 
1Samuel2:24 Ee, bana ba ka; gobane ga se mo gobotse ge ka ekwa, o dira gore setshaba sa Jehofa se tshele." 
1Samuel2:25 Ge motho yo mongwe a senyetsa yo mongwe, moahlodi o tla mo ahlola; eupsa ge e ba motho a senyetsa Jehofa, ka mang yo a tlago go mo lopa? Eupsa ga se ba theetsa lentsu la mohlakodi, ka gobane Morena o be a nyaka go ba bolaya." 
1Samuel2:26 Ngwana Samuele a gola, a kgahlwa ka Jehofa le batho." 
1Samuel2:27 Monna wa Modimo a tla go Eli, a re go yena: “Se ka seo Jehofa a se boletsego: ‘Na ka ile ka iponagatsa ba ntlo ya tatago ge ba be ba le Egepeto ntlong ya Faro?" 
1Samuel2:28 Na ka mo kgethile melokong ka moka ya Baiseraele gore e be moperisita wa ka, gore a rotogele go nna, a tshume diorelo, a apare efoda pele ga ka? Na ka file tatago dihlabelo ka moka tsa go fiswa tsa bana ba Baiseraele?" 
1Samuel2:29 Ka ka baka leo o raga mohlaselwa wa ka le sehlabelo sa ka legatong la ka; Na o hlompha barwa ba gago go mpheta ka go ba nontsha ka dihlabelo tse kgolo tsa setshaba sa ka sa Baiseraele? 
1Samuel2:30 Ka gona Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele o re: Ruri ka boletse gore ntlo ya gago le ntlo ya tatago e sepele pele ga ka; eupsa Jehofa, wena motho, o be kgole le nna! Gobane bao ba nkgodisago, ka tla ba hlompha, le bao ba nnyatsago ba tla nyatswa." 
1Samuel2:31 Bona, go tla matsatsi ao ka tlago go kgaola letsogo la gago le letsogo la ntlo ya tatago, gore go se be le mokgalabje ka lapeng la gago." 
1Samuel2:32 Mpone ka ntlong ya ka ka mahumo ka moka ao Modimo a tlago go a nea Baisraele; ka lapeng la gago go ka se be le mokgalabje go isa mehleng ya neng le neng. 
1Samuel2:33 Monna wa gago yo nka se mo tseego go mmago, o tla go fedisa mahlo, a go tshwenya pelo;" 
1Samuel2:34 Se e tla ba pontsho go wena, yeo e tlago go wela barwa ba gago ba babedi, Hofini le Finease; ka letsatsi le lengwe bobedi bja bona ba tla hwa." 
1Samuel2:35 Ka tla ntsosa moperisita yo a botegago yo a tlago go dira go ya ka seo se lego pelong ya ka le monaganong wa ka. Ka tla mo agela ntlo ye e tiilego; le o tla dula o le ka thoko ga motlotswa wa ka. 
1Samuel2:36 Motho yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a setsego ntlong ya gago a khunamele yena ka silifera le senkgwa, a re: “Ntlise go yo mongwe wa baperisita.” Diofisi, gore ka kgone go ja seripa sa bogobe." 
1Samuel3:1 Morwa wa Samuele a hlankala Jehofa pele ga Eli. Lentsu la Morena le be le le botse mehleng yeo; go be go se na pono e bulegilego. 
1Samuel3:2 Eli o be a rapaletse lefelong la gagwe, mahlo a gagwe a thoma go fifala moo a sa kgonego go bona;" 
1Samuel3:3 Lebone la Modimo wa thereso le be le se la tingwa tempeleng ya Jehofa, moo Samuele a bego a robetse le areka ya Modimo wa thereso;" 
1Samuel3:4 Jehofa a bitsa Samuele a re: “Ka nna yo; 
1Samuel3:5 A kitimela go Eli, a re: “Ka nna yo; gobane O mpiditse. A araba: Ga se ka bitsa; robala gape. O ile a robala." 
1Samuel3:6 Jehofa o ile a bitsa Samuele gape. Samuele a ema a ya go Eli, a re: Ka nna yo; gobane O mpiditse. A mo fetola a re: “Ga se ka bitsa, morwa wa ka; robala gape." 
1Samuel3:7 Samuele o be a se a hlwa a tseba Jehofa, le lentsu la Jehofa ga se la hlwa a utollwa go yena." 
1Samuel3:8 Jehofa o ile a bitsa Samuele ka lekga la boraro. A tsoga a ya go Eli a re: Ka nna yo! gobane O mpiditse. Eli a lemoga gore Jehofa o biditse ngwana. 
1Samuel3:9 Eli a re go Samuele: “Sepela o robale; gobane mohlanka wa gago o a kwa. Samuele a ya a robala legatong la gagwe. 
1Samuel3:10 Jehofa a tla, a ema, a bitsa bjalo ka dinako tse dingwe: “Samuele, Samuele.” Samuele a araba, a re: “Bolela; gobane mohlanka wa gago o a kwa." 
1Samuel3:11 Jehofa a re go Samuele: “Bona, ka tla dira selo Baiseraele, seo ditsebe tsa yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a se kwago di tlago go tshoswa." 
1Samuel3:12 Mohlang woo ka tla phethagatsa Eli tsohle tseo ka di boletsego mabapi le ntlo ya gagwe; ge nka thoma, ka tla fetsa gape." 
1Samuel3:13 Gobane ka mmoditse gore ka tla ahlola ntlo ya gagwe go ya go ile ka baka la bokgopo bjo a bo tsebago; gobane barwa ba gagwe ba be ba ba kwera, eupsa a se ba thibele." 
1Samuel3:14 Ka baka leo ka enne ba ntlo ya Eli gore molato wa ntlo ya Eli o ka se hlwekiswe ka dihlabelo goba ka sebego sa ruri. 
1Samuel3:15 Samuele a robala go fihla mesong, a bula mejako ya ntlo ya Jehofa. Samuele a tshaba go bontsha Eli sefahlego sa gagwe." 
1Samuel3:16 Ka moka Eli a bitsa Samuele a re: “Samuele, morwa wa ka.” A mo fetola a re: “Ka nna yo.”" 
1Samuel3:17 A re: “Lentsu leo Jehofa a go boditsego lona ka lefe? Ka kgopela gore le se ka la nkutela; Modimo a go dire se, le go feta fao ge o ka uta selo go tsohle tseo o mpoditsego tsona." 
1Samuel3:18 Samuele a mo botsa ka moka, a se mo utele selo. O itse: Ka Jehofa; A a dire seo a bonago se lokile." 
1Samuel3:19 Samuele o ile a gola le Jehofa o be a na le yena, le ga se a ka a dumelela mantsu a gagwe a fela." 
1Samuel3:20 Baiseraele ka moka go tloga Dani go fihla Beresheba ba tseba gore Samuele o hlomilwe gore e be moporofeta wa Jehofa. 
1Samuel3:21 Jehofa a iponagatsa gape kua Shilo, ka gobane Jehofa o ile a iponatsa go Samuele kua Shilo ka lentsu la Jehofa." 
1Samuel4:1 Lentsu la Samuele la fihla go Baiseraele ka moka. Baiseraele ba tswa go yo lwa le Bafilisitia, ba hloma mesasa kua Ebenesere. Bafilisitia ba dikanetsa Afeka." 
1Samuel4:2 Bafilisitia ba thoma go tia go Baiseraele, le ge go be go e-ba le ntwa, Baiseraele e ile ya fenywa pele ga Bafilisitia; ba bolaya batho ba naga ye e ka bago banna ba bagale ba dikate tse nne." 
1Samuel4:3 Ge banna bao ba fihla mesaseng, bagolo ba Baiseraele ba re: “Ka ka baka la’ng Jehofa a re otla lehono pele ga Bafilisitia?” A re rotogeng re yo re tlisa areka ya kgwerano ya Morena kua Shilo, gore e tle gare ga rena, e re pholose diatleng tsa manaba a rena." 
1Samuel4:4 Setshaba sa romela molaetsa Shilo, sa tlisa areka ya kgwerano ya Jehofa wa madira, yo a dulago magareng ga bakarubi; Barwa ba babedi ba Eli, Hofini le Finehase, ba be ba na le areka ya kgwerano ya Modimo." 
1Samuel4:5 Ge areka ya kgwerano ya Jehofa e tsena mesaseng, Baiseraele ka moka e ile ya goeletsa ka mokgosi o mogolo, moo lefatshe la sikinyegago gape." 
1Samuel4:6 Ge Bafilisitia ba ekwa lesata la mokgosi, ba re: “Mokgosi wo mogolo wo o lego mesaseng ya Baheberu o bolela’ng?” Ba kwa gore areka ya Morena e tlile mesaseng." 
1Samuel4:7 Bafilisitia ba tshoga, ka ge ba be ba re: “Modimo o tlile mesaseng.” Ka moka ba re: Re madimabe! gobane selo se se bjalo se be se se gona pele." 
1Samuel4:8 Re madimabe! ka mang yo a tlago go re hlakodisa diatleng tsa medimo ye e matla? ka yona medimo yeo e ilego ya tshabela BaEgepeto dikotlo ka moka lesokang. 
1Samuel4:9 Lena Bafilisitia, le tie le le itloseng bjalo ka batho, gore le se ka la hlankala Baheberu go etsa ge ba le hlankatse." 
1Samuel4:10 Bafilisitia ba lwa, Baiseraele a fenywa, yo mongwe le yo mongwe a tshabela tenteng ya gagwe. Ka moka gwa ba le polao ye kgolo; ka gobane Baiseraele ba 30 000 ba ile ba wa ka maoto." 
1Samuel4:11 Areka ya Modimo ya tsewa; barwa ba babedi ba Eli, Hofini le Finehase, ba bolawa." 
1Samuel4:12 Monna wa Babenjamine a tshaba madira a tla Shilo ka lona letsatsi leo, a gagogile diaparo tsa gagwe, a rwele lefatshe hlogong ya gagwe." 
1Samuel4:13 Ge a fihla, a bona Eli a dutse setulong kgauswi le tsela le a dula a lebeletse, ka gobane pelo ya gagwe e be e thothomela ka baka la areka ya Modimo wa thereso. Ge monna yoo a fihla motseng woo, o ile a rera, le motse ka moka wa lla." 
1Samuel4:14 Ge Eli a ekwa lesata la mokgosi, a re: “Lesata la lesata le ka lefe? Ka moka monna yoo a kitimela go tsena le a botsa Eli." 
1Samuel4:15 Eli o be a na le mengwaga ye masometshela-tee; mahlo a gagwe a be a le leswiswi kudu gore a ka bona. 
1Samuel4:16 Monna a re go Eli: “Ka nna yo a tswilego mesaseng, le lehono ka tshabile ka ntle ga mesasa.” A re: “Mora wa ka, bothata ka eng moo?" 
1Samuel4:17 Morongwa a araba a re: “Baiseraele e tshabile pele ga Bafilisitia, le go bile le polao e kgolo gare ga setshaba, le barwa ba gago ba babedi, Hofini le Finehase, ba hwile le areka ya Modimo e tserwe.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Ge a bolela ka areka ya Modimo wa thereso, a wela setulong ka thoko ga kgoro, molala wa gagwe wa robega le a hwa, ka gobane e be e le mokgalabje e bile a imela. Ka moka a etelela pele Baiseraele ka nywaga e 40." 
1Samuel4:19 Morwedi wa gagwe, mosadi wa Finease, o be a imile, a le kgauswi le go belega; ge a ekwa gore areka ya Modimo e tserwe, le gore mmatswale wa gagwe le monna wa gagwe ba hwile, a wa fase, a belega; gobane bohloko bja gagwe bo be bo mo fentse." 
1Samuel4:20 Ge a hwa, basadi bao ba bego ba eme kgauswi le yena ba re go yena: “O se ka wa boifa; gobane o belege morwa. Eupsa ga se a ka a araba, e bile ga se a ka a nagana ka yona." 
1Samuel4:21 A bitsa Ikabode a re: “Letago le tlogile go Baiseraele, gobane areka ya Modimo e tserwe ka baka la tatagwe le monna wa gagwe.”" 
1Samuel4:22 A re: “Letago le tlogile go Baiseraele, gobane areka ya Modimo e tserwe.”" 
1Samuel5:1 Bafilisitia ba tsea areka ya Modimo, ba e tlisa go tswa Ebenesere, ba e tlisa Ashdode." 
1Samuel5:2 Bafilisitia ba tsea Areka ya Modimo, ba e tlisa ka ntlong ya Dagone, ba e bea pele ga Dagoni." 
1Samuel5:3 Ge ba etswa Ashdode e sa le ka pela, ba bona Dagone a wetse fase pele ga areka ya Jehofa. Ba tsea Dagone ba mo busetsa lefelong la gagwe." 
1Samuel5:4 Ge ba tsoga e sa le ka pela mesong ya gosasa, ba bona Dagone a wetse fase pele ga areka ya Jehofa; Hlogo ya Dagone le matsogo ka bobedi di ile tsa kgaolwa mojakong; ka kutu ya Dagone feela yeo e ilego ya sala ka go yena." 
1Samuel5:5 Ka ka baka leo baperisita ba Dagoni goba motho le ge e le ofe yo a tsenago ka ntlong ya Dagone ba sa gatago mojako wa Dagone kua Ashdode go fihla le lehono. 
1Samuel5:6 Eupsa seatla sa Jehofa sa ba imela ba Ashdode, a ba bolaya ka bogale bja tshosa, Ashdode le mabopong a yona." 
1Samuel5:7 Ge banna ba Ashdode ba bona gore go bjalo, ba re: “Areka ya Modimo wa Baiseraele e se ka ya dula le rena, ka gobane seatla sa gagwe se imela godimo ga rena le godimo ga Dagoni modimo wa rena.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Ka gona ba roma batho gore ba kgobokatse marena ka moka a Bafilisitia go bona, ba re: “Re tla dira’ng ka areka ya Modimo wa Baiseraele? Ba fetola ba re: “Ka ka gobane areka ya Modimo wa Baiseraele e be e iswa Gathe.” Ka gona ba tlisa areka ya Modimo wa Baiseraele moo." 
1Samuel5:9 Ge ba be ba o dikanetsa, seatla sa Jehofa sa lwa le motse ka tshenyo e kgolo kudu. Magoro ao." 
1Samuel5:10 Ka ka baka leo ba ilego ba romela areka ya Modimo wa thereso kua Ekorone. Ya re ge areka ya Modimo e fihla Ekrone, Baekrone ba goeletsa ba re: “Ba re tlisitse areka ya Modimo wa Baiseraele gore ba re bolaye le setshaba sa rena.”" 
1Samuel5:11 Ka gona ba roma batho ba yo kgobokatsa marena ka moka a Bafilisitia le ba re: “Areka ya Modimo wa Baiseraele e boele lefelong la yona, e le gore e se ka ya re bolaya le setshaba sa rena; ka gobane go ile gwa ba le tshenyo e bolayago motseng ka moka; Seatla sa Modimo se be se le boima kudu fao." 
1Samuel5:12 Banna bao ba sa hwego ba bethwa, le mokgosi wa motse wa rotogela legodimong." 
1Samuel6:1 Areka ya Jehofa e be e le nageng ya Bafilisitia dikgwedi tse supago. 
1Samuel6:2 Bafilisitia ba bitsa baperisita le banoge ba re: “Re tla dira’ng ka areka ya Jehofa?” re botse ka yona le re tla e isa lefelong la yona. 
1Samuel6:3 Ba re: “Ge e ba o ka roma areka ya Modimo wa Baiseraele, o se ka wa e romela e nnosi; eupsa le ge go le bjalo mo busetseng sebego sa molato; o tla fola, le o tla tseba lebaka leo ka lona seatla sa gagwe se sa gogolego go wena." 
1Samuel6:4 Ba re: “Sehlabelo sa molato e tla ba eng, gore re boele go yena?” Ba fetola ba re: “Dipeba tse hlano tsa gauta le dipeba tse hlano tsa gauta, go ya ka palo ya marena a Bafilisitia;" 
1Samuel6:5 Ka gona dira diswantsho tsa maswika a lena a go sila, le diswantsho tsa dipeba tsa lena tseo di senyago lefatshe; bokang Modimo wa Baiseraele; mohlomong a tla emisa seatla sa gagwe go lena, le medimo ya lena, le naga ya lena." 
1Samuel6:6 Bjale ka ka baka la’ng le thatafatsa dipelo tsa lena go etsa ge BaEgepeto le Faro ba thatafaditse dipelo tsa bona? Ge A be a soma ka mohlolo gare ga bona, na ga se ba dumelela batho go sutha le go huduga?" 
1Samuel6:7 Bjale dira koloyana ye mpsha, o tsee dikgomo tse pedi tsa maswi, tseo di sa tlego joko, o tleme dikgomo ka koloyana, o tlise dinamane tsa tsona gae go tsona;" 
1Samuel6:8 Tsea areka ya Jehofa o e beye ka koloyaneng; le mekgabiso ya gauta yeo o tlago go mo busetsa yona e le sebego sa molato, ka lepokising la yona; e tlogele e sepele." 
1Samuel6:9 Bona, bo ile bja rotoga ka tsela go tloga lebopong la gagwe go ya Bethe-shemeshe, le moo a re direla bobe bjo bogolo; eupsa ge e ba go se bjalo, gona re tla tseba gore e be e se seatla sa gagwe seo se re otilego; e be e le sebaka seo se re diragetsego." 
1Samuel6:10 Banna bao ba dira bjalo; a tsea dikgomo tse pedi tsa go gama, a di kgomaretsa ka koloyana, a tswalela dinamane tsa tsona ka ntlong." 
1Samuel6:11 Ba bea areka ya Jehofa godimo ga koloyana, le lepokisi le le nago le dipeba tsa gauta le diswantsho tsa dinaka tsa tsona." 
1Samuel6:12 Dikgomo tsa sepela tseleng ya go otlologa go ya Betheshemeshe, tsa sepela tseleng e kgolo, di lla ge di sepela, tsa se fapogele ka go le letona goba ka go le letshadi; marena a Bafilisitia a ba latelela go fihla mollwaneng wa Betheshemeshe." 
1Samuel6:13 Banna ba Bethe-Shemeshe ba be ba buna puno ya bona ya korong moeding, ba emisa mahlo ba bona areka, ba thaba ge ba e bona." 
1Samuel6:14 Ka morago ga moo koloyana ya fihla tshemong ya Jošua, ya Mobet-Shemeshe, ya ema moo, moo go bego go na le leswika le legolo; ba rema dikgong tsa koloyana, ba direla Jehofa dikgomo tsa go fiswa." 
1Samuel6:15 Balefi ba theosa areka ya Jehofa le lepokisi leo le bego le na le lona, leo go lona go bego go na le mekgabiso ya gauta, ba di bea mohlareng o mogolo; banna ba Bethe-Shemeshe ba neela Jehofa dihlabelo tsa go fiswa le dihlabelo letsatsing leo." 
1Samuel6:16 Ge marena a mahlano a Bafilisitia a bona seo, ba boela Ekrone letsatsing leo." 
1Samuel6:17 Tse ka disekale tsa gauta tseo Bafilisitia ba di buseditsego Jehofa e le sebego sa molato; Ashidode, Gasa, Ashkalone, Gathe, Ekrone;" 
1Samuel6:18 le dipeba tsa gauta, go ya ka palo ya metse ka moka ya Bafilisitia yeo e bego e le ya marena a mahlano, go tloga metseng e sireleditswego le metsana go fihla leswikang le legolo la Abele, moo ba ilego ba bea areka ya Jehofa go e hlokomela. MODIMO. E sa le gona go fihla le lehono tshemong ya Jošua wa Betheshemeshe." 
1Samuel6:19 A bolaya banna ba Bethe-shemeshe, ka gobane ba be ba tsena ka arekang ya Jehofa, ee, a bolaya banna ba masometshela le banna ba bahlano; go bolaya." 
1Samuel6:20 Banna ba Bethe-Shemeshe ba re: “Ka mang yo a ka kgonago go ema pele ga Jehofa Modimo yo yo mokgethwa? o tla rotogela go mang wa rena? 
1Samuel6:21 Ba roma baromiwa go badudi ba Kiriathe-jearime, ba re: “Bafilisitia ba busitse areka ya Jehofa; theogela fase le o e ikhwetse." 
1Samuel7:1 Banna ba Kiriathe-Jearime ba tla, ba tsea Areka ya Jehofa, ba e tlisa ka ntlong ya Abinadaba yeo e lego mmotong, ba kgethagatsa Eleasara morwa wa gagwe gore a hlokomele areka ya Jehofa." 
1Samuel7:2 Areka ya dula nako e telele kua Kiriathe-Jearime; ntlo ya Baiseraele ka moka e be e dutse e llela Jehofa ka nywaga e masomepedi. 
1Samuel7:3 Samuele a re go ntlo ka moka ya Baiseraele: “Ge le ka boela go Jehofa ka dipelo tsa lena ka moka, gona tlosa medimo e sele le Ashtarothe gare ga lena, le lebise dipelo tsa lena go Jehofa, le mo hlankale, le mo hlankale feela.” O tla go pholosa diatleng tsa Bafilisitia." 
1Samuel7:4 Ka moka bana ba Baiseraele ba lahla Baali le Ashtarothe, ba hlankala Jehofa a nnosi." 
1Samuel7:5 Samuele a re: Kgobokatsa Baiseraele ka moka Mitsepha, ka go rapelele Jehofa." 
1Samuel7:6 Ba kgobokana Mitsipe, ba ga metsi, ba a tshollela pele ga Jehofa, ba ikona dijo letsatsing leo, ba re moo: “Re senyetse Jehofa.” Samuele a laela bana ba Baiseraele gore ba ye Mitseva." 
1Samuel7:7 Ge Bafilisitia ba ekwa gore bana ba Baiseraele ba kgobokane kua Mitsepha, marena a Bafilisitia a rotogela Baiseraele. Ge Baisraele ba ekwa ka taba yeo, ba tshoga Bafilisitia." 
1Samuel7:8 Bana ba Baiseraele ba re go Samuele: “O se ka wa kgaotsa go bitsa Jehofa Modimo wa rena, gore a re pholose diatleng tsa Bafilisitia." 
1Samuel7:9 Samuele a tsea kwana yeo e amusago a e neela Jehofa e le sebego se se feletsego sa go fiswa le Samuele a bitsa Jehofa bakang sa Baiseraele; Jehofa a mo theetsa. 
1Samuel7:10 Ge Samuele a neela sehlabelo sa go fiswa, Bafilisitia ba batamela go lwa le Baiseraele. Ba fenywa ka Baisraele." 
1Samuel7:11 Banna ba Baiseraele ba tswa Mitsepha ba rakadisa Bafilisitia ba ba bolaya go fihla Bethe-kara. 
1Samuel7:12 Ka moka Samuele a tsea leswika, a le bea magareng ga Mitsipe le Shene, a le reela leina la Ebenesere, a re: “Go fihla ga bjale Jehofa o re thusitse.”" 
1Samuel7:13 Ka ge ba be ba kokobetswe pele ga Bafilisitia, ba se sa tla lebopong la Baiseraele; seatla sa Jehofa sa lwa le Bafilisitia mehleng ka moka ya Samuele." 
1Samuel7:14 Metse yeo Bafilisitia ba e tserego Baiseraele e ile ya busetswa Baiseraeleng, go tloga Ekrone go fihla Gathe; naga ya gagwe ya hlakodisa Baiseraele diatleng tsa Bafilisitia. Ka moka gwa ba le khutso magareng ga Baiseraele le Baamore." 
1Samuel7:15 Samuele o ile a tswela pele a etelela pele Baiseraele matsatsing ka moka a bophelo bja gagwe. 
1Samuel7:16 Ngwaga le ngwaga a dikologa Bethele, Gilegala, Mitsepha, a ahlola Baiseraele mafelong ao ka moka." 
1Samuel7:17 Go boela morago ga gagwe e be e le Rama; gobane ntlo ya gagwe e be e le moo; a laela bana ba Baiseraele moo; a agela Jehofa sebeso moo. 
1Samuel8:1 Ya re ge Samuele a tsofetse, a bea barwa ba gagwe gore e be Baatlhodi ba Baiseraele." 
1Samuel8:2 Leina la leitsibulo la gagwe e be e le Joele; leina la wa bobedi, Abia; e be e le Baatlhodi kua Bereseba." 
1Samuel8:2 Leina la leitsibulo la gagwe e be e le Joele; leina la wa bobedi, Abia; e be e le Baatlhodi kua Bereseba." 
1Samuel8:3 Barwa ba gagwe ga se ba sepela ditseleng tsa gagwe, eupsa ba ile ba aroga ba nyaka go hwetsa poelo e sa botegego le ba amogela tsogo-le-kobong le kahlolo e kgopamego." 
1Samuel8:4 Bagolo ka moka ba Baiseraele ba kgobokana, ba tla go Samuele kua Rama." 
1Samuel8:5 A re go yena: “Bona, o tsofetse, barwa ba gago ga ba sepele ditseleng tsa gago; bjale, re dirile kgosi gore e re ahlole bjalo ka ditshaba ka moka." 
1Samuel8:6 Eupsa taba yeo e ile ya se thabisa Samuele ge ba re: “Re fe kgosi gore e re ahlole.” Samuele a rapela Morena. 
1Samuel8:7 Jehofa a re go Samuele: “Theetsa lentsu la setshaba go tsohle tseo ba go botsago tsona, gobane ga se wa ba lahla, eupsa nna ka ba ganne, gore ka ba buse." 
1Samuel8:8 Go ya ka mediro ka moka yeo ba e dirilego go tloga letsatsing leo ka ba ntshitsego Egepeto go fihla letsatsing leo ba ntlogetsego gore ka hlankale medimo e mengwe, ba go dira bjalo." 
1Samuel8:9 Bjale theetsang lentsu la bona; eupsa ba ba kgalema, ba ba tsebisa tshwanelo ya kgosi yeo e tlago go ba busa." 
1Samuel8:10 Samuele a botsa batho bao ba mo kgopelago kgosi mantsu ka moka a Jehofa. 
1Samuel8:11 A tswela pele ka gore: “Tsela ya kgosi yeo e tlago go go busa se: E tla tsea barwa ba gago le ya ba beela dikoloi tsa yona tsa ntwa le banamedi ba yona ba dipere; ba bangwe ba tla tshaba pele ga dikoloi tsa gagwe tsa ntwa. 
1Samuel8:12 O mo kgethe gore e be molaodi wa ba dikate le ba masome a mahlano; o tla ba kgetha gore ba mo fedise, ba thube dibetsa tsa gagwe le go dira dibetsa tsa gagwe tsa ntwa le dikoloi tsa gagwe tsa ntwa." 
1Samuel8:13 Le tla tsea barwedi ba lena gore e be baapei, babeki le baapei." 
1Samuel8:14 O tla tsea masemo a lena, le dirapa tsa lena tsa merara, le dirapa tsa lena tsa mehlware, e lego tse kaone-kaone tsa tsona, a di nea bahlanka ba gagwe." 
1Samuel8:15 O tla tsea karolo ya lesome ya peu ya gago le ya dirapa tsa gago tsa merara, a e nea bahlankadi ba gagwe le bahlanka ba gagwe." 
1Samuel8:16 O tla tsea bahlanka ba gago ba banna, le makgoba a gago, le masogana a gago a mabotse kudu, le dipokolo tsa gago, a ba bea modirong wa gagwe." 
1Samuel8:17 O tla tsea karolo ya lesome ya dinku tsa lena, le le tla ba bahlanka ba gagwe." 
1Samuel8:18 Mohla woo le tla goeletsa ka baka la kgosi ya lena yeo le tlago go le kgethela; Jehofa a ka se go kwe letsatsing leo. 
1Samuel8:19 Eupsa setshaba sa gana go theetsa lentsu la Samuele; ba araba ba re: “Ee!” eupsa re tla ba le kgosi yeo e tlago go re busa; 
1Samuel8:20 Gore re tle re swane le ditshaba ka moka; le gore kgosi ya rena e re ahlole, e re etele pele, e lwe dintwa tsa rena." 
1Samuel8:21 Samuele a kwa mantsu ka moka a setshaba, a a kwa ditsebeng tsa Jehofa." 
1Samuel8:22 Jehofa a re go Samuele: “Theetsa lentsu la bona, o ba dire kgosi.” Samuele a re go banna ba Baiseraele: “Yo mongwe le yo mongwe a ye motseng wa gabo.”" 
1Samuel9:1 Bjale go be go na le monna wa Babenjamine yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Kishi, morwa wa Abiele, morwa wa Tserore, morwa wa Begorathe, morwa wa Afia, MoBabenjamine, monna wa maatla." 
1Samuel9:2 O be a na le morwa yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Saulo, lesogana le le kgethilwego le lebotse; le go be go se yo a swanago le yena gare ga bana ka moka ba Baiseraele; go tloga lethekang go ya godimo o be a le motelele go feta motho le ge e le ofe yo mongwe." 
1Samuel9:3 Dipokolo tsa Kishi tatago Saulo di be di hwile. Kishi a re go Saulo morwa wa gagwe: “Tsea yo mongwe wa bahlanka, o eme o yo tsoma dipokolo;" 
1Samuel9:4 A feta thabeng ya Eferaime, a phatsa nageng ya Shalisha, eupsa ba se ba hwetse; le ba feta nageng ya Salim, le ba be ba se gona; a phatsa nageng ya Babenjamine le ba se ba bone." 
1Samuel9:5 Ge ba fihla nageng ya Tsefe, Saulo a re go mohlanka wa gagwe yo a bego a na le yena: “Etla re boele morago; tate yoo ga se a ka a kgaotsa go hlokomela ditonki le go re hlokomela." 
1Samuel9:6 A re go yena: “Bona bjale, motseng wo go na le monna wa Modimo, le ka monna yo a hlomphegago; se sengwe le se sengwe seo a se bolelago se a phethagala; a re yeng gona bjale; mohlomongwe a ka re bontsha tsela yeo re swanetsego go sepela ka yona." 
1Samuel9:7 Saulo a re go mohlanka wa gagwe: “Bona, ge re ka ya, re tla tlisa monna yoo? gobane senkgwa se fedile ka dibjaneng tsa rena, le ga go na mpho yeo e ka e tlisago go monna wa Modimo seo re nago le sona." 
1Samuel9:8 Mohlanka a araba Saulo gape a re: “Bona, ka na le karolo ya bone ya shekale ya silifera; Se ka tla se nea monna wa Modimo, gore a re botse tsela ya rena." 
1Samuel9:9 Mehleng ya pele kua Baiseraele, ge monna a be a e-ya go botsisa Modimo, o ile a re: “Etlang re yeng dinogeng tsa meoya; gobane yo a bitswago moporofeta lehono o be a bitswa mmoni." 
1Samuel9:10 Ka moka Saulo a re go mohlanka wa gagwe: “O boletswe gabotse; tla re sepele Ba boela motseng moo monna wa Modimo a bego a le gona. 
1Samuel9:11 Ge ba rotogela motseng, ba rotogela mmotong, ba hwetsa dikgarebe tse nnyane di etswa go yo ga metsi, ba re go bona: “Na mmoni ka mo?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Ba fetola ba re: “Ka yena; bona, O pele ga lena; akgofela, ka gobane lehono O tlile motseng; gobane go na le sehlabelo sa phatlalatsa lehono lefelong le le phagamego." 
1Samuel9:13 Gateetee ge o tsena motseng, o tla o hwetsa gateetee pele o rotogela lefelong le le phagamego go yo ja; gobane setshaba se ka se je go fihlela a etla, le sa segofatsa sehlabelo; le ka morago ba ja baeng. Ka fao ema bjale; gobane mo nakong ye o tla mo hwetsa." 
1Samuel9:14 Ba rotogela motseng, ge ba tsena motseng, Samuele a tswa go yo ba gahlanetsa, gore a rotogele lefelong le le phagamego." 
1Samuel9:15 Jehofa a tla go Samuele ditsebe tsa Jehofa letsatsing la pele ga ge Saulo a etla a re: 
1Samuel9:16 Gosasa mo e ka bago ka nako ye ka tla go romela monna yo a tswago nageng ya Babenjamine, ka tla mo tlotsa gore e be kgosana ya setshaba sa ka sa Baiseraele, a pholosa setshaba sa ka seatleng sa Bafilisitia; gobane ka e bone." 
1Samuel9:17 Ya re ge Samuele a bona Saulo, Jehofa a re go yena: “Bona monna yo ka boletsego le wena ka yena! O tla busa setshaba sa ka." 
1Samuel9:18 Ka moka Saulo a batamela Samuele kgorong, a re: “Mpotse gore ntlo ya mmoni e kae.”" 
1Samuel9:19 Samuele a fetola Saulo a re: “Ka nna mmoni; mo gogele godimo pele ga ka; gobane lehono o tla ja le Nna, le gosasa ka tla go lokolla go yo go botsa tsohle tseo di lego pelong ya gago." 
1Samuel9:20 Ge e le ditonki tsa lena tseo di timetsego matsatsing a mararo a go feta, ga se la di khutsisa; gobane di hweditswe. Le dikganyogo ka moka tsa Baiseraele di godimo ga bomang? Na ga se ka go wena le gohle ka ntlong ya gago?" 
1Samuel9:21 Saulo a araba a re: “Na ga ka Mobenyamini wa meloko e menyenyane ya Baiseraele? le peu ya ka ye mpsha gare ga meloko ka moka ya moloko wa Babenjamine? bjale ka ka lebaka la eng o bolela le nna ka tsela yeo? 
1Samuel9:22 Samuele a tsea Saulo le mohlanka wa gagwe a ba tlisa ka phaposing ya go robala, a ba dudisa lefelong le legolo gare ga bao ba laleditswego, bao e bego e le batho ba ka bago masometharo." 
1Samuel9:23 Samuele a re go moapei: “Tlisa kabelo yeo ka go filego yona, yeo ka go boditsego yona: “E apare.”" 
1Samuel9:24 Moapehi wa dinkgwa a tsea legetla leo le bego le le godimo ga lona, a le bea pele ga Saulo. Samuele a re: Lebelela tse dingwe! E bee pele ga gago le o je, ka gobane go fihla ga bjale e bolokatswe lena ga e sa le ka re: “Ka laleditse setshaba.” Ka gona Saulo a ja le Samuele letsatsing leo." 
1Samuel9:25 Ge ba theogile lefelong le le phagamego ba tsena motseng, Samuele a boledisana le Saulo godimo ga ntlo." 
1Samuel9:26 Ge ba tsoga e sa le mesong, Samuele a bitsa Saulo godimo ga ntlo, a re: “Tsoga, ka go romele.” Ka gona Saulo a mo bolaya, ba tswa ka bobedi, yena le Samuele." 
1Samuel9:27 Ge ba be ba theogela mafelelong a motse, Samuele o ile a re go Saulo: “Botsa mohlanka gore a tswele pele (go rena), eupsa emela, gore ka go botse lentsu la Jehofa. Modimo." 
1Samuel10:1 Samuele a tsea lenaka la mafura a le tshela hlogong ya gagwe, a mo atla, a re: “Na ga se gore Jehofa o go tlotse gore o be molaodi wa bohwa bja gagwe?”" 
1Samuel10:2 Ge o tlogile go nna lehono, o tla hwetsa banna ba babedi kgauswi le lebitla la Ragele mollwaneng wa Babenjamine kua Tseletsa; ba tla re go wena: Dipokolo tseo o ilego wa di tsoma di hweditswe; le bona, tatago o kgaoditse go hlokomela di-diesel, le o nyamile, o re: Ka tla dira eng ka morwa wa ka?" 
1Samuel10:3 Ge o tswela pele go tloga moo, o tla fihla lesokang la Tabora, le o tla kopana le banna ba bararo bao ba rotogelago go Modimo kua Bethele, yo mongwe a rwele dipudi tse tharo, yo mongwe a rwele dinkgwa tse tharo le yo mongwe a rwele seaparo sa go rwala ya beine." 
1Samuel10:4 Ba tla go dumedisa ba go nea dinkgwa tse pedi; seo o tlago go se amogela diatleng tsa bona. 
1Samuel10:5 Ka morago ga moo, o tla fihla mmotong wa Modimo, moo go nago le madira a Bafilisitia; ge o fihla motseng, o tla gahlana le lesaba la baporofeta leo le theogago go tswa godimo, le le eta pele ka harepa, moropa, phaephe le selepa; ba tla porofeta;" 
1Samuel10:6 Moya wa Jehofa o tla go wela, wa porofeta le bona, wa fetoswa motho yo mongwe." 
1Samuel10:7 Ge dipontsho tse di go bonala, itirele lefelo le lebotse; gobane Modimo o na le wena." 
1Samuel10:8 Theogela pele ga ka Gilegala; bona, ka tla theogela go lena go tlisa dihlabelo tsa go fiswa, le go dira dihlabelo tsa kabo; dula matsatsi a supago go fihlela ka tla go wena ka go botse seo o swanetsego go se dira." 
1Samuel10:9 Ya re ge a furalela Samuele, Modimo a mo nea pelo e nngwe." 
1Samuel10:10 Ge ba fihla mmotong, ba bona sehlopha sa baporofeta ba mo gahlanetsa; Moya wa Modimo wa tla godimo ga gagwe, le a porofeta gare ga bona." 
1Samuel10:11 Ya re ge bohle bao ba bego ba mo tseba pele ba bona gore o porofeta gare ga baporofeta, setshaba sa boledisana: “Ka eng se se tlilego go morwa wa Kishi?” Na Saulo le yena o gare ga baporofeta?" 
1Samuel10:12 Yo mongwe moo a araba a re: “Tatago bona ka mang? Ka fao ya ba seema: Na Saulo le yena o gare ga baporofeta? 
1Samuel10:13 Ge a fetsa go porofeta, a fihla lefelong le le phagamego." 
1Samuel10:14 Saulo malome wa gagwe a re go yena le mohlanka wa gagwe: “O ile kae?” Yena a re: “Go nyaka dipokolo; ge re bona gore ga ba gona, ra tla go Samuele." 
1Samuel10:15 Ka moka tate le malome Saulo ba re: “Mpotse seo Samuele a go boditsego sona. 
1Samuel10:16 Saulo a re go tatagwe: “O re boditse gabotse gore disele di hweditswe.” Eupsa ka mmuso wo Samuele a boletsego ka wona, ga se a ka a mmotsa." 
1Samuel10:17 Samuele a kgobokatsa setshaba go Jehofa kua Mitsepha; 
1Samuel10:18 a re go bana ba Baiseraele: “Se ka seo Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele a se boletsego: “Ka ntshitse Baiseraele Egepeto le ka le hlakodisa diatleng tsa BaEgepeto le diatleng tsa mebuso ka moka le go tswa diatleng tsa bao ba le gatelelago. 
1Samuel10:19 Lehono o lahlile Modimo wa gago, yo a go hlakodisitsego mathateng a gago ka moka le masetlapelong a gago; a re go yena: “Aowa, eupsa re bee kgosi.” Itokisetseng bjale pele ga Jehofa ka meloko ya lena le ka dikate tsa lena." 
1Samuel10:20 Ge Samuele a biditse meloko ka moka ya Baiseraele, moloko wa Babenjamine wa thopsa." 
1Samuel10:21 Ge a batamela moloko wa Babenjamine go ya ka malapa a bona, lapa la Matri la thopsa le Saulo morwa wa Kishi a thopsa; ge ba mo nyaka, ga a hwetswe." 
1Samuel10:22 Ka ka baka leo ba yago go botsisa Jehofa ge e ba monna yoo a sa tla mo. Jehofa a re: “Bona, o iphihla gare ga dilo tseo.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Ka gona ba kitima ba mo tlisa moo; ge a be a eme gare ga batho, o be a le motelele go feta batho le ge e le bafe go tloga magetleng a gagwe go ya godimo." 
1Samuel10:24 Samuele a re go setshaba ka moka: “Le a bona yo Jehofa a mo kgethilego, ga go na yo a swanago le yena gare ga setshaba ka moka? Ka moka setshaba ka moka sa goeletsa sa re: “Morena a pholose kgosi!" 
1Samuel10:25 Ka moka Samuele a botsa setshaba mokgwa wa mmuso, a o ngwala ka pukung, a o bea pele ga Jehofa. Samuele a roma setshaba ka moka, yo mongwe le yo mongwe a ya ntlong ya gagwe." 
1Samuel10:26 Saulo le yena a boela gae Gibea; o ile a sepela le sehlopha sa banna bao dipelo tsa bona di bego di kgoma Modimo. 
1Samuel10:27 Eupsa barwa ba Beliale ba re: “Monna yo o tla re pholosa bjang?” Ba mo nyatsa, ba mo tlisetsa dimpho. Eupsa o ile a homola." 
1Samuel11:1 Ka moka Nahashe wa Moamoni a rotoga, a hloma mesasa kgahlanong le Jabeshe-gileade, banna ka moka ba Jabeshe ba re go Nahashi: “Dira kgwerano le rena le re tla go hlankala.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Nahashe wa Moamoni a re go bona: “Ka tla dira kgwerano le lena ka seemo se, gore ka timole mahlo a bahlanka ba lena ka moka, ka gobose Baiseraele ka moka.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Bagolo ba Jabeshe ba re go yena: “Re fe matsatsi a supago a go khutsa gore re romele baromiwa mellwaneng ka moka ya Baiseraele; le bjale, ge go se na motho yo a re pholosago, re tla tswa go wena." 
1Samuel11:4 Ka moka baromiwa ba tla Gibea ya Saulo, ba bolela mantsu a ditsebe tsa setshaba." 
1Samuel11:5 Saulo a tswa nageng a latela mehlape; Saulo a re: “Na setshaba se a lla? Ba mmotsa ka banna ba Jabeshe. 
1Samuel11:6 Moya wa Modimo wa tla godimo ga Saulo ge a ekwa ditaba tseo, le kgalefo ya gagwe ya tuka kudu." 
1Samuel11:7 A tsea dikgomo, a di sega diripa, a di romela mabotong ka moka a Baiseraele ka diatla tsa baromiwa, a re: “Mang le mang yo a sa tswego ka morago ga Saulo le Samuele, go tla dirwa bjalo ka dikgomo tsa gagwe.” Poifo ya Morena ya wela setshaba, le sa tloga ka kwano e tee." 
1Samuel11:8 Ge a ba bala, bana ba Baiseraele e be e le ba dikate tse makgolo a mararo, banna ba Juda e le ba dikate tse masometharo." 
1Samuel11:9 Ba re go baromiwa bao ba tlilego: “Se le tla botsa banna ba Jabeshe-gileada: ‘Gosasa ge letsatsi le fisa, le tla ba le thuso. Baromiwa ba tla ba botsa banna ba Jabeshe; le ba thabile." 
1Samuel11:10 Banna ba Jabeshe ba re: “Gosasa re tla tswa go lwa le wena, le o re dire se sengwe le se sengwe seo se bonalago se le botse.”" 
1Samuel11:11 Ka letsatsi le le latelago Saulo a bea setshaba ka dihlopha tse tharo; ba tla gare ga setshaba ka masa, ba bolaya bana ba Amoni go fihla seetsa sa mesong." 
1Samuel11:12 Setshaba sa re go Samuele: “Ka mang yo a rego: ‘Na Saulo o tla re busa?’ ba theosetse re ba bolaye.” 
1Samuel11:13 Saulo a re: “Lehono go ka se bolawe motho le ge e le ofe, gobane lehono Jehofa o dirile pholoso go Baiseraele.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Samuele a re go setshaba: “Etlang re ye Gilegala re mpshafatse mmuso moo.” 
1Samuel11:15 Setshaba ka moka sa ya Gilegala; le moo ba bea Saulo kgosi pele ga Jehofa kua Gilegala; moo ba neela dihlabelo tsa tebogo pele ga Jehofa; Saulo le banna ka moka ba Baiseraele ba thaba kudu moo. 
1Samuel12:1 Samuele a re go Baiseraele ka moka: “Bona, ka theeditse lentsu la gago dilong ka moka tseo o mpoditsego tsona, ka go bea kgosi.”" 
1Samuel12:2 Bjale, bona, kgosi e sepela pele ga lena, le nna ka tsofetse e bile ka na le hlogo e mepududu; barwa ba ka ba na le lena, ka sepela le lena go tloga bofseng bja ka go fihla le lehono." 
1Samuel12:3 Ka nna yo: Ka hlatsetse pele ga Jehofa le pele ga motlotswa wa gagwe. Goba ka tsere lerete la mang? goba ka forile mang? ka lahlile mang? goba ka tlile tsogo-le-kobong ya mang gore ka tswalele mahlo ka yona? ka tla le busetsa yona. 
1Samuel12:4 Ba re: “Ga se wa re fora, wa re gatelela, ga se wa ka wa tsea selo seatleng sa motho le ge e le ofe.”" 
1Samuel12:5 A re go bona: “Jehofa ka hlatse kgahlanong le lena, mme motlotswa wa gagwe ka hlatse lehono, gore ga se la amogela selo seatleng sa ka. Ba fetola ba re: “Ka hlatse.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Samuele a re go setshaba: “Ka Jehofa yo a ilego a tswetsa pele Moše le Arone, le yo a tswetsego pele borakgolokhukhu ba lena nageng ya Egepeto." 
1Samuel12:7 Bjale ema, ka go lopa pele ga Jehofa mabapi le ditiro ka moka tsa go loka tseo Jehofa a di dirilego go wena le borakgolokhukhu ba gago." 
1Samuel12:8 Ge Jakobe a fihla Egepeto, botataweno ba llela Jehofa, Jehofa a roma Moše le Arone, bao ba ntshitsego borakgolokhukhu ba lena Egepeto, ba ba dudisa lefelong le." 
1Samuel12:9 Ba lebala Jehofa Modimo wa bona, a ba rekisetsa seatleng sa Sisera, molaodi wa madira a Hatsore, le seatleng sa Bafilisitia le seatleng sa kgosi ya Moaba, le ba lwa le bona." 
1Samuel12:10 Ba goeletsa Jehofa ba re: “Re dirile sebe, ka gobane re lahlile Jehofa, ra hlankala Baali le Asitarothe; re lokolla feela diatleng tsa manaba a rena, le re tla go hlankala." 
1Samuel12:11 Jehofa a roma Jerubaale, le Bedani, Jafete, le Samuele, ba go hlakodisa diatleng tsa manaba a gago ka mahlakoreng ka moka, wa dula o sireletsegile." 
1Samuel12:12 Ge o bona Nahashi kgosi ya bana ba Amoni a go lwa le wena, o tla re go nna: “Ee! eupsa kgosi e tla re busa, le ge Jehofa Modimo wa gago e le kgosi ya gago." 
1Samuel12:13 Bjale, bona kgosi yeo o e kgethilego, yeo o e latetsego! le bona, Jehofa o go tloditse gore o be kgosi." 
1Samuel12:14 Ge o ka boifa Jehofa, wa mo hlankala, wa theetsa lentsu la gagwe, wa se rabele malebana le taelo ya Jehofa, gona wena le kgosi yeo e go busago le tla latela Jehofa Modimo wa gago." 
1Samuel12:15 Eupsa ge e ba o sa theetse lentsu la Jehofa, eupsa wa rabela malebana le taelo ya Jehofa, gona seatla sa Jehofa se tla lwa le wena, go etsa ge se ile sa lwa le borakgolokhukhu ba gago." 
1Samuel12:16 Bjale ema o bone selo se segolo seo Jehofa a tlago go se dira pele ga mahlo a lena. 
1Samuel12:17 Na ga se puno ya korong lehono? Ka tla bitsa Jehofa, a roma diaduma le pula; gore o bone le go tseba gore bokgopo bja gago ka bjo bogolo, bjo o bo dirilego mahlong a Jehofa, ka go go kgopela kgosi." 
1Samuel12:18 Samuele a bitsa Jehofa; Ka gona Jehofa a roma diaduma le pula letsatsing leo, le batho ka moka ba boifa Jehofa le Samuele kudu." 
1Samuel12:19 Setshaba ka moka sa re go Samuele: “Rapelela Jehofa Modimo wa gago ka baka la bahlanka ba gago, gore re se ka ra hwa; gobane re okaditse bobe bjo go dibe tsa rena ka moka, gore re kgopele kgosi." 
1Samuel12:20 Samuele a re go setshaba: “Le se ka la boifa. 
1Samuel12:21 Le se ka la fapoga; gobane ka lefeela. 
1Samuel12:22 Gobane Jehofa a ka se tlogele setshaba sa gagwe ka baka la leina la gagwe le legolo, ka gobane o kgahlilwe ka Jehofa go le dira setshaba sa gagwe." 
1Samuel12:23 Ge e le nna, ge e le nna, Modimo a se ka a se dire sebe malebana le Jehofa ka go kgaotsa go le rapela; eupsa ka tla le ruta tsela e botse le e lokilego." 
1Samuel12:24 Fela boifa Jehofa, le mo hlankale ka thereso ka dipelo tsa lena ka moka; gobane le bone dilo ka moka tse dikgolo tseo a le diretsego tsona." 
1Samuel12:25 Eupsa ge le ka tswela pele le dira tse mpe, le tla gogolwa, lena le kgosi ya lena." 
1Samuel13:1 Saulo a busa Baiseraele ngwaga o tee. 
1Samuel13:2 Saulo a kgetha banna ba 3 000 go Baiseraele; ba 2 000 ba be ba na le Saulo kua Migma le Thabeng ya Bethele, le ba 1 000 ba be ba na le Jonathane kua Gibea kua Babenjamine. A busetsa batho ba bangwe ditenteng tsa bona." 
1Samuel13:3 Jonathane a fenya madira a Bafilisitia ao a bego a le Geba, le Bafilisitia ba kwa ka seo. Saulo a letsa phalafala nageng ka moka, a re: “Theetsang, lena Baheberu;" 
1Samuel13:4 Baiseraele ka moka ba kwa gore Saulo o fentse madira a Bafilisitia, le gore Baiseraele le yena o be a sisimisa Bafilisitia. Ka moka setshaba sa kgobokana ka morago ga Saulo kua Gilegala." 
1Samuel13:5 Bafilisitia ba kgobokana go yo lwa le Baiseraele, dikoloi tsa ntwa tse dikate tse masometharo le banamedi ba dipere ba dikate tse tshela le batho ba bjalo ka santa yeo e lego lebopong la lewatle ka bontsi; ba tloga ba hloma mesasa kua Migama, ka bohlabela bja Bethe-Avene." 
1Samuel13:6 Ge banna ba Baiseraele ba bona gore ba tlaletswe kudu (ka gobane batho ba be ba gateletsegile), ka moka setshaba sa thoma go iphihla magageng le dithokgweng le maswikang le mafelong a phagamego le meleteng." 
1Samuel13:7 Baheberu ba bangwe ba tshela Noka ya Jorodane ba ya nageng ya Gade le Gileade. Ge e le Saulo o be a sa dutse a le Gilegala le batho ka moka ba mo latela ba thothomela. 
1Samuel13:8 A dula matsatsi a supago go ya ka nako yeo Samuele a e beilego; eupsa Samuele ga se a ka a tla Gilegala; setshaba sa phatlalala go yena. 
1Samuel13:9 Saulo a re: “Ntlisetseng sehlabelo sa go fiswa le dihlabelo tsa khutso.” Ka moka a dira sehlabelo sa go fiswa. 
1Samuel13:10 Gateetee ge a feditse go neela sehlabelo sa go fiswa, Samuele a tla. Saulo a tswa go mo gahlanetsa go mo dumedisa." 
1Samuel13:11 Samuele a re: “O dirile eng?” Saulo a re: “Ka bone gore setshaba se gasane go nna, le gore ga se wa tla ka matsatsi ao a beilwego, le gore Bafilisitia ba kgobokane kua Migma;" 
1Samuel13:12 Ka gona ka re: Bafilisitia ba tla theogela godimo ga ka Gilegala, le ga se ka lopa Jehofa." 
1Samuel13:13 Samuele a re go Saulo: “O dirile bosilo, ga se wa boloka taelo ya Jehofa Modimo wa gago yeo a go laetsego yona. Gobane ka nako yeo Jehofa o be a tla hloma mmuso wa gago godimo ga Baiseraele go isa mehleng ya neng le neng." 
1Samuel13:14 Eupsa bjale mmuso wa gago o ka se tswele pele; Morena o ile a nyaka monna ka pelong ya gagwe, Morena a mo laela gore e be kgosi ya setshaba sa gagwe, ka ge a be a sa phethe seo Morena a se laetsego." 
1Samuel13:15 Samuele a ema, a mo rotoga a mo rotogela Gibea wa Babenjamine. Saulo a bala batho bao ba bego ba na le yena, e ka ba banna ba makgolo a tshelelago." 
1Samuel13:16 Saulo le Jonathane morwa wa gagwe le batho bao ba bego ba na le bona ba dula Gibea kua Babenjamine, eupsa Bafilisitia ba hloma mesasa Migma." 
1Samuel13:17 Babolai ba tla tswa mesaseng ya Bafilisitia ka dihlopha tse tharo, le sehlopha se tee se tla rotogela tseleng ya Ofura nageng ya Suali." 
1Samuel13:18 Sehlopha se sengwe sa retologela Bethe-Horone, sehlopha se sengwe sa retologela mollwaneng wo o lebeletsego moeding wa Tseboime go leba lesokang." 
1Samuel13:19 Ga se gwa ka gwa hwetswa tshosa nageng ka moka ya Baiseraele, ka gobane Bafilisitia ba be ba re: “Baheberu ba se ka ba ba direla ditshosa goba marumo.”" 
1Samuel13:20 Eupsa Baiseraele ka moka ba theogela go Bafilisitia le yo mongwe le yo mongwe a sikinya sebetsa sa gagwe le bora bja gagwe le selepe sa gagwe le lepara la gagwe. 
1Samuel13:21 Eupsa ba be ba e-na le motshene wa dikota le tshipi le diforoko le dilepe le go loutsa dithupa. 
1Samuel13:22 Ka gona letsatsing la ntwa ga se gwa hwetswa tshosa goba lerumo seatleng sa le ge e le ofe wa batho bao ba bego ba na le Saulo le Jonathane; eupsa Saulo le Jonathane morwa wa gagwe ba be ba le moo. 
1Samuel13:23 Bahlabani ba Bafilisitia ba ya moeding wa Migma. 
1Samuel14:1 Ka letsatsi le lengwe Jonathane morwa wa Saulo a re go lesogana leo le bego le rwele ditlhamo tsa lona: “Tloo, re tshele go ya madireng a Bafilisitia, yeo e lego ka mosola.” Eupsa ga se a ka a botsa tatagwe." 
1Samuel14:2 Saulo a dula ka thokong ya Gibea ka tlase ga sehlare sa garanata seo se lego Migrone; banna bao ba bego ba na le yena e be e le banna ba ka bago makgolo a tshela; 
1Samuel14:3 Ahija, morwa wa Ahitube, ngwanabo Ikabode, morwa wa Finease, morwa wa Eli, moperisita wa Jehofa kua Shilo, a apere efode. Ka gona batho ba be ba sa tsebe gore Jonathane o be a se gona." 
1Samuel14:4 Magareng ga maboto ao Jonathane a bego a le kgaufsi le go tshela ka ona go ya madireng a Bafilisitia go be go na le leswika ka lehlakoreng le le lego ka lehlakoreng le lengwe; leina la yo mongwe e be e le Botsese, yo mongwe e be e le Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Lerameng le lengwe le ile la retologela ka leboa go ya Migama, le le lengwe la retologela ka borwa go ya Gibea." 
1Samuel14:6 Jonathane a re go lesogana leo le bego le rwele ditlhamo tsa lona: “Etla re tshele madireng.” 
1Samuel14:7 Morwadi wa dibetsa tsa gagwe a re go yena: “Dira tsohle tse di lego pelong ya gago; bona, ka na le wena go ya ka pelo ya gago." 
1Samuel14:8 Jonathane a re: “Bona, re tla tshelela go banna bao, ra ineela go bona.”" 
1Samuel14:9 Ge ba ka re go rena: “Swarelang ka go tia, re tla tla go lena; moo re tla ema re tiile, ra se rotogele go ba lwantsha." 
1Samuel14:10 Eupsa ge e ba ba re: “Rotogela go rena; moo re tla rotogela, ka gobane Morena o di gafetse diatleng tsa rena, le se e tla ba pontsho go rena." 
1Samuel14:11 Bobedi bja bona ba ipontsha e le banna ba motse wa Bafilisitia, le Bafilisitia ba re: “Baheberu ba tswa mekoti yeo ba bego ba iphihla go yona.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Mohlapetsi a araba Jonathane le morwadi wa dibetsa tsa gagwe, a re: “Rotogela go rena, re tla le bontsha se sengwe.” Jonathane a re go lesogana la gagwe: “Rotoga ntatele, gobane Jehofa o ba gafetse diatleng tsa Baiseraele.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Jonathane a ema ka diatla tsa gagwe le maotong a gagwe, le morwadi wa gagwe wa dibetsa a mo latela. Mme morwadi wa gagwe wa ditlhamo a mmolaya." 
1Samuel14:14 Polao ya mathomo yeo Jonathane le morwadi wa gagwe wa dibetsa ba e dirilego e be e le banna ba ka bago 20, bao ba bego ba kgona go lema dikgomo tsa seripa sa kgoro." 
1Samuel14:15 Ge go sikinyega madira, nageng le gare ga setshaba ka moka;" 
1Samuel14:16 Bahlapetsi ba Saulo kua Gibea kua Babenjamine ba lebelela; le bona, sehlopha sa bahlolampherefere se qhibidiga, le sa tswela pele se bethana." 
1Samuel14:17 Ka moka Saulo a re go banna bao ba bego ba na le yena: “Bala bjale le le bone gore ka mang yo a tlogilego go rena.” Ge ba bala, Jonathane le morwadi wa gagwe wa ditlhamo ba be ba se gona." 
1Samuel14:18 Saulo a re go Ahija: “Tlisa areka ya Modimo mo.” Gobane areka ya Modimo e be e na le bana ba Baiseraele ka nako yeo. 
1Samuel14:19 Ya re ge Saulo a be a bolela le moperisita, lesata leo le bego le le gare ga madira a Bafilisitia la tswela pele le Saulo a re go moperisita: “Gogela seatla sa gago.”" 
1Samuel14:20 Saulo le batho ka moka bao ba bego ba na le yena ba kgobokana, ba tla ntweng." 
1Samuel14:21 Baheberu bao ba bego ba na le Bafilisitia pele ga nako yeo, bao ba ilego ba rotogela mesaseng le bona ba etswa nageng ya go dikologa, le bona ba retologa go ba le bana ba Baiseraele bao ba bego ba na le Saulo le Jonathane." 
1Samuel14:22 Ka mo go swanago banna ka moka ba Baiseraele bao ba bego ba iphihla nageng ya dithabeng ya Eferaime, ge ba ekwa gore Bafilisitia ba tshabile, le bona ba ba latela ka thata ntweng." 
1Samuel14:23 Ka gona Jehofa a pholosa Baiseraele letsatsing leo, le ntwa ya tswela pele go fihla Bethe-avene." 
1Samuel14:24 Banna ba Baiseraele ba tlalegile letsatsing leo, ka gobane Saulo o be a eleditse setshaba a re: “Go rogilwe monna yo a jago dijo le ge e le dife go fihla mantsiboa, gore ka tle ka lefeletse manaba a ka.” Ka gona ga go le o tee wa batho yo a ilego a latswa dijo tseo." 
1Samuel14:25 Batho ka moka ba tla sethokgweng; le go be go na le todi ya dinose mo mmung. 
1Samuel14:26 Ge banna bao ba fihla ka sethokgweng, bona todi ya dinose e rothile; eupsa ga se a bea seatla sa gagwe molomong wa gagwe, ka gobane setshaba se be se boifa kano." 
1Samuel14:27 Eupsa Jonathane ga se a ka a theetsa kaletso ya tatagwe; ka fao, a tsea ntlha ya lepara leo a bego a le swere, a le gatelela ka gare ga lesaka la dinose, le a bea seatla sa gagwe molomong wa gagwe; le mahlo a gagwe a phadima." 
1Samuel14:28 Ka moka yo mongwe wa setshaba a araba a re: “Tatago o ile a laela setshaba ka go tia ka kano, a re: “Go rogilwe motho yo a jago dijo le ge e le dife lehono.” Le batho ba be ba lapile." 
1Samuel14:29 Ka moka Jonathane a re: “Tate o bakile mathata nageng; bona, mahlo a ka a a phadima, ka gobane ka latswitse todi ye nnyane ye." 
1Samuel14:30 Go tla bjang gore lehono batho ba ja dihlapi tsa manaba a bona, tseo ba di thopilego ka bolokologi? gobane polao e be e se e kgolo go Bafilisitia?" 
1Samuel14:31 Letsatsing leo ba bolaya Bafilisitia go tloga Migima go fihla Ajalone. 
1Samuel14:32 Setshaba sa fofa godimo ga dithebola, sa tsea dinku, dikgomo, dinamane, sa di bolaya, sa di ja le madi." 
1Samuel14:33 Ka moka ba botsa Saulo ba re: “Bona, setshaba se senyetsa Jehofa ka ge se ja le madi.” Ka moka a re: O tshetse molao; ka lahlile leswika le legolo lehono." 
1Samuel14:34 Saulo a re: “Iphatlalanyeng gare ga setshaba, le botse gore: ‘Ntlisetseng mo motho yo mongwe le yo mongwe kgomo ya gagwe le dinku tsa gagwe, le di hlabe mo le le je. O se ka wa dira sebe malebana le Jehofa ka go ja madi. Batho ka moka ba tla le kgomo ya gagwe bosegong bjoo, ba di bolaya moo." 
1Samuel14:35 Saulo a agela Jehofa sebeso; e be e le sebeso ya mathomo yeo a e agelago Morena. 
1Samuel14:36 Saulo a re: “A re theogeng Bafilisitia bosego, re ba thopa go fihla ge mesong e hlaba, re se ka ra tlogela motho yo mongwe wa bona.” Bona ba re: “Dira se sengwe le se sengwe seo se bonalago se le botse go wena.” Ka moka moperisita a re: A re batamele Modimo." 
1Samuel14:37 Saulo a botsisa Modimo kaletso: “Na ka theogele Bafilisitia? na o tla ba gafela diatleng tsa Baiseraele? Eupsa ga se a ka a mo araba letsatsing leo. 
1Samuel14:38 Saulo a re: “Batamelang mo, lena dikgosana ka moka tsa setshaba;" 
1Samuel14:39 Gobane Jehofa yo a lopolotsego Baiseraele yo a phelago, le ge e le mo go Jonathane morwa wa ka, ruri o tla hwa. Eupsa go be go se na motho gare ga setshaba ka moka yo a ilego a mo araba." 
1Samuel14:40 Ka moka a re go Baiseraele ka moka: “Le eme ka lehlakoreng le lengwe, nna le Jonathane morwa wa ka re tla ba ka lehlakoreng le lengwe.” Ka moka setshaba sa re go Saulo: “Dira se sebotse mahlong a gago." 
1Samuel14:41 Ka moka Saulo a re go Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele: “Tsea matengwa. Saulo le Jonathane ba thopsa, eupsa banna bao ba phonyokga." 
1Samuel14:42 Saulo a re: “Lahlela matengwa magareng ga ka le Jonathane morwa wa ka.” Jonathane a thopsa. 
1Samuel14:43 Ka moka Saulo a re go Jonathane: “Mpotse seo o se dirilego. Jonathane a mmotsa, a re: “Ka ile ka latswa todi ye nnyane ka ntlha ya molamu wo o bego o le ka seatleng sa ka, le bona, ka swanetse go hwa.”" 
1Samuel14:44 Saulo a fetola a re: “Modimo a dire bjalo le go feta, gobane Jonathane o tla hwa.”" 
1Samuel14:45 Setshaba sa re go Saulo: “Na Jonathane o tla hwa yo a dirilego pholoso ye kgolo ye mo Baiseraele? Bjalo ka ge Jehofa a phela, ga go moriri wa hlogo ya gagwe wo o ka welago fase; gobane o somile le Modimo lehono. Ka gona setshaba sa hlakodisa Jonathane, gore a se hwe." 
1Samuel14:46 Ka moka Saulo a rotoga a latela Bafilisitia, le Bafilisitia ba ya lefelong la bona." 
1Samuel14:47 Saulo a thopa mmuso wa Baiseraele, a lwa le manaba a gagwe ka moka a go dikologa, Moaba le bana ba Amoni le Edomo le dikgosi tsa Tsoba le Bafilisitia. Le kae le kae mo a bego a retologa gona, o be a ba tshosa." 
1Samuel14:48 A kgobokatsa madira a bolaya Baamaleka, a hlakodisa Baiseraele diatleng tsa bao ba ba gatelelago." 
1Samuel14:49 Barwa ba Saulo e be e le Jonathane, Jeshvi le Malkishua; ka maina a barwedi ba gagwe ba babedi; leina la leitsibulo Meraba, le leina la Mikala yo monyenyane;" 
1Samuel14:50 Leina la mosadi wa Saulo e be e le Ahinoma morwedi wa Ahimaase; leina la molaodi wa madira e be e le Abenere morwa wa Nere, malome wa Saulo." 
1Samuel14:51 Kishi e be e le tatago Saulo; Nere tatago Abenere e be e le morwa wa Abiele. 
1Samuel14:52 Mehleng yohle ya Saulo ya ba le ntwa e soro kgahlanong le Bafilisitia. Saulo ge a bona mogale goba mogale, a mo isa go yena." 
1Samuel15:1 Samuele a re go Saulo: “Jehofa a nthomile gore ka go tlotse gore o be kgosi ya setshaba sa gagwe sa Baiseraele; bjale kwa lentsu la mantsu a Jehofa. 
1Samuel15:2 Morena wa madira o re: Ka kwesisa seo Baamaleka ba se dirilego Baiseraele, kamoo a ilego a mo letela ka gona tseleng ge a be a rotoga Egepeto." 
1Samuel15:3 Bjale sepelang o yo bolaya Amaleka, o fedise ka mo go feletsego tsohle tseo ba nago le tsona, o se ka wa ba babalela. Eupsa bolaya tse tona le tse tshadi, dinonyana le masea, dikgomo le dinku, dikamela le ditonki." 
1Samuel15:4 Saulo a kgobokatsa setshaba, a se bala kua Telaime, banna ba maoto ba dikate tse makgolo a mabedi le banna ba dikate tse lesome ba Juda." 
1Samuel15:5 Saulo a fihla motseng wa Amaleka, a lalela moeding." 
1Samuel15:6 Saulo a re go Bakanana: “Sepelang, le tloge, le theogele gare ga Baamaleka, gore ka se ka ka le fedisa le bona; ka gobane o ile a bontsha botho go bana ba Baiseraele ka moka ge ba be ba rotoga Egepeto. Ka gona Bakanana ba tlogela Baamaleka." 
1Samuel15:7 Saulo a bolaya Baamaleka go tloga Havila go fihlela o fihla Shure yeo e lego ka mosola wa Egepeto. 
1Samuel15:8 A thopa Aga kgosi ya Baamaleka a phela, a bolaya setshaba ka moka ka bogale bja tshosa." 
1Samuel15:9 Eupsa Saulo le setshaba ba ile ba pholosa Agage le tse kaone-kaone tsa dinku le dikgomo le dinku le dikwanyana le tsa tsohle tse dibotse, le ba se ka ba ba roga, ba babe. Hlatswa ditshila, yeo ba ilego ba e fedisa ka mo go feletsego." 
1Samuel15:10 Lentsu la Jehofa la tla go Samuele la re: 
1Samuel15:11 Ka itshola ka ge ka beile Saulo kgosi, ka gobane o furaletse go ntatela le ga se a boloka ditaelo tsa ka. Le seo ga se sa thabisa Samuele; a goeletsa Morena bosego ka moka." 
1Samuel15:12 Ge Samuele a tsoga e sa le ka pela go yo gahlanetsa Saulo mesong, Samuele a botswa a re: “Saulo o tlile Karamele, a bona o mo lokiseleditse lefelo; a tsoga, a theogela Gilegala." 
1Samuel15:13 Samuele a tla go Saulo, Saulo a re go yena: “A Jehofa a retwe.” Ka phethile taelo ya Morena." 
1Samuel15:14 Samuele a re: “Bjale go lla ga dinku ditsebeng tsa ka le go lla ga dikgomo mo ka go kwago go bolela’ng?” 
1Samuel15:15 Saulo a re: “Ba di tlisitse go Baamaleka, ka gobane setshaba se ile sa sireletsa tse kaone tsa dinku le tsa dikgomo gore di direlwe Jehofa Modimo wa gago dihlabelo. Le ba bangwe re ba otla ka thogako ya go rakwa." 
1Samuel15:16 Ka moka Samuele a re go Saulo: “Ema ka go botse seo Jehofa a mpoditsego sona bosegong bjo.” A re go yena: “Bolela.” 
1Samuel15:17 Samuele a re: “Ge o be o sa le yo monyenyane mahlong a gago, na ga se wa dira gore o be hlogo ya meloko ya Baiseraele, le Jehofa a go tlotsa gore o be kgosi ya Baiseraele?" 
1Samuel15:18 Jehofa a roma motseta a re: “Sepela o fedise badiradibe e lego Baamaleka ka mo go feletsego, o lwe le bona, o ba fedise ka mo go feletsego;" 
1Samuel15:19 Ka gona, ka ka baka la’ng le se la kwa lentsu la Jehofa, eupsa la fofela dithebola le la dira tse mpe mahlong a Jehofa?" 
1Samuel15:20 Saulo a re go Samuele: “Ee, ka kwele lentsu la Jehofa, ka sepela tseleng yeo Jehofa a nthomilego ka yona, ka tlisa Agaga kgosi ya Amaleka, ka roga Baamaleka.”" 
1Samuel15:21 Eupsa setshaba sa tsea dithebola, mohlape le dikgomo, dihlogo tsa dilo tseo di bego di swanetse go fediswa ka mo go feletsego, gore di direle Jehofa Modimo wa gago dihlabelo kua Gilegala." 
1Samuel15:22 Samuele a re: “Na Jehofa o thabela dihlabelo tsa go fiswa le dihlabelo go swana le go kwa lentsu la Jehofa? Bonang, go kwa go phala sehlabelo, le go theetsa go phala mafura a dikgapa." 
1Samuel15:23 Gobane borabele bo swana le sebe sa boloi, manganga a swana le bokgopo le borapedi bja medimo ya diswantsho. Ka ge o ganne lentsu la Morena, le yena o go ganne go ba kgosi." 
1Samuel15:24 Saulo a re go Samuele: “Ka dirile sebe, ka gobane ka robile taelo ya Jehofa le mantsu a gago, ka gobane ka be ka boifa setshaba le ka kwa lentsu la bona." 
1Samuel15:25 O swarele sebe sa ka, o boele le nna, gore ka direle Morena sehlabelo." 
1Samuel15:26 Samuele a re go Saulo: “Nka se boele le wena, ka gobane o ganne lentsu la Jehofa, le Jehofa o go lahlile gore o se be kgosi ya Baiseraele.”" 
1Samuel15:27 Ge Samuele a retologa go tloga, a swara molala wa kobo ya gagwe le wa gagoga." 
1Samuel15:28 Samuele a re go yena: “Jehofa o go gagotse mmuso wa Baiseraele lehono, a o nea mmago.”" 
1Samuel15:29 Gape Matla a Baiseraele a ka se bolele maaka goba a fetoga, ka gobane ga se motho yo a swanetsego go fetoga." 
1Samuel15:30 A re: “Ka paletswe; le ge go le bjalo o nkgodise pele ga bagolo ba setshaba sa geso le pele ga Baiseraele, o boe le nna, gore ka rapele Jehofa Modimo wa gago." 
1Samuel15:31 Ka gona Samuele a boela morago ga Saulo; Saulo a khunamela Morena. 
1Samuel15:32 Samuele a re: “Tlisang mo go nna Agage kgosi ya Baamaleka.” Agage o ile a tla go yena ka botho. Agage o rile: Ka nnete, bohloko bja lehu bo fedile." 
1Samuel15:33 Samuele a re: “Bjalo ka ge tshosa ya gago e bolaile basadi, mmago o tla fedisa bana gare ga basadi.” Samuele o ile a sega Agage ka diripana pele ga Jehofa kua Gilegala." 
1Samuel15:34 Ka moka Samuele a ya Rama; Saulo a rotogela ntlong ya gagwe kua Gibea ya Saulo. 
1Samuel15:35 Samuele a tswela pele a tla go Saulo go fihla letsatsing la lehu la gagwe; lega go le bjalo, Samuele o ile a se thabele Saulo, le Jehofa a fetosa kgopolo ya gagwe ka go dira Saulo kgosi ya Baiseraele." 
1Samuel16:1 Jehofa a re go Samuele: “O tla llela Saulo go fihla neng, ka ge ka mo lahlile gore a se buse Baiseraele? Tlatsa lenaka la gago ka mafura, o sepele, ka go romele go Jese wa Mobetlelehema, ka gobane ka itlhametse kgosi gare ga barwa ba gagwe." 
1Samuel16:2 Samuele a re: “Nka sepela bjang?” Saulo o tla e kwa, a mpolaya. Morena a re: “Tsea temana, o re: Ka tlile go direla Jehofa dihlabelo.”" 
1Samuel16:3 Bitsa Jese sehlabelong, ka go bontshe seo o swanetsego go se dira; o mphile yo ka mo biditsego." 
1Samuel16:4 Samuele a dira tse Jehofa a di boletsego, a fihla Betlelehema. Bagolo ba motse ba tshoga ge a fihla go bona, ba re: Na o tla ka khutso?" 
1Samuel16:5 A re: “Ka khutso: Ka tlile go direla Jehofa dihlabelo; ikgethefatseng, le tle le nna sehlabelong. A kgethagatsa Jese le barwa ba gagwe, a ba bitsa sehlabelong." 
1Samuel16:6 Ge ba fihla, a lebelela Eliaba a re: “Ruri Motlotswa wa Jehofa o na le yena.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Eupsa Jehofa a re go Samuele: “O se ka wa lebelela ponagalo ya gagwe le botelele bja gagwe; gobane ka mo lahlile; gobane ga se tsela yeo motho a bonago ka yona yeo Modimo a bonago ka yona; gobane motho o lebelela ponagalo ya ka ntle, eupsa Jehofa o lebelela pelo." 
1Samuel16:8 Ka moka Jese a bitsa Abinadaba, a mo feta pele ga Samuele. O ile a re: Jehofa le yena ga se a mo kgetha." 
1Samuel16:9 Ka moka Jese a lesa Shama a feta. O ile a re: Jehofa le yena ga se a mo kgetha. 
1Samuel16:10 Jese a dira gore barwa ba gagwe ba supago ba fete pele ga Samuele. Samuele a re go Jese: “Morena ga se a kgetha se.” 
1Samuel16:11 Samuele a re go Jese: “Na bana ba gago ka moka ba mo?” A re: “Go sa na le o tee, o disa dinku.” Samuele a re go Jese: “Roma go mo lata, gobane re ka se dule fase go fihlela a fihla mo.”" 
1Samuel16:12 A roma ba yo mo lata. O be a le lesweu, a le botse, a le botse. Morena a re: Tsoga o mo tlotse, gobane ka yena yo." 
1Samuel16:13 Ka moka Samuele a tsea lenaka la mafura a mo tlotsa gare ga bana babo, le moya wa Jehofa wa tla go Dafita go tloga letsatsing leo go ya pele. Ka moka Samuele a tsoga a ya Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 Eupsa moya wa Jehofa wa tloga go Saulo, moya o mobe o tswago go Jehofa wa mo tshwenya." 
1Samuel16:15 Bahlanka ba Saulo ba re go yena: “Bona bjale, moya o mobe o tswago go Modimo o go tshwenya.”" 
1Samuel16:16 Bjale anka mong wa rena a laele bahlanka ba gagwe gore ba nyaka monna yo bohlale yo a nago le bokgoni bja go letsa harepa; ge moya o mobe wa Modimo o le wela, o tla tla ka seatla sa gagwe, le o tla fodiswa." 
1Samuel16:17 Saulo a re go bahlanka ba gagwe: “Mphepele monna yo a kgonago go bapala gabotse, le mo tlise go nna.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Le yo mongwe wa bahlanka ba gagwe a araba a re: “Bona, ka bone morwa wa Jese wa Mobetlelehema, gore ka monna yo mobotse, le monna yo matla, le yo a nago le kwesiso e botse, le bjalo ka monna yo mobotse; le Jehofa o na le yena." 
1Samuel16:19 Ka moka Saulo a roma baromiwa go Jese a re: “Nthome Dafita morwa wa gago yo a nago le dinku.” 
1Samuel16:20 Jese a tsea pokolo yeo e rwelego senkgwa, le lepotlelo la beine, le potsanyane, a di romela ka Dafita morwa wa gagwe go Saulo." 
1Samuel16:21 Dafita a tla go Saulo, a ema pele ga gagwe. A ba morwadi wa dikotse tsa gagwe." 
1Samuel16:22 Saulo a romela Jese a re: “A Dafita a eme pele ga ka; gobane o amogetse mahlong a ka. 
1Samuel16:23 Ya re ge moya o mobe o tswago go Modimo o tlile godimo ga Saulo, Dafita a tsea lerumo la mokokotlo le a otla lerumo ka seatleng sa gagwe." 
1Samuel17:1 Bjale Bafilisitia ba kgobokatsa madira a bona ntweng, ba kgobokana kua Shoge, yeo e lego ya Juda, ba hloma mesasa magareng ga Shoge le Aseka, kua Efesdamime." 
1Samuel17:2 Saulo le banna ba Baiseraele ba kgobokana, ba hloma mesasa kgauswi le moeding wa Ela, ba lwa le Bafilisitia." 
1Samuel17:3 Bafilisitia ba ema thabeng ka lehlakoreng le lengwe, Baiseraele e eme thabeng ka lehlakoreng le lengwe." 
1Samuel17:4 Go tswa mesaseng ya Bafilisitia, yo a bitswago Goliata, wa Gathe, yo botelele bja gagwe e bego e le dikubiti tse tshela le bophagamo." 
1Samuel17:5 O be a rwele kafa ya koporo hlogong ya gagwe, a apere kobo ya poso; boima bja seaparo seo e be e le dishekale tse dikate tse hlano tsa koporo." 
1Samuel17:6 O be a na le megopo ya koporo maotong a gagwe, a na le kafa ya koporo magetleng a gagwe." 
1Samuel17:7 Lepara la lerumo la gagwe le be le swana le kota ya balogi; Hlogo ya lerumo la gagwe e be e le boima bja tshipi ya dishekale tse 600, le morwadi wa kotse a mo eta pele." 
1Samuel17:8 A ema a bitsa madira a Baiseraele a re go ona: “Ka ka baka la’ng le tswile go yo lokisa ntwa ya lena? Na ga se nna Mofilisita le mohlanka wa gago Saulo? Kgetha monna, theogela go nna." 
1Samuel17:9 Ge e ba a kgona go lwa le nna le a ntlhaba, gona re swanetse go ba bahlanka ba gago; eupsa ge nka mo fenya ka mmolaya, le tla ba bahlanka ba rena la re hlankala." 
1Samuel17:10 Mofilisita a re: “Lehono ka ganetsa diphuthego tsa Baiseraele; mphe monna, re tle re lwe mmogo." 
1Samuel17:11 Ge Saulo le Baiseraele ka moka ba ekwa mantsu ao a Mofilisita, ba tshoga kudu le ba tshoga kudu." 
1Samuel17:12 Bjale Dafita e be e le morwa wa Moefurate yola wa Betlelehema ya Juda, yoo leina la gagwe e bego e le Jese. O be a na le barwa ba seswai, le monna yoo e be e le mokgalabje gare ga setshaba mehleng ya Saulo." 
1Samuel17:13 Barwa ba bararo ba bagolo ba Jese ba ya ba latela Saulo ntweng; maina a barwa ba gagwe ba bararo bao ba ilego ntweng e be e le Eliaba leitsibulo, le Abinadaba yo a latelago le Shama wa boraro." 
1Samuel17:14 Dafita e be e le yo monyenyane le ba bararo ba bagolo ba latela Saulo. 
1Samuel17:15 Eupsa Dafita a tloga a boa go Saulo go yo fepa dinku tsa tatagwe kua Betlelehema. 
1Samuel17:16 Mofilisita yoo a batamela mesong le mantsiboa, a itlhagisa matsatsi a masomenne." 
1Samuel17:17 Jese a re go Dafita morwa wa gagwe: “Tseela bana beno efa ya mabele a omilego le dinkgwa tse tse lesome, o di ise mesaseng go bana beno;" 
1Samuel17:18 Tsea diphelehu tse tse lesome go molaodi wa dikate tsa tsona, o bone kamoo di phelago ka gona le bana babo lena le o ba enane." 
1Samuel17:19 Bjale Saulo le bona le banna ka moka ba Baiseraele ba be ba le moeding wa Ela ba elwa le Bafilisitia. 
1Samuel17:20 Ka gona Dafita a tsoga e sa le ka pela mesong, a tlogela dinku go mohlokomedi, a tsea a sepela go ya ka fao Jese a mo laetsego ka gona. A fihla moleteng ge madira a be a etswa ntweng, a goeletsa ntwa." 
1Samuel17:21 Gobane Baiseraele le Bafilisitia ba be ba lokaleditse ntwa, madira a lwantsha madira." 
1Samuel17:22 Dafita a tlogela koloi yeo e hlokometswe ka baleti, a kitimela madireng go yo dumedisa bana babo." 
1Samuel17:23 Ge a dutse a boledisana le bona, a rotoga mohlabani, Mofilisita wa Gathe, yo a bitswago Goliata, a etswa madireng a Bafilisitia, a bolela ka mantsu ao, le Dafita a ba kwa." 
1Samuel17:24 Ge banna ka moka ba Baiseraele ba bona monna yoo, ba mo tshaba, ba tshoga kudu." 
1Samuel17:25 Ka moka banna ba Baiseraele ba re: “Na le bone monna yo yo a rotogago?” ruri o rotogile go yo kwera Baiseraele; monna yo a mmolayago, kgosi e tla mo humisa ka mahumo a magolo, ya mo nea morwedi le ya lokolla ntlo ya tatagwe go Baiseraele." 
1Samuel17:26 Dafita a bolela le banna bao ba bego ba eme pele ga gagwe a re: “Go tla dirwa’ng ka monna yo a bolayago Mofilisita yo le a tlosa kgoboso go Baiseraele? gobane Mofilisita yo yo a sa bollago ka mang yo a ka nyatsago ditaelo tsa Modimo yo a phelago? 
1Samuel17:27 Setshaba sa mo araba ka mokgwa wo, sa re: “Go tla dirwa bjalo ka monna yo a mmolayago.”" 
1Samuel17:28 Eliaba ngwanabo yo mogolo a kwa ge a bolela le banna bao; Eliaba a galefela Dafita, a re: “Na o tlile mo?” mme o tlogetse dinku tseo tse sego kae lesokang le bomang? Ka tseba boikgogomoso bja gago, le bosilo bja pelo ya gago; gobane o ile a theoga go yo bona ntwa." 
1Samuel17:29 Dafita a re: “Ka eng seo bjale ka se dirilego? Na ga go na lebaka? 
1Samuel17:30 A mo tlogela, a ya go yo mongwe, a bolela ka mokgwa wo o swanago." 
1Samuel17:31 Mantsu ao Dafita a a boletsego a kwewa, ba a bolela pele ga Saulo." 
1Samuel17:32 Dafita a re go Saulo: “A go se be le motho yo a feletswego ka pelo ka baka la gagwe; mohlanka wa gago o tla ya a lwa le Mofilisita yo. 
1Samuel17:33 Saulo a re go Dafita: “O ka se kgone go lwa le Mofilisita yo go yo lwa le yena, ka gobane o sa le mofsa e bile o le monna wa sebete go tloga bofseng bja gagwe.”" 
1Samuel17:34 Dafita a re go Saulo: “Mohlanka wa gago o be a disa dinku tsa tatagwe, le gwa tla tau le bere le a tsea kwana mohlapeng." 
1Samuel17:35 Ka tswa ka mo latela, ka mo itia, ka mo boloka molomong wa gagwe; ge a tsogela nna, ka mo swara ka ditedu tsa gagwe, ka mo itia ka mmolaya." 
1Samuel17:36 Mohlanka wa gago o bolaile tau le bere; 
1Samuel17:37 Dafita a re: “Jehofa yo a mpholositsego mading a tau le mading a bere, o tla ntlhakodisa diatleng tsa Mofilisita yo.” Saulo a re go Dafita: “Sepela, Jehofa a be le wena.”" 
1Samuel17:38 Saulo a hlomela Dafita ka ditlhamo tsa gagwe, a mo apesa kafa ya koporo hlogong. Le yena a itlhama ka tshosa." 
1Samuel17:39 Dafita a tlema tshosa ya gagwe ditlhamo tsa gagwe le a leka go sepela; ka gobane ga se a ka a hlatsela. Dafita a re go Saulo: “Nka se kgone go sepela le bona; ka gobane ga se ka ka ka di leka. Dafita a di amoga go yena. 
1Samuel17:40 A tsea lepara la gagwe ka seatleng, a mo kgethela maswika a mahlano a boreledi moeding, a a tsenya ka mokotleng wa modisi wo a bego a na le wona, e lego ka gare ga lesoba; kobo ya gagwe e be e le ka seatleng sa gagwe, a batamela Mofilisita."
