2Kings21:13 Ka tla otlollela Jerusalema mothaladi wa Samaria le thapo ya ntlo ya Ahaba; ka tla phumola Jerusalema bjalo ka ge motho a phumola sebjana, a se phumola, a se pshatlaganya." 
2Kings21:14 Ka tla lahla masaledi a bohwa bja ka, ka a gafela diatleng tsa manaba a bona; ba tla fetoga dihlapi le dihlapi tsa manaba a tsona ka moka;" 
2Kings21:15 Ka ge ba dirile tse mpe mahlong a ka, ba nkwera, go tloga letsatsing leo botatago bona ba tswago Egepeto go fihla le lehono." 
2Kings21:16 Go feta moo, Manase o ile a tsholla madi a se nago molato kudu moo a ilego a tlatsa Jerusalema go tloga ntlheng e nngwe go ya go e nngwe; ntle le sebe sa gagwe seo a se tliseditsego Juda ka go dira bobe mahlong a Jehofa." 
2Kings21:17 Ditiro tse dingwe tsa Manase le tsohle tseo a di dirilego le sebe sa gagwe seo a se dirilego, na ga se tsa ngwalwa ka pukung ya ditaba tsa ditiragalo tsa dikgosi tsa Juda?" 
2Kings21:18 Mafelelong Manase a robala le borakgolokhukhu ba gagwe le a bolokwa serapeng sa ntlo ya gagwe, serapeng sa Utsa; Amone morwa wa gagwe a busa legatong la gagwe." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni o be a e-na le nywaga e 22 ge a thoma go busa, le a busa Jerusalema ka nywaga e mebedi. Leina la mmagwe e be e le Meshulemethe morwedi wa Haruse wa Jotoba." 
2Kings21:20 A dira tse mpe mahlong a Jehofa, go etsa ge Manase tatagwe a dirile." 
2Kings21:21 A sepela tseleng ka moka yeo tatagwe a bego a sepela ka yona, a hlankala medimo ya diswantsho yeo tatagwe a bego a e hlankala, a e khunamela." 
2Kings21:22 A lahla Jehofa Modimo wa borakgolokhukhu ba gagwe, a se sepele tseleng ya Jehofa." 
2Kings21:23 Bahlanka ba Amone ba mo loga maanomabe, ba bolaya kgosi ka ntlong ya gagwe." 
2Kings21:24 Batho ba naga ba bolaya bohle bao ba bego ba loga maanomabe malebana le Kgosi Amone; batho ba naga ba bea Josia morwa wa gagwe kgosi legatong la gagwe. 
2Kings21:25 Bjale ditaba tse dingwe tsa Amone tseo a di dirilego, na ga se tsa ngwalwa ka pukung ya Dikoronika tsa dikgosi tsa Juda?" 
2Kings21:26 A bolokwa lebitleng la gagwe kua tshemong ya Usa, le Josia morwa wa gagwe a busa legatong la gagwe." 
2Kings22:1 Josia o be a na le mengwaga ye senyane ge a thoma go busa, le a busa mengwaga ye masometharo-tee kua Jerusalema. Leina la mmagwe e be e le Jedidah, morwedi wa Adaiah the Muskateer." 
2Kings22:2 A dira tse di lokilego mahlong a Jehofa, a sepela tseleng ka moka ya Dafita tatagwe, a se fapoge ka letsogong le letona goba la nngele." 
2Kings22:3 Ka ngwaga wa lesometee le wa bobedi wa puso ya kgosi Josia, kgosi ya roma Safane morwa wa Asalia, morwa wa Meshulama, mongwaledi ntlong ya Jehofa, e re:" 
2Kings22:4 a rotogela go Hilikia moperisita yo mogolo, gore a kgobokatse tshelete yeo e tlisitswego ka ntlong ya Jehofa yeo baleti ba mejako ba e kgobokaditsego." 
2Kings22:5 Ba e gafela diatleng tsa basomi bao ba hlokometsego ntlo ya Jehofa; e nee bao ba dirago modiro wa ntlo ya Jehofa gore ba lokise masoba a ntlo; 
2Kings22:6 le babetli, baagi le basomi ba mafsika, le go reka dikota le maswika ao a betlilwego bakang sa go lokisa ntlo." 
2Kings22:7 Lega go le bjalo, ga se gwa ka gwa balwa tshelete yeo e bego e le ka seatleng sa bona, ka gobane ba be ba dirisana ka potego." 
2Kings22:8 Ka moka Hilkia moperisita yo mogolo a re go Shafane mongwaledi: “Ka hweditse puku ya Molao ka ntlong ya Jehofa. Hilikia a nea Safane puku yeo, le a e bala." 
2Kings22:9 Safane mongwaledi a tla go kgosi a mmotsa a re: “Bahlanka ba gago ba kgobokaditse tshelete yeo e hweditswego ka ntlong, ba e gafela diatleng tsa balebeledi.” Ya ntlo ya Morena." 
2Kings22:10 Safane mongwaledi a botsa kgosi a re: Moprista Hilikia o nneile puku. Safane a e bala pele ga kgosi. 
2Kings22:11 Ya re ge kgosi e kwele mantsu a puku ya Molao, ya gagola diaparo tsa yona." 
2Kings22:12 Kgosi ya laela moprista Hilikia le Ahikama morwa wa Safane le Akabore morwa wa Mikaya le Safane mongwaledi le Asaya mohlanka wa kgosi. 
2Kings22:13 Sepela o botsise Jehofa, nna le setshaba le Juda ka moka mabapi le mantsu a puku ye ao a hweditswego; gobane bogale bja Jehofa bjo bo re tukago ka bjo bogolo, ka gobane borakgolokhukhu ba rena ga se ba theetsa. Go ya ka mantsu a puku ye, go dira tsohle tse di ngwadilwego ka rena." 
2Kings22:14 Ka gona moperisita Hilikia, Ahikama, Akibore, Safane le Asaya, ba ya go Hulda moporofeta wa mosadi, mosadi wa Shalume morwa wa Tikwa, morwa wa Harhase, mohlokomedi wa diaparo; (o be a dula Jerusalema kholetsheng;) le ba bolela le yena." 
2Kings22:15 A re go bona: “Se ka seo Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele a se boletsego: “Botsang monna yo le nthomilego go nna. 
2Kings22:16 Morena o re: “Bona, ka tla tlisetsa bosula lefelong le le go badudi ba lona, e lego mantsu ka moka a puku yeo kgosi ya Juda e e badilego." 
2Kings22:17 Gobane ba nthibela le ba bea medimo e mengwe gore ba nkwere ka mediro ka moka ya diatla tsa bona; ka fao kgalefo ya ka e tla tuka mo lefelong le, le ya ka se timilwe." 
2Kings22:18 Eupsa go kgosi ya Juda yeo o e romilego gore e yo botsisa Jehofa, o botse gore: “Se ka seo Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele a se boletsego: ‘Mabapi le mantsu ao o a kwelego;" 
2Kings22:19 Gobane pelo ya gago e be e le boleta le wa ikokobetsa pele ga Jehofa ge o ekwa seo ka se boletsego kgahlanong le lefelo le le go badudi ba lona, gore e be lesope, le diaparo tsa gago tsa gagoga le di goeletsa pele ga gago tsa gago. Ka nna; Ka go kwele, go bolela Morena." 
2Kings22:20 Ka gona, bona, ka tla go kgobokatsa go borakgolokhukhu ba gago, le o tla kgobokatswa lebitleng la gago ka khutso; mahlo a gago a ka se bone bobe ka moka bjo ka tlago go bo tlisetsa lefelong le. Ka moka ba tsebisa kgosi gape." 
2Kings23:1 Ka moka kgosi ya roma, ba kgobokatsa bagolo ka moka ba Juda le Jerusalema go yena." 
2Kings23:2 Kgosi ya rotogela ntlong ya Jehofa le banna ka moka ba Juda le badudi ka moka ba Jerusalema le baperisita le baporofeta le setshaba ka moka go tloga go yo monyenyane go fihla go yo mogolo. 
2Kings23:3 Jehofa a ema kgauswi le kokwane yeo le a dira kgwerano pele ga Jehofa ya gore a latele Jehofa le go boloka ditaelo tsa gagwe le dikgopotso tsa gagwe le melao ya gagwe e hlomilwego ka dipelo tsa bona ka moka le ka moya wa bona ka moka le ka moya wa bona ka moka gore ba ba dire dipeelano tsa tumelelano ye. Di ngwadilwe ka pukung ye. Ka moka naga ka moka ya ema ka kwano. 
2Kings23:4 Kgosi ya laela Hilikia moperisita yo mogolo, le baperisita ba bobedi le baleti ba kgoro gore ba ntshe tempeleng ya Jehofa dibjana ka moka tsa Baali, le dithokgwa ka moka tsa dithokgwa le madira ka moka a legodimo, ba fise bona mollong. Ka ntle ga Jerusalema nageng ya Kidrone le ba tlisa melora ya bona Bethele." 
2Kings23:5 A tsea baperisita ba medingwana bao dikgosi tsa Juda di bego di ba kgethile gore ba tshume diorelo mafelong a phagamego metseng ya Juda le mafelong ao a dikologilego Jerusalema. Ba tshuma Baali, le letsatsi, le ngwedi, le dinaledi, le madira ka moka a legodimo diorelo." 
2Kings23:6 A tsea dikgong tseo ntlong ya Jehofa ka ntle ga Jerusalema a di isa moeding wa Kidrone, a di fisa ka moeding wa Kidrone, a di betha lerole le a lahlela lerole la tsona mabitleng a batho ba tlwaelegilego." 
2Kings23:7 A phusola dintlo tsa basodoma tseo di bego di le kgaufsi le ntlo ya Jehofa, moo basadi ba bego ba loga dikota." 
2Kings23:8 A ntsha baperisita ka moka metseng ya Juda, a silafatsa mafelo a phagamego ao baperisita ba bego ba tshuma diorelo go ona, go tloga Geba go fihla Bereseba, a thuba mafelo a phagamego a dikgoro tseo di bego di le ka pele ga kgoro ya Jošua. Mmusisi wa motse, yo a bego a le ka go le letshadi la monna kgorong ya motse." 
2Kings23:9 Lega go le bjalo baperisita ba mafelong a phagamego ga se ba ka ba rotogela sebesong ya Jehofa kua Jerusalema, eupsa ba ja bogobe bjo bo sa omelwago gare ga bana babo bona." 
2Kings23:10 A silafatsa Tofethe, yeo e lego moeding wa bana ba Hinomo, gore go se be le motho yo a ka fetisago morwa wa gagwe goba morwedi wa gagwe mollong go ya Moleka." 
2Kings23:11 A tsea dipere tseo dikgosi tsa Juda di bego di di neile letsatsi mojakong wa ntlo ya Jehofa le ka phaposing ya kgosi Nathanaele le moeding, le dikoloi tsa ntwa tsa letsatsi a di fisa." 
2Kings23:12 Disebeso tseo di bego di le ka phaposing ya ka godimo ya Ahasi, tseo dikgosi tsa Juda di di dirilego, le disebeso tseo Manase a di dirilego malapeng a mabedi a ntlo ya Jehofa, kgosi ya di thuba. Ba lahlela lerole la bona moeding wa Kidirone." 
2Kings23:13 Le ditora tse di phagamego tseo Salomo kgosi ya Baiseraele a di agilego ka pele ga Jerusalema, ka lehlakoreng le letona la thaba ya tshenyego, bakang sa Ashorethe e lego makgapha a Basidone le bakang sa Kamose e lego makgapha a Moaba le bakang sa Milikomo, e lego makgapha a kgosana ya Baamoni." 
2Kings23:14 A pshatlaganya diswantsho tseo, a rema dihlare, a tlatsa mafelo a tsona ka marapo a batho." 
2Kings23:15 Go okatsa moo, a aga sebeso kua Bethele le lefelong le le phagamego leo Jeroboama morwa wa Nebate a dirilego gore Baiseraele a dire sebe, a phusola sebeso le lefelo le le phagamego le a fisa lefelo le le phagamego le a e tshela lerole le a fisa sethokgwa." 
2Kings23:16 Ge Josia a retologa a lebelela mabitla ao a lego mmotong, a romela batho gore ba ntsha marapo ao mabitleng a a fisa sebesong le a e silafatsa, go ya ka lentsu la Jehofa leo monna wa Modimo a le boletsego. Rera, yo a boletsego mantsu a." 
2Kings23:17 A re: “Leina le ka le bonago ka mang?” Banna ba motse ba mmotsa: “Ka lebitla la monna wa Modimo leo Juda a le dirilego, le go tsebatsa tse o di dirilego kgahlanong le sebeso ya Bethele.”" 
2Kings23:18 A re: “A a eme; go se be le yo a sisinyago marapo a gagwe. Ka gona ba tlogela marapo a gagwe, le marapo a moporofeta yo a tswago Samaria." 
2Kings23:19 Go feta moo, dintlo ka moka tsa mafelo a phagamego ao a bego a le metseng ya Samaria, tseo dikgosi tsa Baiseraele di di dirilego gore di befetse Jehofa, Josia a di tlosa le a di dira ka mo a di dirilego ka gona kua Bethele." 
2Kings23:20 A bolaya baperisita ka moka ba mafelo a phagamego bao ba bego ba le moo godimo ga disebeso, a fisa marapo a batho godimo ga bona, a boela Jerusalema." 
2Kings23:21 Kgosi ya laela setshaba ka moka ya re: “Le direng Paseka ya Jehofa Modimo wa lena go etsa ge go ngwadilwe ka pukung ya kgwerano ye.” 
2Kings23:22 Gobane go be go se gwa swarwa Paseka e bjalo mehleng ya Baatlhodi bao ba ahlolago Baiseraele goba mehleng ya dikgosi tsa Baiseraele goba mehleng ya dikgosi tsa Juda; 
2Kings23:23 Eupsa ngwageng wa lesometee le wa bobedi wa puso ya Kgosi Josia, moo Paseka ye e bego e swaretswe Jehofa kua Jerusalema." 
2Kings23:24 Go feta moo, Josia o ile a tlosa diopedi tsa meoya, dinoge, medingwana, medingwana le dilo ka moka tse di sisimisago tseo di lekilwego nageng ya Juda le Jerusalema, e le gore a phethe mantsu a molao wo o ngwadilwego ka pukung. Wo moperisita Hilikia a o hweditsego ka ntlong ya Jehofa." 
2Kings23:25 Go be go se na kgosi yeo e swanago le yena pele ga gagwe, yeo e ilego ya retologela go Jehofa ka dipelo tsa yona ka moka le ka moya wa yona ka moka le ka matla a yona ka moka, go ya ka molao ka moka wa Moše. Ka morago ga gagwe go be go se na yo a swanago le yena." 
2Kings23:26 Lega go le bjalo Jehofa ga se a ka a furalela bogale bja gagwe bjo bogolo, bjoo bogale bja gagwe bo ilego bja tuka go Juda ka baka la dikgopiso tsohle tseo Manase a mo kgopisitsego ka tsona." 
2Kings23:27 Jehofa a re: “Ka tla tlosa le Juda mahlong a ka, bjalo ka ge ka tlositse Baiseraele, ka lahla motse wo wa Jerusalema wo ka o kgethilego le ntlo yeo ka boletsego ka yona gore: ‘Leina la ka le tla ba gona." 
2Kings23:28 Bjale ditaba tse dingwe tsa Josia le tsohle tseo a di dirilego, na ga se tsa ngwalwa ka pukung ya ditaba tsa mehleng ya dikgosi tsa Juda?" 
2Kings23:29 Mehleng ya gagwe Faro Nego kgosi ya Egepeto a rotogela kgosi ya Asiria nokang ya Eforate. A mmolaya kua Megido, ge a mmona." 
2Kings23:30 Bahlanka ba gagwe ba mo rwala a hwile ka koloi a hwile go tswa Megido, ba mo isa Jerusalema, ba mmoloka lebitleng la gagwe. Ka moka batho ba naga ba tsea Joahase morwa wa Josia, ba mo tlotsa, ba mo bea kgosi legatong la tatagwe." 
2Kings23:31 Jehoahase o be a e-na le nywaga e masomepedi-tharo ge a thoma go busa; a busa dikgwedi tse tharo kua Jerusalema. Mmagwe e be e le Hamutale morwedi wa Jeremia wa Libina. 
2Kings23:32 A dira tse mpe mahlong a Jehofa, go ya ka tsohle tseo borakgolokhukhu ba gagwe ba di dirilego." 
2Kings23:33 Faro-nego a mo gapeletsa go ya Ribla nageng ya Hamate, gore a se ka a busa Jerusalema; a lefisa naga ditalente tse lekgolo tsa silifera le talente ya gauta." 
2Kings23:34 Faro-nego a bea Eliakime morwa wa Josia kgosi ka phaposing ya Josia tatagwe, a fetola leina la gagwe gore e be Joyakime. A tla Egepeta a hwela moo." 
2Kings23:35 Joyakime a nea Faro silifera le gauta; o be a lefisa naga fela motshelo, go lefa tshelete yeo ka taelo ya Faro; a kgopela silifera le gauta go batho ba naga, go yo mongwe le yo mongwe go ya ka motshelo wa gagwe, gore a di nee Faro Nego." 
2Kings23:36 Jehoyakime o be a e-na le nywaga e masomepedi-hlano ge a thoma go busa; a busa mengwaga ye lesometee Jerusalema. Leina la mmagwe e be e le Sebuda morwedi wa Pedaya wa Ruma. 
2Kings23:37 A dira tse mpe mahlong a Jehofa, go ya ka tsohle tseo borakgolokhukhu ba gagwe ba di dirilego." 
2Kings24:1 Mehleng ya gagwe Nebukadinetsara kgosi ya Babele a rotoga le Joyakime a ba mohlanka wa gagwe ka nywaga e meraro. Ka morago ga moo a mo retologela. 
2Kings24:2 Jehofa a roma madira a Bakaladea le madira a Siria le madira a Moaba le madira a bana ba Amoni gore a yo lwa le yena, le a ba roma go yo lwa le Juda gore ba e fedise, go ya ka lentsu la Jehofa leo o e buile has O e buile ka bahlanka ba Hae, baporofeta ba buile." 
2Kings24:3 Ge e le gabotse, go ile gwa direga ka taelo ya Jehofa go Juda gore a ba tlose mahlong a gagwe ka baka la dibe tsa Manase go ya ka tsohle tseo a di dirilego;" 
2Kings24:4 Le ka baka la madi a se nago molato, ka gobane o ile a tlatsa Jerusalema ka madi a se nago molato; yeo Jehofa a sa e lebalelago." 
2Kings24:5 Bjale ditaba tse dingwe tsa Jehoyakime le tsohle tseo a di dirilego, na ga se tsa ngwalwa ka pukung ya ditaba tsa mehleng ya dikgosi tsa Juda?" 
2Kings24:6 Ka gona Jehoyakime a robala le borakgolokhukhu ba gagwe le Jehoyakini morwa wa gagwe a thoma go busa legatong la gagwe. 
2Kings24:7 Kgosi ya Egepeto ga se ya hlwa e boela nageng ya yona, ka gobane kgosi ya Babele e be e tsere dilo ka moka tseo di bego di le mabapi le kgosi ya Egepeto go tloga nokang ya Egepeto go fihla nokang ya Eforate." 
2Kings24:8 Jehoyakine o be a e-na le nywaga e lesomeseswai ge a thoma go busa, le a busa ka dikgwedi tse tharo kua Jerusalema; Mmagwe e be e le Nehushita morwedi wa Elnathane wa Jerusalema." 
2Kings24:9 A dira tse mpe mahlong a Jehofa, go ya ka tsohle tseo tatagwe a di dirilego." 
2Kings24:10 Ka nako yeo bahlanka ba Nebukadinetsara kgosi ya Babele ba rotogela Jerusalema le motse wa rakalela. 
2Kings24:11 Nebukadinetsara kgosi ya Babele a tla go lwa le motse, bahlanka ba gagwe ba o dikanetsa." 
2Kings24:12 Jehoyakine kgosi ya Juda a ya go kgosi ya Babele, yena le mmagwe, bahlanka ba gagwe, dikgosana tsa gagwe le balaodi ba gagwe. Kgosi ya Babele ya mo tsea ngwageng wa senyane le wa bobedi wa puso ya gagwe." 
2Kings24:13 A ntsha matlotlo ka moka a ntlo ya Jehofa le matlotlo a ntlo ya kgosi le dibjana ka moka tsa gauta tseo Salomo kgosi ya Baiseraele a di dirilego ka ntlong ya Jehofa. Morena a realo. 
2Kings24:14 A thopa Jerusalema ka moka, le dikgosana ka moka, le banna ka moka ba bagale, mathopsa a dikate tse lesome, le bagwebi ka moka le basomi ba ditshipi. Ga go le o tee yo a ilego a sala, ge e se batho ba diilago kudu ba naga." 
2Kings24:15 A isa Jehoyakine Babele, le mmago kgosi, basadi ba kgosi, bahlankadi ba gagwe, le banna ba bagale ba naga yeo a ba thopilego Jerusalema." 
2Kings24:16 Bahlabani ka moka ba bagale, le ditsebi tsa mosomo wa diatla le basomi ba ditshipi, ba dikate tse supago, ka moka ba matla le bao ba swanelegago ntwa, ba rwala kgosi ya Babele bothopsa Babele." 
2Kings24:17 Kgosi ya Babele ya bea Matania ngwanabo tatagwe kgosi legatong la gagwe, ya mo fetola leina la gagwe gore e be Tsedekia." 
2Kings24:18 Tsedekia o be a na le mengwaga ye 21 ge a thoma go ba kgosi, le a busa mengwaga ye 11 kua Jerusalema. Mmagwe e be e le Hamutale morwedi wa Jeremia wa Libina." 
2Kings24:19 A dira tse mpe mahlong a Jehofa, go ya ka tsohle tseo Joyakime a di dirilego." 
2Kings24:20 Tsedekia a rabela kgosi ya Babele ka bogale bja Jehofa kua Jerusalema le Juda go fihlela a ba raka pele ga gagwe. 
2Kings25:1 Ka ngwaga wa senyane wa puso ya gagwe, kgweding ya lesome, ka letsatsi la lesome la kgwedi, Nebukadinetsara kgosi ya Babele a tla, yena le madira a gagwe ka moka, ba lwa le Jerusalema, a hloma mesasa kgahlanong le yona. Ba e aga ka merako ka mahlakoreng ka moka." 
2Kings25:2 Ka gona motse wa rakalela go fihla ngwageng wa lesometee wa puso ya Kgosi Tsedekia. 
2Kings25:3 Ka letsatsi la senyane la kgwedi ya bone tlala ya fenya motseng, le gwa se be le senkgwa sa batho ba naga." 
2Kings25:4 Motse wa fediswa, banna ka moka ba ntwa ba tshaba bosego ka kgoro ya magareng ga maboto a mabedi, kgauswi le serapa sa kgosi; Bakaladea ba dikanetsa motse ka mahlakoreng ka moka, le kgosi ya ya lesokang." 
2Kings25:5 Madira a Bakaladea a rakadisa kgosi, a e hwetsa dithoteng tsa Jeriko, madira a yona ka moka a phatlalala go yena." 
2Kings25:6 Ka moka ba swara kgosi le ba e rotosetsa go kgosi ya Babele kua Ribla; ba mo ahlola. 
2Kings25:7 Ba bolaya barwa ba Tsedekia pele ga mahlo a gagwe, ba ntsha mahlo a Tsedekia, ba mo tlema ka ditlemo, ba mo isa Babele." 
2Kings25:8 Ka kgwedi ya bohlano, ka letsatsi la bosupa la kgwedi, e lego ngwaga wa lesomeseswai wa puso ya Kgosi Nebukadinetsara kgosi ya Babele, Nebusaradani molaodi wa baleti, mohlanka wa kgosi ya Babele, a tla Jerusalema." 
2Kings25:9 A fisa ntlo ya Jehofa le ntlo ya kgosi le dintlo ka moka tsa Jerusalema, le ntlo ya motho yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo mogolo a fisa ka mollo." 
2Kings25:10 Madira ka moka a Bakaladea ao a bego a na le molaodi a phusola merako ya Jerusalema gohle. 
2Kings25:11 Nebusaradane molaodi wa bahlapetsi o ile a ba tsea batho ba bangwe ka moka bao ba bego ba setse motseng le bafaladi bao ba ilego ba wela kgosi ya Babele gotee le masaledi a lesaba. 
2Kings25:12 Eupsa molaodi wa bahlapetsi a tlogela badiidi kudu mo nageng gore e be balemi ba merara le balemi. 
2Kings25:13 Bakaladea ba thuba dikokwane tsa tempele tseo di bego di le ka ntlong ya Jehofa le dibjana le letamo tseo di bego di le ka ntlong ya Jehofa, ba thuba tempele le ba isa tempele go tloga go bona go ya Babele." 
2Kings25:14 Dipitsa, digarafo, disnufer le dikhaba le dibjana ka moka tsa koporo tseo ba bego ba hlankala ka tsona, ba tsea." 
2Kings25:15 Molaodi wa bahlapetsi o ile a tsea ditshitswana tsa mollo le dibjana le gauta ka moka, gauta le silifera le silifera." 
2Kings25:16 Dikokwane tse pedi, lewatle le tee le metheo yeo Salomo a e diretsego ntlo ya Jehofa; Koporo ya dilo tse ka moka e be e se na boima." 
2Kings25:17 Bophagamo bja kokwane e tee e be e le dikubiti tse lesomeseswai, motse-mosate wa yona e be e le koporo, bophagamo bja yona e be e le dikubiti tse tharo; le diphaphathi tsa sehuba, le diphaphathi tse di bego di le godimo ga hlogo, ka moka e le tsa koporo;" 
2Kings25:18 Molaodi wa bahlapetsi a tsea Seraya moperisita yo mogolo le Tsefanya moperisita wa bobedi le baleti ba bararo ba mojako. 
2Kings25:19 Go tswa motseng a tsea mohlankadi yo a bego a okametse bagale, le banna ba bahlano ba maphodisa a kgosi bao ba hweditswego motseng, le mongwaledi wa makgotla, bao kgosi e ba kgethilego. Batho ba naga le banna ba masometshela ba batho ba naga yeo ba hweditswego motseng;" 
2Kings25:20 Ka gona Nebusaradane molaodi wa bahlapetsi a ba tsea, a ba tlisa go Ribla kgosi ya Babele." 
2Kings25:21 Kgosi ya Babele ya ba otla le ya ba bolaya kua Ribla nageng ya Hamathe. Ka ka baka leo Juda e ilego ya tloswa nageng ya bona. 
2Kings25:22 Ge e le batho bao ba setsego nageng ya Juda, bao Nebukadinetsara kgosi ya Babele a ba tlogetsego, a bea Gedalia morwa wa Ahikama morwa wa Shafane kgosi ya bona." 
2Kings25:23 Ge balaodi ka moka ba madira, bona le banna ba bona ba ekwa gore kgosi ya Babele e beile Gedalia go ba mmusisi, ba tla Gedalia kua Mitsepha: Ishimaele morwa wa Nethania, Johanane morwa wa Kara le Seraya; Lesea. Wa Tanhumethe, le Banetofa, le Jaasania morwa wa Mohathe, bona le banna ba bona." 
2Kings25:24 Gedalia a ba ena le banna ba bona a re go bona: “Le se ka la boifa go ba bahlanka ba Bakaladea. Dula nageng yeo, le hlankale kgosi ya Babele; le o tla loka." 
2Kings25:25 Eupsa ka kgwedi ya bosupa Ishmaele morwa wa Nethania, morwa wa Elisama, wa lapa la bogosi, a tla a bolaya banna ba lesome le yena le Gedalia, le a hwa le Bajuda le Bakaladea bao ba bego ba na le yena kua Mitsepha." 
2Kings25:26 Batho ka moka, ba banyenyane le ba bagolo, le balaodi ba madira, ba tsoga ba tla Egepeto, ka gobane ba be ba boifa Bakaladea." 
2Kings25:27 Ka ngwaga wa masometharo-supa wa go thopsa ga Jehoyakine kgosi ya Juda, ka kgwedi ya lesomepedi, ka letsatsi la masomepedi-supa la kgwedi, Evi-Merodaka kgosi ya Babele a ba kgosi. Go busa, go phagamiswa. Hlogo ya Joyakini kgosi ya Juda e ile ya tswa kgolegong;" 
2Kings25:28 A bolela le yena ka botho, a bea sedulo sa gagwe sa bogosi ka godimo ga sedulo sa bogosi sa dikgosi tseo di bego di na le yena kua Babele." 
2Kings25:29 A apara diaparo tsa gagwe tsa kgolego, a ja senkgwa pele ga gagwe matsatsi ka moka a bophelo bja gagwe." 
2Kings25:30 Tefo ya gagwe e be e le tefo ya ka mehla yeo a e newago ka kgosi, e lego tekanyo ya letsatsi le lengwe le le lengwe, matsatsing ka moka a bophelo bja gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adama, Sethe, Enose," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kanane, Mahalalele, Jarede," 
1Chronicles1:3 Henoka, Methusela, Lameka," 
1Chronicles1:4 Noa, Seme, Hama le Jafete." 
1Chronicles1:5 Barwa ba Jafete e be e le Gomere, Magogo, Madai, Javane, Tubala, Mesheka le Tirase." 
1Chronicles1:6 Le barwa ba Gomere; Ashkanase, le Rifate le Togarema." 
1Chronicles1:7 Barwa ba Jafane e be e le Elisha le Tarashishi, Kitime le Dodanime." 
1Chronicles1:8 Le barwa ba Hama; Kushe le Mizraime, Put le Kanana." 
1Chronicles1:9 Barwa ba Kushe e be e le Seba, le Havila, le Sabata, le Raama le Sabetega. Barwa ba Raama; Bona gape le Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kushe a tswala Nimirothe; a thoma go ba le maatla lefatsheng. 
1Chronicles1:11 Mizraime a tswala Lude, Anamime, Hababe, le Futuhime;" 
1Chronicles1:12 le Patrusime le Kasluhime, Bafilisitia le Bakafitori ba tswago kae." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanana a tswala Sidone leitsibulo la gagwe le Hethe. 
1Chronicles1:14 Le Bajebuse, le Baamore, le Bagiregashe;" 
1Chronicles1:15 Baheve le Baaraki le Batsini; 
1Chronicles1:16 le ma-Arvadia, le ma-Semare, le Ditsebi tsa Dipalo." 
1Chronicles1:17 Barwa ba Seme; Elama, le Asure, le Arfaksade, le Lude, le Siria, le Use, le Hule, le Gethere, le Mesheka." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpakshade a tswala Shela, Shela a tswala Ebere." 
1Chronicles1:19 Ebere a belegelwa barwa ba babedi, leina la yo mongwe e be e le Pelege; gobane mehleng ya gagwe lefatshe le be le arogane, leina la ngwanabo e be e le Jokitane." 
1Chronicles1:20 Jokotane a tswala Almodade, Shelefe, Hatsamethe, Jerak;" 
1Chronicles1:21 le Hadorama, le Usale, le Dikla;" 
1Chronicles1:22 le Ebale, le Abimaele, le Sheba;" 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofire, Havila le Jobabe. Ba ka moka e be e le barwa ba Jokotane." 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofire, Havila le Jobabe. Ba ka moka e be e le barwa ba Jokotane." 
1Chronicles1:24 Seme, le Arfaksade, le Shela;" 
1Chronicles1:25 Ebere, Pelege, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugo, Nahoro, Tera." 
1Chronicles1:27 Aberame; ka yena Aborahama. 
1Chronicles1:28 Barwa ba Aborahama; Isaka le Ishmaele. 
1Chronicles1:29 Meloko ya bona ka ye: Maitsibulo a Ishmaele, e lego Nebayothe; le Kadare, le Adbeele, le Mibisame;" 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishma le Duma, Massa, Hadada le Tema;" 
1Chronicles1:31 Jeture, Nafishi le Kadema. Ba ka barwa ba Ishmaele." 
1Chronicles1:32 Barwa ba Katura, mosadi wa serethe wa Aborahama: o belege Tsimerane, Jokshane, Medane, Midiane, Ishibaka le Shuaga. Barwa ba Jokshane; Bona gape le Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:33 Le bana ba Midiane; Efa le Efere le Henoge le Abida le Eldaa. Bohle ba ka barwa ba Katura. 
1Chronicles1:34 Aborahama a tswala Isaka. Barwa ba Isaka; Esau le Baiseraele. 
1Chronicles1:35 Barwa ba Esau e be e le Elifase, Reuel le Jeushe, Jaalame le Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Barwa ba Elifase; Temane le Omare, Tsefi le Gathame, Kanase le Timna, le Amaleka." 
1Chronicles1:37 Barwa ba Reuele ka Nahathe, Sera, Shama le Misa." 
1Chronicles1:38 Barwa ba Seire e be e le Lotane, Shobale, Tsibeone, Ana, Dishone, Esere le Dishane." 
1Chronicles1:39 Barwa ba Lotane e be e le Hori le Homame, Timina e be e le ngwanabo Lotane." 
1Chronicles1:40 Barwa ba Shobala; Alan, Manahathe, Ebala, Shefi le Oname. Le bana ba Tsibeone; Aia, le Hannah." 
1Chronicles1:41 Barwa ba Ana; Go hloka tlhompho. Le barwa ba Dishone; Amerama, le Eshbane, le Itherane le Karane." 
1Chronicles1:42 Barwa ba Esere e be e le Bilhane, Tsafane le Jakane. Barwa ba Dishane; Utse o mo Aran." 
1Chronicles1:43 Bjale tse ka dikgosi tseo di ilego tsa busa nageng ya Edomo pele ga ge kgosi le ge e le efe e busa bana ba Baiseraele; Bela morwa wa Beore, leina la motse wa gagwe e be e le Dinhaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela a hwa, le Jobabe morwa wa Sera wa Botsera a busa legatong la gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela a hwa, le Jobabe morwa wa Sera wa Botsera a busa legatong la gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobabe a hwa, Hushame wa naga ya Bathane a busa legatong la gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobabe a hwa, Hushame wa naga ya Bathane a busa legatong la gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:46 Hushame a hwa, le Hadada morwa wa Bedada, yo a ilego a fenya Midiane nageng ya Moaba, a busa legatong la gagwe; leina la motse wa gagwe e be e le Avithe." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadada a hwa, Samla wa Masreka a busa legatong la gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:48 Samla a hwa, Shaulo wa Rehobothe kgauswi le noka a busa legatong la gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:49 Ge Saulo a hwile, Baalhanani morwa wa Akibore a busa legatong la gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:50 Baali-Hanane a hwa, Hadada a busa legatong la gagwe; leina la motse wa gagwe e be e le Pai; leina la mosadi wa gagwe e be e le Mehetabele morwedi wa Matrede morwedi wa Metsahaba." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadada le yena a hwa. Tsena ka dikgosana tsa Edomo; Kgosana Timna, Mohumagadi Aliah, Mohumagadi Jethethe." 
1Chronicles1:52 Kgosana Oholibama, Kgosana Ela, Kgosana Pinone;" 
1Chronicles1:53 le Hosana Kanase le Hosana Temane le Hosana Mibsara; 
1Chronicles1:54 Hosana Magdiele, Hosana Irame. Tse ka dikgosana tsa Edomo." 
1Chronicles2:1 Ba ka bana ba Baiseraele; Rubeni, Simeone, Lefi, le Juda, le Isakara, le Sebulone;" 
1Chronicles2:2 Dan, Josefa, le Benjamine, Nafutali, Gade, le Ashere." 
1Chronicles2:3 Barwa ba Juda; Onane le Shela; ba bararo ba belegetswe Shua wa Mokanana. Ere, leitsibulo la Juda, e be e le yo kgopo mahlong a Jehofa; a mmolaya." 
1Chronicles2:4 Thamara morwedi wa gagwe a mo belegelwa Farese le Sara; Barwa ka moka ba Juda e be e le ba bahlano. 
1Chronicles2:5 Barwa ba Perese e be e le Hetserone le Hamule. 
1Chronicles2:6 Barwa ba Serah; Simri, Ethan, Hemane, Calcol le Dara, ba bahlano ka moka." 
1Chronicles2:7 Barwa ba Karami e be e le Akara, moapostola wa Baiseraele, yo a dirilego sebe selong seo se rogilwego." 
1Chronicles2:8 Barwa ba Ethane e be e le Asaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Le barwa ba Hetserone bao a ba belegetswego; Jeremia le Rama le Kalubai. 
1Chronicles2:10 Rama a tswala Aminate. Aminadaba a tswala Nahashone, kgosana ya bana ba Juda;" 
1Chronicles2:11 Nasoni a tswala Salma, Salma a tswala Boase." 
1Chronicles2:12 Boase a tswala Obede, Obede a tswala Jese." 
1Chronicles2:13 Jese a tswala leitsibulo la gagwe Eliaba, wa bobedi Abinadaba, wa boraro Shimea." 
1Chronicles2:14 Nethanele wa bone, Radai wa bohlano;" 
1Chronicles2:15 Oseme wa botshelela, Dafita wa bosupa;" 
1Chronicles2:16 Dikgaetsedi tsa gagwe e be e le Tseruya le Abigaile. Barwa ba Tseruya e be e le Abisai, le Joaba, le Asahele, ba bararo." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaile a belega Amasa, tatago Amasa e be e le Jethere wa Moishimaele." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebe morwa wa Hetsirone a tswala bana ba Asuba mosadi wa gagwe le Jeriothe. Ba ka barwa ba gagwe; Jesere, le Shobabe, le Ardone." 
1Chronicles2:19 Ge Azuba a hwile, Kalebe a tsea Efrathe, yo a mo belegetsego Huri." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huri a tswala Uri, Uri a tswala Betsalele." 
1Chronicles2:21 Ka morago ga moo Hetserone a ya go morwedi wa Magire tatago Gileade, yoo a mo nyetsego ge a be a na le mengwaga ye masometshela; a belega Segube." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segube a tswala Jaire, yo a bego a na le metse e 23 nageng ya Gileade." 
1Chronicles2:23 A tsea Gesure le Siria gotee le metse ya Jaire go bona, le Kanate le metse ya yona, e lego metse e masome a masome a masome a masome a bona." 
1Chronicles2:24 Ka morago ga ge Heserone a hwile kua Kalebe Efrata, Abia mosadi wa Hetsirone a mo belegelwa Ashuru tatago Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Barwa ba Jerameele leitsibulo la Hetsirone e be e le Rama leitsibulo, Buna, Orene, Oseme, Ahija." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerameele le yena o be a na le mosadi yo mongwe yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Atara; o mosadi wa rena Onam. 
1Chronicles2:27 Barwa ba Rama leitsibulo la Jerameele e be e le Maase, Jamine le Ekare." 
1Chronicles2:28 Barwa ba Oname e be e le Shamai le Jada. Le barwa ba Shamai; Nadaba le Abishure. 
1Chronicles2:29 Leina la mosadi wa Abishure e be e le Abihaile, le a mo belegela Agbane le Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Barwa ba Nadaba e be e le Selede le Apaime, eupsa Selede a hwa a se na bana." 
1Chronicles2:31 Barwa ba Apaime ka Ishi. Barwa ba Jishi; Sheshane ya. Barwa ba Sheshane; Tla. 
1Chronicles2:32 Barwa ba Jada ngwanabo Shamai; Jethere le Jonathane, le Jethere ba hwa ba se na bana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Barwa ba Jonathane; Peleth le Zaza. Ba e be e le barwa ba Jerameele. 
1Chronicles2:34 Bjale Sheshane o be a se na barwa, a na le barwedi feela. Seshane o be a na le mohlanka wa Moegepeta, yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Jara." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshane a nea Jaha mohlanka wa gagwe morwedi wa gagwe gore e be mosadi wa gagwe; a mo belegelwa Athai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai a tswala Nathane, Nathane a tswala Tsabade." 
1Chronicles2:37 Sabade a tswala Efale, Efale a tswala Obede." 
1Chronicles2:38 Obede a tswala Jehu, Jehu a tswala Asaria." 
1Chronicles2:39 Asaria a tswala Heles, Heles a tswala Elia." 
1Chronicles2:40 Elia a tswala Shishamai, Shishamai a tswala Shalume." 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalume a tswala Jekamia, Jekamia a tswala Elisama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Barwa ba Kalebe ngwanabo Jerameele e be e le Mesha leitsibulo la gagwe, yo e bego e le tatago Tsife; le barwa ba Maresha tatago Heberone." 
1Chronicles2:43 Barwa ba Heberone ka Kora, Tapua, Rekame le Shema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema a tswala Rahame tatago Johoama le Rekame tatago Shamai. 
1Chronicles2:45 Morwa wa Shamai e be e le Maone; 
1Chronicles2:46 Efa serethe sa Kalebe, a belega Harane, Moše le Gase; Harane a tswala Gase." 
1Chronicles2:47 Barwa ba Jagdai e be e le Regeme, Jothame, Geshane, Pelete, Efa, le Shafa." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka, mosadi wa serethe wa Kalebe, a belega Shebere le Tirhana." 
1Chronicles2:49 A belega Shaafe tatago Madmana, Sheva tatago Magbina le tatago Gibea; Morwa wa Kalebe e be e le Ahase." 
1Chronicles2:50 Ba ka barwa ba Kalebe morwa wa Huri, leitsibulo la Efurata; Shobale tatago Kiriate-Jearime;" 
1Chronicles2:51 Salma tatago Betlelehema, Haref tatago Bethe-Gadere." 
1Chronicles2:52 Shoba tatago Kiriathe-Jearime o be a na le barwa; Ba Manase ba bararo le seripa. 
1Chronicles2:53 Le malapa a Kiriathe-jearime; ba Baite, ba Pug, ba Sumathe le Baegepeta; go bona go ile gwa theoga ma-Basare le ma-Stauli." 
1Chronicles2:54 Barwa ba Salma; Betlelehema, le Banetofi, le Atarothe, ntlo ya Joaba, le seripa sa Bamanaka le Batsori." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ditlogolo tsa bamangwalo bao ba bego ba dula Jabose; le Ba-Hammers, le Bashime, le Basugathe. Ba ka Bakanana bao ba tswago Hemathe, tatago lapa la Rekabe." 
1Chronicles3:1 Ba e be e le barwa ba Dafita, bao a ba belegetswego Heberone; leitsibulo, Aminone, wa Ahinoama wa Mojeseriele; Daniele wa bobedi, wa Abigaile wa Mokarmele;" 
1Chronicles3:1 Ba e be e le barwa ba Dafita, bao a ba belegetswego Heberone; leitsibulo, Aminone, wa Ahinoama wa Mojeseriele; Daniele wa bobedi, wa Abigaile wa Mokarmele;" 
1Chronicles3:2 wa boraro e be e le Abesalomo morwa wa Maaka, morwa wa Talmai, kgosi ya Gesure; wa bone e be e le Adoniya morwa wa Hagithe;" 
1Chronicles3:3 wa bohlano e be e le Shefatia wa Abitale; wa botshelela e be e le Jitreame ka Egla mosadi wa gagwe. 
1Chronicles3:4 Ba ba tshelelago ba ba belegetswe Heberone; a busa moo ka nywaga e supago le dikgwedi tse tshela, le a busa kua Jerusalema ka nywaga e masometharo-tharo." 
1Chronicles3:5 Ba ba belegetswe yena Jerusalema; Shimea, le Shobabe, le Nathane, le Salomo, ba bane, le Batse-shua morwa wa Amiele;" 
1Chronicles3:6 le Jibara, le Elisama, le Elifelete;" 
1Chronicles3:7 le Noga, le Nefege, le Jafia;" 
1Chronicles3:8 Elisama, Eliada le Elifelete, ba seswai ba bona." 
1Chronicles3:9 Ba ka moka e be e le barwa ba Dafita, ka ntle le barwa ba direthe le Thamara kgaetsedi ya bona." 
1Chronicles3:10 Barwa ba Salomo e be e le Rehoboama morwa wa gagwe, Abia morwa wa gagwe, Asa morwa wa gagwe, Jehoshafate morwa wa gagwe;" 
1Chronicles3:11 Jorama morwa wa gagwe, Ahasia morwa wa gagwe, Joase morwa wa gagwe;" 
1Chronicles3:12 Amatsia morwa wa gagwe, Asaria morwa wa gagwe, Jothame morwa wa gagwe;" 
1Chronicles3:13 Ahasi morwa wa gagwe, Hiskia morwa wa gagwe, Manase morwa wa gagwe;" 
1Chronicles3:14 Amoni morwa wa gagwe, Josia morwa wa gagwe." 
1Chronicles3:15 Barwa ba Josia e be e le wa pele Johanani, wa bobedi e le Jehoyakime, wa boraro e le Tsedekia, wa bone e be e le Shalume." 
1Chronicles3:16 Barwa ba Jehoyakime e be e le Jekonia morwa wa gagwe le Tsedekia morwa wa gagwe. 
1Chronicles3:17 Barwa ba Jekonia e be e le Asiri morwa wa gagwe Shealtiele; 
1Chronicles3:18 le Malakirama, le Pedaya, le Shenatsare, le Jekamia, le Hoshama le Nedabia." 
1Chronicles3:19 Barwa ba Pedaya e be e le Serubabele le Shimei; le barwa ba Serubabele; Meshulame, Hanania le Shelomithe bana babo bona;" 
1Chronicles3:20 Hashuba, Ohele, Beria, Hasadia, Jushabetsede, ba bahlano." 
1Chronicles3:21 Barwa ba Hanania; Pelatia le Jeshaya: barwa ba Refaya, barwa ba Arnane, barwa ba Obatya, barwa ba Shegania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Barwa ba Shegania; le barwa ba Shemaya; Hatu, le Jigale, le Baria, le Nearia, le Shafate, ba tshelela." 
1Chronicles3:23 Barwa ba Nearia; Eljonai, Hiskia le Azrikama, ba bararo." 
1Chronicles3:24 Barwa ba Elioenai e be e le Hodaya, Eliashibe, Pelaya, Akube, Johanane, Dalaia le Anani, e le ba supago." 
1Chronicles4:1 Barwa ba Juda; Peretz, Heserone, Karmi, Huri le Shoba." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaya morwa wa Shobala a tswala Jahathe; Jahathe a tswala Akumai le Lahade. A ka malapa a Batsora. 
1Chronicles4:3 Ba e be e le botatago Etame; le Jeseriele, le Ishma, le Idbashe; mme leina la kgaetsedi ya bona e be e le Hazelponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Le Penuele tatago Gedoro le Esere tatago Husha. Ba ka barwa ba Huri, leitsibulo la Efurata, tatago Betlelehema." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashure tatago Tekoa o be a na le basadi ba babedi, e lego Hela le Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara a mo tswalela Ahusame, Hefere, Temeni, Hahashatari. Ba e be e le barwa ba Naära." 
1Chronicles4:7 Barwa ba Hela e be e le Tserete le Itsoara le Ethanane. 
1Chronicles4:8 Kose a tswala Anube le Tsobeba le malapa a Ahare morwa wa Harume. 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabese o be a hlomphega go feta bana babo; mme mmagwe a mo rea leina la Jabese, a re: Ka gobane ka mo belege ka manyami." 
1Chronicles4:10 Jaebetz o ile a lopa Modimo wa Baiseraele a re: “Wena ge e ba ruri o rata go ntshegofatsa le go katolosa naga ya ka, e le gore seatla sa gago se be godimo ga ka le gore o nthibele bobe, e le gore bo se ka bja ba bohloko!” Le Modimo a mo fa seo a se kgopetsego." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kalube ngwanabo Shua a tswala Mehire, tatago Eshitone." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshitone a tswala Betrafa, Pasha, le Tehinna tatago Irinahase. Ba ka banna ba Rega." 
1Chronicles4:13 Barwa ba Kanase e be e le Othiniele le Seraya. Le barwa ba Othiniele; Hathati. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonothai a tswala Ofura, Seraya a tswala Joaba, tatago moeding wa Karatsime. Gobane e be e le ditsebi tsa diatla." 
1Chronicles4:15 Le barwa ba Kalebe morwa wa Jefune; Iru, Ela le Naame; barwa ba Ela e be e le Kanase." 
1Chronicles4:16 Barwa ba Jehalelele ka Tsife le Tsifa, Tiria le Asarele." 
1Chronicles4:17 Barwa ba Esera e be e le Jethere, Mered, Efere le Jalone; A belega Miriame, Shammai le Ishiba, tatago Estemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Juda mosadi wa gagwe a belega Jarede tatago Gedoro, Hebere tatago Sogo le Jekuthiele tatago Tsenoa. Ba ka barwa ba Bithia morwedi wa Faro, yoo Merede a mo nyetsego." 
1Chronicles4:19 Barwa ba mosadi wa gagwe Hodia kgaetsedi ya Nahame, tatago Kaila wa Mogareme le Estemoa wa Mogatha." 
1Chronicles4:20 Barwa ba Shimone e be e le Aminone le Rina le Bene-Hanane le Tilone. Barwa ba Ishi e be e le Suhethe le Ben-tsohethe. 
1Chronicles4:21 Barwa ba Shela morwa wa Juda: Ere tatago Leka, Laada tatago Maresha, le malapa a ntlo ya ditsebi tsa diatla, ntlong ya Akibea;" 
1Chronicles4:22 le Jokime, le banna ba Koseba, le Joase, le Seraf, bao ba busitsego Moaba le Jashubilehema. Le tse ka dilo tsa kgale." 
1Chronicles4:23 Ba e be e le babepi ba dipitsa, le bao ba bego ba dula gare ga dithokgwa, ba dula moo le kgosi ka baka la modiro wa yona." 
1Chronicles4:24 Barwa ba Simeone e be e le Nemuele, Jamine, Jaribe, Sara le Shaulo." 
1Chronicles4:25 Shalume morwa wa gagwe, Mibisame morwa wa gagwe, Mishma morwa wa gagwe." 
1Chronicles4:26 Barwa ba Mishima e be e le Hamuele morwa wa gagwe, Sagure morwa wa gagwe, Shimei morwa wa gagwe." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei o be a na le barwa ba lesometshela le barwedi ba tshela; eupsa bana babo ba be ba se na bana ba bantsi, le ditlogolo tsa bona ka moka e be e le tse dintsi go swana le ditlogolo tsa Juda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Ba dula Bereseba, Molada le Hasara." 
1Chronicles4:29 Biliha, le Esem, le Tolade;" 
1Chronicles4:30 le Bethuele, le Horma, le Sitlage;" 
1Chronicles4:31 le Bethe-marabothe, le Hatsaro, le Bethe-Birei, le Shaaraime; Metse yeo e be e le metse ya bona go fihla pusong ya Dafita." 
1Chronicles4:32 Metse ya bona e be e le Etame, Aine, Rimone, Tokane, le Ashane, e lego metse e mehlano." 
1Chronicles4:33 Metse ya bona ka moka yeo e bego e dikologile metse ye go fihla Baali. Tse e be e le madulo a bona le moloko wa bona. 
1Chronicles4:34 Le Mesobabe, le Jameleka, le Josha morwa wa Amatsia." 
1Chronicles4:35 Le Joele, le Jehu morwa wa Joshibia, morwa wa Seraya, morwa wa Asiele." 
1Chronicles4:35 Le Joele, le Jehu morwa wa Joshibia, morwa wa Seraya, morwa wa Asiele." 
1Chronicles4:36 Le Elionenai, Jakobe, Johane, Asaya, Adiele, Jeshmiele le Benaya;" 
1Chronicles4:37 le Shisha morwa wa Tsifi, morwa wa Arone, morwa wa Jedaya, morwa wa Simiri, morwa wa Shemaya;" 
1Chronicles4:38 Ba ba boletswego ka maina e be e le dikgosana ka malapeng a bona, le ntlo ya borakgolokhukhu ba bona e be e le e kgolo kudu." 
1Chronicles4:39 Ba ya mojakong wa Gedoro, ka thoko ya ka bohlabela ya moedi, ba yo tsoma mafulo a mehlape ya bona." 
1Chronicles4:40 Ba hwetsa mafulo a humilego le a bose; gobane batho ba Hama ba be ba dula moo kgale. 
1Chronicles4:41 Tseo di ngwadilwego ka maina di tlile mehleng ya Hesekia kgosi ya Juda, tsa phusola ditente tsa tsona le mesasa ya tsona, le ka ditente. Mafulo a mehlape ya bona." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ba bangwe ba bona, e lego barwa ba Simeone, banna ba makgolo a mahlano, ba ya thabeng ya Seire, ba na le balaodi ba bona Pelatia, Nearia, Refaya le Usiele, barwa ba Ishi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Ba bolaya Baamaleka ba bangwe bao ba setsego, ba dula moo go fihla le lehono." 
1Chronicles5:1 Barwa ba Rubeni leitsibulo la Baiseraele; eupsa ka ge a be a silafaditse malao a tatagwe, tshwanelo ya gagwe ya matswalo e ile ya newa barwa ba Josefa morwa wa Baiseraele; tokalo ya matswalo." 
1Chronicles5:2 Gobane Juda e tiile go feta bana babo, le go tswa go yena go tlile kgosana. Eupsa tshwanelo ya matswalo e be e le ya Josefa." 
1Chronicles5:3 Barwa ba Rubeni leitsibulo la Baiseraele e be e le Hanok le Palu, Hetsirone le Karami." 
1Chronicles5:4 Barwa ba Joele; Semaya morwa wa gagwe, Gogo morwa wa gagwe, Shimei morwa wa gagwe;" 
1Chronicles5:4 Barwa ba Joele; Semaya morwa wa gagwe, Gogo morwa wa gagwe, Shimei morwa wa gagwe;"

1Chronicles5:6 Beera morwa wa gagwe, yo a ilego a mo isa bothopsa go Tiligathe-pilenesere kgosi ya Asiria; e be e le moetapele wa Barubeni." 
1Chronicles5:7 Bana babo bona go ya ka malapa a bona e be e le Jeiele le Sagaria, e lego dihlogo tsa malapa a botatago bona."

1Chronicles5:8 Bela morwa wa Asase, morwa wa Shema, morwa wa Joele, yo a bego a dula Aroere, go fihla Nebo le Baalimeone;" 
1Chronicles5:9 Ka bohlabela a dula lesokang go fihla Nokang ya Eforate, ka gobane diruiwa tsa bona di be di atile nageng ya Gileada." 
1Chronicles5:10 Mehleng ya Saulo ba lwa le Bahagari bao ba ilego ba wa ka diatla tsa bona, ba dula ditenteng tsa bona nageng ka moka ya ka bohlabela ya Gileada." 
1Chronicles5:11 Barwa ba Gade ba dula ka mosola wa bona, nageng ya Bashane go fihla Salega."

1Chronicles5:12 Joele molaodi, Safame wa bobedi, Janai le Shafate kua Bashane." 
1Chronicles5:13 Bana babo bona ba ntlong ya borakgolokhukhu ba bona e be e le Mikaele le Meshulama le Sheba le Jorai le Jagane le Tsia le Hebere, ba supago." 
1Chronicles5:14 Ba e be e le barwa ba Abihaile, morwa wa Huri, morwa wa Jaroa, morwa wa Gileada, morwa wa Mikaele, morwa wa Jese, morwa wa Jahedo, morwa wa Buse;" 
1Chronicles5:15 Aki morwa wa Abdiele, morwa wa Guni, kgosana ya malapa a borakgolokhukhu ba bona." 
1Chronicles5:16 Ba dula Gileade kua Bashane le mafulong ka moka a yona le mafulong ka moka a Sharone, mellwaneng ya bona." 
1Chronicles5:17 Tse ka moka di ile tsa balwa go ya ka masika a Jothama kgosi ya Juda le mehleng ya Jeroboama kgosi ya Baiseraele. 
1Chronicles5:18 Go bana ba Rubeni le bana ba Gada le seripa-gare sa moloko wa Manase e be e le banna ba bagale ba dikate tse masomenne-nne-makgolosupa bao ba itlhamilego ka bora le tshosa; go ya ntweng. 
1Chronicles5:19 Le ba lwa le Bahagari, le Jethere, le Nefi, le Nodabe." 
1Chronicles5:20 Ba thuswa go lwa le bona, le Bahagari ba gafelwa diatleng tsa bona le bohle bao ba bego ba na le bona; ka gobane ba be ba Mo tshepile." 
1Chronicles5:21 Ba tsea mehlape ya bona; dikamela tsa bona e be e le dinku tse 50 000 le tse 500, ditonki tse 2 000 le banna ba 100 000." 
1Chronicles5:22 Gobane go ile gwa wa ba bantsi bao ba bolailwego, ka gobane ntwa e be e le ya Modimo. Ka gona ba dula lefelong la bona go fihlela ba ya bothopsa." 
1Chronicles5:23 Barwa ba seripa sa moloko wa Manase ba be ba dula nageng yeo; ba dula go tloga Bashane go fihla Baalhermone le Senire, go fihla thabeng ya Heremone." 
1Chronicles5:24 Ba e be e le dihlogo tsa malapa a botatago bona: Efere, Ishi, Eliele, Asriele, Jeremia, Hodavia le Jahadiele, banna ba bagale, banna ba tumilego, dihlogo tsa malapa a botatago bona." 
1Chronicles5:25 Ba thoma go dira sebe malebana le Modimo wa borakgolokhukhu ba bona le go ba le ditswalano tsa boitshwaro bjo bo gobogilego le medimo ya ditshaba tsa naga yeo Modimo a e fedisitsego pele ga bona. 
1Chronicles5:26 Ka moka Modimo wa Baiseraele a ba tlisetsa moya wa Puli kgosi ya Asiria le moya wa Tiligathe-pilenesere kgosi ya Asiria, go bona wa Barubeni le Bagada le seripa-gare sa moloko wa Manase. A dula Hala, le Habore, le Hari, ho fihlela nokang ya Gosane, ho fihlela kajeno."

1Chronicles6:62 Ba e be e le barwa ba Gersom go ya ka malapa a bona go tswa molokong wa Isakara, moloko wa Ashere, moloko wa Nafutali le molokong wa Manase kua Bashane."

1Chronicles7:1 Barwa ba Isakara e be e le Tola, le Pua, Jashube, le Shimrone, ba bane." 
1Chronicles7:2 Barwa ba Tola; Usi, le Refaya, le Jeriele, le Jahmai, le Jibsama, le Shemuele, e lego dihlogo tsa malapa a botatago bona, ba kua Tola; e be e le bahlabani ba sebete melokong ya bona; bao palo ya bona mehleng ya Dafita e bego e le 22 006." 
1Chronicles7:3 Barwa ba Usi e be e le barwa ba Izragia; Mikaele, Obatya, Joele, Isiya, mengwaga ye mehlano, ka moka ka dihlogo." 
1Chronicles7:3 Barwa ba Usi e be e le barwa ba Izragia; Mikaele, Obatya, Joele, Isiya, mengwaga ye mehlano, ka moka ka dihlogo." 
1Chronicles7:4 Gotee le bona, go ya ka malapa a bona, go ya ka malapa a borakgolokhukhu ba bona, go be go na le dihlopha tsa bagale ba dikate tse masometharo-tshela, ka gobane ba be ba na le basadi ba bantsi le barwa." 
1Chronicles7:5 Bana babo bona gare ga malapa ka moka a Isakare e be e le banna ba bagale ba matla, ba balwa ka moka go ya ka masika a bona e le ba dikate tse masomeseswai-supa." 
1Chronicles7:6 Barwa ba Babenjamine; Bela le Bekar le di-Jediael tse tharo. 
1Chronicles7:7 Barwa ba Bela; Ebone, le Usi, le Usiele, le Jerimothe, le Iri, ba bahlano; dihlogo tsa malapa a botatago bona, banna ba bagale; go ya ka malapa a bona go be go e-na le ba 22 034." 
1Chronicles7:8 Barwa ba Begere; Shemira, Joase, Eliesere, Elienai, Omiri, Jerimothe, Abia, Anathothe, le Alemethe. Ka moka ga bona ka barwa ba Begere." 
1Chronicles7:9 Palo ya bona go ya ka meloko ya bona, go ya ka malapa a bona, go ya ka dihlogo tsa malapa a botatago bona, banna ba bagale, e be e le ba dikate tse masomepedi-makgolopedi." 
1Chronicles7:10 Barwa ba Jediaele; Bilihane le barwa ba Bilhane; Jesu le Benjamine le Ehude le Kanana le Sathane le Tarashishe le Ahishakara. 
1Chronicles7:11 Barwa ka moka ba barwa ba Jediaele, go ya ka dihlogo tsa borakgolokhukhu ba bona, banna ba bagale, e be e le banna ba ntwa ba 17 200." 
1Chronicles7:12 Le Shupime le Hupime, barwa ba Ire, le Hushime, barwa ba Ahere." 
1Chronicles7:13 Barwa ba Naftali e be e le Jahigiele, Guni, Jesere le Shalume barwa ba Bilha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Barwa ba Manase e be e le Asriele; mosadi wa gagwe wa serethe, Mosiria, a belega Magire, tatago Gileade." 
1Chronicles7:15 Majire a tsea kgaetsedi ya Hupime le Shupime, yoo leina la kgaetsedi ya gagwe e bego e le Maga. Leina la wa bobedi e be e le Tselofehade; Tselofehade o be a na le barwedi." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maga mosadi wa Magi a belega morwa, a mo rea leina la Peresh. Leina la ngwanabo e be e le Tsereshe; barwa ba gagwe e be e le Ulama le Rakame." 
1Chronicles7:17 Barwa ba Ulama ka eng? Ba e be e le barwa ba Gileade, morwa wa Magire, morwa wa Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Hamolekathe ngwanabo a belega Jesu le Abiesere le Mahala. 
1Chronicles7:19 Barwa ba Shemida e be e le Ahiane, Šegeme, Liki le Aniame." 
1Chronicles7:20 Barwa ba Eferaime e be e le Shuthela le Berede morwa wa gagwe le Tahathe morwa wa gagwe le Elada morwa wa gagwe le Tahathe morwa wa gagwe. 
1Chronicles7:21 Le Sabade morwa wa gagwe, le Shuthela morwa wa gagwe, le Esere le Eliada, bao ba bolailego banna ba Gathe bao ba belegwego nageng yeo, ka gobane ba theogile go yo tsea dikgomo tsa bona." 
1Chronicles7:22 Eferaime tatago bona a lla matsatsi a mantsi, le bana babo ba tla go mo homotsa." 
1Chronicles7:23 Ge a tsena go mosadi wa gagwe, a ima, a belega morwa, a mo rea leina la Beria, ka gobane go ile gwa senya ntlo ya gagwe." 
1Chronicles7:24 Morwedi wa gagwe e be e le Sheera, yo a ilego a aga Bethe-Horone ya ka tlase le ya ka godimo, le Ushere." 
1Chronicles7:25 Barwa ba gagwe e be e le Refa, Retsefa, Tela morwa wa gagwe, le Tahane morwa wa gagwe." 
1Chronicles7:26 Laedane morwa wa gagwe, Amihude morwa wa gagwe, Elishama morwa wa gagwe;" 
1Chronicles7:27 E sego morwa wa gagwe, Jošua morwa wa gagwe." 
1Chronicles7:28 Naga ya bona le mafelo a bona a bodulo e be e le Bethele le mafulo a yona, le go leba Naharane le ka bodikala bja Gesere le mafulo a yona; le Šegeme le mafulo a yona, le Gasa le mafulo a yona;" 
1Chronicles7:29 Mollwaneng wa bana ba Manase, Bethe-Sheane le metse ya yona, Taanaka le metse ya yona, Megido le metse ya yona, Doro le metse ya yona. Barwa ba Josefa, morwa wa Baiseraele, ba be ba dula lefelong le." 
1Chronicles7:30 Barwa ba Ashere; Imina, le Jeshua, le Jeshuai, le Beria, le Sera kgaetsedi ya bona." 
1Chronicles7:31 Barwa ba Beria e be e le Hebere le Malkiele, yo e lego tatago Biritsavithe." 
1Chronicles7:32 Hebere a tswala Jafelete, Shomere, Hothame, le Shua kgaetsedi ya bona." 
1Chronicles7:33 Barwa ba Jafete e be e le Pasaka, Bimehale le Ashvathe. Ba ka barwa ba Jafulete." 
1Chronicles7:34 Barwa ba Shamere e be e le Ahi, le Rohega, Jehuba le Siria." 
1Chronicles7:35 Barwa ba ngwanabo e be e le Helema; Sofa ka Jimna le Seles ka Amal. 
1Chronicles7:36 Barwa ba Tsofi; Suaga le Harnefere le Shuale le Beri le Imra," 
1Chronicles7:37 le Betsere, Hode, Shama, Tsilesa, Itherane le Berea." 
1Chronicles7:38 Barwa ba Jethere e be e le Jefune, Pispa le Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Barwa ba Ula e be e le Ara, le Haniele le Resia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Ba ka moka e be e le bana ba Asere, dihlogo tsa ntlo ya tatago bona, banna ba bagale ba ba kgethilwego le bagale, ba bagolo ba dikgosana. Palo-moka ya banna bao ba bego ba ka ya ntweng e be e le ba 26 000." 
1Chronicles8:1 Babenjamine a tswala Bela leitsibulo la gagwe, Ashbele wa bobedi, Ahara wa boraro." 
1Chronicles8:2 Noga ya bone le Rafa ya bohlano. 
1Chronicles8:3 Barwa ba Bela e be e le Adara, Gera, le Abihudi;" 
1Chronicles8:4 le Abishua, le Naemane, le Ahoa." 
1Chronicles8:5 Le Gera, le Shefufane, le Hurama." 
1Chronicles8:6 Bana ka barwa ba Ehude: ba ka dihlogo tsa borakgolokhukhu ba badudi ba Geba, ba dula Manahathe." 
1Chronicles8:7 Naamane le Ahija le Gera ba mo belegelwa Usa le Ahihude. 
1Chronicles8:8 Shaharaime a tswala bana nageng ya Moaba, ka morago ga ge a ba tlositse; Basadi ba gagwe e be e le Hushime le Baara." 
1Chronicles8:9 Mosadi wa gagwe a mo belegelwa Hode, Jobabe, Tsibia, Mesha, le Malkame." 
1Chronicles8:9 Mosadi wa gagwe a mo belegelwa Hode, Jobabe, Tsibia, Mesha, le Malkame." 
1Chronicles8:10 Le Jeushe, Sakia le Mirma. Ba e be e le barwa ba gagwe, dihlogo tsa borakgolokhukhu ba bona." 
1Chronicles8:11 Hushime a tswala Abitube le Elepaale. 
1Chronicles8:12 Barwa ba Elepaale; Hebere, le Misham, le Skamed, bao ba agilego Ono le Lod, le metse ya yona;" 
1Chronicles8:13 Beria le Shema, bao e bego e le dihlogo tsa dintlo tsa botatago badudi ba Ajalone, bao ba ilego ba raka badudi ba Gathe." 
1Chronicles8:14 Ahio, Shashaka le Jeromothe;" 
1Chronicles8:15 le Sebadia, le Arade, le Adere." 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikaele, Ishipa le Joha, barwa ba Beria;" 
1Chronicles8:17 le Sebadia, le Meshulama, le Hisikia, le Hebere." 
1Chronicles8:18 Itsimerai, Itsilia, Jobabe, barwa ba Elepaale;" 
1Chronicles8:18 Itsimerai, Itsilia, Jobabe, barwa ba Elepaale;" 
1Chronicles8:19 le Jakime, le Tsigri, le Sabedi;" 
1Chronicles8:20 le Elienai, le Silthai, le Eliele;" 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaya, Beraya, Shimeate, barwa ba Shimei;" 
1Chronicles8:22 ba Ishipane, Hebere le Eliele;" 
1Chronicles8:23 Abdone, Sigri, Hanani;" 
1Chronicles8:24 Hanania, Elama, Antothia;" 
1Chronicles8:25 le Jefedia le Penuele, barwa ba Shashaka;" 
1Chronicles8:26 le Shamsherai, Sagaria le Athalia;" 
1Chronicles8:27 Jaresia, Elia, Sigri, barwa ba Jerohama." 
1Chronicles8:28 Ba e be e le dihlogo tsa borakgolokhukhu ba bona go ya ka malapa a bona, e lego baetapele. Ba be ba dula Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles8:29 Tatago Gibeone o be a dula Gibeone; yo leina la mosadi wa gagwe e bego e le Maaka. 
1Chronicles8:30 Morwa wa gagwe wa leitsibulo Abdone, Tsure, Kishi, Baali le Nadabe;" 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedoro, Ahjo le Sager." 
1Chronicles8:32 Miklothe a tswala Shimea. Ba dula le bana babo bona kua Jerusalema, ka mosola wa bona." 
1Chronicles8:33 Nere a tswala Kishi, Kishi a tswala Saulo, Saulo a tswala Jonathane, Malkishua, Abinadaba le Eshbaale." 
1Chronicles8:34 Morwa wa Jonathane e be e le Meribe-baali; Meribe-baale a tswala Mika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Barwa ba Mika e be e le Pithone, Meleka, Taria le Agashe." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahasi a tswala Joyada. Joada a tswala Alemethe, Asimavethe le Simiri. Tsimiri a tswala Moše." 
1Chronicles8:37 Moše a tswala Binea. Rafa morwa wa gagwe, Eleasa morwa wa gagwe, Asele morwa wa gagwe." 
1Chronicles8:38 Asele o be a na le barwa ba tshelelago, bao maina a bona e lego Asrikama, Bokaru, Ishmaele, Sheria, Obatya le Hanane. Ba ka moka e be e le barwa ba Asele." 
1Chronicles8:39 Barwa ba Hesekiele ka Ulama ngwanabo, Jehushe wa bobedi, Elifelete wa boraro." 
1Chronicles8:40 Barwa ba Ulama e be e le banna ba bagale ba bagolo, babetsi ba mesebe, ba na le barwa ba bantsi le barwa ba barwa, e lego ba lekgolo-masomehlano. Ka moka ga bona e be e le ditlogolo tsa Babenjamine." 
1Chronicles9:1 Ka gona Baiseraele ka moka ba balwa ka malapa a bona; di ngwadilwe ka pukung ya dikgosi tsa Baiseraele le tsa Juda, tseo di ilego tsa iswa bothopsa Babele;" 
1Chronicles9:2 Badudi ba pele bao ba ilego ba dula metseng ya bona e be e le Baiseraele, baperisita, Balefi le Banethinime." 
1Chronicles9:3 Bana ba Juda le bana ba Babenjamine le ba Eferaime le Manase ba be ba dula Jerusalema. 
1Chronicles9:4 Uthai morwa wa Amihude, morwa wa Omri, morwa wa Imri, morwa wa Bani, wa bana ba Perese morwa wa Juda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Le ba Shilo; Baboledi e be e le Asaya le barwa ba gagwe. 
1Chronicles9:6 Go barwa ba Tsera; Jehuele le bana babo, ba 600, ba be ba le moo ba nnosi;" 
1Chronicles9:7 go barwa ba Babenjamine; Salu, morwa wa Meshulame, morwa wa Hodavia, morwa wa Hasenua;" 
1Chronicles9:8 Ibnea morwa wa Jerohama, le Ela morwa wa Usi, morwa wa Migri, le Meshulame morwa wa Shefatia, morwa wa Ruele, morwa wa Ibnia;" 
1Chronicles9:9 Bana babo bona go ya ka ditlogolo tsa bona e be e le makgolo a senyane-masomehlano-tshela. Banna ba ka moka e be e le dihlogo tsa malapa a botatago bona. 
1Chronicles9:10 Le baperisita; Jedaya, Joyaribe le Jagine," 
1Chronicles9:11 le Asaria morwa wa Hilikia, morwa wa Meshulame, morwa wa Tsadoko, morwa wa Merayothe, morwa wa Ahitube, mmusi wa ntlo ya Modimo;" 
1Chronicles9:12 le Adaya morwa wa Jerohama, morwa wa Pashure, morwa wa Malakiya, le Masai morwa wa Adiele, morwa wa Jahigisere, morwa wa Meshulame, morwa wa Meshilememi, morwa wa Imere;" 
1Chronicles9:13 le bana babo bona, e lego dihlogo tsa malapa a borakgolokhukhu ba bona, ba 1 700; banna ba bantsi ba bokgoni bakang sa modiro wa tirelo ya ntlo ya Modimo." 
1Chronicles9:14 Le ba Balefi; Semaya morwa wa Hashube, morwa wa Aserikamo, morwa wa Hashabia, wa barwa ba Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 Bakara, Hereshe, Galale, le Matania morwa wa Mika, morwa wa Tsigri, morwa wa Asafa;" 
1Chronicles9:16 le Obatya morwa wa Shemaya, morwa wa Galale, morwa wa Jeduthune, le Beria morwa wa Asa, morwa wa Elkana, yo a bego a dula metseng ya Banetofi." 
1Chronicles9:17 Baleti ba kgoro e be e le Shalume, Akube, Talmone, Ahimane le bana babo bona; Shalume e be e le hlogo;" 
1Chronicles9:18 go fihla ga bjale ba be ba letile kgorong ya kgosi ka bohlabela; e be e le baleti ba dikgoro ka dihlopha tsa barwa ba Lefi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Shalume morwa wa Kora, morwa wa Abiasafa, morwa wa Kora, le bana babo ba barwa ba tatagwe, e lego Bakora, ba be ba okametse tirelo ya baleti ba mejako ya taberenakale ya kopano, le borakgolokhukhu ba bona, bao ba be ba okametse modiro wo. Bao ba bego ba okametse dikgoro tsa Jehofa e be e le baleti ba dikgoro." 
1Chronicles9:20 Finease morwa wa Eleasara e be e le mmusi wa bona nakong e fetilego, Jehofa o be a na le yena." 
1Chronicles9:21 Sagaria morwa wa Meshelemia e be e le moleti wa mojako wa taberenakale ya kopano. 
1Chronicles9:22 Barwa ka moka bao ba kgethilwego go ba baleti ba dikgoro mejakong e be e le ba makgolo a mabedi le lesomepedi. Ba ba balwa go ya ka masika metseng ya bona, yeo Dafita le Samuele mmoni ba e hlomilego melokong ya bona." 
1Chronicles9:23 Ka gona bona le bana ba bona ba be ba hlokometse dikgoro tsa ntlo ya Jehofa, e lego ntlo ya taberenakale, ka bahlapetsi." 
1Chronicles9:24 Baleti ba kgoro e be e le ka dikotara tse nne, ka bohlabela, bodikala, leboa le borwa." 
1Chronicles9:25 Bana babo bona bao ba bego ba le metseng ya bona ba be ba tla tla ka morago ga matsatsi a supago nako le nako le bona. 
1Chronicles9:26 Gobane Balefi ba, baleti ba bane ba bagolo ba dikgoro, ba be ba le mosomong wa bona le ba hlokometse diphaposi le matlotlo a ntlo ya Modimo wa thereso." 
1Chronicles9:27 Ba robala go dikologa Ngwako wa Modimo bosego ka moka, ka gobane molato o be o le godimo ga bona, mesong e mengwe le e mengwe ba e bula." 
1Chronicles9:28 Ba bangwe ba bona ba be ba na le boikarabelo bja modiro wa bodiredi, gore ba ba tlise le go ba ntsha pele ga bona." 
1Chronicles9:29 Ba bangwe ba bona ba ile ba kgethwa go hlokomela dibjana, le diletso ka moka tsa Sekgethwa, le senkgwa, le beine, le mafura, le diorelo le dinoko." 
1Chronicles9:30 Ba bangwe ba barwa ba baperisita ba dira setlolo sa dinoko. 
1Chronicles9:31 Matithia, yo mongwe wa Balefi, yo e bego e le leitsibulo la Shalume wa Momahorete, o be a na le mosomo wa go hlokomela dilo tseo di dirilwego ka dipaneng." 
1Chronicles9:32 Bana babo bona ba bangwe ba barwa ba Bahethe ba be ba okametse dinkgwa tsa pontsho, gore ba di lokisetse ka Sabatha e nngwe le e nngwe." 
1Chronicles9:33 Ba ka diopedi tse dikgolo tsa borakgolokhukhu ba Balefi, bao ba bego ba dula diphaposing tseo ba bego ba lokologile, ka gobane ba be ba thwetswe modirong woo mosegare le bosego." 
1Chronicles9:34 Ba e be e le dihlogo tsa malapa a botatago Balefi go ya ka malapa a bona; ba dula Jerusalema. 
1Chronicles9:35 Kua Gibeone, tatago Gibeone e be e le Jehiele, yoo leina la mosadi wa gagwe e bego e le Maaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Morwa wa gagwe wa leitsibulo Abdone, Tsure, Kishi, Baali, Nere le Nadabe;" 
1Chronicles9:37 le Gedoro, Ai, Sagaria le Miklothe." 
1Chronicles9:38 Miklothe a tswala Shimeame. Ba dula le bana babo bona Jerusalema, ba lebane le bana babo bona." 
1Chronicles9:39 Nere e be e le tatago Kishi. Kishi a tswala Saulo; Saulo a tswala Jonathane, Malkishua, Abinadaba, le Eshbaale." 
1Chronicles9:40 Morwa wa Jonathane e be e le Meriba-baali, mme Meribale e be e le tatago Mika." 
1Chronicles9:41 Barwa ba Mika e be e le Pithone, Meleka, Taria le Agashe." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahasi a tswala Jara; Jara a tswala Alemethe, Azmavethe, le Simiri; Tsimiri a tswala Moše." 
1Chronicles9:43 Moše a tswala Binea. Refaya morwa wa gagwe, Eliasa morwa wa gagwe, Asele morwa wa gagwe." 
1Chronicles9:44 Asele o be a na le barwa ba tshelelago, bao maina a bona e lego Asrikama, Bokaru, Ishmaele, Sheria, Obatya le Hanane. Ba e be e le barwa ba Asele." 
1Chronicles10:1 Bjale Bafilisitia ba lwa le Baiseraele; banna ba Baiseraele ba tshaba pele ga Bafilisitia, ba wela fase ba bolailwe thabeng ya Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Bafilisitia ba latela Saulo le barwa ba gagwe ka thata. Bafilisitia ba bolaya Jonathane, Abinadaba, le Malkishua, barwa ba Saulo." 
1Chronicles10:3 Ntwa ya lwa le Saulo, le babetsi ba mesebe ba mo otla, le a gobala ka babetsi ba mesebe." 
1Chronicles10:4 Ka moka Saulo a re go mohlanka wa gagwe: “Goga tshosa ya gago o ntlhabe ka yona; mohlomong batho bao ba tla tla ba ntshega. Eupsa morwadi wa gagwe wa dibetsa ga se a ka a rata; gobane o be a tshogile kudu. Ka moka Saulo a tsea tshosa a e wela. 
1Chronicles10:5 Ge morwadi wa ditlhamo tsa gagwe a bona gore Saulo o hwile, a wela ka tshosa le a hwa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Ka gona Saulo a hwa le barwa ba gagwe ba bararo le lapa la gagwe ka moka ba hwa gotee. 
1Chronicles10:7 Ge banna ka moka ba Baiseraele bao ba bego ba le moeding wa moela ba bona gore ba tshabile le gore Saulo le barwa ba gagwe ba hwile, ba tlogela metse ya bona le ba tshaba; Bafilisitia ba tla dula mo go yona." 
1Chronicles10:8 Ka letsatsi le le latelago ge Bafilisitia ba etla go hlobola bao ba bolailwego, ba hwetsa Saulo le barwa ba gagwe ba wele thabeng ya Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Ka morago ga ge ba mo hlobotse, ba tsea hlogo ya gagwe le ditlhamo tsa gagwe ba di romela nageng ya Bafilisitia gore ba ise ditaba go medingwana ya bona le setshaba." 
1Chronicles10:10 Ba bea ditlhamo tsa gagwe ka ntlong ya modimo wa bona, ba mo kgomaretsa hlogo tempeleng ya Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Ge badudi ka moka ba Jabeshe Gileade ba ekwa ka tsohle tseo Bafilisitia ba di dirilego Saulo. 
1Chronicles10:12 Bahlabani ka moka ba tsea ditopo tsa Saulo le ditopo tsa barwa ba gagwe, ba di tlisa Jabose, ba boloka marapo a bona ka tlase ga sehlare sa tamarisk kua Jabose, ba ikona dijo matsatsi a supago." 
1Chronicles10:13 Ka gona Saulo a hwa ka baka la molato wa gagwe wo a o dirilego malebana le Jehofa, e lego lentsu la Jehofa leo a sa kago a le boloka, le ka baka la go kgopela kaletso go yo a nago le moya wa go tlwaelega gore a mmotsise." 
1Chronicles10:14 Ga se a ka a botsisa Jehofa; ka gona a mmolaya, a mo nea Dafita morwa wa Jese mmuso." 
1Chronicles11:1 Ka moka Baiseraele ka moka ba kgobokana go Dafita kua Heberone, ba re: “Bona, re lerapo la gago le nama ya gago.”" 
1Chronicles11:2 Le gona, mehleng e fetilego ge Saulo e be e sa le kgosi, ka wena o ilego wa eta pele le go tlisa Baiseraele;" 
1Chronicles11:3 Ka gona bagolo ka moka ba Baiseraele ba tla go kgosi Heberone; Dafita a dira kgwerano le bona kua Heberone pele ga Jehofa; ba tlotsa Dafita kgosi ya Baiseraele, go ya ka lentsu la Jehofa ka Samuele." 
1Chronicles11:4 Dafita le Baiseraele ka moka ba ya Jerusalema, e lego Jebuse. Moo Bajebuse ba bego ba dula gona nageng yeo ba bego ba le go yona." 
1Chronicles11:5 Badudi ba Jebuse ba re go Dafita: “O ka se tle mo.” Lega go le bjalo, Dafita o ile a thopa sebo sa Sione, motse wa Dafita." 
1Chronicles11:6 Dafita a re: “Mang le mang yo a tlago go bolaya Bajebuse pele e tla ba molaodi le molaodi.” Joaba morwa wa Tseruya a rotoga pele, a ba kgosana." 
1Chronicles11:7 Dafita a dula seboeng; ka baka leo ba o bitsa motse wa Dafita. 
1Chronicles11:8 A aga motse ka moka, go tloga Milo go dikologa, Joaba a lokisa motse ka moka." 
1Chronicles11:9 Dafita a tswela pele a gola le go feta, ka gobane Jehofa wa madira o be a na le yena." 
1Chronicles11:10 Bjale tse ka dikgosana tsa bagale bao Dafita a bego a na le bona, gore ba mo matlafatse mmusong wa gagwe le Baiseraele ka moka, ba mo bea kgosi go ya ka lentsu la Jehofa mabapi le Baiseraele." 
1Chronicles11:11 Palo ya banna ba bagale bao Dafita a bego a na le bona ka ye. Jasobeama, le Hagmoni, molaodi wa balaodi; a lahlela lerumo la gagwe go banna ba makgolo a mararo bao ba ilego ba ba fenya ka pela." 
1Chronicles11:12 Ka morago ga gagwe e be e le Eleasara morwa wa Dodo, moagi yo e bego e le yo mongwe wa bagale ba bararo." 
1Chronicles11:13 O be a na le Dafita kua Pas-damime, le moo Bafilisitia ba kgobokane bakang sa ntwa, moo go bego go e-na le tshemo yeo e tletsego lenti; setshaba sa tshaba pele ga Bafilisitia." 
1Chronicles11:14 Ba di tsenya ka mokotleng, ba o neela, ba bolaya Bafilisitia; Jehofa a ba hlakodisa ka pholoso e kgolo." 
1Chronicles11:15 Ka morago ga moo ba bararo ba bagolo ba masometharo ba theogela leswikang go Dafita, ka leweng la Adulama; madira a Bafilisitia a hloma mesasa moeding wa Refaime." 
1Chronicles11:16 Ka nako yeo Dafita o be a le ka gare ga lesaka, le madira a Bafilisitia a be a le Betlelehema." 
1Chronicles11:17 Dafita a hlologetswe, a re: “A nkabe motho a ka nwa metsi a sediba sa Betlelehema, seo se lego kgorong!" 
1Chronicles11:18 Ka gona ba bararo ba thuba mesasa ya Bafilisitia, ba goga metsi ka sedibeng sa Betlelehema seo se lego kgorong, ba a tsea ba a tlisa go Dafita. Eupsa Dafita ga se a ka a e nwa, eupsa a e tshollela pele ga Jehofa." 
1Chronicles11:19 A re: “Modimo wa ka a ka se dire selo se; Na ka tla nwa madi a banna bao ba beilego maphelo a bona kotsing? ka gobane ba e tlisitse maphelo a bona kotsing. Ka ka fao a sa nyakago go e nwa. Dilo tse tse tharo ba di dira ka mafolofolo a magolo. 
1Chronicles11:20 Abisai ngwanabo Joaba e be e le molaodi wa ba bararo; 
1Chronicles11:21 Go ba bararo, o be a hlomphega go feta ba babedi; gobane e be e le mmusi wa bona; eupsa ga se a fihlelela tse tharo tsa mathomo." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya morwa wa Jehoyada, morwa wa mogale wa Kabetseele, yo a dirilego ditiro tse dintsi; a bolaya ditau tse pedi tsa Moaba; gape, a theoga a bolaya tau ka moleteng, mola go se na lehlwa." 
1Chronicles11:23 A bolaya MoEgepeto, monna wa bogolo bjo bogolo, bophagamo bja dikubiti tse hlano; seatleng sa MoEgepeto go be go na le lerumo le le swanago le kota ya balogi; eupsa a theogela go yena a swere lepara, a ntsha lerumo seatleng sa MoEgepeto, a mmolaya ka lerumo la gagwe." 
1Chronicles11:24 Dilo tseo Benaya morwa wa Jehoyada a di dirile, le a ba le leina gare ga bagale ba bararo." 
1Chronicles11:25 Bonang, o be a hlomphega gare ga ba masometharo, eupsa a se fihlelele ba bararo ba pele." 
1Chronicles11:26 Asahele ngwanabo Joaba, le Elhanani morwa wa Dodo wa Betlelehema, banna ba bagale;" 
1Chronicles11:27 Shammathe kua Haroro, Hele kua Pelone;" 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira morwa wa Ika wa Moteko, le Abiesere wa Moantothe." 
1Chronicles11:29 Le Sibegai wa Husha, le Ilai wa Moahohe." 
1Chronicles11:30 Le Maharai wa Monetofa le Helede morwa wa Bana wa Monetofa. 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai morwa wa Ribai wa Gibea wa bana ba Babenjamine, le Benaya wa Mopirathoni." 
1Chronicles11:32 Go tswa nokang ya Gaashe, Abiele, Arbathe." 
1Chronicles11:33 Le Azmavethe wa Morumane le Eliaba wa Shaalbon; 
1Chronicles11:34 Barwa ba Hashememe wa Mogisone e be e le Jonathane morwa wa Sage wa Harari. 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiame morwa wa Sakara wa Momohare le Elifele morwa wa Ura; 
1Chronicles11:36 Hefere wa Momeger, le Ahija wa Peloni;" 
1Chronicles11:37 Hetsero wa Mokarmele le Naarai morwa wa Eshebai. 
1Chronicles11:38 Joele ngwanabo Nathane le Mibara morwa wa Hagara; 
1Chronicles11:38 Joele ngwanabo Nathane le Mibara morwa wa Hagara; 
1Chronicles11:39 Tseleka wa Moamoni, Naharai wa Beerothe, mohlanka wa Joaba morwa wa Tseruya." 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira wa mo-Itre, Garebe wa mo-Itre," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uria wa Mohethe le Sabade morwa wa Alai. 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina morwa wa Tsisa, kgosana ya Rubeni, e be e le ba masometharo;" 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanane morwa wa Maaka le Jehoshafate wa Momitine; 
1Chronicles11:44 Usia wa Moastera, le Shama le Jehiele, barwa ba Hotane wa Moarorote;" 
1Chronicles11:45 Jediaele morwa wa Tsimiri le Joha ngwanabo Motishi; 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliele wa Momoaba, Jeribai le Joshavia, barwa ba Elnaama, le Itma wa Momoaba." 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliele, Obede le Jaasiele, ba Metsoba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Ba ka bona bao ba ilego ba tla go Dafita kua Sitlage, ge a be a sa dutse a le kgauswi ka baka la Saulo morwa wa Kishi. Ba be ba le gare ga banna ba bagale, bathusi ba ntwa." 
1Chronicles12:2 Ba be ba itlhamile ka bora, ba kgona go dirisa seatla sa le letona le sa le letshadi go lahlela maswika le go thuntsha mesebe go tswa bora, e lego bana babo Saulo go tswa Babenjamine." 
1Chronicles12:3 Kgosana e be e le Ahiesere le Joase, barwa ba Shemaa wa Mogibea. Le Jesiele le Pelete, barwa ba Asimavethe; le Beraka le Jehu wa Moantothe;" 
1Chronicles12:4 le Ismaia wa Mogibeoni, monna yo maatla gare ga ba masometharo; le Jeremia, le Jahasiele, le Johanane, le Jotsabade, ba Gedera." 
1Chronicles12:5 Elusai, Jerimothe, Belia, Shemaria, le Shefatia wa Rafi;" 
1Chronicles12:6 le Elkana, le Jesiya, le Asarele, le Josere, le Jasobaama, ba Kora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 le Joele le Sebadia, barwa ba Jerohama wa Gedoro." 
1Chronicles12:7 le Joele le Sebadia, barwa ba Jerohama wa Gedoro." 
1Chronicles12:8 Ge e le Bagada, ba ile ba kgetha Dafita nageng ya dithabeng go fihla lesokang, e le banna ba bagale ba bagale, banna bao ba kgonago go swara dikotse le dikotse, bao difahlego tsa bona di bego di swana le difahlego tsa ditau le di akgofela go swana le ditshwene." 
1Chronicles12:9 Esere wa pele, Obatya wa bobedi, Eliaba wa boraro;" 
1Chronicles12:10 Mishmana ka wa bone, Jeremia wa bohlano;" 
1Chronicles12:11 wa botshelela Atai, wa bosupa Eliele;" 
1Chronicles12:12 wa botshelela Johanane, wa botshelela Elzabad;" 
1Chronicles12:13 la lesome la Jeremia, la lesometee la Magbanai;" 
1Chronicles12:14 Tse e be e le dihlogo tsa dihlopha tsa barwa ba Gade; e nyenyane e be e le lekgolo, le e kgolo e le sekate." 
1Chronicles12:15 Ka bona bao ba ilego ba tshela Jorodane ka kgwedi ya pele, ge e be e tlala mabopong a yona ka moka; ba tshabela dinokang ka moka, ka bohlabela le ka bodikala." 
1Chronicles12:16 Bana ba Babenjamine le ba Juda ba tla go Dafita mosate. 
1Chronicles12:17 Dafita a tswa go yo ba gahlanetsa le a ba araba ka gore: “Ge e ba o tlile ka khutso go nna go tlo nthusa, pelo ya ka e tla go kgomarela; ge e ba o tla go mpholosa manabeng a ka, le o se na molato diatleng tsa ka, wena Modimo wa borakgolokhukhu ba rena, gona nkgalemela." 
1Chronicles12:18 Ka moka moya wa tla go Amasai yo e bego e le molaodi wa balaodi, a re: “Ka lehlakoreng la gago, Dafita, le ka lehlakoreng la gago, wena morwa wa Jese! khutso, khutso a e be go lena, khutso a e be go bathusi ba lena; gobane Modimo wa gago o a go thusa. Dafita a ba amogela, a ba bea baetapele ba sehlopha." 
1Chronicles12:19 Ba bangwe ba Manase ba wela go Dafita, ge a be a etla le Bafilisitia ba lwa le Saulo. Eupsa ga se ba ka ba ba thusa; gobane dikgosana tsa Bafilisitia di be di mo eleditse gore a tloge, di re: “O tla tloga go Saulo mong wa gagwe.” Ya dihlogo tsa rena." 
1Chronicles12:20 Ge a eya Sitlage, Adna, Jotsabade, Jediaele, Mikaele, Jotsabade, Elihu, Tsilithai, balaodi ba ba dikate ba Manase ba wela godimo ga gagwe." 
1Chronicles12:21 Ba thusa Dafita go lwa le sehlopha sa bagale, ka gobane ka moka e be e le banna ba bagale, e le balaodi ba madira." 
1Chronicles12:22 Gobane ka nako yeo o ile a tla go Dafita go mo thusa, go fihlela e le madira a magolo ao a swanago le madira a Modimo." 
1Chronicles12:23 Ka dipalo tsa madira ao a bego a itokiseditse ntwa, a tla go Dafita Heberone, go ya ka lentsu la Jehofa, gore a fetose mmuso wa Saulo go yena." 
1Chronicles12:24 Bana ba Juda bao ba rwelego kotse le lerumo e be e le ba dikate tse makgolo a tshela le makgolo a senyane-pedi, ba itokiseleditse ntwa." 
1Chronicles12:25 Go barwa ba Simeone, bahlabani ba matla, ba 7 100," 
1Chronicles12:26 go barwa ba Lefi ba 4 600; 
1Chronicles12:27 Joyada e be e le moetapele wa Baarone, a na le ba dikate tse tharo-makgolosupa;" 
1Chronicles12:28 le Tsadoko lesogana, monna wa mogale, le balaodi ba masomepedi-pedi ba ntlo ya tatagwe." 
1Chronicles12:29 Go barwa ba Babenjamine, ba ntlo ya Saulo, e be e le ba 3 000; gobane go fihla ga bjale ba bantsi ba bona ba be ba disa ntlo ya Saulo." 
1Chronicles12:30 Go bana ba Eferaime banna ba bagale ba dikate tse masomepedi, bao ba tumilego ntlong ka moka ya borakgolokhukhu ba bona." 
1Chronicles12:31 Seripa sa moloko wa Manase go be go na le ba dikate tse lesomeseswai bao ba bego ba kgethilwe ka maina gore ba tle go bea Dafita kgosi. 
1Chronicles12:32 Go barwa ba Isakara, banna bao ba tsebago mehla, ba tseba seo bana ba Baiseraele ba swanetsego go se dira; dihlogo tsa bona e be e le tse makgolo a mabedi; bana babo ka moka ba be ba le ka tlase ga taolo ya bona." 
1Chronicles12:33 Ba Sebulone, bao ba ilego ba ya ntweng, bao ba tsebago ntwa, bao ba nago le didiriswa ka moka tsa ntwa, ba dikate tse masome a mahlano, bao ba bego ba kgona go boloka maemo. Ba be ba sa forana." 
1Chronicles12:34 Go Nafutali balaodi ba dikate tse sekate, ba dikate tse masometharo-supa ba na le dikotse le marumo." 
1Chronicles12:35 Wa moloko wa Dani dikate tse masomepedi-seswai makgolotshela. 
1Chronicles12:36 Go Asere, ba ba tswago ntweng, ba dikate tsa ntwa, ba dikate tse masomenne." 
1Chronicles12:37 Ka mosola wa Jorodane, Barubeni le Bagada le seripa sa moloko wa Manase, ba swere mehuta ka moka ya diletso tsa ntwa, ba dikate tse lekgolo-masomepedi (120 000)." 
1Chronicles12:38 Banna ba ka moka ba ntwa bao ba bego ba kgona go boloka maemo, ba tla Heberone ka pelo ye e phethagetsego, go tlo dira Dafita kgosi ya Baiseraele ka moka; Baisraele ka moka ba dumela go dira Dafita kgosi." 
1Chronicles12:39 Ba dula moo le Dafita matsatsi a mararo, ba eja le go nwa, ka gobane bana babo bona ba be ba ba lokiseditse." 
1Chronicles12:40 Go feta moo, bao ba bego ba le kgaufsi le bona, go fihla Isakara, Sebulune le Naftali, ba tlisa bogobe godimo ga dipokolo le dikamela le meila le dikgomo le nama, bupi, dikuku tsa mago le beine ka bontsi le mafura le dikgomo le diruiwa. Lehumo, ka gobane lethabo le be le le Baiseraele." 
1Chronicles13:1 Dafita a bolela ditaba tse dibotse go balaodi ba dikate le ba makgolo le go mmusi yo mongwe le yo mongwe. 
1Chronicles13:2 Dafita a re go phuthego ka moka ya Baiseraele: “Ge e ba go kgahlisa lena le Jehofa Modimo wa rena, a re romeleng bana babo rena bao ba setsego mabopong ka moka a Baiseraele le go baperisita bao ba lego gare ga bona; le Balefi metseng ya bona le mafulong a bona, gore ba re kgobokatse." 
1Chronicles13:3 A re busetseng areka ya Modimo wa rena go rena, gobane ga se ra ka ra e tsoma mehleng ya Saulo." 
1Chronicles13:4 Phuthego ka moka ya re ba dire bjalo, ka gobane taba yeo e be e lokile mahlong a setshaba ka moka." 
1Chronicles13:5 Ka gona Dafita a kgobokatsa Baiseraele ka moka, go tloga Shihoro ya Egepeto go fihla mo Hemate, gore ba tlise areka ya Modimo go tswa Kiriathe-Jearime." 
1Chronicles13:6 Dafita le Baiseraele ka moka ba rotogela Baala, ka gore Kiriathe-Jearime, yeo e bego e le ya Juda, go yo rotosa areka ya Modimo Jehofa yo a dutsego magareng ga bakarubi, yo leina la gagwe le bitswago go yona." 
1Chronicles13:7 Ba rwala areka ya Modimo wa thereso ka koloyana e mpsha go tswa ntlong ya Abinadaba, le Utsa le Ao ba be ba otlela koloyana." 
1Chronicles13:8 Dafita le Baiseraele ka moka ba letsa pele ga Modimo wa bona ka matla a bona ka moka, e le ka dikosa, diharepa, le dikosa tsa dikosa, le dikosa le diphalafala le diphalafala." 
1Chronicles13:9 Ge ba fihla seboeng sa Kidone, Utsa a otlolla seatla sa gagwe gore a sware Areka; gobane dikgomo di be di kgopisitswe." 
1Chronicles13:10 Kgalefo ya Jehofa ya tuka Usa, a mo otla, ka gobane a beile seatla sa gagwe seatleng sa gagwe. Le moo a hwela pele ga Modimo." 
1Chronicles13:11 Dafita a se thabele, ka gobane Jehofa o be a dirile lesoba kua Usa; ka fao leina la lefelo leo le ile la bitswa Peresatsa go fihla le lehono." 
1Chronicles13:12 Dafita a boifa Modimo letsatsing leo, a re: “Ka tla tlisa bjang Areka ya Modimo gae go nna?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Ka gona Dafita ga se a ka a tlisa areka gae motseng wa Dafita, eupsa a e isa ka thoko ntlong ya Obede-Edomo wa Mogithe." 
1Chronicles13:14 Areka ya Modimo ya dula le lapa la Obede-Edomo ka ntlong ya gagwe dikgwedi tse tharo. Morena a segofatsa ntlo ya Obede-Edomo le tsohle tseo a bego a na le tsona. 
1Chronicles14:1 Hirama kgosi ya Tiro a roma baromiwa go Dafita, le dihlare tsa mesedere, le babetli ba mafsika le babetli, gore ba mo agele ntlo." 
1Chronicles14:2 Dafita a lemoga gore Jehofa o mo hlomile gore e be kgosi ya Baiseraele, ka gobane mmuso wa gagwe o be o buseditswe go yena ka baka la setshaba sa gagwe sa Baiseraele." 
1Chronicles14:3 Dafita a tsea basadi ba bangwe kua Jerusalema, Dafita a tswala barwa le barwedi ba bangwe." 
1Chronicles14:4 A ka maina a barwa ba gagwe bao a bilego le bona kua Jerusalema; Shamua le Shobabe, Nathane le Salomo," 
1Chronicles14:5 le Ibhara, le Elishua, le Elpalete;" 
1Chronicles14:6 le Noga, le Nefege, le Jafia;" 
1Chronicles14:7 le Elisama, le Beeliada, le Elifelete." 
1Chronicles14:8 Ge Bafilisitia ba ekwa gore Dafita o tloditswe e le kgosi ya Baiseraele ka moka, Bafilisitia ka moka ba rotogela go nyaka Dafita. Dafita o ile a kwa ka seo, a tswa go yo ba gahlanetsa." 
1Chronicles14:9 Bafilisitia ba tla ba ba phatlalatsa moeding wa Refaime. 
1Chronicles14:10 Dafita a botsisa Jehofa a re: “Na ka tla rotogela Bafilisitia?” na o tla di gafela diatleng tsa ka? Morena a re go yena: “Ema; gobane ka tla ba gafela diatleng tsa gago. 
1Chronicles14:11 Ba rotogela Baali-peratsime; Dafita a ba otla moo. Ka moka Dafita a re: “Modimo a ka hlaba diatla go etsa ge a be a otla manaba a ka; ka baka leo ba reela lefelo leo leina la Baali-peratsime. 
1Chronicles14:12 Ge ba tlogetse medimo ya bona moo, Dafita a laela le ba fiswa ka mollo." 
1Chronicles14:13 Bafilisitia ba busa ba phatlalala moeding. 
1Chronicles14:14 Ka ka baka leo Dafita a ilego a lopa Modimo gape; Modimo a re go yena: “O se ka wa sepela le bona; ba furalela le o kopane le bona kgauswi le mehlare ya dithetlwa. 
1Chronicles14:15 Ge le ekwa modumo wa go gwanta ditlhoreng tsa dihlare tsa morara, gona le tlo ya ntweng, gobane Modimo o tswile pele ga lena go yo bolaya madira a Bafilisitia." 
1Chronicles14:16 Dafita a dira ka fao Morena a mo laetsego ka gona, ba fenya madira a Bafilisitia go tloga Gibeone go fihla Gesere." 
1Chronicles14:17 Pego ya Dafita ya ya dinageng ka moka; Jehofa o beile poifo ya gagwe ditshabeng ka moka. 
1Chronicles15:1 Dafita a mo direla dintlo motseng wa Dafita, a lokisetsa areka ya Modimo lefelo, a e hlomela tente." 
1Chronicles15:2 Dafita a re: “Ga go yo a swanetsego go rwala areka ya Modimo ge e se Balefi, gobane Jehofa o kgethile bona gore ba rwale areka ya Modimo le go mo hlankala ka mo go sa felego.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Dafita a kgobokatsa Baiseraele ka moka kua Jerusalema gore a rotose Areka ya Jehofa lefelong la yona leo a e lokiseditsego yona. 
1Chronicles15:4 Dafita a kgobokatsa barwa ba Arone le Balefi. 
1Chronicles15:5 Go barwa ba Kohathe; Uriele kgosana le bana babo ba lekgolo-masomepedi. 
1Chronicles15:6 Go barwa ba Merari; Asaia kgosana le bana babo ba makgolo a mabedi a masomepedi; 
1Chronicles15:7 go barwa ba Gersome; Joele, hlogo, le bana babo, 130;" 
1Chronicles15:7 go barwa ba Gersome; Joele, hlogo, le bana babo, 130;" 
1Chronicles15:8 go barwa ba Elishafane; Semaya kgosana le bana babo ba makgolo a mabedi; 
1Chronicles15:9 go barwa ba Heberone; Eliele, kgosana, le bana babo, ba masomeseswai-pedi;" 
1Chronicles15:10 go barwa ba Usiele; Aminadaba kgosana le bana babo ba lekgolo le lesome le metso e mebedi. 
1Chronicles15:11 Dafita a roma a bitsa baperisita Tsadoko le Abiathare le Balefi, ba theogela Uriele, Asaia, Joele, Shemaia, Eliele le Aminadaba." 
1Chronicles15:11 Dafita a roma a bitsa baperisita Tsadoko le Abiathare le Balefi, ba theogela Uriele, Asaia, Joele, Shemaia, Eliele le Aminadaba." 
1Chronicles15:12 A re go bona: “Le dihlogo tsa malapa a botatago Balefi; Ikgethagatseng, lena le bana babo lena, gore le rotose areka ya Morena Modimo wa Baiseraele lefelong leo ka le lokiseditsego yona." 
1Chronicles15:13 Ka ge le sa ka la dira bjalo mathomong, Jehofa Modimo wa rena o re fedisitse, ka gobane ga se ra mo tsoma ka tsela ya go loka." 
1Chronicles15:14 Ka gona baperisita le Balefi ba ikgethagatsa gore ba rotose Areka ya Jehofa Modimo wa Baiseraele. 
1Chronicles15:15 Bana ba Balefi ba rwala Areka ya Modimo magetleng a bona ka dikota tsa yona, bjalo ka ge Moše a laetse go ya ka lentsu la Jehofa." 
1Chronicles15:16 Dafita a bolela le dikgosana tsa Balefi gore di kgethe bana babo bona gore e be diopedi ka diletso tsa mmino, diharepa le diletso tsa dithapo, ba lla lentsu la lethabo." 
1Chronicles15:17 Balefi ba kgetha Hemane morwa wa Joele; go bana babo e be e le Asafa morwa wa Berekia; go barwa ba Merari, bana babo bona e be e le Ethane morwa wa Kusia;" 
1Chronicles15:17 Balefi ba kgetha Hemane morwa wa Joele; go bana babo e be e le Asafa morwa wa Berekia; go barwa ba Merari, bana babo bona e be e le Ethane morwa wa Kusia;" 
1Chronicles15:18 Bana babo bona ba sehlopha sa bobedi e be e le Sagaria, Bene, Jaesiele, Shemirothe, Jehiele, Juni, Eliaba, Benaya, Maseya, Matia, Elifele, Mikinia, Obede-Edomo le Jeiele, baleti ba dikgoro." 
1Chronicles15:19 Ka gona diopedi e lego Hemane, Asafa le Ethane, ba ile ba kgethwa go letsa disimba tsa koporo;" 
1Chronicles15:20 le Sagaria, Asia, Shemiramothe, Jehiele, Juni, Eliaba, Maaseya le Benaya;" 
1Chronicles15:21 Matithia, Elifele, Mikinia, Obede-Edomo, Jeiele, le Asasia ba be ba okametse Basheme go lokisa wa boraro." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kanania, kgosana ya Balefi, e be e le yo a laelago kopelo." 
1Chronicles15:23 Beria le Elkana e be e le baleti ba mojako wa areka.
